entries.title: Subway Idol Birthday Billboard Photo
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a realistic smartphone-style photo taken in a subway station, showing a young woman posing beside a large wall-mounted digital birthday advertisement for a K-pop idol.

Canvas: Horizontal 3:2 photo, eye-level perspective, natural indoor station lighting, slight wide-angle lens look.

Setting: Clean subway corridor with glossy off-white square tiled walls and dark grout, gray stone floor, black base trim, ceiling panels visible at the top, and a small green rectangular sign on the left wall. A large black-framed digital billboard is mounted on the tiled wall, occupying most of the right side of the image.

Main subject: One young woman stands on the left side of the frame in front of the billboard. She has long dark wavy hair and wears a sleeveless short white summer dress with thin straps and a small bow at the chest. She smiles toward the camera, but her face is covered by a soft-edged opaque taupe privacy rectangle. Her pose uses exactly two pointing gestures: her left hand points across her body toward the billboard, and her right hand points upward toward the billboard.

Billboard design: The digital screen shows a pastel pink-and-sky-blue birthday fan ad with sparkles, stars, soft clouds, translucent heart shapes, and a magical swoosh arc in the top-right. On the left half of the billboard is a large glamour portrait of a young woman with long dark hair and bare shoulders; her face is also covered by a large opaque taupe privacy rectangle. The billboard has exactly six visible text elements: 1) small English greeting at the top, 2) large Korean name in teal, 3) date line, 4) large Korean birthday phrase, 5) smaller Korean congratulatory message, 6) teal rounded footer label.

Text content: Use the top greeting Happy Seul Day. Use the large central Korean name 윤슬. Use the date 1996.02.15. Use the birthday phrase 여신 탄신일. Use the small message and footer text 사랑스러운 윤슬아, 생일 축하해! 언제나 빛나는 너를 응원해 ♥ / from. 슬의 모든 순간을 사랑하는 팬들. Typography should be elegant teal serif-like Korean lettering, with the name largest, the birthday phrase second largest, and the footer in white text inside a teal rounded rectangle.

Visual style: Photorealistic candid fan photo, realistic shadows and reflections on the digital screen, crisp billboard details, slightly muted station colors contrasted with the bright pastel ad. Do not add extra people, extra posters, watermarks, or additional text beyond the six specified text elements.
entries.description: A photorealistic subway fan-photo scene with a woman pointing at a pastel Korean idol birthday billboard, useful for recreating K-pop advertisement mockups.

entries.title: Gritty Claude Prompts Carousel Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a square gritty social media carousel cover poster on aged beige paper with a distressed photocopy/zine aesthetic. The composition has 1 central black-and-white taped photograph, scratched and worn, with a wide gray paint smear obscuring the face; 2 pieces of yellowed masking tape hold it down, one horizontal strip at the top and one torn vertical strip on the right edge. Add 1 large hand-drawn red starburst scribble in the upper left, and use rough stamped typography layered over torn paper scraps. The main headline reads "CLAUDE PROMPTS" in huge distressed black uppercase letters across the center, partially overlapping the photo. Add the small word "EVERY" above the bottom headline, then a massive red stamped word "BEGINNER" across the lower middle, followed by "NEEDS" in black on the lower right. Include the subtitle "A STARTER PACK FOR REAL LIFE" centered near the bottom in small typewriter-style uppercase letters. Add tiny handwritten footer text "CLAUDE • BEGINNER PROMPTS" at bottom left, "SWIPE →" at bottom right, and a small page indicator "01 / 12" in the top right. Use a limited palette of dirty beige, black ink, gray paint, and deep red, with torn edges, ink smudges, rough halftone texture, scratches, tape shadows, and imperfect alignment; make it feel like an underground punk flyer repurposed as a bold AI prompt carousel thumbnail.
entries.description: Generates a distressed punk-zine style social media carousel cover for beginner Claude prompt content.

entries.title: Cute Winter Anime Channel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A cute pastel anime promotional poster in a dreamy idol-fanclub style, landscape orientation, featuring a single horse-girl character from the waist up on the right side of the composition. She has dark chestnut brown long fluffy hair with side-swept bangs covering one eye, one large visible sparkling purple-pink eye, fair skin, soft blush, and upright horse ears with a large cream bow tied between them. Her expression is gentle, shy, and welcoming, with a small smile and a slight head tilt toward the viewer. She wears a thick red scarf with white horizontal stripes, a cream cable-knit sweater, and a navy sailor-style inner collar with a small red ribbon at the chest. The overall color palette is warm pink, cream, beige, and cocoa brown with soft winter lighting.

Design the image as a Japanese fan-content announcement graphic with layered sticker-like typography, fluffy outlines, hearts, sparkles, and snowflake motifs. The background should be a softly blurred cozy winter café or warmly lit indoor scene with glowing bokeh and pale decorative textures. Add exactly 5 major text areas: a pink ribbon banner at the top with the Japanese text "ライスと一緒に"; a very large central-left headline in rounded pop lettering reading "ほのぼの 育成" with "ほのぼの" in pink and white and "育成" in bold brown with white stitched edging; a small dark ribbon under it reading "しよっ♪"; a circular brown badge on the right reading "初見さん歓迎"; and a logo-like label at bottom right reading "ライスシャワーちゃんねる" with a small horseshoe icon. Add exactly 1 memo pad in the bottom-left corner with 3 checklist lines, each with a pink checkmark: "ストーリー", "チャンミ", and "まったり雑談". Include small decorative pink hearts around the character, tiny accent lines near her head, white snowflakes, lace-like trim, paper-cut corner decorations, and a soft scrapbook aesthetic. Make the whole piece look like an adorable fictional stream or channel thumbnail welcoming new viewers, highly polished, clean anime line art, soft shading, glossy eyes, and charming commercial poster composition.
entries.description: This prompt generates a pastel Japanese-style anime promotional thumbnail with a single horse-girl character and layered text graphics, ideal for fictional stream, fanclub, or channel announcement art.

entries.title: Post-Apocalyptic Cactus Warrior
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic vertical cinematic action poster in a 9:16 crop: a fierce female post-apocalyptic warrior named unnamed cactus warrior stands in the middle of a ruined modern city, low-angle perspective, dust storm and shattered buildings behind her. She wears a tight black leather armored bodice with a deep neckline, black tactical pants, belts, pouches, straps, dark metal shoulder and arm armor, and tattered yellow cloth panels hanging from her waist. Her wet dark brown hair whips in the wind, but her face is intentionally hidden by one small opaque brown rectangular censor block centered over her head. She thrusts a massive spiked metal mace toward the camera, creating extreme foreground perspective: the mace head is huge, blurred slightly by depth of field, covered in gold spikes, dark worn metal, scratches, and an embossed cactus-like emblem on the front. Behind her rises one enormous prickly pear cactus paddle, towering diagonally from lower right to upper left like a monstrous shield, yellow-green and scarred, with many long white thorns and red cactus fruit buds; debris and sparks fly through the air. In the upper right background, include one giant ghostly close-up female head or hair silhouette partially visible behind the cactus, with its face covered by one large opaque brown rectangular censor block. Use exactly 2 censor rectangles total: 1 small block over the warrior's face and 1 large block over the background face. The mood is explosive, gritty, hyper-detailed, dark fantasy sci-fi, photorealistic concept art, high contrast golden-hour backlight, volumetric smoke, falling rubble, dynamic motion, shallow depth of field, no text, no watermark.
entries.description: A cinematic vertical action poster prompt for generating a gritty armored warrior with a giant cactus backdrop and spiked mace in a ruined city.

entries.title: Cinematic Kodak Film Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Using cinematic quality, Kodak film style, slightly reduced saturation, high dynamic range, and realistic contrast.

Lens: 85mm lens, f/1.8 aperture, shallow depth of field, RAW format photorealistic feel, rich detail.

Generate a cinematic character poster featuring the character's name.

It's both a character poster and a representation of their story.

A large, elegant profile of the character's face occupies half the image, with perspective and movement, creating a slightly wide-angle lens feel.

The character's appearance and clothing match the original character design.

Skin pores. Correct anatomy. Fingers relaxed naturally. No gloves.

Facial and clothing features should also be adapted from the original design, including the weapon held in the hand, and expressions and poses consistent with the character design, generating a 9:16 poster image.

entries.title: Japanese Television Telop Graphics
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Please create a design in the style of Japanese TV show telops (captions). Ensure all text used is in Japanese and clearly legible.

Font Styles:
- Main Heading: Thick, legible rounded Gothic similar to LINE Seed JP Heavy.
- Emphasized Telop: Ultra-thick Gothic typical of variety shows, with white outlines, red text, and yellow shadows.
- Supplementary Text: A professional typeface suitable for news programs, similar to BIZ UDP Gothic.
- Handwritten Memo: Rough script style like Tanuki Oil Magic marker.

Design:
Organize several telop samples onto a single sheet, like a collection from a Japanese variety or news show. The background should be gray. Use a bold color palette of red, yellow, blue, and white. Incorporate white outlines, black outlines, drop shadows, and fluorescent highlighter-style decorations. Include small labels like "Free Font" or "Usage Example" near each sample.

entries.title: Gothic Royal Podcast Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic 16:9 podcast cover in a dark medieval-gothic royal style, like an HBO historical documentary poster. The scene is inside a shadowy cathedral throne room with black stone arches, two tall pointed stained-glass windows, carved gothic architecture, candlelit gold highlights, and a deep black-and-burnished-gold color palette. In the center foreground place the partial bust of an aging king in a heavy fur mantle and ornate collar, facing forward; his head is backed by an intricate oversized golden crown that forms a halo-like architectural diagram, but cover the face with a plain vertical brown rectangle as if anonymized. Behind him blend detailed gold line art of a crown, a grand cathedral-city, a royal seal, manuscript parchment with Latin-like writing, and a crowded medieval court. On the left include one tall heraldic banner with a crowned lion crest and a crown emblem, plus four small seated courtiers at the lower left with their faces obscured by small brown rectangles. Use dramatic chiaroscuro, smoky texture, antique parchment grain, fine engraved details, and luminous metallic gold typography. Add exactly three centered text lines at the bottom: the large main title 王冠之下的不死之身, a smaller subtitle between thin horizontal divider lines with arrow ornaments 从神学王权到现代国家的诞生, and a small author/source line with decorative flourishes 恩斯特·H.坎托洛维奇《国王的两个身体》. Make the layout balanced and poster-like, with the title occupying the lower third, the crown halo dominating the upper center, and no modern objects.
entries.description: Generates a dramatic medieval-gothic podcast cover about kingship, theology, and the birth of the modern state.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dark cinematic podcast cover in a 16:9 horizontal format, painted like a dramatic Baroque oil painting with golden-brown chiaroscuro lighting, aged parchment textures, and a historical mystery atmosphere. The scene shows a weary medieval scholar or miller seated at a rough wooden desk in the right-center foreground, face intentionally obscured by a dark square shadow, one hand pressed to his temple while the other writes with a feather quill on handwritten papers. On the desk include 5 main foreground objects: an open occult notebook filled with diagrams, loose manuscript pages, a burning wax candle, a wedge of hole-filled cheese, and scattered larvae; include exactly 9 clearly visible larvae around the cheese and papers. Behind him, blend a surreal cosmic sky with stars, astrological circles, a cratered moon, golden nebula dust, and faint mathematical manuscript marks, merging into a late-medieval village with a windmill on the lower left and shadowy church officials or inquisitors on the upper right. Add exactly 4 visible text blocks: a large cream-colored Chinese main title on the left reading 奶酪宇宙里的磨坊主, a smaller subtitle beneath it reading 《奶酪与蛆虫》与普通人的思想史, a tiny bottom-left tagline reading - 当一个普通人开始解释宇宙,权力便开始不安。, and a parchment note on the right reading 审讯记录\n梅诺基奥\n1599年. Use elegant traditional Chinese typography, off-white ink for the title, muted gold for the small tagline, high contrast but weathered edges, museum-poster composition, no modern objects, no clean digital gloss, richly detailed, ominous, intellectual, and suitable as a historical philosophy podcast episode cover.

entries.title: King Kong Reborn Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A hyper-detailed cinematic movie poster for a giant monster reboot set in Manhattan at sunset. A colossal enraged gorilla resembling King Kong stands on top of a heavily destroyed skyscraper in the foreground, roaring with mouth wide open and teeth exposed. The creature is massively muscular, covered in dark brown fur, with multiple visible battle scars and fresh wounds across the chest, arms, shoulders, and legs. One hand grips the broken steel spire and shattered crown of the building, while one huge foot crushes the rooftop. The city below is New York, with the Empire State Building clearly visible in the mid-right background and a dense skyline fading into dramatic golden haze. The sky is filled with dark storm clouds split by warm orange sunset light. Include exactly 3 military helicopters: 1 near the upper right shining a bright searchlight toward the ape, 1 smaller helicopter near the center-right skyline, and 1 lower-left helicopter sweeping a searchlight across smoky buildings. Add fires, smoke plumes, glowing embers, street-level destruction, and a sense of large-scale urban chaos. Compose it as a polished modern Hollywood theatrical one-sheet with the monster centered and towering over the city. In the lower third, add the tagline text: The legend rises again. Above the credits, place the huge metallic embossed title in two lines: KING KONG and below it REBORN. Beneath that, add a dense realistic film-credit block with multiple producer, director, cast, and screenplay lines in small condensed type. At the very bottom, add the release line: SUMMER 2026. Use ultra-realistic lighting, dramatic contrast, blockbuster poster composition, volumetric smoke, sharp details, photoreal fur, and premium action-adventure disaster-film aesthetics.
entries.description: A dramatic blockbuster-style giant ape movie poster with dense theatrical typography, ideal for cinematic film-poster generation and text-layout demos.

entries.title: Explosive Japanese AI Threat Thumbnail
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic Japanese YouTube thumbnail in a hyper-aggressive clickbait style, 16:9 landscape, with a dark black-and-crimson background filled with red lightning, smoky clouds, glowing sparks, ink splatter, and explosive energy. The composition has 4 main text areas and 2 graphic icon elements. Across the top, place huge distressed white Japanese headline text reading 動画編集ディレクター, using an extra-bold block font with rough grunge texture, black outline, and heavy shadow. In the center, place the dominant oversized kanji 全滅 in a massive shattered font, red at the top fading to yellow at the bottom, with cracked stone texture, black border, debris fragments, and impact glow, occupying most of the frame. At the lower center, add a black slanted banner with a white border containing bright yellow and red Japanese text reading このままだと仕事がなくなる...!?, bold and urgent. On the left side, add a vertical black panel listing exactly 4 warning items, each preceded by a red X mark: 「案件減少」, 「単価下落」, 「AIの台頭」, 「オワコン化」. On the right side, show a cropped photo-real Japanese man from chest up, facing slightly left, wearing a black T-shirt, with short dark hair and a strong red rim light around his silhouette; his face is partially obscured by a rectangular mosaic censor block in skin-brown tones. At the lower right, include exactly 2 Adobe-style app icons, 「Pr」 and 「Ae」, dark blue-purple rounded squares, partially overlapping, both cracked like broken glass and crossed out with one large diagonal red paint slash X spanning the icons. Add a subtle dark city skyline silhouette in the lower left background. Overall look: sensational, destructive, high contrast, gritty, overloaded with texture, with intense red/black color grading, thick shadows, dramatic glow, and polished viral-thumbnail composition.

entries.title: Japanese Katsudon Diet Thumbnail
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a bright, high-impact Japanese YouTube thumbnail about diet-friendly eating, in a clean split composition. The left half is a white background filled with oversized bold Japanese headline text stacked vertically and diagonally for maximum readability: the top line says "カツ丼" in huge vivid orange with a thick white outline and soft drop shadow, below it "食べても" in dark brown, then "太らない方法" in hot pink with a white outline and a yellow underline swoosh, and at the bottom a gigantic red-orange "5" with white outline next to "選!" in dark brown with a white outline. Add small yellow sparkle accents and comic-style emphasis marks around the headline. In the lower left corner, place a simple flat illustration of 1 smiling woman from the waist up wearing a yellow tank top, brown hair tied back in a ponytail, making an OK hand gesture, set over a pale yellow circle. The right half shows a close-up, appetizing katsudon bowl photographed in warm light: 1 ceramic bowl with blue vertical stripe patterns, filled with sliced golden-brown breaded pork cutlet over egg and onion on rice, glossy sauce, visible steam rising, and 1 small green herb leaf garnish on top. In the upper right corner, add 1 white circular badge with a dotted yellow border containing the Japanese text "おいしく楽しく♪ 賢くコントロール!" in a friendly handwritten style, with yellow accent marks around the badge. Along the entire bottom, include a pale cream horizontal information strip with 5 circular icons and 5 labels separated evenly from left to right: 1 salad bowl icon with the text "バランスの良い食事", 1 scale icon with "カロリーを意識", 1 walking person icon with "適度な運動", 1 glass of water icon with "水分をしっかり", and 1 clock icon with "食べる時間を工夫". Use a glossy commercial thumbnail aesthetic, warm food photography, thick outlined typography, cheerful health-themed colors, and strong contrast optimized for social media click-through.

entries.title: Retro Game Style Japanese Event Banner
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a bold Japanese event thumbnail in a retro 8-bit video game style on a clean white background with a black, white, and vivid yellow color palette. The composition is a single highly graphic poster packed with pixel-art decorations, thick black outlines, comic halftone dots, drop shadows, and arcade-inspired stickers. In the center, place an enormous headline reading "LOVART" in oversized block letters, bright yellow with a thick black outline, white border, and heavy shadow, slightly tilted and dominating most of the image. Above it, add a jagged white banner with black outline containing the Japanese title "AIデザイン運用勉強会". Below the main title, place a black ribbon with yellow and white Japanese text reading "最新ツール実践 × プロの基礎力". At the lower left-center, add a large rounded rectangular date panel in yellow with black outline and white trim, including a pixel calendar icon on the left and the text "5.10 (sat) 19:00 START" in huge black retro type. At the lower right, place a black spiky label reading "speaker" above the large yellow-outlined name "kats". Surround the layout with exactly 11 decorative gaming elements: 1 pixel speech burst at upper left saying "LEVEL UP!", 1 yellow lightning bolt near the top, 1 yellow question block with a black question mark at upper right, 1 pixel sword on the right side, 1 starburst on the right saying "GAME ON!", 1 chibi pixel character jumping on the left in a yellow jacket with raised fist, 1 small black "1UP" life icon with three yellow hearts at lower left, 1 retro game controller beneath it, 3 groups of sparkle stars scattered around the composition. Add comic accents such as dotted halftone patches, angled yellow speed lines, small checkerboard strips, and a pixel cursor pointer near the subtitle. Include a stylized anime-like speaker avatar in the lower right corner wearing a black cap and black hoodie with yellow accents, face partially obscured or simplified, integrated like a streamer or event host badge. Make all Japanese and English text crisp, readable, and accurately typeset, with the overall feeling of a high-energy YouTube thumbnail or social media event banner for a design/AI workshop.

entries.title: Surreal Japanese Meme Thumbnail at Pyramid
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic, absurdist Japanese clickbait-style poster image at sunset in the desert, with the Great Pyramid serving as a massive stone tabletop in the foreground. A messy-haired Japanese man in a dark navy kimono-like robe kneels behind a black plate of translucent squid sashimi, delicately arranging the food with chopsticks. His expression area is obscured by a rectangular blur block, while his wild windblown hair is sharply silhouetted against a glowing orange sky with low sun and scattered clouds. On the plate are neatly piled pale pink squid pieces, a large green shiso leaf, and a small yellow garnish flower. To the right sits a wooden compartment tray with condiments and small dishes. On the left edge of the pyramid surface, show 1 giant human thumbnail standing upright like a monument, and in front of it 1 tiny orchestra of about 10 formally dressed musicians with string instruments and a conductor, staged as if performing on the stone. The visual joke is that the man was supposedly going to conduct an orchestra inside a thumbnail, but is instead decorating salted squid on top of a pyramid. Use hyper-detailed photoreal compositing, exaggerated scale contrast, cinematic sunset rim light, gritty texture, high contrast, and surreal humor. Add large Japanese headline text integrated into the composition in bold, comic YouTube-thumbnail style with thick black outlines, yellow and white lettering, red paint-brush accents, black ink splatter behind the top headline, and a huge red shout at the bottom. Include exactly 6 text blocks: top-left large yellow text "明日も親指の爪の中でオーケストラ指揮しなきゃ!", below it on a red brushstroke "と思ったら", middle-lower large white and yellow text "ピラミッドの頂上でイカの塩辛をデコレーションしてました〜。", bottom very large red text "チクショー!!", and bottom-right yellow hashtag text "#まいにちチクショー". Compose it like an over-the-top viral Japanese meme thumbnail, vertically framed, dense and attention-grabbing.

entries.prompt: A high-impact YouTube thumbnail about HARNESS ENGINEERING in the AI age, 16:9 format, split-screen composition with 2 male presenters shown from the chest up, one on the left and one on the right, both facing forward in office or studio settings. The right presenter has short dark hair, wears glasses and a light blue striped button-up shirt, speaking into a large black microphone, with a softly lit tech-themed background. Use dramatic contrast, cool blue color grading, glossy thumbnail polish, strong rim lighting, mild background blur, and an energetic tech-business aesthetic designed for maximum click-through rate.

entries.title: Flashy Gold AI Income Thumbnail
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a flashy Japanese YouTube thumbnail in a luxurious black-and-gold money-making style, packed with dramatic visual impact and designed to feel viral, celebratory, and high-value. Use a dark black background filled with intense golden light bursts, glitter particles, sparkles, lens flares, and streaking fireworks radiating outward from the center. Scatter shiny gold confetti across the whole frame. Place piles and angled stacks of Japanese yen banknotes in the lower left and lower right background, partially visible and glowing under the gold lighting. In the center, feature huge embossed metallic gold Japanese typography with thick beveled 3D edges, strong highlights, black shadowing, and a premium foil texture. The top headline should read "フォロワー100人未満でも" in bold white Japanese text with a dark outline, centered near the top. The main central text should read "画像生成で" on the upper middle line and "月100万" on the largest line below, both in giant gold 3D serif-style Japanese characters, with "100" especially dominant and oversized. Beneath that, add a wide black banner with gold trim and elegant ornamental corners, containing the subtitle text "0からの実績を完全公開・再現可能メソッド" in white Japanese characters, with "完全公開" highlighted in gold. Along the bottom, place exactly 3 horizontally aligned black-and-gold rounded rectangular callout panels with ornate gold borders and subtle glow. The left panel contains a gold upward-trending chart icon and the text "実績スクショ公開". The center panel contains a gold map pin icon and the text "0→100ロードマップ". The right panel contains a gold rocket icon and the text "今すぐ始める方法". Add small laurel or decorative gold flourishes around these bottom panels. On the right side of the composition, place a cute chibi sheep mascot with fluffy light blue wool, cream-colored horns and ears, a simple neutral face, and a small body, holding an open red book labeled "BOOK". The mascot should overlap the right side of the main text area slightly and be outlined clearly so it stands out from the glittering background. Overall composition should be extremely high contrast, richly saturated gold, glossy, crowded, and optimized as a bold social media thumbnail that instantly communicates wealth, success, and AI image-generation income.

entries.title: Cyberpunk AI Tools Comparison Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A futuristic Japanese tech comparison poster in a dark cyberpunk control-room setting, wide 16:9 composition. Large distressed white Japanese headline text at the upper left reading "三つ巴", with a bold gold subtitle directly below reading "それぞれの武器". Across the center-left are 3 glowing holographic comparison panels arranged horizontally and connected by neon arrows: a blue panel labeled "Google", an amber-gold panel labeled "Claude", and a purple-magenta panel labeled "OpenAI". The Google panel contains 4 inner cards: 2 larger top cards labeled "Gemini" and "Antigravity", plus 2 smaller bottom cards showing analytics/dashboard-like visuals and a blue isometric cube graphic. The Claude panel contains 4 inner cards: 1 large top card labeled "Claude Code", plus 3 smaller bottom cards showing a network diagram, text/code list, and chart analytics. The OpenAI panel contains 5 inner cards: 2 larger top cards labeled "ChatGPT" and "Codex", plus 3 smaller bottom cards showing interface/code windows and a geometric wireframe cube. Add glowing bidirectional arrows between Google and Claude, and between Claude and OpenAI. At the bottom center, place a large neon-framed banner with gold text reading "Google / Claude / OpenAI". On the right side, include a young woman standing and pointing left toward the panels, with long straight split-dyed hair in pastel pink and cyan blue, a plain white t-shirt with black text reading "OKIHIRO AI Creative", and a soft pink pleated skirt. Her face is obscured by a smooth rectangular blur block. Use cinematic sci-fi lighting, glossy hologram UI details, high contrast, vivid blue-gold-purple accents, and a polished YouTube thumbnail aesthetic.

On the left and center, place a luminous circular hub labeled "AI" in bright blue, with 3 directional glowing energy arrows branching outward to competing platforms: "Google" on the left in a blue electric region, "Claude" on the upper right in a gold electric region, and "OpenAI" at the bottom center in a magenta-purple electric region. Add a subtle world-map or territory-battle visualization effect under each brand region, like illuminated digital land masses or influence zones. On the right side, show a young Japanese-looking woman from waist up, facing forward, wearing a long straight split-color wig with pastel pink on one side and pastel blue on the other, a plain white T-shirt with the printed text "OKIHIRO AI Creative", and a light pink skirt. She raises one index finger beside her face in a presenter pose. Her face is fully obscured by a large soft-edged rectangular blur block. Across the top, add huge distressed white Japanese headline text: AI戦国時代. Beneath it, add a second line in bold gold Japanese text: 性能だけの話じゃない. Across the bottom, place a wide black banner with massive bold gold Japanese text: 空気を取った側が勝つ. Make the typography oversized, gritty, and attention-grabbing, with slight glow and drop shadow. Use a color palette of black, electric blue, gold, magenta, and neon white, with intense contrast and thumbnail readability.

entries.title: Cyberpunk 404 Witch Summoning
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic anime-style cyberpunk witch standing on a dark rooftop high above a dense futuristic city at night, viewed from a slightly elevated angle. The main subject is a petite young witch girl with pale skin, short icy blue bobbed hair, pointed elf-like ears, and glowing red eyes, wearing a sly confident smile. She raises a black wand overhead in her right hand, with a dangling orb charm at the tip glowing faintly purple and red. Her oversized crooked witch hat is black with purple lining and covered in stitched patches, warning labels, straps, and white graphics including a large "404" and a skull emblem. She wears a black and purple techwear outfit: oversized hooded jacket with many straps and tags, black crop top with "404" on the chest, layered belts, short bottoms, fishnet on one leg, black lace-up combat boots, chokers, and metallic accessories. Several hanging straps and tags visibly read words like "WITCH 404," "404," and glitch-themed markings. Beneath and beside her, a large glowing violet magic circle mixed with hacker interface aesthetics is projected on the rooftop floor, filled with occult rings, sigils, a central skull symbol, and scattered neon system text such as error-code fragments, creating a fusion of sorcery and digital corruption. Emerging from the circle is 1 large armored summoned figure: a black futuristic demon-knight or robotic familiar with jagged reflective armor, a narrow purple-lit visor, and a heavy weapon held in one hand, partially dissolving into purple energy shards and smoke. The background shows a sprawling rainy megacity of apartment towers and industrial rooftops, packed with windows, balconies, cables, signs, and haze. On a nearby building wall is a giant vertical graffiti-style sign with 3 readable elements: "404", "Witch", and "ERROR NOT FOUND", plus a smaller "E404". Additional purple neon glitch text and symbols are scattered across rooftops and in the air. Use a dark palette of black, indigo, and deep violet with sharp magenta-purple highlights, cinematic contrast, reflective wet surfaces, dense detail, and a high-end polished illustration style. The mood is occult, edgy, stylish, and dangerous, combining urban fantasy, hacker aesthetics, and magical summoning.

entries.title: Anime Fantasy Travel Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic anime movie poster for a fictional film titled EL VIAJE DE LA LUNA DE PLATA, in polished modern Japanese animation style with a natural, less over-detailed look. Center a teenage anime girl from mid-thigh up, facing forward, with a short silver bob haircut, pale skin, a black choker, small black geometric earrings, a white tank top, and a dark navy oversized zip hoodie with two yellow stripes running down the sleeves. She has a backpack strap over one shoulder and both hands tucked casually into the hoodie pockets. Her face is obscured by a flat rectangular censor block in a muted beige tone, covering the entire face area. Place her in a dramatic twilight coastal city setting that blends travel, nostalgia, and fantasy: on the left, a lit train platform with a commuter train approaching, its destination sign showing Japanese characters; behind it, a glowing city skyline with a ferris wheel. In the distance and lower left, layered mountains and a winding illuminated valley road. On the right, a cliffside coast at sunset with the sea reflecting warm light, a crescent moon in the sky, several flying seabirds, and a curving highway descending along the hillside. Also on the right, include a wooden signpost with exactly 3 directional signs labeled "NUEVOS CAMINOS", "VIEJOS RECUERDOS", and "SIN LÍMITES". At the top center, add the Spanish tagline CADA DESTINO CAMBIA SU HISTORIA in elegant serif capitals. On the upper left, create an awards column in gold typography with laurel wreaths and exactly 4 award blocks: one text block reading "GANADORA DE MÚLTIPLES PREMIOS" with 5 gold stars beneath it, then three laurel award sections reading "MEJOR PELÍCULA ANIMADA / FESTIVAL INTERNACIONAL DE ANIMACIÓN / 2024", "PREMIO DEL PÚBLICO / FESTIVAL INTERNACIONAL DE CINE / 2024", and "MEJOR BANDA SONORA ORIGINAL / ACADEMIA DE CINE ANIMADO / 2024". Place the film title large across the lower center in luminous ornate serif lettering with a magical glow and sweeping flourishes, layered partly over the character. Beneath it, add the Spanish quote A veces, para encontrarte... tienes que perderte en el mundo.. Below that, add "UNA PELÍCULA DE ESTUDIO LUMINARIA" in small caps. At the bottom, add the release line PRÓXIMAMENTE EN CINES in large gold serif capitals, plus tiny production logos and credits along the footer, including a small studio emblem on the left. Rich blue, violet, and warm sunset orange palette, glossy poster lighting, romantic adventure mood, balanced composition, highly polished theatrical key art, vertical one-sheet film poster.

entries.title: Cinematic City Explosion Chase
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic photorealistic action scene in a rainy downtown city street canyon, showing a dark-haired man in his 30s sprinting directly toward the camera in the center foreground with a tense survival expression, wearing a soaked dark jacket, dark shirt, and dark pants, mid-stride with one arm pumping forward. Behind him, a massive urban explosion tears through the street and lower facade of a high-rise building, sending a huge cloud of smoke, fire, dust, shattered concrete, glass, and metal debris outward in all directions. The scene includes exactly 3 visible damaged vehicles: 1 dark sedan in the left foreground with headlights on and a crumpled hood splashing through rainwater, 1 wrecked dark car in the right midground with severe front-end damage, and 1 overturned or airborne black SUV tilted upward behind it on the right side. Wet asphalt reflects headlights, firelight, and gray skyscrapers. Dense debris fills the air, with chunks of rubble frozen in motion. Overcast stormy daylight, desaturated blue-gray color palette with orange fire accents, dramatic motion blur in flying debris but sharp focus on the running figure, low-angle wide-lens composition, blockbuster disaster-movie realism, ultra-detailed textures, high contrast, dynamic depth, volumetric smoke, rain spray, cinematic lighting. Add a white Pollo.ai logo in the top-right corner.

entries.title: Dark Fantasy Wizard Podcast Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic dark fantasy studio poster of two wizard-like figures posed like a parody heavy-metal album cover. In the foreground, a stocky older wizard sits or leans toward the camera, wearing a glossy black hooded robe, large over-ear studio headphones, and a long thick white beard spilling over his chest. He grips a tall black staff in his left hand; the staff has an elongated spearhead-shaped ornate top with open lattice details. A large black podcast microphone on a boom or stand is positioned directly in front of him at mouth level, with a visible sticker that reads "CARAJO" on the microphone body. Behind him stands a second older wizard in a luminous white robe with gold trim and a rope belt, also with long white hair and a long white beard. He holds a tall white staff with a matching ornate spearhead top in his right hand and extends his left hand toward the viewer in a commanding spell-casting gesture, fingers spread. Behind the standing wizard's head is a bright electric-blue glowing circular halo made of runes, creating a magical summoning-ring effect. The background is pure black, with high-contrast cinematic lighting: cool blue rim light from behind and warm highlights on the hands, robes, and staffs. The composition is vertical, tightly framed, with the black-robed wizard occupying the lower center and the white-robed wizard towering behind him. At the bottom center, add the title GORDALF in huge metallic stone-textured gothic block letters, like a fantasy metal logo, and place 1 small occult-style emblem centered underneath the word. Photorealistic cosplay portrait, ultra-detailed fabrics, theatrical fantasy realism, poster design, sharp focus, moody epic atmosphere.

entries.title: Japanese AI Design Webinar Thumbnail
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a clean, modern Japanese webinar thumbnail in a wide 16:9 layout with a corporate tech-design aesthetic. Use a very light gray background with subtle diagonal translucent panels and bold electric-blue geometric accents, including 3 angular blue-and-white ribbon shapes on the right side behind the speaker. The composition is split into 2 main horizontal sections: a large hero area on top and an information bar across the bottom. In the top-left hero area, place a large bold sans-serif Japanese headline in vivid blue on 2 lines reading AI×デザインで\n新事業を創出. Beneath it, add a dark-blue rectangular banner with centered white bold text reading 〜社員AI活用率90%超・デザイン費削減達成する方法〜. On the right half, show a sharply lit half-body portrait of 川合 卓也, an East Asian man in his 30s with short black hair, wearing a navy blazer over a white crew-neck shirt, arms folded, facing slightly left toward the headline. His face is intentionally obscured by a square skin-tone blur block centered over the face. Next to his torso, place a white rectangular name card with 2 lines of small black Japanese text above a larger bold black name: 株式会社SHIFT AI\nデザイン部長/講師 and 川合 卓也. Across the bottom, create a white info bar with thin blue vertical dividers and 4 visual components from left to right: 1) a blue gradient angular K logo with the brand text KAWAI DESIGN in black uppercase sans-serif, 2) the date in large blue text reading 2026/2/9, 3) a blue filled circle containing the white Japanese weekday 月 followed by the time 21:30〜22:30 in large blue text, 4) a blue outlined laptop-and-chat icon followed by the blue text オンライン. Keep typography bold and highly legible, with strong hierarchy, generous spacing, precise alignment, minimal clutter, and a polished webinar promotional design suitable for a business landing page or social media thumbnail.

entries.title: Steampunk ElectroVid Homepage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a full-page steampunk video platform homepage mockup in a dark antique bronze, brass, and sepia palette, styled like a Victorian industrial version of YouTube. The interface should be vertically oriented like a poster or website screenshot, richly decorated with gears, pipes, engraved metal borders, filigree, gauges, screws, and glowing Edison bulbs. At the top left, place a modern overlay logo reading "Pollo AI" with smaller text "GPT Image 2" beneath it. Center the main site title in large ornate serif lettering: "ElectroVid", with a smaller engraved tagline below: "THE FUTURE IN MOTION". Add a horizontal navigation bar under the title with exactly 6 items: a home icon button, "TRENDING", "INNOVATIONS", "DOCUMENTARIES", "ENTERTAINMENT", and a search box on the right showing the placeholder "Search ElectroVid..." and a search icon. On the left sidebar, add a section titled "POPULAR CHANNELS" containing exactly 3 vertically stacked channel cards with circular emblems and subscribe buttons: 1) "THE PATENT OFFICE" with "27.4K SUBSCRIBERS", 2) "THE ROYAL SOCIETY" with "18.7K SUBSCRIBERS", 3) "GENERAL ELECTRIC" with "35.1K SUBSCRIBERS". Each card should have an ornate vintage badge logo and a rectangular button labeled "SUBSCRIBE". In the main content area, place one large featured video player with a sepia still image of two late-19th-century inventors in suits arguing in front of a chalkboard marked "AC vs. DC" with lightning motifs; one man points while the other gestures back, and a light bulb plus early electrical apparatus sit on the table between them. Intentionally obscure both faces with soft rectangular blur blocks. Add a video progress bar, playback controls, and timestamp "08:47 / 22:31". Beneath the player, show the video title "The Truth About AC vs. DC: The Final Debate". Below that, include a channel row with a circular avatar, the channel name "The Electrical Age", metadata "142K views • 3 days ago", and on the right a like button reading "LIKE" with count "5.8K". Under this, add a section header "LATEST VIDEOS" and exactly 3 video thumbnails in one row. Thumbnail 1: a sepia portrait of Thomas Edison holding a glowing bulb, face obscured with a blur block, duration "10:12", title "My New Incandescent Bulb", creator "Thomas Edison", metadata "89K views • 5 days ago". Thumbnail 2: a dramatic sepia image of the Wardenclyffe Tower under lightning, duration "15:36", title "The Wonders of the Wardenclyffe Tower", creator "Nikola Tesla", metadata "120K views • 1 week ago". Thumbnail 3: a sepia photo of an early automobile with Henry Ford seated in it, duration "12:08", title "The Automobile Revolution", creator "Henry Ford", metadata "110K views • 1 week ago". Below the thumbnails, add a centered metal button labeled "VIEW ALL VIDEOS". At the bottom footer, include the text "© 1893 ElectroVid, Ltd." on one line and "All rights reserved." on the next. Add decorative pressure gauges in the upper right and lower right corners, plus exposed pipes and a large gear in the lower left. Make the whole design highly detailed, symmetrical, tactile, and cinematic, with engraved textures, aged paper panels, brass highlights, soft warm bulb glow, and crisp, legible typography integrated into the antique UI.
entries.description: A detailed Victorian-industrial video platform homepage mockup with ornate text, dense UI elements, and sepia scientific media, ideal for showcasing GPT Image 2 text rendering.

one man points while the other gestures back, and a light bulb plus early electrical apparatus sit on the table between them. intentionally obscure both faces with soft rectangular blur blocks. add a video progress bar, playback controls, and timestamp "08:47 / 22:31". beneath the player, show the video title "the truth about ac vs. dc: the final debate". below that, include a channel row with a circular avatar, the channel name "the electrical age", metadata "142k views • 3 days ago", and on the right a like button reading "like" with count "5.8k". under this, add a section header "latest videos" and exactly 3 video thumbnails in one row. thumbnail 1: a sepia portrait of thomas edison holding a glowing bulb, face obscured with a blur block, duration "10:12", title "my new incandescent bulb", creator "thomas edison", metadata "89k views • 5 days ago". thumbnail 2: a dramatic sepia image of the wardenclyffe tower under lightning, duration "15:36", title "the wonders of the wardenclyffe tower", creator "nikola tesla", metadata "120k views • 1 week ago". thumbnail 3: a sepia photo of an early automobile with henry ford seated in it, duration "12:08", title "the automobile revolution", creator "henry ford", metadata "110k views • 1 week ago". below the thumbnails, add a centered metal button labeled "view all videos". at the bottom footer, include the text "© 1893 electrovid, ltd." on one line and "all rights reserved." on the next. add decorative pressure gauges in the upper right and lower right corners, plus exposed pipes and a large gear in the lower left. make the whole design highly detailed, symmetrical, tactile, and cinematic, with engraved textures, aged paper panels, brass highlights, soft warm bulb glow, and crisp, legible typography integrated into the antique ui. youtube thumbnail portrait cinematic office

entries.title: Chibi Shark Adventure Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A bright, hyper-energetic Japanese movie poster illustration in a polished anime chibi style, set in a sparkling tropical ocean adventure scene. Center the composition on 2 cute chibi children riding a smiling blue shark that leaps diagonally upward through swirling seawater and white splash effects. The left child is a boy with short black hair, huge glossy blue eyes, a happy open-mouth smile, a black T-shirt, dark shorts, white sneakers, and a light blue shark hoodie with a tooth-edged hood framing his face; he points upward with one hand and hugs the shark with the other. The right child is a girl with orange hair, large glossy purple eyes, a joyful open-mouth smile, an orange dress, pink shoes, and a pink shark hoodie with a tooth-edged hood; she throws one arm wide in excitement while holding on with the other. Make the shark large and friendly with a rounded body, pale belly, tiny black eyes, and a wide open mouth. Surround them with a vivid underwater-and-surface world: schools of small tropical fish, exactly 1 sea turtle on the left, exactly 1 dolphin on the right, exactly 1 pink octopus on the right, exactly 1 pufferfish on the lower left, coral reefs and sea plants along the bottom edges, air bubbles throughout, and strong blue water motion lines. In the upper background, show a sunny sky with dramatic sun rays streaming into the water, fluffy clouds, 2 seagulls flying, a rocky tropical island with palm trees on the upper left, and a pirate ship on the upper right with white sails and a cute shark emblem. Add a ship wheel partly visible behind the main title. Use a dense, exciting Japanese kids-anime promotional layout with oversized 3D lettering and explosive effects. At the top, place the giant Japanese title text サメなの ワクワク 大作戦 in stacked lines, with glossy blue, orange-pink, and yellow-orange gradient letters, thick white outlines, dark blue shadows, water splashes, and sparkles. Beneath the title, add a smaller curved Japanese tagline in white with blue outline: さあ、海のむこうへ!最高の冒険がはじまる!. At the bottom, place huge release text in Japanese, 2026年 夏公開, in bold red-to-yellow gradient 3D letters with white and blue edging, sitting over a radiant orange burst. On the lower right, add a blue starburst badge with the Japanese text ドキドキ!ワクワク!いっしょに出発だ! in white and yellow. Include exactly 2 treasure-themed corner props: an open treasure chest with gold coins at the lower left and a compass at the lower right. The overall look should be glossy, saturated, family-friendly, whimsical, cinematic, and toy-like, with crisp outlines, exaggerated expressions, high contrast, and a poster-ready vertical composition. No photorealism, no muted colors, no minimalism.
entries.description: A colorful Japanese-style anime poster for a children's ocean adventure film, ideal for recreating bold promotional key art with cute characters and dramatic title typography.

entries.title: Tech Tutorial Thumbnail with UI Mockup
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A clean modern YouTube thumbnail on a bright white background, split visually between bold text on the left and a cropped presenter on the right. On the left, place a massive stacked headline in heavy black sans-serif uppercase reading CLAUDE DESIGN, aligned top-left across two lines. Below it, add a large rounded rectangular orange banner with a subtle drop shadow containing bold white uppercase text with an orange outline that reads IN 6 MINS. Near the headline, include 2 orange starburst spark shapes, one small beside the text and one much larger in the far right background. In the lower-left quadrant, show a floating app interface mockup for a design tool dashboard with a soft off-white panel, thin borders, rounded corners, and a faint shadow. The interface should have a left sidebar with 4 menu items labeled exactly: "Recent", "Your designs", "Examples", and "Design systems". The main panel header should say "Recent" and contain 3 project cards arranged in a grid, labeled exactly: "Thumio Design System", "Thumio Startup", and "Design System". On the right half, show a cropped photorealistic young adult man from chest up wearing a white turtleneck sweater, with messy light brown hair and light facial hair, positioned close to camera. His face is intentionally obscured by a solid tan rectangle placeholder covering most of the face area. He points with one hand toward the interface panel on the left, finger extended. Use a warm orange and white brand palette, high contrast, minimal clutter, polished creator-economy thumbnail styling, subtle shadows, and a composition designed for tech tutorial content.
entries.description: A bold YouTube-style thumbnail featuring a tutorial headline, a design app dashboard mockup, and a presenter pointing at the interface for branding or design-system content.

entries.title: Anime Romance Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A Japanese theatrical romance movie poster in a tall smartphone-style vertical layout with rounded corners, designed like a polished anime key visual. The main image shows a beautiful teenage billboard girl heroine standing on an outdoor balcony at dusk, turning back over her shoulder to look at the viewer with a soft, wistful expression. She has very long silver-white twin-tail hair tied with dark ribbons, pale skin, and large pink-violet eyes. She wears a delicate white frilled blouse with voluminous sleeves and a dark high-waisted dress or corset-like skirt, creating an elegant, slightly gothic school-romance look. The atmosphere is dreamy and emotional, filled with glowing bokeh lights, drifting petals or snow-like sparkles, sunset pink and lavender light, and a luminous cityscape in the blurred background. Use rich cinematic anime rendering, ultra-detailed hair strands, soft rim light, glossy eyes, and a bittersweet first-love mood. Add Japanese poster typography integrated into the composition: a large vertical pink poetic tagline on the right, a vertical white tagline on the left, a very large main title near the lower left reading 看板娘, and a smaller subtitle beside it reading 君と紡ぐ恋物語. Include 5 small rectangular film-strip preview stills aligned across the lower middle, each showing the same heroine in different emotional close-ups. Add dense credits, festival-style laurels, and small release information at the top and bottom in Japanese, with the overall feel of a premium romance anime film poster advertising a tragic, beautiful love story. Use a pastel palette of mauve, blush pink, violet, pearl white, and midnight navy, with soft bloom, shallow depth of field, and elegant poster composition.
entries.description: This prompt generates a polished Japanese anime-style theatrical poster for a bittersweet romance film, ideal for cinematic key art, mock movie ads, or dramatic character-focused poster design.

entries.title: Flashy Japanese AI Thumbnail
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a hyper-saturated Japanese YouTube thumbnail in a flashy clickbait anime style, 16:9 landscape, with a split composition: huge stacked text blocks dominating the left two-thirds and an anime character on the right one-third. The background is a fiery explosion of red, orange, and gold energy with glowing sparks, lens flares, glittering star highlights, and a high-contrast metallic shine effect everywhere. On the left, place 4 bold text groups stacked vertically with thick black outlines, white inner strokes, intense outer glow, and glossy 3D treatment. Top line: giant Japanese headline text 紅エンジニア必見 in vivid red with white edging and bright gold spark accents. Second line: a rounded square orange app-like icon with a white stylized "M" to the left of the word masatra in enormous lowercase white sans-serif letters with black outline and subtle gray shading. Third line: a black rectangular banner with compact bold white Japanese text reading "次世代AIエージェントフレームワーク". Bottom line: very large gold metallic Japanese text 徹底解説 with beveled 3D embossing, orange-to-gold gradient, bright specular highlights, and glowing edges. On the right, show 1 anime-style young adult woman from chest up, with brown medium-length hair, wearing a white open lab coat over a white shirt, leaning toward the camera and pointing directly at the viewer with a foreshortened hand and extended index finger in the foreground. Her pose should feel confident, urgent, and attention-grabbing. Use dramatic rim lighting from the fiery background, strong orange highlights on skin and clothing, and a polished commercial thumbnail finish. Reserve a large rectangular area over the upper-right face region as a flat placeholder block in light brown, obscuring most of the face. Make the overall design extremely dense, glossy, explosive, and optimized for maximum readability at small size.
entries.description: This prompt generates a high-impact anime-style Japanese YouTube thumbnail for AI or tech explainers with oversized text, fiery effects, and a pointing character.

entries.title: Flashy X Monetization YouTube Thumbnail
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a high-impact Japanese YouTube thumbnail in a flashy internet-marketing style, 16:9 landscape, with an explosive black-and-gold background filled with sparkles, lens flares, glowing particles, and dramatic light streaks. The composition is dense and energetic, with giant layered typography dominating the left and center, and an anime-style male character on the right. At the very top, place a curved red ribbon banner with gold trim and bold white-and-yellow Japanese text reading 実績者が教える. Below it, make the main headline extremely large, glossy, and three-dimensional with heavy black outlines and gold glow: a huge metallic gold "10", followed by bold white "日で", then a giant neon green glowing "X", then stacked white text "収益化", and at the bottom the largest gold text "達成". Behind the headline, add a bright green upward-trending bar graph with an arrow pointing to the upper right to symbolize growth. On the left side, include 3 social-and-money elements: a tilted black smartphone displaying the white X logo, a green chat bubble with a white heart, and a smaller green chat bubble with a white user silhouette. At the lower left, add 2 stacks of shiny gold coins and 1 gold coin with a yen symbol. On the right side, show 1 anime-style young man from about thigh-up, with messy dark brown hair accented by vivid green streaks, fair skin, and a confident pose with crossed arms, wearing a black jacket with green inner clothing; his face area is obscured by a simple rectangular blur block. Near his lower right side, place 1 gold award seal with laurel decoration and a small crown, containing the Japanese text "成功者続出", and attach a red ribbon across the bottom of the seal with the text "再現性あり". Along the bottom, place 3 glowing green rectangular feature boxes with gold borders and black interiors. The first box contains 1 beginner mark icon and the text "X初心者でも 簡単収益化". The second box contains 1 clock icon and the text "1日1時間の 作業でOK". The third box contains 1 calendar icon with a green check and the text "最短10日で 収益化条件達成". Use oversized bold Japanese fonts, metallic gold gradients, white text with thick black stroke, vivid neon green highlights, extreme contrast, and a polished click-through-rate optimized thumbnail aesthetic.
entries.description: This prompt generates a bold Japanese marketing-style thumbnail for videos about monetizing X quickly, ideal for social media growth or online income content.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自YouMind 全量搜索库的海报条目《Flashy X Monetization YouTube Thumbnail》。 关键词：phone camera。可直接作为灵感底稿，再去高级编辑细调。

entries.title: Next-Gen Voxel Game Screenshot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed, realistic first-person video game screenshot of a next-generation voxel-based world. At the top center, a large, bold 3D logo reads "MINECRAFT 2". The scene features a lush, blocky landscape with a river, a small wooden cabin, a windmill, a waterfall, and majestic mountains in the background. The world blends realistic lighting, volumetric clouds, and high-resolution textures with cubic, voxel geometry. In the foreground on the left, a blocky green creeper stands on the grass, while a blocky brown wolf stands on the dirt path to the right. On the far right, the player's hand holds a pixelated blue diamond sword in a first-person perspective. At the bottom of the screen is a game user interface featuring a health bar with 10 red hearts, a green experience bar with the number '16', a hunger bar with 10 brown meat icons, and a 9-slot inventory hotbar. The hotbar contains, from left to right: a selected blue tool with a green highlight box, a green tool, a knife, a wrench with the number '3', a piece of meat with '6', a lantern with '24', a dirt block with '10', a bucket, and a sponge block.
entries.description: Generates a realistic, high-fidelity first-person screenshot of a block-building game with a custom logo, environment, and UI overlay.

entries.title: Anime Horror Game Thumbnail Composite
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A composite YouTube thumbnail illustration featuring the logo for Doki Doki Literature Club! in the top center, designed as a pink circle with a blue heart, colorful block letters, and a green pen. Below the logo, in the lower center, is a dark silhouette of a person sitting at a desk facing a glowing pink computer monitor in a dark room. The background is divided into 4 corner sections separated by torn paper edges, each containing a portrait of an anime girl in a school uniform. The top left corner shows a girl with long brown hair and a white bow smiling; the top right corner shows a girl with long dark purple hair looking sad; the bottom left corner shows a girl with short pink hair looking upset; and the bottom right corner shows a girl with short coral hair and a red bow smiling. Floating in the dark space between the characters and the central figure are exactly 3 large white question marks and 4 pieces of lined paper with blurry writing. The overall dark, mysterious, and slightly unsettling contrasts sharply with the bright anime characters and colorful logo.

entries.title: Magical Gothic Library Balcony
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical 2:3 anime fantasy illustration of one elegant young girl standing on a glossy balcony inside an enormous magical gothic library-observatory at twilight. The girl has long pastel pink hair, pale skin, a gentle smiling expression, and wears an ornate black-and-white frilled gothic lolita dress with layered lace, puffed sleeves, ribbons, white stockings, and black platform heels; she turns slightly toward the viewer while standing near a gold filigree railing. Surround her with exactly seven prominent glowing butterflies: one large pink butterfly near the left railing, one small butterfly above the upper balcony, one tiny butterfly near the window, one large pink butterfly on the right railing, one large butterfly near the bottom left floor, one small butterfly near her feet, and one small butterfly at the lower right edge. The setting is a vast cathedral-like interior with towering bookshelves, sweeping spiral staircases, arched balconies, marble columns, gilded railings, chandelier-like lamps, reflective black floors, and intricate art nouveau metalwork. On the right, include a gigantic arched glass window covered in rain streaks, revealing a luminous night city skyline with castle spires and a large glowing ferris wheel outside. Use a dreamy lavender, rose pink, pale blue, and warm gold palette, misty volumetric light, sparkling particles, soft bloom, extremely detailed architecture, delicate linework, cinematic depth, ethereal magical atmosphere, and a high-resolution polished anime art style. No text, no watermark, no extra characters.

entries.title: Minimalist Children's Book Illustration
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Transform the photo into a delicate minimalist hand-drawn children's illustration with a soft whimsical fairy-tale aesthetic. Use simple elongated shapes, thin imperfect hand-drawn lines, flat pastel colors, minimal details, and a cute doll-like character style with rosy cheeks, tiny facial features, and simplified anatomy. Add subtle paper texture, soft pencil and pastel shading, watercolor softness, and a clean white background with small stars or sparkles.
Stylize the clothing in a playful storybook way with simplified shapes and gentle decorative details. The overall mood should feel airy, cozy, naive, and charming, like a modern Scandinavian nursery postcard or children's book illustration. Avoid photorealism, 3D, cinematic lighting, glossy surfaces, complex shadows, realistic anatomy, and hyper-detail.

entries.title: Strauss Four Last Songs Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic 16:9 digital illustration inspired by Las «Cuatro últimas canciones» by Strauss. Show an elderly male classical composer in formal dark suit and bow tie, positioned slightly left of center in side profile facing left toward a glowing sunset over a calm lake with distant mountains. His gray-white hair and the right half of his body dissolve into wind, mist, sparkling particles, and translucent fragments, suggesting a peaceful death or the soul dispersing into air. Add sweeping golden musical staves and floating notes across the upper right and lower right sky, integrated like luminous ribbons carried by the wind. Use a dreamy pastel palette of lavender, peach, gold, blue, and soft rose, with volumetric haze, painterly realism, epic orchestral atmosphere, and a serene melancholic mood. Include exactly 2 text elements: large bottom title text reading Las «Cuatro últimas canciones» in pale cream/yellow with dark outline and drop shadow, and a smaller bold red word at lower right reading Strauss with black outline. Place an opaque muted beige square over the man's face, centered on the head, as if the face is intentionally censored. No extra text, no watermark, no borders.

entries.prompt: Create a cinematic travel-poster style night photograph of Lisbon, showing a steep old European cobblestone street descending into the distance with shiny tram tracks running down the center, historic narrow buildings on both sides, iron balconies and shuttered windows, warm amber street lamps glowing on the right and along the street, a deep blue night sky, and distant softly blurred hilltop lights. entries.title: Cosmic Coral Whale
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dreamy fantasy illustration of a colossal translucent humpback whale swimming through deep outer space as if it were an ocean. The whale fills most of a vertical portrait canvas, angled from lower left to upper right, with its head on the left and its tail curling upward on the right into a graceful splash-like arc. Make the whale's body glassy and bioluminescent in luminous cyan, turquoise, royal blue, violet, and soft pink, with glowing speckles like stars inside its skin. Inside the transparent whale's belly, show a vibrant coral reef ecosystem with exactly 5 prominent coral clusters: one large pale pink branching coral near the center, one pink-and-yellow anemone-like coral on the right, one soft blue coral mound beneath the center, one lavender-pink reef patch near the lower left, and one pale peach coral fan near the mid-lower body. Add exactly 11 small fish below the whale, swimming in a loose arc, colored cream, pale yellow, light blue, cyan, and orange. Add exactly 3 jellyfish around the whale: one glowing jellyfish to the left above the head, one small jellyfish near the upper center above the whale's back, and one tiny jellyfish at the right edge beside the tail. Surround the whale with many sparkling bubbles and water droplets, especially along the arcing tail and lower right fin, but keep them delicate and jewel-like. The background is a dark navy star field with countless tiny stars and a few larger twinkling starbursts, creating a cosmic underwater atmosphere. Style: highly detailed ethereal digital painting, delicate dissolving outlines, soft gradients, transparent watercolor glow, luminous rim light, magical ocean-in-space mood, no text, no border, no watermark.

entries.title: Helen of Troy Mythic Portrait Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a cinematic mythological character portrait poster for Helen of Troy, styled like an elegant historical fantasy book cover.

Canvas: Vertical 4:5 portrait poster, warm golden-brown palette, shallow depth of field, soft temple or palace background, dramatic side lighting, luxurious classical atmosphere.

Main subject: A regal ancient Greek woman shown from chest up, turned slightly to the viewer's left. Her face is intentionally covered by a centered opaque square censor block in a medium warm brown skin-tone color, hiding the eyes, nose, and mouth. She has long wavy golden blonde hair in an ornate updo with loose curls, wearing a delicate gold laurel crown and elaborate dangling gold earrings. Her outfit is a white Greco-Roman draped gown with rich gold embroidery, beaded trim, floral metallic appliqué, and a single visible embellished shoulder strap.

Layout and typography: Create a premium editorial poster composition with text layered around the portrait. Use exactly 6 visible text elements: 1) top-left serif title in uppercase: THE FACE THAT LAUNCHED A THOUSAND SHIPS; 2) below it, small italic quote: Her beauty was not just admired - it was destiny.; 3) large cream-gold brush-script title across the lower-left and center: "Helen of Troy"; 4) large Chinese calligraphy-style title beneath it: "特洛伊的海伦"; 5) lower-left small serif caption: "HELEN OF TROY" with smaller subtitle "The Face That Launched a Thousand Ships"; 6) bottom-left italic quote: I was not the cause of war, but the mirror of men's desire.. Add two tiny decorative gold divider ornaments, one below each quote.

Visual style: Ultra-realistic painterly photography hybrid, romantic historical fantasy, warm rim light on hair and shoulders, luminous gold highlights, soft shadows, creamy bokeh, subtle film grain, high-detail jewelry and embroidery, elegant cream and gold typography.

Constraints: Keep the face-obscuring square clearly visible and flat, with sharp edges; do not show facial features through it. Keep all six text elements legible and in their described positions. Avoid modern objects, logos, watermarks, or extra characters.

entries.title: Queen of the Nile Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a cinematic vertical character poster for a regal Egyptian queen, titled Queen of the Nile. The composition is a glamorous bust-length portrait of Cleopatra VII standing in a dark ancient Egyptian palace or temple interior, lit by warm golden torchlight with shallow depth of field, floating dust, bokeh highlights, and gilded columns fading into the background. The queen wears a white pleated linen gown with gold straps, an elaborate broad gold-and-turquoise collar necklace, layered gold chains, a large turquoise pendant, gold armbands shaped like sacred ornaments, long turquoise-and-gold drop earrings, and a black braided beaded Egyptian wig. Add a dramatic gold cobra headdress centered above the forehead with black enamel and turquoise jewel details, plus hanging gold bead strands on both sides. Her face should be intentionally obscured by a flat centered rectangle of medium brown, covering the facial features while leaving the neck, hair, jewelry, and headdress visible. Use a luxurious black-and-gold movie-poster aesthetic, high contrast, realistic photography mixed with polished fantasy historical styling, sharp jewelry detail, soft background blur, and subtle film grain.

Text layout: place the large headline "Queen of the Nile" across the top in elegant metallic gold serif typography. Add a small gold winged scarab emblem centered above or near the headline with thin ornamental divider lines. On the left side, write "Cleopatra VII" in large expressive gold brush script with underline strokes. On the right side, include bold gold Chinese calligraphy text 埃及艷后 with sweeping brush underline strokes. At the bottom center, add the quote Last Pharaoh of Ancient Egypt in pale gold serif type, enclosed in quotation marks, with a small gold scarab ornament and thin decorative line beneath it. Keep exactly four main text groups: top headline, left character name, right Chinese calligraphy, and bottom quote. No extra logos, no watermark, no additional text.

entries.title: Surreal AI Error Renaissance Collage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical 9:16 museum-grade digital pop-surrealist collage about artificial intelligence, classical sculpture, and retro computer failure, titled AI IS THINKING SO I DON'T HAVE TO.

Canvas: Tall poster, 768×1152 or similar 2:3 vertical crop, aged warm ivory paper background with subtle stains, fibers, dust, speckles, fine cracks, faint grid lines, registration marks, dotted halftone fields, technical drafting lines, and archival museum-plate texture.

Main subject: A large broken Renaissance-style marble bust occupying the right two-thirds of the poster, cropped close and extending from near the top edge to the bottom edge. The bust should resemble a classical bearded male philosopher with curled hair and draped robe, but the statue is shattered open. The left side remains pale cracked marble; the right side is hollowed out and packed with dense exposed machinery: tangled beige and black cables, circuit boards, ribbon cables, brass connectors, small chips, dark mechanical cavities, and fragments of plaster. Add chipped edges, crumbling stone, missing chunks, and dust. Place a flat opaque muted taupe square over the central face area, as if a neutral censor block or missing-image placeholder is covering the face.

Central digital overlay: Add exactly 1 retro Windows 95-style error dialog box across the lower chest of the bust. It has a dark blue title bar reading Fatal Error, a grey body, a red circular icon with a white X, a small close button in the top-right, and the message System failure at address 0041:7B3E The operation completed successfully.. Include exactly 1 rectangular OK button and exactly 1 large pixelated white mouse cursor pointing at the OK button.

Typography and small interface details: On the left side, set the main headline in a refined editorial mix of tall serif and bold condensed sans-serif typography. Make "AI" very large in burnt orange, "IS" smaller in dark grey, "THINKING" bold dark grey, and "SO I DON'T HAVE TO" in elegant tall serif with "TO" in burnt orange. Beneath it add a small uppercase text block of exactly 4 lines: "DELEGATION", "AS EVOLUTION.", "COMPLACENCY", "AS DESIGN." Add exactly 1 small orange roman numeral mark "III" below that. Along the far left margin include vertical microtext reading "EX06/95 47-A" and "MIND / MACHINE INTERFACE". Near the top-left add tiny label "Fig. 01". Near the lower-left add tiny technical text "CALC. // HUMAN INPUT 0.001%" plus small barcode-like marks and square swatches.

Additional graphic elements: Include exactly 1 faint circular technical diagram in the lower-left quadrant, exactly 1 orange nested-corner geometric logo near the bottom-left, exactly 1 black dripping binary data cluster on the lower-right of the bust made from 0s and 1s, and several thin black drafting lines with crosshair ticks and dotted measurement guides distributed across the poster. Keep the background mostly empty on the left to emphasize editorial negative space.

Visual style: Sophisticated conceptual mixed-media collage, antique museum catalog meets cybernetic ruin, high-detail photorealistic marble and electronics, restrained palette of ivory, stone grey, dark graphite, muted brass, burnt orange, dusty blue, and taupe. Lighting is soft and diffused, with realistic shadows and tactile paper grain. The mood is intellectual, eerie, satirical, and slightly apocalyptic.

Constraints: Use no extra characters, no modern glossy UI, no neon cyberpunk lighting, no clean futuristic robot face, no watermark. Preserve the exact counted elements: 1 bust, 1 taupe face block, 1 error dialog, 1 OK button, 1 cursor, 1 binary drip cluster, 1 circular diagram, 1 orange nested-corner logo, 1 "III" mark, and 4 small delegation text lines.
entries.description: A vertical museum-style pop-surrealist collage combining a shattered classical marble bust, exposed circuitry, editorial typography, and a retro fatal error dialog.

entries.title: Kijiro Cat Rider Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a richly detailed fictional Japanese animated movie poster about an adventurous anthropomorphic cat traveling by motorcycle, with a nostalgic hand-painted anime fantasy style.

Canvas: Vertical theatrical poster, 3:4 aspect ratio, warm cinematic composition, full-bleed illustration with layered Japanese typography. Use a soft teal-blue sky, golden sunlight, muted browns, cream highlights, and painterly film-grain texture.

Main subject: Center a brave tabby cat rider named Kijiro, shown as a cute but heroic anthropomorphic cat with green eyes, striped fur, large upright ears, and a calm determined expression. The cat wears vintage aviator goggles on its head, a leather helmet strap, blue scarf and windblown cape, rugged blue travel clothes, brown gloves, belts, pouches, knee guards, boots, and small adventurer gear. The cat rides a large vintage blue motorcycle toward the viewer at a low angle; include a big round headlamp, chrome forks, front fender, engine details, handlebars, leather saddlebags, and weathered scratches.

Background: A sweeping coastal road curves along cliffs beside a deep blue sea. Add white flowers and greenery in the lower right foreground, distant islands and waves on the left, and a tall fantasy castle city on a hill in the right background. The sky is bright blue with dramatic cream clouds and drifting petals or paper-like flecks, creating a sense of wind and travel.

Layout and text: Make the design look like a Japanese theatrical poster. Include exactly 4 small rectangular preview stills stacked vertically along the lower-left side: 1 close-up portrait of the goggled cat, 1 sunset castle landscape, 1 coastal road landscape, and 1 dark side-profile cat portrait. Add a laurel-award block in the upper left with small Japanese festival-style text. Add vertical Japanese tagline text on the upper right. Add a large cream Japanese title across the lower center: キジ郎の旅. Beneath it add the subtitle 風と記憶の向こうへ. Add a small synopsis line in Japanese near the bottom center and dense tiny production credits along the bottom edge. Add a release line reading 2025年・春 旅立ちの季節にロードショー and a small fictional website in the bottom right.

Visible Japanese copy to include: upper-left tagline "見えない風が、彼をどこかへ運んでいく。"; upper-left award text "長編アニメーション映画 / 幻想映画祭出品 /(架空)"; right vertical tagline "誰にも縛られず、ただ、風のままに。"; synopsis "孤高のライダー、キジ郎。その旅は、出会いと別れ、そして"本当の自由"を知る物語。"

Visual style: Detailed 2D anime poster illustration, reminiscent of classic hand-painted adventure animation and fantasy road movies, intricate linework, textured watercolor-gouache shading, cinematic lighting, charming animal character design, aged paper grain, elegant Japanese typography, no photorealism.

Constraints: Keep all text integrated as poster typography, avoid modern UI elements, avoid logos or real studio names, do not add extra characters, and keep the motorcycle, cat, castle, ocean road, flowers, and exactly 4 preview stills clearly visible.

The left side contains exactly 6 text/graphic blocks: 1) a small top badge reading "GOLDEN ERA ICON" with a circular dragon emblem, two horizontal rules, and 2 small stars; 2) a huge stacked condensed serif title reading "KYRIE" above "CHEUNG"; 3) a small divider with 1 centered star and the text "2020s"; 4) a quotation block reading ; 5) a red circular stamped seal reading "ARCHIVE / CLASSIFIED / UNDERWORLD"; 6) a bottom file label reading FILE No.01 with thin lines and tiny decorative stars/floral marks.

Subject details: On the right side, show one slim young East Asian man in profile facing left, standing with relaxed posture and one hand in his trouser pocket.
