entries.title: Peach Blossom Xianxia First Encounter
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic romantic xianxia poster of Zhao Ling'er during a peach-blossom first encounter, vertical 2:3 composition. Show a young, innocent, gentle Chinese fairy-like woman in a flowing pale blue and white hanfu, standing beside a clear turquoise stream and turning back toward the viewer with one arm extended forward as if inviting the viewer to take her hand. Her long dark hair is half-up in an elegant bun with floral hairpins, silver ornaments, beads, and long translucent blue ribbons streaming in the breeze; her skirt and sleeves are layered, sheer, and luminous, with a dark waist sash and delicate fantasy embroidery. The face area is covered by a simple square soft brown censor block centered over the face. Surround her with abundant pink peach blossoms: branches arch across the top and sides, blossoms frame the foreground with dreamy bokeh, and loose petals drift through the air. Background: an idyllic ancient Chinese garden valley with traditional wooden pavilions on the left and mid-distance, an arched stone bridge over the stream, mossy rocks, sparkling water reflections, and misty green mountains fading into bright morning haze. Mood: not dark, not oppressive, not cold or tragic; instead pure, tender, lively, lovable, heart-stirring, and innocent. Use ultra-detailed cinematic realism, soft pastel colors, luminous backlight from the upper right, shallow depth of field, gentle lens bloom, sparkling water highlights, floating petals, ethereal fairy-tale atmosphere, high-end movie poster quality. No text, no logo, no watermark.
entries.description: A cinematic xianxia poster prompt for creating a tender peach-blossom garden encounter with a gentle hanfu heroine reaching toward the viewer.

entries.title: Retro Hong Kong Gangster Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical retro Hong Kong-Macau triad boss style character poster for Kyrie Cheung. Use a gritty cinematic 1970s-1990s crime archive aesthetic with aged paper texture, scratches, dust, worn corners, dark sepia and deep red tones, and faded gold typography. Canvas is a 2:3 portrait poster. The right half shows one young East Asian man in side profile facing left, standing against a dark red weathered wall under dramatic low-key lighting; he has short messy black hair, a calm intimidating posture, a white wrinkled button-up shirt with sleeves rolled to the forearms, black high-waisted trousers, black belt, one hand in pocket, and a wristwatch. Keep the face partially obscured or shadowed for anonymity. The top background includes traditional Chinese roof eaves with circular decorative tiles, dimly lit and distressed. The left half is a bold vintage title layout: small top label reads "GOLDEN ERA ICON" inside a thin rectangular frame with exactly 1 dragon medallion icon and exactly 2 small star icons, then huge condensed block serif text stacked in two lines reading KYRIE CHEUNG. Beneath the title add a thin divider with exactly 1 centered star, then the decade label 2020s. Below that add the quote in faded gold, mixing Chinese and English exactly as written. Add exactly 1 red circular archive stamp near the lower left reading "ARCHIVE / CLASSIFIED / UNDERWORLD". At the bottom left add the file label FILE No.01 with thin horizontal rules and exactly 3 tiny decorative stars/leaves underneath. Use tall compressed vintage poster typography, distressed ink, uneven print registration, grain, vignette, and a thin worn border around the poster. No modern clean design, no extra people, no additional text beyond the specified poster elements.

entries.title: Blizzard Cliff Predator Chase
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a hyper-realistic cinematic vertical action photograph of a shirtless muscular man climbing a jagged icy mountain cliff during a ferocious blizzard, shot from a dramatic wide-angle perspective as if from a camera attached near the climbing rope. The man is in the lower foreground, leaning upward with intense survival energy, one hand gripping a thick rope that runs toward the viewer and the other hand holding a battered ice axe. He wears only torn, dark grey denim pants with ripped knees; his bare torso is heavily muscled, dirty, scratched, wet, and dusted with snow and frost. Behind and above him, an enormous snow leopard leaps down from the cliff face in mid-attack, mouth open snarling, blue-gray eyes focused on the climber, one front paw extended with claws visible. The scene is set in a steep Himalayan-style gorge with dark rocky walls, snow-covered ridges, icy mist, wind-blown powder, and dense diagonal snowfall. Use cold blue-gray color grading, high contrast, gritty textures, realistic fur detail, frozen skin texture, motion blur in the snow, and dramatic cinematic lighting. Keep the composition tense and dynamic: the climber occupies the lower left/center foreground, the rope creates strong depth toward the bottom right, and the attacking animal dominates the upper right background. No text, no watermark, no extra people, no modern climbing gear besides the rope and ice axe.
entries.description: A cinematic survival-action image of a shirtless climber on an icy mountain cliff being attacked by a snow leopard in a blizzard.

entries.title: Pastel Zodiac Girls Grid
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a delicate 12-panel zodiac character collection poster featuring twelve cute anime-style girls, one for each Western zodiac sign, in a soft watercolor storybook aesthetic.

Canvas: Vertical poster in a 3-column by 4-row grid, with exactly 12 equal square panels separated by thin white gutters. Use a pale cream paper background with subtle watercolor texture, gentle fading edges, and no text labels.

Visual style: Dreamy Japanese kawaii illustration, soft pastel palette, translucent watercolor washes, pencil-like sketch lines, airy composition, tiny sparkles, floral accents, plush animals, magical props, and a hand-painted children's book feeling. Characters should have tiny closed or sleepy eyes, soft blush, small mouths, oversized wavy hair, frilly dresses or fantasy outfits, and peaceful poses. Keep the entire image light, gentle, and slightly hazy, with no harsh contrast.

Subject details: Depict exactly 12 zodiac-themed girls, one per panel, arranged left to right, top to bottom:
1. Aries: a peach-orange curly-haired girl with small ram horns, surrounded by warm orange brushstrokes, holding a fluffy lamb-like plush or companion.
2. Taurus: a brown-haired girl with bull horns, sitting among roses and soft cream flowers, holding a dessert or cake, with a cozy teddy-like animal nearby.
3. Gemini: two twin girls standing close together, one pink-haired and one blue-haired, surrounded by small floating cards or papers and sunflowers.
4. Cancer: a blue-haired girl under a coral-pink crab-shaped hood or umbrella, hugging a pillow, with several tiny orange crabs around her.
5. Leo: a golden-blonde girl wearing a small crown, holding a wand or scepter, with a cute lion plush beside her, warm yellow-orange tones.
6. Virgo: a brown curly-haired girl in a neat scholar or botanist outfit, sitting at a desk with an open botanical book, small jars, flowers, and tidy shelves behind her.
7. Libra: a lavender-haired girl holding golden balance scales, wearing a pale flowing dress, with delicate flowers and a small white bird nearby.
8. Scorpio: a dark purple-haired girl in a gothic floral outfit, surrounded by black-purple flowers and scorpion-tail shapes, elegant and mysterious but still cute.
9. Sagittarius: an orange-haired archer girl with a bow and arrow, wearing a light green skirt, with small wings or feather details and a tiny animal companion.
10. Capricorn: a gray-brown curly-haired mountain-goat girl with curved goat horns, wearing earthy layered clothes and a backpack, standing near rocks or mountains with a small goat companion.
11. Aquarius: a pale blue-haired girl pouring water from a vessel, surrounded by blue ribbons, bubbles, and swirling water shapes, wearing a white and blue flowing outfit.
12. Pisces: a blue-haired ocean girl with starfish and sea ornaments in her hair, holding or surrounded by two pastel fish, with watery translucent blue waves.

Customization: The collection theme is Western zodiac signs as cute anime girls. The art style is soft pastel watercolor kawaii anime illustration. The character mood is sleepy, gentle, dreamy, and innocent. The palette is pale peach, cream, lavender, sky blue, soft gold, and rose pink. The layout is 3 columns by 4 rows with 12 square panels.

Constraints: Include exactly 12 panels and exactly the 12 listed zodiac characters. Do not add text, logos, captions, watermarks, realistic faces, photorealism, or dark dramatic lighting. Maintain consistent chibi-inspired proportions and the same watercolor texture across all panels.
entries.description: Generates a 12-panel watercolor anime poster of cute zodiac-themed girls for decorative character collections or social media visuals.

entries.title: Gothic Mourning Women on Cathedral Steps
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic black-and-white fashion photograph of three women dressed in dramatic Victorian gothic mourning attire ascending wide old stone steps outside a monumental cathedral or classical stone building. The scene is shot in high-contrast monochrome with harsh sunlight and deep shadows, like vintage street photography or a noir editorial. All three figures wear full-length black pleated gowns, sheer black veils, long gloves, and layered mourning fabrics. The center woman is the closest focal subject, seen from behind and slightly turned over her shoulder, her face partly obscured by a translucent veil, wearing a fitted black bodice with puff sleeves and a long flowing skirt. The left woman is slightly behind in shadow, mostly hidden under a black veil, with her face intentionally obscured by a small dark rectangular blur. The right woman is farther up the stairs, walking away in profile/back view, wearing a long trailing black skirt and veil. The background shows weathered stone columns, masonry, steps, and a dark doorway or barred window, with strong architectural texture. Composition should be horizontal widescreen, documentary realism, elegant and mysterious, no text, no modern objects, no color, no watermark.
entries.description: A cinematic monochrome editorial scene of three veiled gothic women climbing ancient cathedral steps, useful for dark fashion or noir historical atmosphere.

entries.prompt: Create a dramatic black-and-white documentary fashion photograph of exactly three women dressed as gothic mourners ascending the broad stone steps of an old cathedral or historic civic building. The scene is shot in harsh natural daylight with deep shadows and high contrast, like a 35mm film still. All three figures wear full-length black Victorian-inspired mourning dresses with pleated skirts, fitted waists, long black gloves, and sheer black veils covering their heads and faces. The center woman is closest to camera, turned partly back over her shoulder so one eye and part of her face are faintly visible through the veil; the left woman is slightly behind and darker, with her face obscured by a solid black rectangular censor-like shadow; the right woman is farther ahead on the stairs, facing away and walking upward, her long pleated skirt trailing. The background shows large pale stone columns, worn masonry, carved architectural details, and wide weathered steps, with the figures placed across the lower and middle frame. Use a cinematic horizontal composition, monochrome grayscale, strong chiaroscuro lighting, realistic fabric texture, lace and gauze transparency, solemn ritual atmosphere, no text, no modern objects, no extra people. Optional customization: set the location as old cathedral steps, the clothing style as Victorian gothic black pleated gowns, the image mood as solemn and mysterious, the camera style as high-contrast black-and-white 35mm documentary photograph, and the number of women as three.

entries.title: Horror Movie Poster Shattered Mirror
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A vertical horror movie poster in ultra-realistic cinematic style. A young woman in her mid-20s with long messy black hair, pale skin, and a terrified expression looks upward into the darkness. Her face is dramatically lit from below with a cold blue-white light, casting deep shadows across her features. Her lips are slightly parted, eyes glistening with fear. She wears a torn dark dress. Wind appears to blow her hair across her face.
The entire poster is framed by a massive shattered mirror - jagged glass shards explode outward from the center in all directions. In the broken reflection fragments on her left side, her mirror image appears demonic - blackened eyes, blood streaking down her cheeks, mouth stretched unnaturally wide. In the dark background, a shadowy faceless figure stands far behind her, barely visible through the broken glass.
Large horror typography dominates the lower half. Title text reads: "WHEN DARKNESS WEARS YOUR FACE" - letters appear carved from cracked bone and dried blood, with deep fractures running through each character. "WHEN" sits small at the top, "DARKNESS" bold and large in the middle, "WEARS YOUR FACE" largest at the bottom with blood dripping from the letters like open wounds.
Small elegant serif text at the very top reads: "A VOIDCREST FILMS PRODUCTION." A standard fictional movie credit block runs along the bottom in tiny white text listing fictional names: directed by MARCUS HALLOWAY, produced by ELARA VOSS, starring NADIA CROSS. Color grade: deep blacks, desaturated teal shadows, crimson blood accents, single cold key light. Style: photorealistic, ultra-detailed, 4K professional horror movie poster, vertical 9:16 aspect ratio.
entries.description: A chilling vertical horror movie poster prompt featuring a terrified woman framed by a massive shattered mirror, complete with dramatic lighting and detailed fictional credits.

entries.title: Muted Speech Editorial Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical editorial poster portrait of an anonymous young man seated front-facing in a chair against a smoky warm-gray studio background, centered from mid-thigh upward. He wears clean layered neutral knitwear: a taupe ribbed crewneck sweater over subtle beige-gray clothing, with relaxed trousers, soft folds, and muted fashion-magazine styling. His mouth, jaw, and throat are tightly wrapped in glossy translucent plastic film, catching highlights and compressing the neck as a visual metaphor for forced silence; cover the central face area with a flat opaque square censor block in a dark brown-to-warm-gray tone, while leaving the hair, ears, sweater, and wrapped neck visible. Surround him with exactly 13 empty translucent speech bubbles: 2 large partial bubbles cropped at the far left, 1 huge partial bubble cropped at the far right, 3 medium bubbles behind his head and shoulders, 5 small bubbles scattered across the upper and middle background, and 2 large hazy foreground bubbles partially cropped near the lower left and lower right. Add handwritten white text at the top reading SAY IT, with a thin crossed-out phrase directly below reading NEVER MIND. Add giant semi-transparent block letters across the bottom reading MUTE, spanning nearly the full width and partially covering the seated figure. Use soft diffused side lighting, shallow depth of field, subtle film grain, muted monochrome beige-gray palette, high-end conceptual photography style, restrained emotional mood, no extra text, no logos, no watermark.
entries.description: A conceptual fashion-editorial poster showing a silenced seated man surrounded by empty speech bubbles, ideal for themes of censorship, anxiety, or self-expression.

entries.title: Sakae Nagoya Watercolor Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a vertical travel poster illustration of SAKAE, NAGOYA in a refined watercolor-and-ink urban sketch style on warm off-white textured paper. The scene shows a lively street intersection in Sakae, Nagoya, Japan, viewed from sidewalk level with strong depth perspective. On the left foreground, draw a charming old corner cafe building with weathered cream walls, black awning, large window, warm interior seating, potted plants, climbing leafy vines, and a parked green bicycle leaning near the curb; include readable cafe signage: "KAKUOZAN LARDER", "BLEND", and "COFFEE". Place a small chalkboard sign outside reading "COFFEE / SANDWICH / and / GOOD MUSIC" with a tiny cup drawing. In the center distance, feature the Nagoya TV Tower rising clearly above trees and city buildings. On the right, show a modern elevated glass-and-metal transit structure, streetlights, traffic signals, a "Sakae" sign, road markings, bicycles, and pedestrians crossing a broad zebra crossing. Include one prominent woman seen from behind in the lower center foreground wearing a light beige long coat and carrying a brown shoulder bag, walking into the city. Add many small pedestrians but keep them sketchy and atmospheric. Use delicate black pen linework, pale gray shadows, muted blue-gray architecture, soft green foliage, and restrained watercolor washes with lots of white space.

Poster typography: At the upper right, set the large bracketed headline "[SAKAE, NAGOYA]" in elegant tall serif capitals. Beneath it, add the handwritten script subtitle "Everyday Urban Rhythm", a thin horizontal rule, and small uppercase text "SAKAE, NAKA WARD, NAGOYA, JAPAN". Farther right, add a compact quote block: "A CITY THAT BLENDS / TRADITION AND INNOVATION, / PEOPLE AND CULTURE, / IN PERFECT HARMONY." In the bottom left margin, add a small circular travel stamp reading "NAGOYA / 名古屋 / JAPAN". Keep the composition airy, sophisticated, editorial, and print-ready, with no photo-realism and no extra text.
entries.description: A refined vertical watercolor urban sketch poster of Sakae, Nagoya with cafe street life, Nagoya TV Tower, and elegant travel typography.

entries.title: Velvet Signal Album Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a square album-cover image with a moody cinematic close-up of a person wearing large black over-ear studio headphones, centered and cropped tightly so the headphones fill the left and right edges and long dark hair falls down both sides. The face is intentionally hidden by one large opaque centered square block in a warm dark brown gradient, covering most of the upper and middle portrait from near the top edge to above the title area. Use soft warm backlighting, muted cream background, dark shadows, slight vintage film grain, shallow depth of field, and an intimate late-night listening-session mood. At the bottom center, add exactly two text elements: the large elegant serif title "Velvet Signal" in pale cream/gold lettering, and directly underneath it the smaller spaced artist name "PZF". Keep the typography refined, minimal, and centered, with the title occupying the lower third and no other text, logos, stickers, borders, or watermarks. Overall color palette: black headphones and hair, warm beige background, deep brown face-obscuring square, and soft ivory-gold typography.

entries.title: Romantic Sunset Album Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a square cinematic album cover for a romantic indie pop song titled TWO HEARTS, ONE SUN. The scene shows two lovers as a single dark silhouette embracing and kissing or leaning forehead-to-forehead in the exact center of the frame, standing in soft wild grass by a calm sea at sunset. A huge glowing sun sits directly behind their bodies on the horizon, creating a bright golden halo that merges their silhouettes. The sky is a smooth dramatic gradient from deep navy blue at the top through violet and rose into saturated orange near the horizon, with subtle haze, lens flare orbs, and dreamy atmospheric bloom. Low dark island silhouettes appear far left and far right across the water. The foreground is shadowy, with delicate out-of-focus grasses, seed heads, and small bokeh highlights, creating depth. Use warm orange, gold, and red tones contrasted with cool blue shadows; romantic, nostalgic, cinematic, slightly painterly-photographic, soft focus, high dynamic range, no hard outlines. Add centered bottom typography: the title in widely spaced uppercase elegant sans-serif letters, glowing pale gold, and a smaller artist name beneath it reading PZF. Keep the composition minimal and symmetrical, with the couple and sun perfectly aligned, no extra people, no buildings, no border, no watermark.
entries.description: A cinematic square album cover featuring two lovers silhouetted against a giant sunset over the sea, ideal for romantic indie pop artwork.

entries.title: Neon Disco Album Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a square 1:1 synthwave disco album cover for a track titled MIRROR MIRROR by PZF. Show two stylish adult figures standing back-to-back in a smoky nightclub beneath a huge mirrored disco ball that dominates the upper center of the frame. The left figure is a woman with voluminous shoulder-length auburn curls wearing a glossy red leather jacket, angled slightly left with one hand near her pocket; the right figure is a man with slick dark hair wearing a glossy black leather blazer over an open white shirt, angled slightly right. Their faces should be intentionally obscured by soft rectangular blur blocks, preserving the anonymous editorial look. Use dramatic magenta, violet, electric blue, and hot pink lighting, with horizontal neon tube lights in the background, thick purple fog, reflective highlights on the leather, and a cinematic 1980s club atmosphere. Place exactly 2 text elements: the large title "MIRROR MIRROR" across the lower third in italic all-caps futuristic neon typography, white core with pink glow and slight bevel; and the smaller artist text "PZF" centered beneath it near the bottom in spaced-out italic letters. Keep the composition symmetrical, glossy, high contrast, and photo-realistic, with no extra logos, borders, stickers, or additional text.
entries.description: A photorealistic synthwave nightclub album cover featuring two anonymous leather-clad figures, a disco ball, fog, and glowing title typography.

entries.title: French Indie Album Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a square album cover for a melancholic indie/alternative single. Canvas: 1:1 ratio, softly textured paper background fading from warm cream on the left to pale powder blue on the right, with subtle film grain and a vintage editorial finish. Composition: place a blurred, painterly portrait of a person on the right two-thirds of the cover, cropped from mid-torso upward, head tilted back and turned slightly upward, with short dark messy hair forming a soft silhouette. The face is intentionally obscured by a rectangular frosted blur block in the upper-right area, semi-opaque with muted beige, gray, and brown tones. Clothing: a richly textured mustard-gold faux-fur coat or shawl sweeping dramatically from the lower-left corner across the body toward the right, with motion blur and warm amber shadows; underneath, a dark patterned high-neck garment in burgundy, green, and charcoal. Typography: on the left side, set exactly 2 text elements. Text element 1 is the title Encore Une Fois, stacked across three lines, very large, elegant high-contrast serif typeface, thin strokes, dark charcoal gray, aligned left, occupying the upper-left quadrant. Text element 2 is the artist name PZF, small uppercase serif letters with wide tracking, placed below the title near the left-center. Visual style: romantic, cinematic, slightly surreal, soft-focus photographic painting, warm ochre and burnt orange contrasted with cool blue, nostalgic French art-pop mood. Constraints: keep the design readable at thumbnail size, preserve generous negative space around the typography, no extra logos, no barcode, no additional text.

entries.title: Odesa Postmodernism Character Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical editorial character poster inspired by Odesa postmodernism, combining a fashion portrait with a bold symbolic inner-world mural.

Canvas: Tall vertical poster, 2:3 aspect ratio, full-bleed saturated red background and glossy red floor with subtle reflections. High-contrast studio lighting, sharp foreground subject, slightly softer oversized graphic shadow mural behind them.

Layout: Place the figure full-body in the lower left third, standing casually with hands in coat pockets, leaning slightly back. Put large typography in the upper left: a small black uppercase line reading "| OLEKSANDR ROITBURD" above two large stacked white uppercase words reading "POSTMODERNISM" and "ODESA". Fill the right two-thirds with a monumental black silhouette mural shaped like a crowned human profile facing right, extending from upper right to near the floor.

Subject details: The foreground person is an older, slim, stylish man with short white hair and a deliberately anonymized face covered by a centered soft square blur. He wears a long black coat, black blazer, black T-shirt with one large red square on the chest, loose cropped dark trousers with rolled cuffs, black-and-white striped socks, and polished red lace-up shoes. Keep the pose relaxed and theatrical.

Symbolic mural: Use exactly 11 visible black-and-red motifs integrated inside or around the large profile silhouette: 1 crown on the head, 1 single eye inside the head, 1 white dove-like bird near the mouth, 1 small church or Odesa architectural facade, 1 diagonal staircase, 1 sailboat on waves, 1 classical column, 1 fish, 1 human figure with raised arms, 1 stylized tree, and 1 horse with a rider. The mural should feel like a cut-paper shadow theater projection, graphic and postmodern.

Visual style: Dramatic museum-poster photography mixed with flat symbolic illustration; intense red, black, and white palette with only the subject's skin, gray-white hair, and red shoes adding realism. Use crisp typography, clean negative space, theatrical shadows, glossy floor reflections, and a sophisticated contemporary art-poster mood.

Constraints: Preserve the exact three-line title placement and the 11 counted symbolic motifs. Do not add extra logos, captions, borders, or watermarks.

entries.title: Sonia Delaunay Orphism Fashion Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical fashion-art poster portraying Sonia Delaunay and the movement Orphism as a symbolic AI portrait, blending haute couture photography with modernist abstract geometry.

Canvas: Tall portrait poster, 9:16 aspect ratio, vivid saturated red background and red glossy floor with subtle reflection. The composition places the human figure in the lower-left third and a huge abstract projected silhouette occupying the right two-thirds.

Typography: In the upper-left corner, use exactly 3 visible text elements: 1) large thin white uppercase "SONIA" on the first line and "DELAUNAY" on the second line, 2) very large bold condensed white uppercase "ORPHISM" beneath it, 3) small white uppercase "SONIA DELAUNAY" below a thin horizontal rule. Keep the typography clean, Swiss/poster-like, aligned left.

Subject details: A full-body elegant woman stands facing forward with a poised fashion-editorial posture, one hand near her chin and the other hand tucked into a pocket. Her face is intentionally simplified and softly obscured, like a smooth rectangular blur, while her short dark 1920s-style bob haircut remains visible. She wears exactly 6 visible fashion elements: a long sleeveless geometric color-block dress, black long-sleeve underlayer, cream-colored right sleeve panel, long black bead necklace, black Mary Jane heels, and a black side skirt or coat panel. The dress features Sonia Delaunay-inspired Orphic color blocks: red, yellow, green, blue, cream, orange, black, purple, and pink, with circular arcs, semi-circles, triangles, and curved panels.

Projected inner world: Behind and to the right of the figure, create one monumental dark red translucent shadow silhouette suggesting a profile bust or inner psyche. Within this projection include exactly 9 major abstract geometric components: 1 large head profile silhouette facing left, 2 concentric target circles near the head, 1 large concentric circle around the torso, 1 dark central circle inside it, 1 tall triangular wedge descending through the body, 1 diagonal ribbon sweeping from lower left to middle right, 1 small dark circle near the lower torso, and 1 small dark circle near the bottom right. Use layered transparent crimson, burgundy, black-red, and orange-red tones so the shapes look like projected light and shadow.

Visual style: High-fashion editorial lighting, theatrical red studio set, strong contrast, glossy floor reflection, modern poster design, crisp typography, cinematic shadows, clean digital image quality. The mood should feel like a symbolic portrait of an artist's inner world expressed through Orphist abstraction.

Constraints: Do not add extra people, logos, watermarks, captions, or additional text beyond the 3 specified text elements. Keep the palette dominated by red with white typography and multicolor geometric clothing. Preserve the vertical poster layout and the large abstract shadow projection.
entries.description: A vertical art-fashion poster showing Sonia Delaunay-inspired Orphist geometry as a projected inner world behind an elegant figure.

entries.title: Crowd-Built Anime Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a photorealistic conceptual crowd portrait on a square canvas: an aerial/isometric view of a giant anime-inspired male bust formed entirely from thousands of tiny standing people. The character is shown from the shoulders up in three-quarter side profile facing right, with exaggerated tall spiky white hair, a visible left ear, pale skin tones suggested by lighter-clothed crowds, and a massive high black coat collar and dark jacket suggested by densely packed black-clothed crowds. The whole portrait is built from countless individual human figures arranged like pointillist pixels, with the hair spikes and coat edges sharply readable from above. Place the formation on a vast matte off-white floor with empty negative space around it, scattered with a small number of lone pedestrians walking away from the crowd and casting long thin shadows. Add a large opaque warm-gray square censor block centered over the face area, covering most facial features from forehead to chin while leaving the hair, ear, collar, shoulders, and surrounding people visible. Use cinematic minimalist lighting, soft high-angle sunlight, realistic tiny shadows, ultra-detailed installation-art texture, muted beige, white, black, and charcoal palette, no text, no logos, no border. The portrait subject may be customized as spiky-haired anime male with high collar, with white, black, warm off-white, and warm gray.

entries.title: Stylish Japanese Summer Fan Illustration
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a stylish contemporary Japanese summer illustration on a clean white vertical canvas, centered on one traditional round uchiwa fan with a bamboo handle. The fan face should be teal and deep blue with layered translucent graphic shapes, combining ukiyo-e-inspired motifs and modern poster design. Show exactly 6 main decorative motif groups on and around the fan: 1) a white flowing river or wave ribbon sweeping from the lower left across the fan, 2) green bamboo leaves clustered across the upper left edge, 3) morning glory flowers on the right side with one large pink bloom, one large navy bloom, and several small dark blue blossoms, 4) round green leaves near the flowers and lower left, 5) a partial pale parasol-like circular arc with cream and coral bands behind the upper right of the fan, and 6) abstract halftone dots, splatter marks, and diagonal geometric strokes in turquoise, lime green, coral pink, and navy around the fan. Render the fan ribs and frame as realistic pale bamboo, with many thin spokes radiating from the base, a small turquoise binding at the handle joint, and a natural bamboo handle extending downward. Use a crisp mixed-media look: flat vector illustration blended with subtle paper texture, screen-print halftones, translucent overlays, fine white vertical fan fold lines, and slight shadows to give the fan depth. Keep the composition airy and elegant with generous white space. Add a small date and artist signature in the bottom right reading May 15, 2026 and Oyagi. Use a refined fashionable illustration mood inspired by Japanese summer, with dominant colors teal, indigo, lime green, white, coral pink. No extra text, no watermark, no border.
entries.description: A clean fashionable illustration prompt for creating a modern Japanese uchiwa fan artwork with bamboo, waves, flowers, and abstract graphic accents.

entries.searchText: stylish japanese summer fan illustration a clean fashionable illustration prompt for creating a modern japanese uchiwa fan artwork with bamboo, waves, flowers, and abstract graphic accents. create a stylish contemporary japanese summer illustration on a clean white vertical canvas, centered on one traditional round uchiwa fan with a bamboo handle. the fan face should be teal and deep blue with layered translucent graphic shapes, combining ukiyo-e-inspired motifs and modern poster design. show exactly 6 main decorative motif groups on and around the fan: 1) a white flowing river or wave ribbon sweeping from the lower left across the fan, 2) green bamboo leaves clustered across the upper left edge, 3) morning glory flowers on the right side with one large pink bloom, one large navy bloom, and several small dark blue blossoms, 4) round green leaves near the flowers and lower left, 5) a partial pale parasol-like circular arc with cream and coral bands behind the upper right of the fan, and 6) abstract halftone dots, splatter marks, and diagonal geometric strokes in turquoise, lime green, coral pink, and navy around the fan. render the fan ribs and frame as realistic pale bamboo, with many thin spokes radiating from the base, a small turquoise binding at the handle joint, and a natural bamboo handle extending downward. use a crisp mixed-media look: flat vector illustration blended with subtle paper texture, screen-print halftones, translucent overlays, fine white vertical fan fold lines, and slight shadows to give the fan depth. keep the composition airy and elegant with generous white space. add a small date and artist signature in the bottom right reading may 15, 2026 and oyagi. use a refined fashionable illustration mood inspired by japanese summer, with dominant colors teal, indigo, lime green, white, coral pink. no extra text, no watermark, no border. poster / flyer fashion realistic

entries.title: Cute Retro Tokyo Cartoon Cityscape
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cute retro cartoon cityscape of Tokyo, in a naive children's picture-book style with ultra-simplified architecture, chunky geometric shapes, exaggerated proportions, and bold thick black outlines. Use a vertical poster composition with a bright cyan-blue halftone sky and a worn beige paper border. Make Tokyo Tower the clear central focus: a tall red-and-white lattice tower with a smiling kawaii face on its observation deck, rosy cheeks, simple black eyes, and a small open mouth. At the upper left, add large tilted comic lettering reading TOKYO in red-orange with black outline, and beneath it place the Japanese text 「東京」 in chunky yellow letters with black outline. Include exactly 2 large cream-colored rounded clouds, one on the left and one on the right. Surround the tower with a simplified skyline of colorful rectangular buildings in blues, pinks, yellows, and oranges. Include exactly 5 visible signboards: a red vertical sign reading 「カラオケ」, a pink vertical sign reading 「原宿」, a yellow horizontal sign reading "SHIBUYA", a red vertical sign reading 「秋葉原」, and one billboard showing a pink-haired cute character portrait. Add one additional billboard with a cute white cat face next to the SHIBUYA sign. In the foreground, show a row of rounded green trees, a blue river or canal with small white ripples, and a cream-and-green cartoon train entering from the lower right on curved tracks, also with a smiling kawaii face and rosy cheeks. Apply a vintage comic-book print texture with visible halftone dots, slightly rough ink edges, saturated colors, playful proportions, and no photorealism.
entries.description: A playful vintage comic-style Tokyo poster featuring Tokyo Tower, kawaii faces, city signs, clouds, trees, water, and a cartoon train.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cute retro cartoon postcard cityscape of Tokyo, with the city's most iconic landmark as the clear central focus: a kawaii Tokyo Tower in the middle, red and white lattice structure, simplified chunky geometry, thick black outlines, a smiling face with rosy cheeks on the observation deck, and exaggerated children's picture-book proportions. Use a vertical 2:3 postcard composition with a turquoise-blue sky, cream paper border, visible vintage print texture, halftone dots, slight ink misregistration, and bold pop-art colors. At the top left, add large tilted red block letters spelling TOKYO with black outline, and below it large yellow Japanese characters 東京. Surround the tower with an ultra-simplified skyline of colorful rectangular buildings in blues, pinks, oranges, and yellows. entries.title: Childlike Abstract Drip Painting
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create an abstract expressionist painting that looks like a chaotic childlike drip painting on a wide horizontal canvas, inspired by mid-century action painting. Use a dense all-over composition with no central subject: layered splatters, scribbles, loops, tangled lines, and drips covering the entire surface. The background should be mottled off-white, pale gray, beige, and dusty blue with scraped, rough texture. Add energetic paint marks in exactly five dominant color groups: black/navy heavy splashes and vertical streaks, white web-like drips, bright orange looping strokes, golden yellow splatters and trails, and small muted red accents. Make the brushwork feel spontaneous, messy, and physical, with thick impasto-like ridges, thrown paint, scratchy crayon-like lines, and overlapping transparent layers. Include faint childlike doodle energy without recognizable figures, objects, words, or readable signature. The image should be a photographed painting, slightly grainy, high detail, edge-to-edge paint coverage, museum-art texture, landscape aspect ratio, expressive and chaotic but visually balanced.
entries.description: Generates a wide chaotic abstract expressionist canvas with layered splatters, loops, drips, and rough childlike painterly texture.

entries.title: Pop Art Maneki-Neko Explosion
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a vibrant vertical poster illustration of a swarm of 42 Japanese maneki-neko lucky cat statues floating and tumbling through a white space, as if exploding outward from the center for a good-luck blessing. The main subject is one oversized white ceramic lucky cat in the foreground, centered slightly low, smiling with yellow-black eyes, red inner ears, pink nose, black whisker marks, a raised left paw, a red collar with gold studs and a gold bell, and a large oval gold coin on its chest with bold black Japanese-style characters. Surround it with exactly 41 smaller matching lucky cats at different scales and rotations: 6 large supporting cats near the edges, 11 medium cats in the midground, and 24 tiny distant cats scattered through the background. All cats should share the same glossy white ceramic body, red collars, gold bells, gold coin plaques, yellow eyes, red ears, and black calligraphic markings, but vary their pose between raised left paw, raised right paw, frontal sitting pose, side view, upside-down tumbling pose, and partial cropped close-up paws or bodies. Use a dramatic fisheye wide-angle perspective with the central cat closest to the viewer and many cats receding into depth.

Visual style: hyper-detailed 3D ceramic pop-art rendering with fine engraved contour-line patterns wrapping over the cats, subtle iridescent rainbow chromatic aberration, glossy highlights, and crisp high-contrast lighting. Add energetic Japanese graphic-design elements behind and between the cats: hot pink diagonal stripes, yellow arcs, black line bursts, cyan/magenta halftone dots, radial speed lines, geometric rectangles, and scattered neon print textures on a clean white background. The composition should feel joyful, chaotic, lucky, celebratory, and maximalist, like a futuristic maneki-neko blessing poster.

Canvas: vertical 2:3 poster, full bleed, high resolution, dense but readable composition. Place a small handwritten signature/date mark in the bottom-right corner reading May 14, 2026 and Oyagi. Use no other English text besides the date/signature; Japanese-style characters may appear only as decorative black glyphs on the gold coins. Keep the foreground cat sharp, with smaller cats and background patterns layered behind it, and avoid photorealistic fur, humans, scenery, borders, or watermarks.
entries.description: A vertical maximalist poster filled with floating ceramic Japanese lucky cats and neon graphic bursts for a playful good-luck visual.

entries.title: Pen and Watercolor Photo Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the sole source image, transform the scene into a loose pen-and-watercolor illustration on white textured paper. Preserve the original pose, framing, suit, tie, and American flag placement, including the face-obscuring rectangle. Remove the photographic stage/background and replace it with plain off-white paper. Render the subject with expressive black ink sketch lines, rough crosshatching, uneven hand-drawn contours, visible watercolor washes, soft bleeding pigments, muted navy/red tones, and lightly unfinished edges. Keep the composition close to the original medium shot and do not add any new objects, text, or background details.

entries.title: Censored Fukusuke Doll Halftone Art
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a high-resolution vertical art print on a clean white background, centered on a glossy traditional Japanese Fukusuke lucky doll in a formal kneeling bow pose with both hands placed on the floor in front. The doll wears an ornate dark navy and black kimono with vivid embroidered floral and phoenix-like motifs, bright royal-blue dotted collar panels, red and white trim, green inner lining, and small white plum-blossom family crests on both sleeves. The head has a shaved turquoise-blue crown with black side hair and a small black topknot, but the face is deliberately hidden by one large opaque rectangular censor block filled with a soft vertical gradient from pale blue at the top through beige to muted mauve at the bottom. Behind the figure, add a dramatic symmetrical optical halftone aura made of dense black dotted contour waves, with subtle cyan, magenta, yellow, and green chromatic offset glitches tracing the silhouette and radiating outward like a digital vibration field. Use hyper-detailed glossy ceramic/plastic texture, sharp studio lighting, saturated colors, crisp edges, and a surreal contemporary AI-art aesthetic. Include exactly one main doll, one censor rectangle, two visible hands, two visible ears, two sleeve crests, and one small bottom-right artist signature area with the date May 14, 2026 above a loose cursive signature Oyagi. The main subject should resemble a traditional Japanese Fukusuke lucky doll; keep the face completely obscured by the rectangle, with no readable facial features visible.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical poster-style AI artwork on a clean white background featuring a highly detailed Shigaraki ware tanuki ceramic statue centered full-body, photographed/illustrated like a glossy speckled pottery object with beige belly, dark brown limbs, mottled glaze, rounded belly, small navel, large straw hat, sake bottle in one paw, and a tokkuri flask or ledger-like accessory in the other. The tanuki's face is deliberately obscured by a perfectly centered opaque square censor block in warm taupe brown, covering the upper torso and face area while leaving the hat rim visible behind it. Surround the statue with energetic abstract graphic-design elements: concentric halftone circles, black-and-white diagonal stripes, dotted gradients, thin radial sunburst lines behind the hat, hot pink and orange blocks, yellow arcs, black rings, magenta splatter, small crosses, grid textures, and subtle glitch-like cyan/magenta color offsets around the statue edges. Use a high-contrast mixed-media style combining realistic ceramic texture with modern pop-art poster graphics, crisp studio lighting, sharp details, and a balanced symmetrical composition. Add a small handwritten signature and date in the bottom right reading May 14, 2026 and Ogygia. Keep the background mostly white, no extra characters, no readable text beyond the date/signature and the bottle markings, and emphasize the unique quality of a Shigaraki ware tanuki statue.

entries.title: Neon Cyberpunk Future Hoodie Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical cyberpunk neon portrait of a mysterious young woman standing centered in a dark futuristic city scene, head slightly bowed, hands tucked into the front pocket of an oversized dark purple hoodie. Her face is intentionally hidden by a centered opaque muted-purple square censor block, while dark messy hair and wispy curls are visible around it. The hoodie has a bright glowing handwritten logo reading Future across the chest in electric magenta-purple. Behind her, fill most of the background with massive rough brushstroke typography reading FUTURE, painted in vivid neon violet with splattered edges and intense glow. Use a smoky black and purple night atmosphere with drifting mist, sparks, light particles, distant blurred city lights, and a high-contrast ultraviolet rim light around the figure. Add exactly 6 translucent sci-fi HUD interface panels around the edges: 1 top-left panel labeled "SYSTEM_OVERVIEW" with a 100% processing bar, 1 top-right panel labeled "CYBER_ID_07" and "LOADING FUTURE," 1 mid-right vertical stacked tech module panel, 1 bottom-left panel labeled "NEON CITY" with small Japanese text and an energy level bar, 1 lower-left tiny coordinates/access-granted panel, and 1 bottom-right panel labeled "FUTURE IS NOW" with status lines and a small globe diagram. Visual style: cinematic cyberpunk poster, photorealistic figure with stylized neon graphics, deep blacks, saturated purple and magenta lighting, glowing haze, sharp hoodie details, dramatic backlight, no extra characters, no watermark.

entries.title: Portugal World Cup Squad Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create an official cinematic national football team squad poster for Portugal and its FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign, using a dramatic heroic sports-poster style.

Canvas: Vertical poster, 2:3 aspect ratio, dark high-contrast stadium atmosphere, smoky vignette edges, glowing floodlights, sparks, and a large waving national flag filling the background. Use Portugal's green-and-red flag colors with a large coat-of-arms shield behind the players. Add the Portugal federation crest at the top left and a gold FIFA World Cup trophy emblem with the text "FIFA WORLD CUP 2026" at the top right.

Layout: Arrange exactly 11 starting players in a commanding pyramid formation, all facing forward with serious expressions and powerful upright poses. The captain is elevated at the top center with a blazing backlight halo. The goalkeeper is front-center holding a football with both gloved hands. Build the squad in four visible tiers: 1 top captain, 3 upper attacking/midfield players, 5 middle/back-line players, and 2 front players flanking the goalkeeper, with the goalkeeper centered in front.

Player count and visible kit labels: Include exactly 11 players wearing Portugal red home shirts except the goalkeeper in a dark black patterned keeper kit. Visible shirt numbers and labels should be: 7 RONALDO at the top center with captain armband; 10 BERNARDO upper left; 8 B. FERNANDES upper center; 15 JOÃO NEVES upper right; 19 N. MENDES middle far left; 14 INÁCIO middle left; 3 RÚBEN DIAS middle right; 20 JOÃO CANCELO middle far right; 23 VITINHA front left; 1 DIOGO COSTA front-center goalkeeper; 17 R. LEÃO front right. Use gold numbering and small white/gold name text beneath each number. Faces may be realistic but keep them cleanly visible and not distorted.

Uniform details: Red Puma-style Portugal kit with green-and-gold collar trim, Portugal crest on the chest, Puma-style cat logo, subtle fabric texture, athletic fit, shorts mostly cropped out. Goalkeeper wears black long-sleeve jersey with subtle diagonal pattern, Portugal crest, number 1, padded gloves, and holds a modern patterned match ball.

Text content: Large distressed cream headline across the lower third: "ONE NATION. ONE DREAM.". Under it, smaller red tracking-spaced subtitle: "ROAD TO FIFA WORLD CUP 2026". Below that in small white spaced letters: "UNITED STATES · CANADA · MEXICO". Bottom center sponsor strip with a gold Puma-style logo, Portugal crest, and the text "PORTUGAL FPF".

Visual style: Hyper-realistic composite photography, epic sports marketing poster, cinematic orange rim light behind the captain, deep shadows, stadium crowd bokeh, smoke, embers, dramatic contrast, sharp jersey details, premium official-tournament feel.

entries.title: Cyberpunk Neuromancer Fashion Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical cyberpunk fashion editorial poster for NEUROMANCER, with a full-body male model posed in front of enormous glowing letterforms spelling the title behind him.

Canvas: Portrait 4:5 poster, glossy cinematic lighting, high resolution, dark blue, black, white, and electric cyan palette. Low camera angle looking upward, making the figure heroic and towering.

Main subject: One young adult male cyberpunk model standing center, slightly leaning back with one hand in his pocket. His face is intentionally obscured by a soft square blur/mosaic censor block. He has messy dark hair and wears a full black futuristic outfit: 6 visible outfit pieces total - shiny cropped leather jacket with high collar, black layered shirt, belted utility pants with zipper pockets and straps, black belt with metal buckle, tall lace-up combat boots, and small hanging strap/accessory details. Wet, reflective, high-fashion material textures.

Background and layout: Split background with a pale cracked concrete wall on the left and a deep smoky blue-black digital void on the right. Behind the model, use huge vertical neon-outline typography, partially hidden by the figure, forming the word from CASE; the letters are white on the left and electric blue on the right, glowing strongly with bloom. Add blue fog at floor level and a wet reflective floor mirroring the boots and neon.

Poster text: At the bottom center, place wide-spaced glowing title text: NEUROMANCER. Add thin horizontal rule lines and tiny sci-fi footer captions. Include exactly 5 bottom footer text groups: left tiny code "NM-024 DATA COLLECTION", center-left "//", center "SPRING / SUMMER 2025 COLLECTION", center-right "SYSTEM COLLAPSE USER AWAKENS", and far-right "NEUROMANCER © ALL RIGHTS RESERVED".

Micro interface details: Add exactly 14 small HUD text/graphic elements around the margins: 1 small crosshair at top left, 1 block reading "DATA RUNNER // USER ID: CASE_024", 1 coordinate block, 1 location block reading "SEOUL / NEW HONGDAE / DISTRICT", 1 vertical dash scale, 1 block reading "4TH CORPORATE WAR SURVIVOR", 1 circular schematic line graphic, 1 system-code block reading "SYS-8X 87 A2", 1 globe icon, 1 crosshair at top right, 1 city-list block reading "NEO-TOKYO / SEOUL / CHIBA CITY / NEW YORK / LONDON", 1 vertical Asian-character label with "//0024", 1 small square outline icon, and 1 block reading "YOUTH / ISOLATION / INTERFACE / REALITY / GLITCH". Keep all micro text tiny and decorative, like a futuristic data dossier.

Style: Photorealistic editorial fashion photography mixed with graphic design, dystopian cyberpunk book-cover aesthetic, neon rim light, volumetric haze, scratched concrete, subtle data-chart lines, high contrast, sharp boot detail, dramatic blue glow. Avoid extra people, avoid readable brand logos, avoid changing the censored face effect.

entries.title: Modern Geometric Polygon Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Please create a modern geometric polygon style portrait art poster based on the uploaded photo. Strictly preserve the identity of the person, including face shape, facial feature relationships, hairstyle silhouette, expression, and overall temperament, ensuring the final image is clearly identifiable as the same person or public figure. The overall style leans towards "contemporary geometric portrait + fashion magazine illustration + gallery art poster." The face consists of simplified polygon facets, geometric color blocks, and clear outlines, maintaining a degree of abstraction while keeping person recognition. Features can be moderately simplified, such as eyes, nose, and mouth being generalized graphically without losing personal expression. Hair can be treated with a geometric sense of mass and polygonal silhouettes, with facial structure emphasizing faceted planes and abstract polygon composition. The overall image uses flat color blocks, clean vector shapes, clear outlines, white space, and poster-level composition. Slight oil pastel grains, screen printing noise, handwritten graffiti traces, and pigment textures are allowed to make it look like a high-end art print poster. Recommended color palettes should be limited but distinct, using black, charcoal grey, cream white, cobalt blue, brick red, mustard yellow, sage green, coral pink, warm beige, etc. The background can be deep matte black, dark charcoal, or premium solid colors to enhance the gallery poster and fashion cover feel. The composition should resemble high-end art posters or fashion covers, with the subject as the focus, leaving room for title and subtitle layout, feeling modern, artistic, and fashionable. Avoid: realistic rendering, 3D effects, anime style, cheap cartoon feel, excessive cubism, direct Picasso imitation, complex cluttered backgrounds, or overly distorted features.

entries.title: Japanese Yoga and Drinks Event Flyer
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a square illustrated Japanese event flyer for ヨガとドリンクの夕べ, promoting an outdoor yoga-and-drinks evening for desk workers.

Canvas: 1:1 square flyer, soft watercolor illustration, calm natural palette, hand-painted texture, gentle ink outlines, inviting wellness-event atmosphere.

Layout: Use three horizontal zones: a translucent pale green title banner across the top, a large central garden illustration, and a cream information panel along the bottom. Keep all typography bold, clean, white or dark charcoal, with subtle drop shadows on the headline for readability.

Top text: Large Japanese headline: ヨガとドリンクの夕べ. Beneath it, smaller Japanese subtitle: デスクワークの疲れをヨガで癒す.

Central illustration: A peaceful Japanese-style park beside a pond, with leafy trees, shrubs, stepping-stone path, a stone lantern on the right, a simple wooden bench, rocks, grass, and a few scattered red leaves. Show exactly 3 yoga participants on mats: 1 seated woman in the foreground wearing a teal ribbed long-sleeve top and dark pants, sitting cross-legged with relaxed hands on knees; 1 woman on the left wearing a white sleeveless top and loose white pants, seated cross-legged and stretching one arm behind her head; 1 man in the rear wearing a light gray T-shirt and navy shorts, barefoot on a mat, bending forward with hands near knees. Add exactly 1 wooden drink tray on the grass to the right of the foreground mat, containing exactly 3 drink items: 2 stemmed glasses filled with amber/orange drinks and 1 tall bottle with a warm-colored label.

Bottom information panel: Cream rectangle with three bold Japanese lines, aligned left: 日付・時間: 6/20(土)15:00-20:00, 場所: 新宿御苑, and 主催: 小規模IT事業者連盟.

Constraints: Preserve the Japanese text exactly as written in the parameter defaults, make the flyer look like a finished event poster rather than a photo, avoid logos or watermarks, keep the faces simple and unobtrusive, and do not add extra people, extra drinks, or extra text.

entries.title: Cute Retro Chengdu Cartoon Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cute retro cartoon travel-poster cityscape of Chengdu, in a naive children's picture-book style with ultra-simplified chunky architecture, exaggerated proportions, bold thick black outlines, bright flat colors, halftone comic-paper texture, slight ink misregistration, and a sunny turquoise-blue sky. Use a vertical 3:4 poster composition. At the top, place huge arched yellow bubble letters reading "CHENGDU" with black shadow, and beneath it red Chinese characters "成都" flanked by two red dots. Make the clear central focus a stylized panda-head building inspired by Chengdu panda landmarks: a large geometric white-and-black panda face structure at the bottom center with a blue glass entrance, stairs, shrubs, and flowers, with a tall slim TV tower rising directly behind it. Include exactly 3 panda motifs: the giant panda-head building, a small cheerful waving panda mascot in the lower left foreground beside a sign, and a red circular passport-stamp graphic in the upper right that says "WELCOME TO CHENGDU" with a panda face. Include exactly 5 puffy cream clouds with peach shading: one large cloud on the upper left, one large cloud on the upper right, one partial cloud entering from the lower left edge, one small cloud near the left-middle skyline, and one small cloud near the right-middle sky. Build a simplified skyline along the bottom with colorful rectangular buildings in teal, yellow, pink, orange, and blue, plus green treetops. Add a traditional Chinese pavilion on the lower left with green tiled roofs, red lanterns, and a small sign with Chinese-style characters; add a yellow vertical building sign on the right reading "太古里"; add a cream arched bridge over bright blue water on the lower right. In the lower left foreground, place a sign reading "I ♥ CHENGDU" next to the waving panda. Keep all forms rounded, toy-like, and geometric, with minimal detail, thick outlines, warm cheerful colors, vintage postcard energy, and no photorealism.
entries.description: Generates a playful vintage-style cartoon city poster of Chengdu with pandas, skyline landmarks, bold lettering, and childlike geometric illustration.

entries.title: Starlit Whale Fantasy Seaside Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Use the uploaded portrait as the only reference for the person's facial identity and hairstyle. Preserve the same face shape, facial features, skin tone, eyes, nose, lips, and hairstyle accurately. Do not copy the original clothes, pose, background, or lighting from the uploaded portrait.

Create a dreamy vertical fantasy portrait at the seaside during blue-hour twilight. A young woman sits sideways on dark coastal rocks beside the ocean, looking softly back toward the camera with a calm, mysterious expression. She has very long flowing dark hair cascading over the rocks and into the shallow water.

She wears an elegant glowing translucent white-gold gown made of soft tulle and sheer fabric. The dress spreads widely across the rocks and water like a luminous veil, filled with tiny golden starlight particles, soft magical sparkles, and gentle glowing dust. The fabric should look delicate, airy, semi-transparent, and cinematic.

In the night sky above the ocean, create a huge whale-shaped constellation made of thousands of glowing stars and light particles, floating gracefully over the sea. The whale should feel magical, ethereal, and majestic, with soft blue-white and golden light. The ocean reflects the glowing dress and the star whale, with realistic waves, dark rocks, and a peaceful horizon.

Style: ultra-realistic fantasy photography, cinematic lighting, soft blue twilight atmosphere, dreamy ocean background, magical realism, high-end visual poster look, delicate skin texture, natural face, realistic anatomy, elegant composition, 9:16 vertical, high detail, soft glow, shallow depth of field, no watermark, no text, no logo.

Negative Prompt:

watermark, logo, text, AI generated label, signature, low quality, blurry, overexposed face, plastic skin, fake face, distorted face, wrong identity, different hairstyle, deformed hands, extra fingers, extra limbs, bad anatomy, duplicate person, messy hair, harsh shadows, unnatural pose, cheap fantasy look, cartoon style, anime style, CGI look, over-saturated colors, broken dress, messy fabric, distorted whale, unrealistic ocean, noise, artifacts

entries.title: Sound Connects Humanity Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Goal: Create a highly detailed vertical music-community poster about sound crossing eras, borders, gender, age, analog media, and digital media, with a luminous fantasy-realism collage of humanity connected by music.

Canvas: Vertical 2:3 poster, cinematic ultra-detailed digital painting, warm sunset golds blended with neon blues, purples, and pinks. No margins; fill the entire canvas with layered scenes and glowing musical motion.

Central composition: Place a large radiant white-gold circular burst in the exact center, like a sun made of sound waves and stardust. Over it, set the main Japanese headline 音で繋がれ in large dark navy calligraphic serif characters. Beneath it, place three centered smaller Japanese lines: 時代も国境も性別も年齢も, アナログもデジタルも, and 「音」は垣根を超えて届く. Keep the text crisp and readable against the glowing center.

Main visual motif: A huge spiral ribbon of light and music notation wraps around the poster from lower left to center, then across the middle and upper right, then back through the bottom. The ribbon contains glowing staff lines, eighth notes, treble-like music symbols, particles, waveform sparks, small app-like music icons, and digital pixels. It should feel like sound physically connecting every scene.

Layout: Build exactly 7 major connected scene zones around the central headline:
1. Upper left prehistoric / tribal campfire music: people dancing, drumming, singing around a fire under a starry sky.
2. Upper center ancient classical world: ruins resembling Greek or Roman columns, musicians with cello, flute, hand drums, and traditional string instruments under a golden sunset.
3. Upper right East Asian historical music scene: Japanese temple roofs, pagoda, cherry blossoms, shamisen players, kimono-like clothing, and lantern glow.
4. Middle left ancient desert / world heritage scene: pyramids in the background, musicians with guitar-like and percussion instruments, travelers and dancers.
5. Middle center modern global city concert: skyline, high-rises, diverse band members, singers, guitarists, saxophone, brass, and crowd energy.
6. Middle right futuristic digital DJ / electronic music scene: DJ at a glowing mixer, laptop-like screens, neon equalizers, holographic icons, synthesizer lights, and cyberpunk purple-blue ambience.
7. Bottom global community gathering: children, adults, elders, people of different cultures and abilities sitting and standing in a circle, including a wheelchair user, acoustic guitars, headphones, a laptop music workstation, city lights, temples, domes, and a final row of silhouettes holding hands along the horizon.

People and instruments: Show a large diverse ensemble of roughly 70 visible people total across the poster, mixing ages from children to elders, different skin tones, body types, genders, historical costumes, modern streetwear, traditional clothing, and futuristic outfits. Include exactly 16 clearly featured instrument or music-making categories: hand drums, frame drums, flute, cello, shamisen, lute-like instrument, acoustic guitar, electric guitar, bass guitar, saxophone, trumpet, violin, microphone singing, DJ controller, laptop digital audio workstation, and headphones. Some faces may be small or impressionistic, but the mood must be joyful, communal, and inclusive.

Style: Epic fantasy realism meets Japanese festival poster and generative-AI music community art. Extremely dense, ornate, and luminous; painterly yet sharp; dramatic sky gradients; sparkling particles; cinematic rim light; rich historical detail; neon digital overlays; sweeping depth from foreground to distant skyline. Use vibrant contrast between ancient firelight, sunset gold, and futuristic cyan-magenta glow.

Constraints: Do not leave empty space except for the central text glow. Keep all typography in Japanese exactly as specified. Avoid logos, watermarks, brand names, random extra text, malformed music notation dominating the headline, or horror/dark dystopian mood. The final image should communicate: sound connects everyone beyond time, nations, gender, age, analog, and digital.
entries.description: A dense cinematic Japanese music poster showing people across eras and cultures connected by glowing sound waves and music notation.

entries.title: Trash Polka Urban Digital Painting
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A high-detail digital painting of a young woman wearing large, vibrant red over-ear headphones, looking directly at the viewer with a piercing gaze. The art style is a fusion of stylized realism and urban abstract expressionism. Her hair is messy, light brown/blonde with loose strands and sharp, geometric shards integrated into the locks. The composition features heavy ink splatters, paint drips, and chaotic red and black brushstrokes reminiscent of 'trash polka' art. The background is a clean, minimalist off-white, making the bold red accents and fine linework pop. High contrast, sharp focus on the eyes, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, trendy street art aesthetic. Key Technical Elements to Capture Color Palette: Dominated by Red, Black, and White. This high-contrast triad is essential for that aggressive, modern look. Artistic Influence: Mentioning "Trash Polka" or "Ink Drip Art" helps the AI understand the messy, splatter-heavy background and the "shattered" look of the hair. Character Features: Use terms like "piercing gaze" and "stylized realism" to ensure the face isn't too cartoonish or too photographic, hitting that perfect "concept art" middle ground. Graphic Elements: The image uses geometric shards and abstract textures overlapping the subject, which creates a sense of depth and digital glitchiness. Aspect ratio is 9:16

entries.title: Red Anime Silhouette Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a striking vertical poster illustration of a young schoolgirl in profile walking toward the right, rendered almost entirely as a black silhouette against a saturated blood-red background. The character has a short bob haircut blown backward by wind, a bowed head, a sailor-style school uniform with a large scarf or neckerchief trailing behind, a flared pleated skirt, long sleeves, dark stockings, and chunky shoes. Use sharp cream-white highlights along the hair, face edge, collar, folds, knees, and shoe tips to define the silhouette. Composition: full-body side view centered slightly right, one leg forward and one leg back, skirt and scarf dramatically swept by wind. Add two thin vertical gray border lines near the left and right edges, plus a black ground shadow and horizontal base line under the feet. Style: high-contrast anime noir, screenprint poster, limited palette of red, black, cream, and muted gray, rough ink edges, graphic negative space, dramatic backlighting, slightly vintage printed texture. No realistic background, no extra characters, no readable modern text, no watermark.

entries.title: Urban Street Art Vector Illustration
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A medium shot of a confident man with a fade haircut and a groomed beard, looking off to the side with his arms crossed. He is wearing an oversized streetwear t-shirt and cargo shorts. The subject features intricate sleeve tattoos and neck tattoos rendered in a stylized, dark ink aesthetic. Artistic Style & Texture: A high-contrast vector illustration with a gritty, urban street-art vibe. The character's skin and clothing have a "liquified" or topographic texture, resembling oil paint swirls or marbleized patterns. A prominent white paint drip effect runs down the center of his shirt, mimicking wet street art. Background & Color Palette: A split-tone background divided vertically: teal on the left and vibrant coral-orange on the right. A large, distressed, hand-painted orange circle sits behind the subject, resembling a rough halo or sun. The color palette is strictly limited to teal, coral-orange, white, and dark charcoal. Typography & Details: In the center of the chest, bold black distressed typography reads: "YULIAN STUDIO, VIBES." The lighting is flat but high-contrast, emphasizing the sharp edges of the vector layers. The overall mood is resilient, edgy, and modern.
entries.description: A high-contrast vector illustration with a gritty urban vibe, featuring a topographic "liquified" texture and custom typography.

entries.title: Expressionist Sketch Art Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
EXPRESSIONIST SKETCH PORTRAIT
Subject name: [Enter Name Here]
Create a 4:5 vertical portrait art poster in the style of Expressionist drawing, inspired by Egon Schiele. The medium should evoke rough white sketch paper texture, using a high contrast monochromatic palette of deep black ink, charcoal grey, and raw white with raw emotional energy and a bold, gallery-quality feel.
Based on the uploaded reference photo, faithfully preserve the subject's facial features, hairstyle, and personal aura in a half-body portrait composition. The rendering style is expressionist ink and charcoal portraiture, not photography, not cartoon, not anime. Facial details should be rendered with loose gestural lines, visible sketch marks, deliberate smudges, and intentionally unfinished areas that give the subject life and emotional intensity.
On the left side of the composition, write the subject's full name in large bold expressive brushstroke lettering as a vertical column, with raw ink energy, line variation, and deliberate imperfection that matches the gestural drawing style. The name strokes should feel like they are drawn with the same hand and the same urgency as the portrait itself.
Based on the subject's name, overall mood, and personal aura, automatically generate one elegant poetic English phrase of 8 to 12 words. The phrase should feel emotionally resonant and not modern colloquial, raw and honest and not overly obscure or kitschy, and deeply evocative of the subject's inner spirit and temperament. Only this one generated phrase should appear in the composition with no repetition and no full-page text coverage.
This poetic phrase must be rendered in bold expressive brushstroke script and organically compose the contours of the figure, with the gestural letterforms bleeding directly into and tracing the subject's head silhouette, hair flow, facial outline, neck, shoulder, and upper body lines. The viewer should feel as if the written words and the drawn figure share the same raw ink energy, as if the act of writing the phrase was the same act as drawing the person into existence.
Preserve large areas of raw open white space. In the lower left add loose gestural sketch marks suggesting ground or shadow. In the upper right add sparse expressive mark-making that suggests space and atmosphere without forming a clear image. These background elements must be raw and minimal and must never compete with the portrait.
Style keywords: Expressionist sketch portrait, Schiele-inspired drawing, gestural brushstroke lettering figure construction, high contrast ink and charcoal, figure outline formed by expressive letterforms, raw energy, emotional, bold, gallery-quality art poster.
Avoid: any Chinese characters or Asian script, cartoon or anime style, vivid colors, clean modern fonts, repetitive or excessive text, cluttered composition, overly refined digital art feel, commercial poster kitsch.
entries.description: An art poster prompt in the style of Egon Schiele, using monochromatic ink and charcoal textures to create an emotional, gestural portrait.

entries.title: Ink-Wash Cinematic Anime Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Ultra-detailed cinematic anime poster inspired by dark Japanese ink-wash illustration and high-end manga cover art. Massive central silhouette composition with a giant monstrous creature or legendary warrior emerging from smoke, ink splashes, ash, and cracked energy textures. Multiple anime characters standing heroically in the foreground with intense expressions, tactical outfits, weapons, and dynamic poses. Background filled with destroyed city ruins, fog, dust, ancient symbols, Japanese calligraphy, and dramatic brush-stroke textures.

Style blends watercolor ink painting, gritty manga realism, and cinematic poster composition. Use monochrome black, white, grey, and muted sepia tones with glowing cyan or gold energy accents. Strong vertical composition, huge layered character silhouettes, soft atmospheric smoke, splattered ink effects, textured paper aesthetic, cinematic lighting, high contrast shadows, glowing eyes, dramatic depth, emotional war atmosphere.

Typography inspired by Japanese anime key visuals with vertical kanji text, minimal serif title fonts, tiny emblem logos, and premium editorial spacing. Ultra-sharp focus, detailed armor textures, painterly brush effects, epic scale, emotional storytelling, movie-poster quality, 8K, masterpiece anime illustration, dark fantasy meets sci-fi aesthetic, highly immersive composition.

entries.prompt:
A seated man with his body grounded, but his head is floating slightly above his neck, drifting upward, connected by thin smoke-like strands.

Background: empty studio.

Typography:

Mood: dissociation, detachment.

entries.title: Japanese Graffiti Art Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a high-detail portrait poster in a bold Japanese graffiti-inspired art style, combining modern urban street aesthetics with expressive Japanese visual culture. The poster should feature dynamic graffiti typography, layered spray-paint textures, hand-drawn symbols, abstract paint splashes, neon brush strokes, urban sticker elements, Japanese calligraphy accents, and decorative ornaments that strongly reinforce the energetic atmosphere of the design. The overall composition should feel artistic, rebellious, fashionable, and visually striking, while still maintaining a premium editorial poster quality instead of looking messy or overdone. Humanity somehow turned vandalism into luxury wall art. Impressive species.

The subject must not replicate the exact pose or expression from the reference photo. Instead, create a completely new half body pose three quarter body and both hands in pocket that feels natural, confident, and full of life. The expression should appear emotionally expressive, charismatic, and engaging, avoiding stiff, awkward, flat, or emotionless body language. The pose should reflect the elegance and sophistication commonly seen in international fashion models, with stylish posture, natural movement, and subtle attitude that enhances the overall cinematic fashion aesthetic.

The outfit should feature contemporary stylish casual fashion with strong visual appeal. Avoid plain or repetitive clothing designs. Use fashionable layering, modern streetwear inspiration, premium casual styling, and a balanced combination of colors, patterns, textures, and fabric types that create a rich and non-monotonous appearance. The clothing should feel trendy, fashionable, youthful, and visually premium while still fitting naturally into the Japanese graffiti poster concept.

The background and poster decorations should be filled with thematic urban Japanese-inspired visual elements such as graffiti walls, spray textures, painted symbols, urban signage, layered stickers, modern Japanese graphic motifs, abstract shapes, paint drips, street fashion aesthetics, and stylish decorative compositions that enhance depth and artistic intensity without distracting from the subject.

Lighting should feel cinematic and fashionable, with strong contrast, clean highlights, realistic skin texture, and high-end editorial poster quality. The final result must look like a premium modern street-fashion campaign poster with highly detailed textures, balanced composition, vibrant color harmony, realistic proportions, ultra-sharp focus, and immersive visual storytelling.

Ultra-detailed, highly aesthetic, premium composition, realistic texture rendering, fashionable urban atmosphere, cinematic quality, poster-ready design, 8K ultra high resolution.

entries.title: Dark Fantasy Kirie Knight and Demon
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic vertical dark fantasy illustration in an extremely intricate Japanese paper-cut silhouette style, like black kirie lace cut from paper over a warm parchment background. The scene shows a blonde armored female knight in the foreground from thighs up, facing slightly left, wearing ornate engraved plate armor covered in dense curling filigree, floral arabesques, tiny cutout patterns, layered pauldrons, gauntlets, breastplate, belt plates, and a sword hilt near the waist. Her long pale blonde hair streams wildly to the right in many thin ribbon-like strands, rendered as pale negative space with black ink outlines. Behind and around her looms a huge shadow demon, with a skull-like eyeless head, sinister grin, elongated clawed hands, and a body made entirely of tangled black vines, smoke tendrils, thorny curls, and lace-like voids, embracing or threatening her from behind. The entire composition is packed edge to edge with swirling black ornamental tendrils and delicate cut-paper holes, high contrast black ink against sepia cream paper, gothic horror atmosphere, baroque detail, handmade papercut texture, sharp silhouettes, dense linework, no color except black and warm beige. Place a flat opaque beige square over the center of the knight's face, hiding her facial features while leaving hair and armor visible. Use a tight portrait composition, cinematic lighting through paper, ultra-detailed, beautiful yet ominous, no text.
entries.description: Generates a gothic paper-cut style fantasy portrait of an armored knight threatened by a swirling shadow demon.
