entries.title: Magical Sky Dancer Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical cinematic fantasy portrait of a graceful young woman with shoulder-length brown hair viewed from a dramatic low angle, standing beneath a brilliant midday sky filled with fluffy white clouds. She wears an elegant flowing kimono-inspired gown: a white satin bodice, sheer translucent white sleeves with purple ribbon ties, a wide ornate gold obi belt with floral decoration and dangling bead tassels, and a deep blue-to-violet layered skirt with embroidered flowers and a high slit. Her face is intentionally covered by a soft square blur, while her pose is expressive and magical: one arm reaches straight upward toward the sun with the hand open and all five fingers visible, and the other arm extends outward with an open hand and five visible fingers. Around her body swirl luminous ribbons of water and sparkling crystal-like droplets, forming spirals and arcs that lead toward a radiant sun halo above her raised hand. Use sky blue, white, violet, indigo, gold, and iridescent highlights, ethereal fantasy lighting, lens flare, glittering particles, translucent fabric motion, highly detailed costume textures, photorealistic anime-realism, dynamic composition, ultra-detailed, sharp focus, dramatic backlighting, 9:16 aspect ratio.

entries.title: Neon Kyoto Rain Alley
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical cinematic fantasy cyberpunk cityscape at night in a neon-soaked futuristic Kyoto-inspired alley after rain, with a glossy black reflective street stretching into deep perspective. The scene contains 13 visible floating Japanese parasols: 1 huge red parasol dominating the upper left corner, 1 large violet parasol near the upper center, 1 dark indigo parasol on the upper right, 1 small red parasol on the left balcony, 1 small gold parasol at mid-left, 1 small gold parasol near the upper-right distance, 1 violet parasol at lower left, 1 gold-violet parasol at lower-left midground, 1 gold parasol near the lower-left edge, 1 red parasol in the central distance, 1 red parasol just below the foreground gate, and 2 tiny red parasols farther down the avenue. Add three red torii gates aligned down the center of the street, the nearest gate large and silhouetted against pink-purple haze. Towering dark skyscrapers rise on both sides, decorated with glowing red filigree patterns, vertical neon signs, suspended cables, cherry blossom branches, and drifting pink petals. Place a lone female figure in the lower right foreground, viewed from behind, wearing a long ornate flowing kimono or cloak in pale lavender and rose gold, with extremely long silvery pink hair streaming to the right as if caught by wind; she gazes toward the illuminated gates and distant city. entries.title: Neferpitou Villain Wallpaper Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical anime character wallpaper poster in a painterly semi-realistic style, featuring Neferpitou from Hunter × Hunter. The composition is a tall 9:16 portrait with the character occupying the right two-thirds of the image, shown from about mid-thigh up in elegant side profile facing left, with a faint mischievous smile and sharp amber-red catlike eyes. The character has pale skin, large cat ears, a long pale cat tail curling along the right edge, and messy short-to-medium wavy silver-white hair with thick curls and tousled bangs. Dress the character in a dark navy high-collared royal guard uniform coat, fitted at the waist, with a row of large round gold buttons catching the light. Use dramatic warm backlighting from the upper left, subtle rim light on the hair and ears, deep navy shadows on the clothing, and a muted parchment-beige textured background with visible brush grain and aged poster atmosphere. On the left side, design a clean editorial typographic layout: one small dark cat silhouette icon near the upper left, one small gold crown icon below it, the huge condensed uppercase navy title text "NEFERPITOU" placed in the lower-left middle, with a tiny red diamond ornament inside or beside the title, the subtitle "HUNTER × HUNTER" in spaced small caps beneath it, a quote reading How curious... I do so love games., then a row of exactly 4 small muted icons described left to right as a circular emblem, a chimera-ant face emblem, a cat-head emblem, and a crown emblem. Under the icons, add five short uppercase description lines: "A ROYAL GUARD.", "A CAT OF THE CHIMERA ANTS.", "BEAUTIFUL. DEADLY.", "PLAYFUL. TERRIFYING.", and "THE KING'S MOST LOYAL." Add thin horizontal divider lines and tiny red diamond accents as decorative separators. Keep all typography aligned to the left with generous negative space, like a premium character key art poster. No extra characters, no modern objects, no speech bubbles, no frame border.

entries.title: Cinematic GPT Image 2 Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic sci-fi landscape poster in a wide 16:9 aspect ratio. The scene shows a lone human silhouette standing on a rocky shore in the lower center foreground, facing a vast reflective mountain lake surrounded by dramatic jagged alpine peaks. Above the horizon is a deep teal-blue night sky with misty clouds, a huge glowing Earth-like planet dominating the upper center background, and one smaller moon near the upper right. Use atmospheric fog, high contrast, cool cyan and dark navy color grading, soft bloom, realistic digital matte-painting style, epic fantasy scale, slight depth-of-field blur, and a mysterious adventurous mood. Overlay large bold white sans-serif title text across the center reading GPT image 2, with subtle dark drop shadow; place a smaller bold white Chinese subtitle centered beneath it reading 更强大的图像生成模型. Keep the typography clean, modern, and highly legible, like a tech launch cover banner.

entries.title: Vintage Hakodate Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vintage Japanese travel poster for Hakodate, Japan on warm aged cream paper with subtle folds, stains, and worn edges. The composition is vertical and centered, with three main text elements: a large bold black Japanese headline at the top reading 函館, a widely spaced romanized title beneath it reading HAKODATE, and a bottom caption between two thin red horizontal rules reading 日本 / HAKODATE, JAPAN. Under the headline, illustrate a detailed retro line-art street scene in muted beige, black ink, and restrained red accents: a straight tram-lined city street receding in one-point perspective, flanked by low Japanese storefronts with vertical shop signs, lanterns, awnings, overhead power lines, traffic lights, a red post box, bicycles, pedestrians, and two cars driving along the road. In the background, show a broad brown mountain rising behind the town, topped by a tall observation tower and a smaller red tower, evoking Mount Hakodate. Use crisp architectural pen-and-ink outlines, minimal flat color, nostalgic Showa-era graphic design, travel-guide poster aesthetics, clean centered layout, and no photorealism.
entries.description: Generates a nostalgic Japanese travel poster featuring Hakodate street scenery, Mount Hakodate, and bold destination typography for editorial or wall-art use.

entries.title: Vintage Hakodate Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vintage travel poster for HAKODATE, Japan, in a tall portrait composition on warm aged cream paper with subtle grain, faded ink, and muted sepia, charcoal, brick red, and soft gray tones. At the very top place enormous clean geometric Art Deco lettering reading HAKODATE; beneath it add a thin-rule subtitle reading THE PORT CITY AT THE FOOT OF MT. HAKODATE with a tiny anchor icon centered below. The main illustration is an extremely detailed pen-and-ink urban street scene looking downhill along tram tracks toward Hakodate Bay and a large rugged mountain in the distance with small antennas on the summit. Include a classic red-and-cream streetcar centered on the tracks, cars on the road, overhead utility wires, old streetlamps, traffic lights, sidewalks full of pedestrians, and a cyclist waiting on the right at a zebra crossing. Frame the street with historic Japanese storefronts and vertical signs, including visible signs for Hakodate Morning Market, Hakodate Beer Hall, Kita no Ryoba, Motomachi Park, Red Brick Warehouses, and Hakodate Station, mixing English with Japanese-style signage where appropriate. Add three prominent foreground crossing pedestrians: a woman in a light skirt on the left, a dark-suited schoolboy or office worker crossing center-left, and a schoolgirl in a pleated skirt crossing center; add one man walking on the right and one cyclist on the far right, for a total of five foreground human figures. In the lower margin, add centered Art Deco typography reading JAPAN, with smaller location text 函館・北海道 and HAKODATE, HOKKAIDO, separated by small red dots and thin decorative lines. The overall style should feel like a refined 1930s Japanese railway tourism poster combined with precise architectural line art, realistic perspective, nostalgic atmosphere, and crisp readable typography.
entries.description: Generates a nostalgic Art Deco travel poster of Hakodate with tram tracks, street life, bay scenery, and Mt. Hakodate in the background.

entries.title: Midnight Anime Album Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a square dark anime-style music album cover featuring an original character named SELEN GRAY. Center a pale, elegant young woman with long windblown silver-gray hair partially covering one eye, cool blue eyes behind thin glasses, and a calm melancholic expression. She wears an all-black gothic streetwear outfit: high-neck top, long oversized trench coat, layered dark skirt or dress, belt details, and a small cross pendant; one hand holds black over-ear headphones by the headband at waist level. Set her on a rooftop or balcony at night with a blurred modern city skyline full of glowing windows behind her, faint clouds, atmospheric haze, and cold moonlit blue-gray lighting. Use a monochrome black, charcoal, and desaturated blue palette with subtle silver highlights, cinematic contrast, delicate linework, painterly anime rendering, and a lonely nocturnal mood. Add album-cover typography: at the top, widely spaced serif uppercase text reading SELEN GRAY with thin horizontal divider lines and a small star-like mark beneath; at the bottom, elegant handwritten script reading Midnight Silence, with a small crescent moon icon below and a thin underline. Include a worn vintage record-sleeve border with scratches, dust specks, faint film grain, scuffed corners, and slightly distressed edges, while keeping the character sharply focused and centered.
entries.description: Generates a moody square anime album jacket featuring a silver-haired gothic heroine against a nocturnal city skyline.

entries.title: Liquid Meltdown Conceptual Fashion Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Full-body shot of a man standing still while the lower half of his body is melting into a glossy liquid pool that reflects his face clearly.

Outfit: structured blazer with casual pants.
Shoes partially dissolved into liquid.
Reflection is sharper than reality.

Typography:

* Top: "STILL"
* Small text: "BUT SLIPPING"
* Liquid surface text distortion: "FORM"

Mood: loss of control, instability, quiet breakdown.

entries.title: Editorial Fashion Magazine Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Using REFERENCE_0 as the portrait source, transform it into a high-end editorial fashion magazine cover while preserving the person, pose, hat, shirt, lighting direction, shadow, and face-obscuring blur. Crop closer into a vertical cover layout and place the subject slightly right of center. Add a gritty off-white paper texture, bold black condensed typography, and neon yellow-green accent bars.

Create a magazine cover titled OFFSET in huge black letters across the top, partially behind the subject's head. Add the issue line at upper right: ISSUE 07 / OCT 2026. Add a vertical neon-green strip at the far left with Japanese copy: 静けさは、時に最も鋭い。. Add a large bottom-left cover headline: QUIET PROVOCATION, with the yellow subtitle Stillness cuts deeper than noise..

Include exactly 5 numbered article teasers in a left column: 01 FORM / PATTERN / RESTRAINT; 02 THE NEW CODE OF SOFT POWER; 03 CITY UNIFORM, REWRITTEN; 04 SHADOW PLAY IN SILVER THREAD; 05 INTERVIEW: ON STYLE WITHOUT PERFORMANCE. Add exactly 1 barcode block with price text "¥1200 (税込)" under it. Add exactly 1 vertical Japanese quote block on the upper right: "装うことは、主張ではなく編集である。" Add exactly 1 small black-and-white city-building photo inset on the lower right with a neon-green side accent. Add exactly 3 tiny editorial text clusters on the lower/right area: "OBSERVE. EDIT. INTENT. REPEAT.", "CITY AS TEXTURE. SILENCE AS LANGUAGE. STYLE AS EDIT.", and a small paragraph under page number. Add exactly 1 large page number "014" in neon yellow-green at the bottom right. Keep the design minimalist, modern, Japanese street-fashion magazine style, with realistic print grain, slightly distressed ink, and strong contrast.
entries.description: Transforms a simple portrait reference into a gritty Japanese-inspired fashion magazine cover with bold typography and editorial cover lines.

entries.title: Gifu Yanagase Arcade Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a clean vintage travel poster illustration of GIFU in Japan, drawn as detailed monochrome line art in deep forest green ink on a warm ivory paper background. The composition is vertical and symmetrical, with one huge minimalist sans-serif headline reading GIFU across the top, a detailed street-level view of the Yanagase covered shopping arcade below it, and one small bottom caption reading 岐阜市 JAPAN. Show the arcade entrance centered in perspective, with the main sign reading 柳ヶ瀬, a long glass-and-metal arched roof receding into the distance, dense storefronts on both sides, hanging shop signs, traffic lights, utility poles, crosswalk stripes in the foreground, and mountains plus a small Japanese castle silhouette rising behind the buildings. Include a lively city scene with pedestrians, two schoolgirls with backpacks walking into the arcade at center foreground, one cyclist crossing left to right in the foreground, café seating on the left, and a woman in a skirt carrying a shopping bag on the right. Use fine architectural drafting lines, delicate hatching, manga-inspired urban detail, flat two-color printmaking style, no shadows except ink line texture, nostalgic tourism-poster mood, centered perspective, crisp typography, and a calm refined Japanese city-travel aesthetic. Add visible Japanese storefront signage including bookshop, coffee shop, Yanagase-dori, and small vertical shop signs, while keeping the overall palette limited to dark green and ivory.
entries.description: Generates a vintage green line-art tourism poster of Gifu's Yanagase shopping arcade for city travel, print, or editorial use.

entries.title: Gaunt Neo-Expressionist Lion
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a raw neo-expressionist mixed-media painting on a dirty off-white canvas, dominated by a front-facing lion head with a gaunt, exhausted, slightly deranged expression. The lion has a huge scruffy mane in ochre, burnt orange, brown, black, and yellow, with spiky hair tufts radiating upward, asymmetrical wide circular eyes, a long yellow muzzle, a black nose, thin whiskers, and clenched vertical teeth like a grimace. Use dense scratched linework, splattered paint, dry-brush texture, scraped marks, drips, cracks, and chaotic graffiti-like scribbles across the whole surface, evoking Jean-Michel Basquiat-inspired outsider art. The background is a distressed cream wall filled with exactly 6 small doodle elements: a black-rayed sun in the upper left, a red circular face-like symbol on the left, a blue rectangular figure with a tiny face on the mid-left, a black boxed face near the lower left, a tall stick-figure face in the upper right, and a black rectangular panel with white occult-like symbols in the lower right. Keep the composition square, tightly cropped around the lion's face, with high contrast, messy hand-drawn energy, no clean digital polish, and a gritty gallery-painting texture. Customize the subject as lion, the emotional expression as gaunt and exhausted, the dominant palette as ochre, burnt orange, brown, black, yellow, and dirty cream, the art style as neo-expressionist mixed-media graffiti painting, and the canvas format as square.
entries.description: Generates a gritty Basquiat-inspired lion portrait suitable for expressive AI art, album covers, posters, or gallery-style wall art.

entries.title: Surreal Blue Fish Hat Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a surreal high-fashion studio portrait on a pure white background: a slender young woman shown from the upper torso upward in side profile facing left, with her face deliberately covered by a flat opaque rectangular privacy block in muted taupe. On her head rests an enormous vivid blue parrotfish like an extravagant sculptural hat, oriented horizontally with its head to the left and tail to the right, much larger than the human head. The fish is hyper-detailed and glossy, painted in electric cobalt, turquoise, cyan, ultramarine, and hints of violet, with visible scales, fins, round eye, slightly open mouth, dorsal fin, tail fin, and wet reflective texture. Surround the fish and figure with energetic abstract paint splashes, drips, tangled ink lines, and thin looping splatter strands in magenta, orange, gold, black, teal, and blue, as if liquid paint is exploding and running downward from the fish, hair, neck, and clothing. The subject has messy dark wet hair, visible ear, long neck, and wears a dark blue-black shirt or jacket covered in the same colorful paint. Use crisp editorial lighting, high-resolution photorealistic detail mixed with expressive acrylic splash art, strong contrast, clean negative space, and a vertical poster composition. Add a small handwritten artist signature and date in the lower right reading May 10, 2026 Oyagi.
entries.description: Generates a vertical surreal fashion portrait of a person wearing a giant vivid blue fish as a sculptural hat with dynamic paint splashes.

entries.title: Steampunk Robot Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic vertical animated movie poster in a warm Disney/Pixar-inspired 3D adventure style, set in a vast whimsical steampunk robot city at sunset with glowing clouds, distant towers, bridges, pipes, floating airships, tiny flying drones, flowers, and lush greenery in the foreground. In the lower left foreground, show a young boy named Bokuto crouching on a grassy rooftop ledge, wearing a blue hoodie, tan shorts, gray sneakers, and tousled brown hair; his face is deliberately obscured by a smooth rectangular blur/blank mask, while he gently holds hands with a small rusty spherical-headed robot sitting opposite him. The main robot has a weathered metal body, round head, one glowing blue camera eye, antenna wire, jointed arms and legs, scratches, dents, rivets, and a tender emotional pose. Add two small side companions near the lower right: a fluffy small dog and a tiny boxy black-screen robot with green eyes. The background should feel enormous and magical, with towering industrial buildings full of tiny lights, balconies, antennas, and signs, bathed in golden sunrise/sunset rim light and soft atmospheric haze. Place Japanese poster copy at the top center reading キミがいれば、きっと、どこへでも行ける。, and a glowing sign on the left building reading 壊れていても、心は動く。. At the bottom center, add a realistic movie-logo layout: small studio text "Disney PIXAR", then the title line "ぼくと" above a huge hand-painted Japanese main title おんぼろロボット, with the first character in warm yellow and the rest in off-white textured lettering. Beneath it add the tagline きみがくれた、たからもの。, a block of tiny faux credits, and the release line "2025年 春 感動の冒険へ". Use dramatic composition, high detail, depth of field, volumetric light, painterly realism, emotional family-film tone, and authentic Japanese theatrical poster typography.
entries.description: Generates a heartfelt Japanese-style animated adventure poster featuring a boy, a rusty robot companion, and a glowing futuristic steampunk city.

entries.title: Dark Kushina Chakra Chain Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical dark anime character poster of Kushina Uzumaki, a powerful red-haired kunoichi woman in a dramatic three-quarter pose, shown from thighs up against a deep blue-black smoky background. She has extremely long, flowing crimson red hair whipping across the entire composition in thick ribbon-like strands, partially covering her face, with a large muted square blur censoring the central face area. Her expression is mostly hidden, but the pose feels intense and commanding: torso turned sideways, one bare arm extended toward the viewer with long fingers splayed in forced perspective. She wears a dark sleeveless shinobi-inspired dress with a high pale collar, fitted black bodice, layered black and dark red skirt panels, side slits, and visible black fishnet mesh at the chest and thigh. Surround her with one continuous glowing red chakra chain looping diagonally around her body, with bright segmented links and smoky red energy trails; add three floating paper talismans with handwritten sealing symbols, including one tag near the upper right, one at lower left, and one near the lower right. In the upper left corner, add faint handwritten text reading "漩涡玖辛奈 / Kushina Uzumaki". Use a moody desaturated color palette, rough ink linework, painterly anime shading, dynamic hair motion, subtle grain, cinematic lighting, and a dark occult ninja atmosphere, with a small artist-signature-like mark in the lower right.
entries.description: Generates a moody vertical anime poster of a red-haired kunoichi surrounded by glowing sealing chains and talismans for stylized character art.

entries.title: Twin Kimono Sakura Watercolor
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a delicate anime-style Japanese ink wash and watercolor illustration on warm off-white textured paper. The scene features exactly 2 young twin-like girls standing close together in the foreground, gently holding hands and leaning their heads together with soft, tired but content smiles. The left girl has short powder-blue hair, blue eyes, and a blue floral kimono with a large blue obi bow, white sakura patterns, tassel ornaments, and small cherry blossoms pinned in her hair. The right girl has short pastel-pink hair, pink eyes, and a pale pink floral kimono with a large rose-pink obi bow, gold accents, tassel ornaments, and cherry blossom hair accessories. Use refined linework, translucent watercolor washes, splattered ink textures, and soft luminous shading. Behind them, paint a misty monochrome sumi-e landscape with exactly 3 main background elements: a pale red sun or moon near the upper left-center, a faint mountain range in gray ink, and a distant Japanese temple gate or shrine structure on the upper right. Add cherry blossom branches across the top and right side, with many soft pink blossoms and dark expressive ink strokes. On the left side, include one vertical column of bold black Japanese brush calligraphy reading 本日もお疲れさまでした, plus a small red seal stamp near the lower left. Composition should be vertical portrait format, romantic and serene, blending traditional Japanese sumi-e, watercolor, and polished modern anime character art, with an elegant spring-night farewell atmosphere.
entries.description: Generates a serene vertical anime watercolor of two kimono-clad girls beneath cherry blossoms with Japanese calligraphy, ideal for seasonal greeting art.

entries.title: Anime Sakura Goodnight Festival Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a richly detailed anime-style Japanese festival bedtime illustration in a warm pastel palette. Show exactly two cute young women in ornate floral kimono standing close together in front of a decorative washi-paper and cherry-blossom backdrop: the left girl has soft pink short bob hair with long bangs covering one eye, pink-red visible eye, a cheerful open-mouth smile, blush, and elaborate sakura-and-ribbon hair ornaments with dangling tassels; the right girl has pale sky blue short bob hair, matching blue floral kimono, similar sakura hair ornaments and tassels, and her face is covered by a centered semi-opaque square censor block in muted gray-lavender fading to peach. Both girls hold one large horizontal rectangular paper sign in the foreground with aged cream paper, red-brown wooden trim, sakura decorations, a red ribbon bow at the bottom, and bold black Japanese calligraphy reading おやすみなさい バルス. Add one smaller hanging tag sign in the upper right with vertical black calligraphy reading お疲れ様. The scene contains exactly three visible paper lanterns on the upper left, all cream-colored with red cherry blossom patterns and dark caps, plus exactly two partially visible folding fans at the bottom corners, one red-and-navy on the left and one blue-and-gold on the right. Fill the background with Japanese patterned screens, gold wave motifs, pink cherry blossom branches, drifting sakura petals, tassels, soft ambient lantern light, intricate kimono fabric textures, and a dreamy high-detail GPT-image-2 anime illustration finish, vertical 4:3 composition, no modern objects except the censor square.

entries.title: Minimalist Architectural Landmark Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Design a luxury minimalist poster centered on a famous architectural landmark of your choice ([building name]). The focal element is an illustrated rendering of the building. Behind it, place one giant bold English word in a design-forward typeface whose character matches the building's identity, with smaller body copy nearby describing its design philosophy. The composition should read as an ultra high-end art poster. Use a restrained, low-key color palette where graphic elements interlock with the architecture, appearing as if they form part of its structural components or extend outward from its silhouette.

entries.title: Nihonbashi Red Line Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical vintage travel poster illustration for NIHONBASHI, with the subtitle TOKYO, JAPAN centered beneath it in thin uppercase lettering, flanked by short horizontal rules. Use an elegant cream paper background and monochrome red ink line art, like a refined architectural pen-and-ink city guide poster with subtle manga-inspired human figures. The scene shows a wide pedestrian street in Nihonbashi, Tokyo, viewed in deep one-point perspective between tall modern and historic commercial buildings. On the right foreground, place the ornate Nihonbashi bridge guardian statue: a highly detailed seated winged kirin/lion-like creature on a stone pedestal beside a decorative streetlamp, with the pedestal plaque reading 日本橋. A canal or bridge railing runs behind it, with trees lining the water. The foreground includes a crosswalk, short bollards, tactile paving, and pedestrians walking in business and casual clothes; include a man with a bicycle at the right edge, a woman in a long skirt crossing near the statue, a suited man walking away in the center, and a woman holding a shopping bag at the left. The left side has storefronts and awnings in detailed perspective. Include exactly 7 visible text elements: the large top headline "NIHONBASHI", the subtitle "TOKYO, JAPAN", a vertical hanging banner reading "NIHONBASHI", a small sign reading "COFFEE", an awning reading "BOOKS", a small awning reading "BAKERY", and a vertical sign reading "CAFE", plus the stone bridge plaque text "日本橋" if using the default. Keep all architecture, people, signs, trees, railings, lamps, and paving rendered as delicate red outlines with minimal shading, spacious white negative areas, crisp poster composition, and a calm sophisticated Tokyo travel atmosphere.
entries.description: Generates a refined monochrome red architectural travel poster of Nihonbashi, Tokyo, suitable for destination art, editorial covers, or tourism prints.

entries.title: Conceptual Crowd Portrait Installation Art
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: # Conceptual Crowd Portrait Please generate a visually impactful "Conceptual Crowd Portrait" based on a clear real-life photo uploaded by the user. ## I. Identity Requirements Strictly refer to the real identity characteristics of the person in the uploaded photo, including: - Facial contour - Facial proportions - Eye and brow structure - Nose shape - Lip shape - Hairstyle foundation - Skin tone and sense of age - Gaze and temperament - Overall character recognizability The final image must allow the viewer to immediately recognize the person from the uploaded photo. Do not turn them into a stranger, do not Westernize, do not idolize/beautify excessively, and do not generate a fake AI face. ## II. Core Concept Recreate the portrait as a large-scale conceptual installation art piece. The entire portrait head is composed of thousands of miniature people, arranged densely like a crowd formation. Through different positions, clothing shades, crowd density, and shadow variations, they collectively form the face, hair, features, glasses, beard, clothing outlines, and overall expression of the person in the photo. The image looks like a giant portrait made of a real crowd, or a contemporary art installation placed in a minimalist white space. ## III. Composition - Vertical composition, suitable for visual posters or conceptual covers. - Aerial view / Isometric top-down view. - The portrait head occupies the main subject of the frame. - Background is a minimalist pure white space with significant negative space. - A few small people are scattered around the portrait to enhance the sense of spatial proportion and realistic scale. - The crowd as a whole forms a clear outline, and facial features must be accurately placed. ## IV. Visual Elements ### Crowd Structure - Use dense crowds to form hair, eyebrows, eyes, bridge of the nose, lips, jawline, and clothes. - Dark-clothed people form hair, glasses, collars, and shadow areas. - Light-clothed people form facial highlights and skin areas. - The arrangement should be natural, with a realistic sense of crowding and small random variations. - Each miniature person should have an independent posture, clothing, and direction, avoiding a copy-paste look. ### Lighting Effects - Soft cinematic lighting. - Low-angle long shadows. - Natural shadows cast at the feet of the crowd. - Unified shadow direction to enhance spatial realism. - Overall clean, high-end, and quiet aesthetic. ### Color Style - Warm neutral tones. - Primarily off-white, light brown, gray, and charcoal black. - Dark clothing used to strengthen character outlines. - Skin areas transitioned with light beige and warm gray crowds. - Restrained color palette, avoiding excessive vibrancy. ## V. Art Style Overall style references: - Contemporary conceptual art. - Museum-grade installation art. - Hyper-realistic crowd simulation. - Minimalist visual posters. - High-end digital art. - Social metaphor visual works. - Cinematic conceptual photography. The image should have a strong visual metaphor: An individual's image is composed of countless tiny individuals, offering both the shock of a macro portrait and the explorability of micro-crowd details. ## VI. Mood Overall atmospheric keywords: - Surreal - Profound - Quiet - High-end - Modern - Thought-provoking - Cinematic - Visually shocking - Shareable ## VII. Rendering Quality - Ultra-high detail. - 8K texture. - Realistic crowd simulation. - Deep focus, ensuring the entire crowd portrait is clearly visible. - Rich details in miniature figures. - Realistic spatial proportions. - Clean image with no cluttered background. - High-end commercial visual quality. - Similar to Octane Render / high-end 3D conceptual rendering effects. ## VIII. Negative Constraints Please avoid the following: - Do not turn the person into a stranger. - Do not just generate a normal portrait. - Do not generate simple collages. - Do not let the crowd lose the portrait outline. - No misplacement of facial features. - No blurred facial structures. - No exaggerated cartoon style. - No low-resolution posters. - No messy backgrounds. - Do not make all miniature people look identical. - No text, watermarks, or logos. - No excessive beautification. - Do not change the person's sense of age or authentic temperament.
entries.description: An artistic prompt that reconstructs a portrait as a massive conceptual art installation made of thousands of tiny people, creating a surreal and profound visual effect.

entries.title: Red Hoodie Lava Dragon Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a bold anime streetwear poster on a clean white background featuring a single anthropomorphic black dragon character in a three-quarter upper-body pose, leaning forward with hands in the hoodie pockets and a confident snarling grin. The dragon has dark charcoal scales, glowing red lava-like crack patterns across the face, neck, tail, and horns, sharp angular red eyes, white fangs, tall pointed ears, two long red-and-black horns, a spiky red mane, and a long curved tail with a red spear-shaped tip entering from the left. Dress the character in a glossy oversized crimson red zip-up hoodie with the hood up, white drawstrings, heavy folds, a front pocket, and black technical cargo pants; show exactly 4 visible clothing markings: a circular black-and-white emblem patch on the upper sleeve, a black rectangular sleeve patch with distorted white lettering, a small triangular chest logo, and a small white chest wordmark. Add dynamic red paint-splatter strokes around the character, especially one large splash on the right and smaller droplets near the left horn area. At the top, design a magazine-cover style typographic layout with one huge bold condensed red headline reading HAROS MRNG, one small black uppercase line above it with intentionally imperfect pseudo-text, one small black subheading block on the upper left reading STRENH BLACK with a second smaller garbled line below, and a black issue number 12 on the upper right. Use high-contrast cel-shaded anime rendering, sharp black outlines, dramatic red highlights, glossy fabric reflections, clean poster composition, and a modern character-design magazine aesthetic.
entries.description: Generates a bold anime magazine-style poster of a lava-cracked dragon character in red streetwear for OC showcases or character art.

entries.title: Red Hoodie Dragon-Wolf Warrior
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dynamic full-body anime poster illustration of an anthropomorphic dragon-wolf hybrid warrior on a clean white background, posed in a powerful crouching action stance with one knee raised, one hand reaching forward with sharp claws, and the other hand tucked into the hoodie pocket. The character has dark charcoal-black scales or fur, a long thick tail with red markings, spiky swept-back red hair and mane-like neck spikes, tall pointed red-and-black horns, angular black cheek fins, glowing red eyes, a snarling mouth with visible sharp teeth, and red claw tips. Dress the character in a deep red oversized hoodie with white drawstrings, a front pouch pocket, heavy folds, and a centered chest graphic of the character's own fierce dragon head logo inside a circular emblem; add a small heart-like patch on the upper sleeve and a dark rectangular patch below it. Pair it with black tactical cargo pants featuring multiple straps, buckles, knee padding, thigh pouches, utility pockets, and loose gathered fabric, plus white athletic sneakers with red accents and gray laces. Surround the figure with bold red painterly slash effects, curved energy arcs, ink splatters, small black debris flecks, and two sharp red starburst spark shapes, emphasizing speed and aggression. Use crisp cel-shaded anime line art, high-contrast lighting, dramatic foreshortening, saturated red highlights, detailed clothing wrinkles, clean white negative space, and a polished character-poster composition with no readable text.

entries.title: Celestial Astrologer Divination Scene
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a highly detailed dark fantasy anime illustration of a mysterious male celestial astrologer, unnamed star diviner, seated at an ornate cosmic divination table in a deep blue observatory filled with stars, nebulae, and glowing magic. He has messy black hair falling over his forehead, with his face deliberately covered by a plain dark gray square censor block, and wears layered midnight-blue and black robes with teal inner fabric, gold embroidery, delicate chains, constellation ornaments, sapphire pendants, and luminous celestial jewelry. His right hand holds a slender gold-and-black wand or pointer angled downward, while his left hand touches a glowing astrological circle on the tabletop. The table surface is a glossy star map covered with golden zodiac rings, constellation lines, sparkling points of light, and six visible floating or resting glass Earth-like spheres: one large glowing globe near the center foreground, one large blurred partial globe at the lower left foreground, one partial globe at the lower right foreground, one medium globe at the right side, one small globe near the center-right, and one medium-small globe on the left side of the table. Behind him, add a huge circular astrolabe halo with zodiac markings, transparent orbital rings, hanging crystal ornaments, and a vivid blue-purple galaxy sky. Include two vertical hanging banners in the background: the left banner reads 星文祓禮 and the right banner reads 天水星朱. Use a cinematic composition, intense electric-blue rim lighting, bright gold accents, sparkling particles, reflective glass, intricate linework, elegant Japanese fantasy aesthetics, ultra-detailed anime rendering, dramatic depth of field, and a mystical star-sorcery atmosphere.
entries.description: Generates a richly detailed anime fantasy scene of a robed star diviner performing cosmic astrology with glowing globes, zodiac circles, and golden celestial ornaments.

entries.title: Bleach Style High-Impact Manga Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Ultra-high detail 2D hot-blooded manga style character poster, close-up portrait of a young reaper character, orange spiky hair, amber eyes, wearing black round vintage sunglasses, cold and serious expression, centered symmetrical composition, lens looking directly at the audience, strong sense of pressure. The sunglass lenses reflect a large number of black and white manga panels and character scenes, and the background is also composed of dense Japanese manga page collages, creating a visual effect of 'character memory / classic scene review'. The foreground floats several strips of high-speed moving manga panels, with dynamic motion blur and depth-of-field blur effects, interspersed above and below the screen to create a sense of speed and spatial hierarchy. Scattered blue spiritual pressure particles / fluorescent energy fragments in the frame, forming cold and warm contrast colors (orange hair vs blue particles). The overall style adopts the BLEACH-style hot-blooded shonen manga aesthetic, merging modern trend poster design with high-end anime commercial visuals. anime key visual, BLEACH style, manga collage poster, cinematic anime lighting, reflective glasses, manga panels reflection, dynamic motion blur, orange spiky hair, intense stare, ultra detailed anime illustration, shonen jump aesthetic, layered composition, high contrast shading, cel shading, glowing blue particles, dramatic close-up portrait, symmetrical composition, manga montage background, Japanese comic aesthetic, premium anime poster

entries.title: Y2K Fashion Magazine Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Based on user-uploaded real photos, generate an East Asian Y2K style fashion poster / magazine cover.
Strictly preserve identity features including face shape, features, skin tone, and overall temperament to ensure the result looks like the user, without becoming a stranger or having an AI 'fake face'.

Overall style references East Asian Y2K girl magazines and millennium pop culture posters. The character is the center protagonist, presenting a confident, photogenic, sweet, or cool fashion state. Clothing can be Y2K millennium style, such as cropped tops, mini skirts, sporty jackets, shiny coats, and accessories like necklaces or futuristic headphones.

Photography texture: studio shoot + direct flash + high-contrast fashion photography. The image should be sharp with transparent glowing skin and clean makeup. The layout is a magazine cover or commercial poster with large headlines, stickers, hearts, stars, bar codes, UI windows, and laser/chrome metal elements.

Overall atmosphere: sweet and cool, eye-catching, dreamy, and trendy with a retro millennium feel. Use color schemes like pink, black, and silver. The image should have a retro commercial printing feel or slight graininess, looking like a complete East Asian fashion cover ready for publication.
entries.description: A stylized prompt to turn personal photos into Y2K-themed East Asian fashion magazine covers with retro-future graphics and high-contrast photography.

entries.title: Luxury Magazine Cover Transformation
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Transform the subject into a high-end magazine cover portrait while preserving 100% facial identity, facial structure, skin tone, proportions, and all unique facial features. Do not alter eyes, nose, mouth, jawline, or facial shape. Maintain realistic skin texture, pores, and natural imperfections. Style the image like a luxury international magazine cover photoshoot, with cinematic studio lighting, premium fashion photography composition, and ultra-clean editorial aesthetics. The subject should appear confident, elegant, and professionally photographed, wearing stylish modern clothing that matches a sophisticated luxury aesthetic. Use soft directional lighting with subtle shadows and depth, creating a polished studio look similar to Vogue, GQ, Forbes, or Harper's Bazaar covers. Background should be minimal, elegant, and slightly textured or gradient-based, matching the color palette of the outfit and overall mood. Add authentic magazine cover elements: realistic masthead typography, elegant headlines and feature text, issue number, barcode, and small editorial details, clean layout with professional spacing. Keep all typography subtle and realistic, integrated naturally into the composition. Depth of field should keep the subject in sharp focus while maintaining a premium cinematic atmosphere. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, editorial photography, luxury magazine aesthetic, highly polished, cinematic, 8K quality.

entries.title: Zodiac Themed Yumi's Cells Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
I am "Your Zodiac Sign"

Create a poster inspired by Yumi's Cells with the same soft, aesthetic, slice-of-life vibe and background style, the zodiac theme is fully reflected in the design. The subject's face must remain completely unchanged and untouched. In hair, put some minimal highlights in color cyan. Surround the subject with multiple small, raw yet realistic cute chibi-style mini 3D versions of the subject, designed like expressive "cells" with oversized heads.....glossy high-detail finishes, and playful emotions. Each mini character represents traits associated with the zodiac sign and is engaged in different actions: one clinging onto the subject's arm one cheering with arms raised one reading a book one drinking coffee one lying down using a phone one making a wacky exaggerated face one looking tired or stressed one shouting energetically one sketching face one clinging into subject's head one with messy or chaotic hair energyEach chibi "cell" should visually reflect personality traits of the zodiac sign through their expressions, posture, and behavior. Add one more chibi that has relevance to my face, and copying the pose of the subject. That chibi must be at the center below. Also, change the background into black and grey atmosphere with navy blue.Ratio 4:5

entries.title: Shonen Manga Character Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Based on the user-uploaded photo, recreate and transform the person into a Japanese hot-blooded shonen manga style / urban street anime character poster.

Preserve real identity features including face shape, facial features, hairstyle, skin tone, and temperament. Create a new full-body anime illustration where the character is fully visible from head to toe.

Style reference: Japanese shonen manga color pages, urban street anime posters, clean and powerful black line work, distinct anime features, sharp layered hair, clear clothing folds, slight pencil sketch feel, partial watercolor or marker coloring, low saturation, paper texture.

Design Tokyo street fashion for the characters: young, relaxed, and cool. Use elements like oversized jackets, cropped tops, cargo pants, sneakers, and headphones. In group shots, outfits should coordinate but not be identical.

Design dynamic poses with a poster feel rather than a simple side-by-side photo. Use positions like back-to-back, walking captures, or sitting on steps to create character relationships.

Create a Japanese urban manga scene such as a Tokyo street corner, convenience store entrance, subway station exit, or rooftop. Add elements like graffiti, posters, vending machines, and street signs for depth.

Overall atmosphere: Shonen manga, urban street, youth, coolness, slightly rebellious, fashion magazine illustration feel.

entries.title: Moonlight Blue Anime Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical anime-style light novel or illustration collection cover set on a moonlit beach at night, dominated by deep cobalt and navy blue tones. At the top, place the large elegant cursive title Moonlight Blue in glowing pale blue-white calligraphy, with long sweeping flourishes, and add the small lowercase author name yurara on the upper left beneath the title. In the upper right sky, include a bright crescent moon surrounded by tiny stars and subtle atmospheric glow. The central subject is a teenage anime girl standing waist-up on the shoreline, reaching one hand toward the viewer in a dramatic invitation pose; her long silvery pale blue hair is windswept in many fine strands across the image, catching moonlight. Her face is covered by a centered opaque muted blue-gray square censor block, hiding the facial features. She wears a white short-sleeved sailor school uniform with a light blue collar and a soft gold ribbon bow, plus a dark skirt visible at the bottom. Behind her, render dark rolling ocean waves, wet sand, and a shimmering path of moonlight reflected on the water. Use soft painterly anime rendering, luminous rim lighting, cinematic composition, delicate hair detail, romantic melancholy mood, and high-resolution book-cover typography.
entries.description: Generates a romantic moonlit anime beach cover with elegant typography and a sailor-uniform girl reaching toward the viewer.

entries.title: Luxury Watercolor Business Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A powerful portrait of a high-status business leader wearing a premium luxury formal suit (tailored dark suit, crisp white shirt, elegant tie).
Sharp facial features, clean grooming, ultra-realistic detailing.
Expression & Mood:
Calm, confident, and highly authoritative expression - focused gaze symbolizing intelligence, control, and global influence.
Pose & Composition:
Half-body portrait (chest-up)
Slight diagonal cinematic angle for depth and intensity
Strong executive posture (hands relaxed or adjusting suit)
Art Style:
Hand-drawn ink sketch lines blended with watercolor textures
Luxury-inspired gold, black, and deep blue/red paint splashes
Dynamic abstract brush strokes representing power and innovation
Highly detailed realistic face with subtle gritty texture
Background:
Clean white or soft neutral base
Elegant watercolor splashes (gold + dark tones)
Soft glowing aura behind the subject for a premium elite feel
Typography Elements:
Main Title:
"TYPE HERE"
Name:
"TYPE HERE" (bold handwritten luxury brush style)
Extra Details:
Subtle gold accents for premium billionaire aesthetic
Light grunge texture overlay for cinematic depth
Minimal crown or abstract wealth/power symbols
Signature (Bottom):
"TYPE HERE"
Optional Quote Section:
"TYPE HERE"
Mood & Tone:
Elite, powerful, cinematic, luxury-driven legacy aesthetic

entries.title: Forbidden City Typography Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a minimalist cinematic Chinese typography poster on aged warm beige paper, centered on the giant deep vermilion Chinese headline text 故宫. The two massive characters should dominate the frame like monumental palace architecture, with their strokes behaving as red Forbidden City walls. Add traditional golden-glazed imperial rooflines and ornate eaves sitting along the top edges of the characters, including small decorative roof beasts. The characters stand across the far side of a vast empty stone courtyard, with pale marble balustrades and symmetrical terraces at the base. In the exact center foreground, place one tiny solitary person in a dark coat facing the characters to emphasize scale. Use a low, frontal, symmetrical composition, lots of negative space in the upper beige sky, muted historical tones, subtle film grain, worn paper texture, slight weathering on the red paint, and an elegant poster-design aesthetic inspired by Chinese cultural heritage and the Forbidden City. No extra text, no logo, no border.

entries.title: Chinese Conceptual Poster Generator
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Based on the provided [Title], automatically generate a high-end Chinese conceptual poster. User only provides Title: Enter title here. Your task: Understand the theme, mood, social issues, and metaphors behind the title, then complete the visual design. Do not mechanically illustrate the title; translate it into a cinematic, magazine-style visual poster. 1. Style: High-end horizontal concept poster. Mood can range from social issues, psychological insights, humanity, intimacy, to workplace pressure. It should look like a deep-dive article cover or art exhibition visual. 2. Layout: Large title on the left/top, visual metaphor on the right/bottom. Strong relationship between text and image. High impact, memory points, and whitespace. Default to landscape 16:9, 4:3, or 3:1. 3. Typography: Main title must be huge and central. Subtitle generated automatically (max 24 characters) explaining the deep issue. Bottom tags (4-6) separated by vertical lines. Fonts matched to theme (Serif for social critique, bold Sans-serif for psychological insight). 4. Visual Metaphor: Use elements like broken statues, empty chairs, mirrors, night cityscapes, or medical images. Focus on 1 strong metaphor + 2-4 details. 5. Atmosphere: Low saturation, advanced lighting, cinematic grain, depth of emotion. No cute or bright internet template styles. 6. Output: A single high-res 4K complete poster in Chinese. No process explanation, just the image.
entries.description: A sophisticated system prompt for generating high-end Chinese conceptual posters based on a single title, focusing on social issues, metaphors, and cinematic magazine-style layouts.

entries.title: Parallel Protocol Sci-Fi Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a gritty retro-futurist deep-sea science fiction movie poster in a tall 2:3 theatrical one-sheet format, with a dark navy-black worn paper background, orange and tan ink, subtle vertical fold marks, scratches, halftone grain, barcode-like production marks, thin technical diagram lines, sonar contour waves, crosshair symbols, small star glints, and wireframe globe icons. At the very top place the tagline TRUST NO SYSTEM. QUESTION EVERYTHING. in small condensed tan uppercase lettering. Dominating the upper third, use huge jagged orange brush lettering for the title PARALLEL PROTOCOL, split around a small centered boxed credit reading "A FILM BY N.MART." The poster features exactly 4 futuristic operatives standing shoulder-to-shoulder in dramatic low-angle lighting: left, a dark armored soldier with long hair, glossy black tactical suit and weapon harness; center-left, the lead woman in a black tailored blazer over a short black dress, lace thigh-high stockings, garters, gloves, braided updo, and a confident commanding stance; center-right, a figure in a flowing white deep-sea pressure coat with blue wave-like patterns, black breathing apparatus and cybernetic gear; right, a black armored female operative with orange illuminated weapon details and heavy tactical cables. Faces should be cinematic but unobscured, with moody rim lighting in burnt orange and cool blue. Add exactly 2 critic quotes: left quote "A VISUALLY STUNNING RIDE." with attribution "- FILM PULSE," and right quote "BOLD. STYLISH. UNFORGETTABLE." with attribution "- INDIE WIRE." Along the left margin include vertical studio text "N.MART STUDIOS" and the year "2025." Near the lower character feet place exactly 4 cast names in small orange uppercase: "ELIOT VALE," "MILES KORBEN," "JULIAN HART," and "LEO DRAKE." In the lower center, add "IN THEATERS" above a huge tan release date 06.27.2025, followed by "EXPERIENCE IT IN IMAX AND REALD 3D," with "IMAX" emphasized in orange. Finish with tiny production credits across the bottom, an "N.MART STUDIOS" logo box on the bottom left, a PG-13 rating box on the bottom right, and a small barcode strip centered near the bottom. entries.title: Dried Flower Sunflower Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical full-body portrait rendered as intricate dried-flower collage art: a young woman walking down a narrow path through a dense sunflower garden, centered in frame, one leg crossing in front of the other, one hand tucked in the pocket of frayed dark denim shorts. She wears a wide woven straw sun hat, a pale blue floral camisole made from layered blue hydrangea petals, distressed denim shorts, and delicate sandals. Her long dark brown hair streams to the right as if moved by a gentle summer breeze, and her face is covered by a soft neutral blurred square, keeping the identity anonymous. The entire image should look handmade from pressed and dried botanical materials: tan straw, brittle petals, seed heads, leaves, stems, and translucent dried flower fragments forming the skin, clothes, hair, and background. Surround her with abundant golden sunflowers on both sides of the path, with large dark seed centers and dry ochre petals; behind her, create a wall of layered blue hydrangea petals with clusters of small white dried flowers. Add a stylized dried-flower sun in the upper left corner made from a round pressed flower center and radiating straw stems. Use warm natural sunlight, earthy beige and gold tones contrasted with soft hydrangea blue, highly detailed tactile textures, shallow depth, fine botanical relief, elegant summer fashion editorial composition, realistic proportions, and a handcrafted pressed-flower artwork aesthetic.

entries.title: Child Crayon Mr Bean Holiday Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a flat scanned childlike crayon-and-colored-pencil drawing on white lined notebook paper with visible blue horizontal rules, a red vertical margin line on the left, slight paper texture, and exactly 3 punched binder holes along the left edge. Recreate a playful movie-poster composition for MR. BEAN'S HOLIDAY: one awkward adult man in a gray suit jacket, white shirt, bright red tie, brown trousers, gray socks, and shiny black shoes is stepping out of a yellow train doorway on the right side, holding a brown plaid suitcase in his lowered right hand. His left leg kicks dramatically straight out toward the upper left, with exaggerated simplified anatomy and wobbly outlines. Place a plain tan rectangular censor block over the center of his face, while leaving dark hair and ears partly visible. The background is filled with heavy uneven blue crayon scribbles for sky, a small simplified sea-and-beach scene at the lower left with exactly 3 horizontal color bands: dark blue ocean, green shoreline, and pale yellow sand. The train is a tall yellow vertical shape on the right with black door outlines and blue handrails, drawn with shaky childlike perspective. Add large hand-lettered poster typography on the left-center in exactly 2 stacked text lines: the first line reads MR. BEAN'S in blue block letters with a smaller "MR." before the huge "BEAN'S"; the second line reads HOLIDAY in red block letters, both outlined in black and placed like a movie poster title. Attach a small luggage tag to the suitcase handle reading MR BEAN. Use wobbly unsteady crayon lines, uneven coloring that crosses the outlines, simple facial and body detail, dense scribble strokes, and a naive elementary-school drawing style while preserving a cinematic poster layout.

entries.title: Vertical Slice Double Exposure Woman

entries.prompt:
A high-contrast, double-exposure editorial portrait of a beautiful woman gazing down with a thoughtful expression. The image is creatively segmented into vertical cuts of varying heights against a textured, off-white parchment background. Atmosphere: Melancholic, introspective, and with hints of modern film noir; facial hair and skin texture rendered in great detail.

entries.title: Time Fragments Anime Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A cinematic anime-style character promotional poster titled "Time Fragments", designed in a vertical 9:16 key visual composition. The upper half features a large, softly glowing silhouette of an anime girl's face formed from intricate clock gears, floating time particles, and soft golden dust. The silhouette appears delicate, semi-transparent, and slightly fragmented, as if made of broken moments in time.
Inside the silhouette, use double exposure storytelling: layered memories transitioning from childhood to present to future - scenes like a young girl running in sunlight, a quiet emotional moment, and a distant hopeful future - all blended seamlessly with floating clock hands, drifting numbers, and light trails. The composition feels nostalgic and meaningful.
The lower section shows the full-body anime girl walking forward gently, symbolizing moving through time. She wears a modern elegant outfit with subtle vintage elements, with soft fabric movement. Her expression is calm but determined.
A thin glowing timeline-like energy line connects the silhouette above to the character below, resembling a flowing stream of time.
Color composition: left side warm golden tones and soft sunset hues (past), right side cool blue tones and soft light gradients (future), blending smoothly in the center.

entries.searchText: time fragments anime poster a vertical cinematic anime poster prompt featuring double exposure storytelling with clock gears and nostalgic light trails. a cinematic anime-style character promotional poster titled "time fragments", designed in a vertical 9:16 key visual composition. the upper half features a large, softly glowing silhouette of an anime girl's face formed from intricate clock gears, floating time particles, and soft golden dust. the silhouette appears delicate, semi-transparent, and slightly fragmented, as if made of broken moments in time. inside the silhouette, use double exposure storytelling: layered memories transitioning from childhood to present to future - scenes like a young girl running in sunlight, a quiet emotional moment, and a distant hopeful future - all blended seamlessly with floating clock hands, drifting numbers, and light trails. the composition feels nostalgic and meaningful. the lower section shows the full-body anime girl walking forward gently, symbolizing moving through time. she wears a modern elegant outfit with subtle vintage elements, with soft fabric movement. her expression is calm but determined. a thin glowing timeline-like energy line connects the silhouette above to the character below, resembling a flowing stream of time. color composition: left side warm golden tones and soft sunset hues (past), right side cool blue tones and soft light gradients (future), blending smoothly in the center. edges are soft, painterly, fading into white negative space, with an ethereal anime aesthetic. ultra-detailed, cinematic lighting, depth of field, soft glow, 4k resolution, emotional storytelling, highly detailed textures. poster / flyer cinematic

entries.title: Gritty Naruto Anime Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic vertical anime movie poster in a gritty ink-and-watercolor collage style for Naruto Uzumaki. The composition centers on a huge left-facing side profile of a teenage ninja with spiky bright blond hair, blue eye, three whisker marks on his cheek, and a black forehead protector with a metal plate engraved with the leaf spiral symbol. Inside and around the silhouette of his head, blend a sepia-orange montage of exactly 8 story elements: a snarling red nine-tailed fox head at the upper right, a charging orange-clad ninja with a kunai at mid-right, a masked silver-haired ninja holding a glowing blue energy sphere at lower right, a small team of dark shinobi figures near the upper center, two blurred small character portraits in the middle, one tiny battle scene near the lower center, and black village gates and ruins layered through the background. At the bottom foreground, show the same blond ninja from behind, standing on a dark rock ledge in an orange-and-black jumpsuit with a pouch, headband tails fluttering, looking over a detailed hidden village below a rugged mountain range carved with faces. Surround the scene with expressive black ink splashes, rough brush strokes, smoky grunge textures, flying orange leaves and embers, warm burnt orange and deep black shadows against an off-white paper background. Add large vertical Japanese brush-calligraphy title text on the left reading うずまき ナルト, a small orange leaf spiral emblem below it, a red square seal stamp near the lower left reading 忍道, thin vertical Japanese tagline text on the right reading 火影になるために, and smaller vertical Japanese text near the title reading 木ノ葉の忍、誇りを胸に。. At the bottom center, add small serif roman text reading "NARUTO UZUMAKI" with a tiny subtitle line beneath it. Use cinematic poster lighting, high detail, dynamic asymmetrical layout, traditional Japanese ink painting texture, anime accuracy, no photorealism.

entries.title: Needle-Felt Country Diorama
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Country: [INSERT COUNTRY NAME]

A miniature felt diorama made of fluffy yarn, wool, and needlework, designed as a single cohesive small world (not a collage), reflecting the real landscape, culture, and daily life of the country.

Structure:
- Select 4-7 naturally integrated elements (landscape, architecture, transport, street life, culture)
- Everything must flow together as one environment

Foreground:
Everyday life - small shops, cafes, markets, people interacting, local clothing, street details, subtle movement, warm human presence

Midground:
Connecting flow - streets, bridges, rivers, paths, transport, cultural spaces that guide the eye naturally from front to back

Background:
One strong identity anchor - landmark, skyline, mountain, or symbolic landscape clearly representing the country (keep it clean, not overcrowded)

Style:
Handmade wool felt, yarn, needle-felt textures, visible fibers, soft edges, miniature craftsmanship, premium diorama realism

Lighting:
Warm golden hour or bright noon, soft shadows, clear visibility, gentle glow enhancing depth

Color:
Soft but saturated palette reflecting the country's natural tones (greens, sky blues, architectural hues, cultural accents), warm and balanced

Composition:
Vertical frame, balanced or centered perspective, slight top-down or immersive angle, clear foreground-midground-background depth

Mood:
Warm, emotional, calm, refined - like a handcrafted fairy-tale version of real life (not childish)

Rules:
- No logos or text overlays
- No collage-style composition
- No random symbolic clutter
- Keep it realistic but stylized as a handmade miniature world

Quality:
16K, ultra-detailed, hyper-realistic miniature textures, cinematic depth, sharp focus

output_goal:
A single, cohesive felt diorama world that instantly conveys the identity and atmosphere of the chosen country through integrated landscape, culture, and daily life
entries.description: Creates a charming, cohesive miniature world made of felt and yarn, depicting the unique landscape and culture of a specific country.

entries.title: Holographic Miku Cyber Concert
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 cyberpunk anime concert poster of Hatsune Miku performing as a gigantic translucent hologram above a packed futuristic arena. She has extremely long glowing turquoise twin-tails streaming in wide ribbons across the composition, a slim idol body, sleeveless gray-and-teal futuristic vest, teal tie, short pleated black skirt with cyan trim, thigh-high dark stockings, arm sleeves, headset, and glowing high heels. Pose her from a dramatic low angle with legs apart on a circular hologram stage, one hand holding a microphone near her mouth and the other arm reaching upward toward the viewer; place a square soft pixelated censor/blur block over the center of her face as in a generated preview. Use intense cyan, aqua, and electric blue lighting, volumetric beams shooting upward from the stage, transparent polygonal ribbons, scanlines, holographic grid patterns, floating triangle icons, particle sparks, and luminous hair strands. The arena below is filled with silhouetted audience hands and many blue glow sticks, with dark skyscraper-like trusses and LED rings in the background. Include exactly 4 visible text/UI blocks: a vertical glowing Japanese slogan on the left reading 繋がる想い、響け、未来へ。, a vertical glowing Japanese slogan on the right reading この歌が、キミの心に届きますように..., a lower-left cyan holographic song information panel with exactly 4 lines reading "♪ Universe Beat", "// Temp: 128BPM", "// Key: G#m", and "// Mode: Lydian", and a lower-right cyan holographic event panel headed ECHO×LINK with "VIRTUAL LIVE" and "2045" beneath it plus small equalizer bars and tiny technical glyphs. Make the illustration highly detailed, glossy, luminous, cinematic, high contrast, immersive, with a deep black background and radiant blue bloom, like a premium Japanese virtual idol live poster.
entries.description: Generates a dramatic vertical cyberpunk virtual idol concert poster with glowing holograms, Japanese slogans, and futuristic UI panels.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自YouMind 全量搜索库的海报条目《Holographic Miku Cyber Concert》。 关键词：cinematic、phone camera。可直接作为灵感底稿，再去高级编辑细调。

entries.title: Retro Anime Space Adventure Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a nostalgic 1990s anime-style sci-fi adventure poster set in deep space, with a star-filled blue nebula background, a large Earth-like planet at upper left, a huge cyan-blue alien creature or spacecraft silhouette looming behind the characters, and a futuristic city with antenna towers and domes along the lower horizon. In the foreground, show two adventurous children standing on a reddish rocky cliff: a girl with a red cropped T-shirt, black pants, pink sneakers, and dark wavy pigtails holding a yellow banana-shaped ray gun, and a boy with a white shirt, brown shorts, white socks, and oversized white sneakers raising one hand toward a glowing orange light. Add two cute mascot companions to the right, exactly 2: one tan bear-like mascot with a red shirt and blue scarf, and one smaller gray-brown animal mascot. Fill the sky with a fleet of exactly 24 small triangular cheese-shaped rocket ships, including 3 larger cheese rockets on the left with blue side fins and orange thruster flames, and 21 smaller cheese rockets receding into the distance. Use dramatic hand-painted cel animation colors, high contrast, crisp ink outlines, cosmic blues, orange highlights, retro VHS-era adventure composition, and a theatrical movie-poster feel. Place a large centered vertical rectangular overlay in front of the background and partly covering the giant blue figure and the boy, with a smooth muted gradient from teal blue to dark gray-purple, no text on the rectangle.
entries.description: Generates a nostalgic cel-animated sci-fi adventure poster with children, mascots, cheese rockets, a cosmic backdrop, and a central gradient overlay.

entries.title: Kirikane Gold Kimono Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical, ultra-detailed Japanese decorative portrait in the style of a luxurious byobu folding screen and kirikane cut-gold leaf craft. Show a young Japanese woman in side profile facing left, wearing an ornate deep vermilion red bridal kimono covered with gold leaf, pale cherry blossom patterns, and intricate brocade texture. Her long glossy black hair flows down her back, decorated with an elaborate cluster of red and ivory sakura hair ornaments and many dangling golden kanzashi chains. Place a flat opaque warm tan square over the center of her face, hiding facial features. The background is a radiant antique gold-leaf landscape with visible cracked foil texture, fine engraved kirikane lines, swirling rivers of gold and cream, distant Mount Fuji, dark pine silhouettes, and abundant red and white cherry blossoms blooming across the upper right and lower foreground. Use a dense gilded composition with layered metallic flakes, raised lacquer-like outlines, mosaic gold cracks, delicate floral filigree, and shimmering highlights; make it feel like traditional Japanese nihonga mixed with high-fashion portraiture. Warm golden lighting, extremely ornate surface detail, elegant asymmetrical composition, no modern objects, no text, vertical 2:3 aspect ratio.
entries.description: Generates an ornate Japanese gold-leaf portrait of a woman in a floral kimono, useful for decorative traditional art and luxury editorial visuals.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image, transform it into an ornate Japanese Rinpa-school decorative painting style while preserving the woman's pose, proportions, outfit silhouette, anonymized face block, and overall framing. Replace the modern office/window background with a lavish gold-leaf folding-screen composition. Add 5 main decorative motif groups: 1) textured gold and silver leaf cloud shapes, 2) flowing deep-blue stylized water with gold wave lines, 3) purple irises with long green leaves on the left and lower foreground, 4) pale cherry blossoms on branches in the upper right, and 5) layered white, gold, and muted floral clusters around the lower and right edges. Integrate the same Rinpa motifs onto the navy dress and white blouse as if painted or gilded on the fabric, especially gold floral sprays and wave patterns, while keeping the subject photorealistic enough to match the reference. Use rich metallic texture, elegant Japanese screen-painting ornamentation, dense decorative layering, and a harmonious gold, navy, ivory, green, and violet palette.
entries.description: Transforms a reference portrait into a lavish Japanese Rinpa-inspired gold-leaf screen illustration with decorative flowers and waves.

entries.title: Surreal Celestial Organic Architecture
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a highly detailed surreal architectural fantasy scene titled The Covenant of the Unfinished: an immense biomorphic ivory structure with smooth flowing walls, hollow oval openings, and sculptural arches curves through a misty dreamlike interior landscape. The setting blends futuristic sacred architecture, Art Nouveau organic forms, and celestial cartography. On the left, glowing golden trees and delicate plants grow inside and around large rounded alcoves, with amber glass-like orbs embedded in the walls and floating among branches. A dark reflective water channel winds through the center foreground, crossed by thin luminous gold lines like star charts and orbital paths. On the right, a broad circular white stone platform with a recessed pool or void sits above the water, while towering vertical columns and translucent curtain-like panels rise into smoky darkness. Fill the air with fine golden geometric overlays: concentric circles, arcs, constellation dots, vertical plumb lines, delicate grids, and suspended pendulum-like droplets. Use a palette of warm ivory, antique gold, deep teal gray, smoky charcoal, and soft mist white, with dramatic diffused light streaming from the upper left, glowing highlights, atmospheric fog, and reflective wet surfaces. The mood should feel mystical, unfinished, sacred, and quietly apocalyptic. Render as a vertical cinematic digital painting with ultra-fine detail, elegant composition, soft volumetric haze, luminous particles, and no people, no readable text, no modern signage.
entries.description: Generates a mystical fantasy environment combining biomorphic architecture, golden celestial diagrams, glowing gardens, and reflective water for cinematic concept art.

entries.title: Gravity-Style Space Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic sci-fi movie poster for GRAVITY in a cold blue-gray, photorealistic IMAX blockbuster style. The composition is a vertical one-sheet poster showing 2 astronauts in space: one large foreground astronaut occupying the left half of the frame, seen in close-up profile from chest to helmet, wearing a bulky white EVA suit with detailed seams, straps, red indicator lights, collar ring, backpack hardware, and a glossy black visor pushed over the face area; and one small distant astronaut drifting near the lower-right middle of the image. Place an enormous cratered moon or planet dominating the background, bright on the upper right and fading into misty shadow, with a debris field of floating rocks and dust; include about 12 prominent asteroid fragments at varying sizes, with the largest dark rock cropped at the bottom right. Obscure the foreground astronaut's face with a centered dark gray square rectangle over the visor/face area, as if a placeholder or censor block, while leaving hair, ear, helmet rim, and suit visible around it. Use dramatic backlighting, shallow depth of field, floating particles, lens haze, and realistic space photography texture. Add exactly 6 visible text elements: small text above the title reading "A FILM BY CHRISTOPHER NOLAN", the large spaced-out title "GRAVITY" across the lower center, the tagline "DON'T LET GO" beneath it, an "EXPERIENCE IT IN IMAX" mark near the bottom center, and 2 tiny studio logos/credits at the bottom left and bottom right. Keep typography thin, elegant, widely letter-spaced, white, and minimal, with the title centered over the astronaut suit and space background.
entries.description: Generates a photorealistic cinematic sci-fi poster with astronauts, lunar debris, IMAX-style typography, and a dramatic blockbuster composition.

entries.title: Radiant Angel in Golden Clouds
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic fantasy image of a radiant androgynous male angel descending through a sea of glowing clouds at sunrise, centered in a wide panoramic composition. The angel has an idealized athletic body, long flowing golden blond hair blowing in the light, a softly obscured or faceless face overwhelmed by divine radiance, bare chest, bare feet, and a wind-tossed white linen wrap draped around the waist and across one shoulder with long translucent fabric ribbons trailing downward. Show exactly two enormous feathered wings, one extending left and one extending right, spanning almost the full width of the frame; the feathers are layered, detailed, ivory and gold, backlit so their edges glow. The angel floats with legs together, arms open outward in a welcoming blessing pose, palms relaxed. Behind the head is an intense sunburst halo of warm golden white light, with dramatic volumetric rays streaming through towering cumulus clouds. The atmosphere is heavenly, serene, awe-inspiring and majestic, filled with tiny sparkling dust motes, soft lens flare, radiant mist, and high-contrast golden illumination. Use hyperrealistic digital painting / epic concept art style, ultra-detailed feathers, luminous skin, ethereal fabric motion, symmetrical composition, wide 21:9 aspect ratio, no text, no border, no modern objects.
entries.description: Generates an epic cinematic heavenly angel scene with vast glowing wings, divine sunlight, and dramatic clouds for fantasy or spiritual artwork.

entries.title: Clockwork Titan Baroque Painting
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a monumental Baroque oil painting with Romantic-era grandeur depicting a colossal golden clockwork titan emerging from stormy, radiant clouds above an ancient crowd. The titan is enormous and divine, built from intricate brass and gold gears, engraved armor plates, pistons, rings, clock faces, and celestial machinery; its head is a dense crown of rotating mechanical structures with a single blazing golden light at the center like an eye. Show the figure from a dramatic low angle, with one massive articulated hand reaching down toward the viewer in extreme foreshortening, fingers made of cylindrical metal segments and ornate joints. Behind its head, place a circular halo of glowing mechanical rings and sunburst light, sending warm rays through towering dark clouds. Below, depict a vast crowd of robed ancient people in awe, many raising their arms toward the titan; include ruined classical architecture and columns at the left and right edges for scale. Use a cinematic wide composition, chiaroscuro lighting, deep shadows, glowing amber highlights, smoky atmosphere, turbulent clouds, dense painterly brushwork, intricate detail, mythic apocalyptic mood, and museum-quality classical realism. Keep the palette dominated by antique gold, bronze, umber, charcoal gray, and warm celestial amber. No modern text, no sci-fi neon, no cartoon styling; make it feel like a lost grand master painting of a divine machine descending from heaven.
entries.description: Generates a dramatic classical oil-painting-style scene of a golden mechanical deity descending from storm clouds above an awestruck ancient crowd.
