entries.searchText: clockwork titan baroque painting generates a dramatic classical oil-painting-style scene of a golden mechanical deity descending from storm clouds above an awestruck ancient crowd. create a monumental baroque oil painting with romantic-era grandeur depicting a colossal golden clockwork titan emerging from stormy, radiant clouds above an ancient crowd. the titan is enormous and divine, built from intricate brass and gold gears, engraved armor plates, pistons, rings, clock faces, and celestial machinery; its head is a dense crown of rotating mechanical structures with a single blazing golden light at the center like an eye. show the figure from a dramatic low angle, with one massive articulated hand reaching down toward the viewer in extreme foreshortening, fingers made of cylindrical metal segments and ornate joints. behind its head, place a circular halo of glowing mechanical rings and sunburst light, sending warm rays through towering dark clouds. below, depict a vast crowd of robed ancient people in awe, many raising their arms toward the titan; include ruined classical architecture and columns at the left and right edges for scale. use a cinematic wide composition, chiaroscuro lighting, deep shadows, glowing amber highlights, smoky atmosphere, turbulent clouds, dense painterly brushwork, intricate detail, mythic apocalyptic mood, and museum-quality classical realism. keep the palette dominated by antique gold, bronze, umber, charcoal gray, and warm celestial amber. no modern text, no sci-fi neon, no cartoon styling; make it feel like a lost grand master painting of a divine machine descending from heaven. poster / flyer cinematic

entries.title: Constructivist Anime Poster Art
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Constructivist graphic design poster, pure color block style, vector graphic style, no substitutions, no shadows, no lighting effects. The theme is Violet Evergarden, with colors matching the character design. The character's body proportions should align with the art style. Clothing is represented using large areas of solid color. Half-body or mostly half-body composition, with the character centered. Geometric shapes (squares, circles, diagonal lines) surround the character to construct the visual layout. The shapes participate in the composition but must not cover the face. All color details must be solid color blocks. Edges should be sharp, clean, and textureless. Overall style: modern graphic design poster, not illustration. 9:16 vertical format.

entries.title: Travel Photo Monthly Calendar Card
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Based on the real travel photo I uploaded, generate a 9:16 aspect ratio 'Monthly Calendar Card'.

[1. Execution Method (Most Important)]
This is a photo editing task, not a regeneration. You must use the original photo as the base layer:
- Keep the person's features, expression, hairstyle, and posture completely unchanged.
- Preserve original lighting, color temperature, and shadow relationships.
- No skin smoothing, brightening, repainting, or stylization.
- Do not change environment, composition, or color atmosphere.
- The original photo must look untouched.

[2. Permitted Operations (Overlay Only)]
Only design layers may be added over the original photo:
- Gradient extension on the bottom 30% (for the calendar).
- Soft translucent mask (to ensure text readability).
- Calendar layout + Month Title + Copywriting.
Prohibited: Repainting subject/background, changing overall tone, or applying design filters.

[3. Color Rules]
Colors must be extracted from the current image (main/secondary/accent colors). Only slight desaturation and brightness unification allowed. Maintain authentic color feel.

[4. Layout Structure]
Top 70%: Original photo (untouched).
Bottom 30%: Gradient + Calendar area (natural transition). Must look like a magazine page, not a template calendar.

[5. Calendar Content]
Automatically generate the corresponding year and month:
- Title: July 2026 / 2026.07
- Days: Mon Tue Wed Thu Fri Sat Sun
- Dates: Arranged according to a real calendar, strictly aligned.

[6. Copywriting Rules]
Length: 8-16 characters. Max two lines. No exclamation marks. No clichés or life lessons. Use emotional fragments or atmospheric sentences.

[7. Selection Advice]
Prefer side profiles, tilted heads, or dynamic movements over close-up front-facing portraits to reduce AI facial distortion risk.

Final Core Rule: Do not make a 'better' photo; lightly place a design layer over the existing one.
entries.description: A detailed layout prompt for transforming personal travel photos into aesthetic monthly calendar cards, emphasizing non-destructive editing and professional typography.

entries.title: Shining Poster as Kids Crayon Art
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image, recreate the same poster composition and character placement but transform it into a creepy-cute children's crayon drawing. Keep the woman peeking from the right with the knife and the broken-door framing, but simplify everything into hand-drawn colored-pencil/crayon textures on a clean white paper background. Replace the dark horror mood with playful kindergarten art elements while preserving the unsettling scene underneath. Add exactly 2 smiling clouds, 1 rainbow arch above the character, 1 teddy bear at the bottom left, 1 bunny at the bottom right, 1 lollipop on the left, 1 wrapped candy near the title, 6 stars scattered around, and 3 small hearts. Redraw the movie title at the bottom as large rainbow crayon letters reading "THE SHINING," with each letter brightly colored and childlike. Make it look naïve, cheerful, scribbly, and imperfect, but still subtly eerie.

entries.title: Noir Mafia Boss Car Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a hyper-realistic cinematic square portrait of a modern mafia boss seated inside a luxury black car at night, framed from the chest up in a 1:1 movie-poster composition. He wears a tailored black three-piece suit with a white dress shirt, black textured tie, black waistcoat, and a crisp white pocket square. His dark wavy hair is sharply detailed, while the entire central face area is covered by a flat opaque brown rectangular censor block, obscuring all facial features. Wisps of cigar smoke curl beside the left side of his head, even though the cigar itself is mostly out of frame, adding a noir crime-drama atmosphere. The car interior is glossy black leather and chrome, with the open door frame arcing behind him and a dark tinted window on the right. Outside the car, show a blurred city street with warm bokeh lights and a distant tower silhouette under a stormy, moody sky. Use cool desaturated tones, high contrast lighting, sharp fabric texture, crisp smoke detail, shallow depth of field, dramatic shadows, premium 8K hyper-realistic photography, cinematic noir style.

entries.title: Autumn Willow Hanfu Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical cinematic fantasy fashion poster in an elegant historical East Asian aesthetic: a young woman, a graceful noblewoman with chestnut-brown hair in a low bun decorated with tiny floral hairpins, stands in side profile beside a shallow reflective stream under an old willow tree. Her face is intentionally covered by a soft square warm-toned blur, while the rest of the figure is sharp and detailed. She wears layered cream and beige embroidered hanfu robes with red floral patterns, long wide sleeves, a pleated skirt, and flowing rust-red ribbons, holding a large cream paper parasol painted with delicate red blossoms and exposed wooden ribs over her shoulder. The scene contains exactly one woman, one open parasol, one massive dark twisting willow trunk, many long golden hanging willow branches, clusters of pale white flowers around her feet, scattered rocks, and one calm stream at the bottom reflecting warm light. Use a warm late-autumn golden-hour palette, dreamy shallow depth of field, volumetric backlight, soft bokeh, highly detailed fabric embroidery, painterly realism mixed with luxury editorial photography, 9:16 poster composition, centered full-body figure slightly left of center. Add a vertical calligraphy title to the right of the woman reading 茵悼晽萱弥旁, with two tiny butterfly motifs near it, and below it add a small elegant serif subtitle reading INICE SOND MIOSE SURTAL AUTMON. At the very bottom, include several narrow centered lines of tiny decorative serif credit text, intentionally mostly unreadable, like an art-book poster footer. Maintain a serene, poetic, autumnal mood with intricate natural textures and no modern objects.

entries.title: Fantasy GPTImage2 Skill Banner
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A richly detailed fantasy workshop poster in a wide cinematic composition, centered on a large hand-painted black brushstroke banner with glowing golden calligraphy reading GPTImage2Skill. The scene is a cozy magical studio inside a wooden cavern or ancient scholar's hut, packed with warm amber lantern light, glowing UI icons, scrolls, tools, potion bottles, and framed artworks, with a distant mystical mountain landscape visible through the opening behind the banner. Arrange exactly 9 human figures total: 6 cheerful chibi mythic apprentices inspired by Journey to the West, 1 elderly master seated at center with white hair in twin buns and a long white beard, and 2 tall elegant fantasy women standing on the right side. Several faces are intentionally obscured by soft blurred rectangles. The apprentices have round expressive faces, small stocky bodies, topknots, colorful traditional outfits in purple, green, red, orange, yellow, and blue, and energetic triumphant poses as if showing off creations. The old master sits calmly in the middle, hands resting on a staff, surrounded by the children. The 2 women on the right wear ornate robes and gold accessories, one crowned, posed like mysterious patrons or spirit queens. Include exactly 8 showcased image boards or screens held by the characters: 1 herbal tea package design with Chinese-style layout and green drink imagery, 1 anime warrior character illustration with electric blue effects, 1 monochrome product sketch sheet or UI wireframe page, 1 mobile app interface mockup on a tablet, 1 luxury perfume bottle product photo, 1 small bird wildlife photograph, 1 dark fantasy landscape painting, and 1 blue analytics dashboard screen. Surround the group with exactly 7 glowing interface/sign elements: 1 code monitor in the upper left, 1 neon puzzle-piece icon, 1 neon network-node icon, 1 neon cube icon, 1 neon image-frame icon, 1 glowing sign reading "PLUGIN", and 1 glowing sign reading "SKILL". Add 2 illuminated floating scrolls with stylized code-like lines, one near the top right and one near the bottom center foreground. The environment should feel busy, celebratory, and handcrafted, mixing Chinese myth, generative AI creativity, game art, app design, product photography, dashboards, and illustration. Use ultra-detailed digital painting, storybook fantasy aesthetics, dramatic rim lighting, warm gold and orange highlights, teal-blue magical accents, layered depth, dense props, whimsical sparks, and a polished promotional banner look.
entries.description: A cinematic fantasy poster showing mythic chibi apprentices presenting eight kinds of AI-generated artwork around a central GPTImage2Skill title, ideal for promotional banners about image prompting and creative tools.

entries.title: Celestial Planet Champagne Fan Art
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A luxurious fantasy anime illustration set in deep outer space, showing a close-up of a slender hand in a glossy black glove emerging from a white astronaut sleeve and delicately holding an ornate crystal champagne flute. The glass is highly decorative, made of transparent iridescent crystal with intricate gold filigree, gemstone settings, and a huge translucent bow tied near the rim, with long sheer ribbons and dangling jeweled chains, stars, beads, and crystal charms flowing outward in elegant arcs. Inside the flute are 7 cute chibi planets with simple round eyes and tiny mouths, floating like sparkling soda bubbles: 1 small gray moonlike planet near the top, 1 red planet, 1 orange planet with sleepy eyelashes, 1 bright blue Earth-like planet with green continents, 1 dark blue planet, 1 pale beige striped ringed planet, and 1 mint-turquoise planet near the bottom. The bowl and stem of the glass are filled with glittering gems, tiny bubbles, and refracted rainbow light. The background is a rich star field with a luminous purple-blue galaxy band sweeping diagonally across the scene, dense twinkling stars, and a glowing circular planet or logo in the upper right in blue, violet, and cyan gradients containing a white symbol. Use a magical celestial idol aesthetic, ultra-detailed anime painting, radiant highlights, jewel-like transparency, dreamy cosmic lighting, saturated blues and violets, delicate gold linework, crisp sparkles, elegant composition, whimsical fan art mood, and a polished high-end fantasy poster finish. Include a small stylized Japanese title logo at the bottom right reading 第九惑星.

entries.title: Dada Anime Collage Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A highly detailed Dadaist mixed-media collage portrait of an androgynous anime boy centered in the composition, shown from the chest up with a calm, slightly melancholic expression and direct gaze. He has messy spiky white-gray hair and pale skin, with one visible eye rendered in a realistic anime style and the face fragmented by torn paper strips, geometric shards, and overlapping newsprint pieces. The entire figure is constructed from layered vintage newspaper clippings, technical diagrams, blueprint grids, distressed typography, cut-paper textures, and photocollage fragments, creating a deconstructed cubist look. Use a muted aged-paper palette of beige, off-white, charcoal black, faded navy blue, gray, and small accents of dark red. The background is a dense wall of torn printed pages and graphic scraps on weathered paper, with exact visible text elements including large "DADA" at the upper left, "anti-kunst" near the upper right, "Die Kunst ist tot / Es lebe / die Kunst" on the left-middle, "ZUFALL / ist / notwendig" on the lower left, oversized "6" and "No." on the left, fragmented "X", "UT", and "frag / ment" on the lower right, and partial year numerals "192" at the top right. Include exactly 3 separate realistic eye cutouts in the collage outside or partially outside the main face, 2 small bee illustrations pinned into the body area, 3 target-like circular graphics on the clothing, 1 small astronaut or suited figure photo at the upper right, 1 mechanical rocket or engine collage element at the upper left, 1 ocean-wave photo strip at the lower right, and multiple circular diagram overlays. The character's outfit should read as a futuristic high-collared jacket assembled from paper scraps and schematic fragments, with small red label details near the collar and a visible "06" marking on the chest. Composition should be vertically poster-like, tightly packed, asymmetrical, and editorial, with gritty tactile paper edges, glue seams, xerox noise, ink smudges, and strong contrast between organic portrait features and abstract graphic construction. Style: avant-garde Dada, Bauhaus-inflected collage, manga portrait fused with archival print ephemera, ultra-detailed, textured, flat frontal view, no clean digital gradients, no modern glossy finish.

entries.title: Cubist Futuristic Android Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A moody cubist geometric portrait of a futuristic humanoid figure, shown from the chest up and filling the frame, with the face intentionally obscured by a large soft-edged rectangular blur centered over the facial area. The composition is built from sharp interlocking triangular and polygonal planes, like fractured glass or faceted metal, forming the hair, head, neck, shoulders, and body armor. Use a dark palette dominated by navy blue, slate, charcoal, black, steel gray, and off-white, with small but striking accents of deep red and muted rust. The figure has angular black hair rendered as jagged crystalline shards, one visible ear on the right side, a pale faceted neck, and broad armored shoulders. The torso resembles a sci-fi mech or android shell in white and blue-gray panels, with the printed number 01 on the upper chest and 2 visible circular mechanical ports or lens-like details: 1 large dark circular component near the lower center chest and 1 smaller dark circular component on the right shoulder plate. In the background, include 2 circular celestial or abstract orb forms: 1 pale moon-like circle in the upper left and 1 dark red orb on the right side, plus 2 sets of vertical architectural bar shapes, one along the left edge and one near the upper right edge, integrated into the same faceted abstract structure. Style it as an oil painting with heavy brush texture on canvas, combining cubism, futurist portraiture, and abstract sci-fi design. The mood is somber, enigmatic, and cinematic, with strong contrast, fragmented lighting, and a symmetrical-but-broken composition. Portrait orientation, tightly cropped, highly detailed, textured, gallery-quality artwork.

entries.title: Gothic Stained-Glass Mecha Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark, ornate, Pre-Raphaelite-inspired portrait of a red-haired anime heroine standing front-facing in a dense cathedral garden, wearing a glossy red futuristic plug suit with black and dark blue paneling and small green chest accents. She has very long, slightly tousled auburn hair with two subtle red hair clips near the crown, pale skin, and a solemn, devotional pose: one hand resting over her chest and the other loosely holding a small bouquet of white lilies downward. Behind her head is a large circular stained-glass halo with intricate gold tracery, blue and ruby jewel tones, and star motifs, creating the effect of a saint icon. The background is packed with climbing vines, deep crimson roses, blooming white lilies, antique brass candleholders, and a faint statue-like female figure recessed on the right side. The composition is centered, symmetrical, and waist-to-thigh portrait framing, with rich oil-painting texture, moody chiaroscuro lighting, aged varnish tones, high detail, gothic floral decoration, sacred-art atmosphere, and an elegant fusion of anime mecha design and medieval religious iconography.

entries.title: Japanese Drama Collage Film Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic Japanese movie poster collage in a glossy sentimental coming-of-age style, designed like an official theatrical key visual. The composition centers on a large close-up portrait of a young Japanese woman with shoulder-length softly wavy brown hair, natural makeup, and a white blouse, lit by warm golden sunset light and rim light around the hair. Surround the central portrait with a dense montage of 9 supporting visual elements: 1) top left, the heroine as a high school student in a dark school uniform with a ribbon tie, seen in profile against a glowing sunset sky; 2) mid left, a smaller school-uniform portrait of the heroine; 3) left lower-mid, a small fluffy long-haired brown dog looking toward camera; 4) top right, the heroine as an office worker typing on a laptop indoors at night in warm room light; 5) right middle, a romantic silhouette scene of a woman and man standing by a riverside railing at sunset; 6) right lower-middle, a ferret curled in a soft blanket looking outward; 7) lower right, a graduate in cap and gown holding a diploma; 8) lower center-left, the heroine sitting on a shoreline from behind beside the dog and the ferret; 9) a stack of 2 small tilted snapshot photos on the right side, one showing a concert or live-house scene from behind and one showing the heroine riding a bicycle by the water. In the lower left background, include a large red torii gate standing in the sea near a city skyline, reminiscent of Miyajima, under a vivid orange-pink twilight sky with reflective water. Add soft cherry blossoms framing the lower right edge. The overall mood should be emotional, inspirational, bittersweet, and life-affirming, with rich amber, rose, and violet tones, cinematic depth, poster-grade compositing, soft bloom, and polished film-poster typography. Prominently place the large Japanese title 私という奇跡 across the center-bottom in bold white brush-calligraphy, with the English subtitle The Miracle of Me below it in elegant serif type. Add multiple lines of small white Japanese catchphrase text integrated around the collage, including reflective quotes near the upper left, upper right, left middle, and bottom area. Include a centered Japanese tagline below the title, small production credits near the bottom center, and the year plus ROADSHOW at the bottom right. Make it look like a premium 2024 Japanese drama film poster about one woman's life journey through school, work, love, pets, music, and graduation.
entries.description: A cinematic Japanese-style movie poster showing a young woman's life story through a warm sunset collage, ideal for inspirational personal-story or faux film-poster generation.

entries.title: Anime Silhouette Character Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Use a cinematic, Kodak film style with slightly reduced saturation, high dynamic range, and realistic contrast.
Lens: 85mm lens, f/1.8 aperture, shallow depth of field, RAW photo-level realism with rich details.

Generate a cinematic character poster of "Frieren" from Frieren: Beyond Journey's End.
It should be both a character poster and a reflection of her story.

Use a large, elegant side-profile silhouette of the character's face occupying half of the frame. Inside it, depict smaller full-body figures and actions with a sense of depth (near large, far small), with a slight ultra-wide lens feeling.

The character's appearance and clothing must stay true to the original design-intelligent, cool, and refined, with a subtle ink-brush glow. Movements should feel smooth and natural.

Facial features and outfit details should adapt from the original design. She should hold her original weapon, and her expression and pose must match her character personality.

Generate it as a 9:16 poster.

entries.title: Character Promotion Poster Framework
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
[Basic Specifications]
- Character promotion poster
- Vertical (9:16) unified key visual
- Composition intended for series development

[Character Design]
- Faithfully reflect the reference image design (hairstyle/face/outfit/motifs)
- Accurately reproduce distinctive elements for high recognizability

[Compositional Structure]
- Hierarchical structure with 'large top, small bottom'
- Upper half: Enlargement of symbolic elements (head/facial outline/mask/upper body silhouette)
- Lower half: Full-body character placement
- Stable standing pose or light movement

[Main Visual Design]
- Strong iconic giant silhouette at the top
- Focus on visual impact
- Convey the character's symbol at a glance

[Collage/Double Exposure]
- Multiple elements contained within the giant silhouette
- Layering scenes, symbolic motifs, and environments
- Building a narrative
- Integrating into mist, ink, or negative space

[World-Building Expression]
- Multiple scenes based on the character's worldview
- Placement of symbolic motifs
- Movement or staging of smaller characters
- Environmental details (nature/architecture/atmosphere)

[Layout (Left-Right Composition)]
- Complementary elements placed on the left and right
- Providing rhythm to the composition
- Creating narrative tension

[Gaze Direction Design]
- A single visual line flowing from top to bottom
- Upper giant silhouette -> internal collage -> lower full-body character
- Continuous visual guidance design

[Margins & Edge Treatment]
- Large use of negative space
- Edge effects: ink bleeding, soft blur, fragmentary decomposition

[Aesthetics & Concept]
- Reflecting Eastern aesthetics: negative space, presence, imperfection
- Coexistence of silence and tension

[Style & Tone]
- Unified visual appearance
- Refined expression
- Restrained tone, avoiding information overload

[Finish Quality]
- High depth of field expression
- Strong visual impact
- Emphasis on storytelling
- Completion level suitable for a poster series

entries.title: Anime Now Playing School Route Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A stylish anime illustration designed like a futuristic music player poster, showing 3 views of the same high-school boy walking home in a quiet suburban Japanese street at late afternoon. The character is a slim handsome teenage boy with short tousled black hair, light skin, and black wired earbuds, wearing a pale blue short-sleeve check-pattern school shirt and a black backpack slung over one shoulder. Arrange him in 3 large overlapping side-profile figures across the image from left to right, each showing a slightly different walking pose and angle, with his face intentionally obscured by a soft blurred rectangular block. The background is a sunlit residential school-route road with utility poles, dense overhead power lines, chain-link fences, trees, sidewalk shadows, and a visible Japanese street sign reading 通学路 and 学園前駅方面. Use a clean cool palette of light blue, gray, black, white, and muted green, accented with bright orange geometric blocks. Frame the image as a graphic design composition with dense UI-like overlays, including a large bottom banner reading now playing, a large right-side time display reading 17 45, a top-left label reading AFTER SCHOOL ROUTE / 17:45, a left vertical track list labeled TRACK with 5 numbered entries 01, 02, 03, 04, 05 and 02 highlighted, a top-right phrase reading KEEP THE MUSIC GOING., and a bottom-right black panel reading GOOD VIBES ONLY. Add barcode-like stripes, arrows, chevrons, dotted grids, thin technical lines, cropped corner borders, and layered translucent panels for a modern posterized techno-aesthetic. Make it feel like an ikemen anime playlist cover, calm, urban, fashionable, and cinematic.

entries.title: Retro Pop Travel Family Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A bold, energetic travel poster in a retro pop-art collage style, vertical composition. The background is a vivid saturated orange with layered textured paper grain, halftone dots, paint splatters, rough brush streaks, diagonal stripe patterns, checkerboard accents, abstract blobs, and hand-drawn white doodles including 4 starburst shapes, 3 zigzag marks, and several short accent strokes. Dominating the upper half is the huge word Go! in oversized comic-style hand-lettered typography, white with rough sketchy brush outlines, slight 3D depth, and yellow paint accents, ending with a dramatic exclamation mark. In the lower right and center foreground, show a cheerful family of 4 on vacation as cutout photo-style figures with thick white sticker outlines: 1 adult man, 1 adult woman, 1 boy, and 1 girl. All four are looking upward and pointing excitedly toward the upper left or upper right, conveying enthusiasm and motion. The man stands on the right, tall, wearing a light cap, white T-shirt, open yellow overshirt, blue jeans, and a backpack strap visible, with one arm raised straight up and finger pointing. The woman stands slightly left of him, wearing a straw hat and a loose white blouse, smiling and pointing upward. In front, the boy wears dark sunglasses, a light jacket over a yellow shirt, and a backpack, pointing diagonally upward. Beside him, the girl wears a straw hat and a yellow-and-white striped top, pointing upward while holding or standing close to a bright yellow hard-shell suitcase with visible telescoping handle in the bottom-right corner. Use a warm palette of orange, yellow, and white with high contrast, playful summer-travel mood, dynamic diagonal flow, poster-like advertising energy, mixed media look combining photographic people and illustrated graphic design.

entries.title: Epic Narrative Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
[Collection-Grade Travel Epic Poster · Universal Meta Prompt]

Based on the multiple character photos I uploaded, automatically generate a collection-grade epic narrative travel poster.

The silhouette of the first attached image is the default main outline reference. Extract the character's profile, body posture, hair outline, clothing silhouette, and overall temperament to form the main subject silhouette.

Other attached images are used as real photo collage materials. The character's image, posture, clothing, hairstyle, accessories, light, shadow, and action moments in the original photos must be preserved as much as possible. Do not generate strangers, and do not change gender, age, face shape, hairstyle, outfit, accessories, or physique.

Character consistency requirement: All characters appearing must come from the same person or group in the uploaded photos. The model needs to automatically extract character features. Do not beautify the person into a completely different face.

Travel Destination: Kunming

Automatically generate the corresponding travel visual world based on the filled city or attraction, including landmark landscapes, urban landmarks, street atmosphere, architectural styles, cultural symbols, etc.

The visual structure uses 'Main Silhouette Outline + Real Photo Collage + Double Exposure Narrative.'

The character outline from the first image serves as the large main visual, with the complete narrative world of the destination growing naturally inside the silhouette. Other images are embedded as photo collages inside or around the silhouette. Edges can be softly merged with watercolor, paper grain, mist, light spots, film scratches, or journal stickers.

Spatial layers must be clear: Foreground is the real moment of the person; Middle ground is the travel scene (streets, bridges, etc.); Background is the skyline or mountains.

Style: Cinematic travel collection poster, double exposure, real photo collage, light watercolor texture integration. The image should be sophisticated, restrained, poetic, and airy.

Text system combines Chinese and English: Main Title (Kunming + English name), subtitle, and short travel quotes.

Output Ratio: 3:4 or 4:5. Texture: High-definition, collection-grade, cinematic poster quality.

entries.title: Ink-Wash Han Li Character Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vertical new-Chinese-style fantasy character poster on textured xuan paper, rendered in elegant monochrome ink-wash with muted teal accents and very subtle gold line tracery. Center a full-body male cultivator named 韩立 standing on a dark lakeside rock in a misty mountain landscape. He is tall, calm, and scholarly, with long black hair tied half-up and the rest flowing in the wind, wearing layered hanfu robes in deep blue-green and pale gray: a dark outer cloak with wide sleeves, a pale inner robe, embroidered trim, ornate waist ornaments, tassels, and flowing translucent fabric ribbons. His expression should feel composed, aloof, and immortal. One hand hangs naturally, while the other is slightly raised, holding a faint swirling magical aura of pale blue-white spiritual energy. The composition uses strong negative space and a refined poster layout: the character slightly right of center, towering ink mountains fading into fog behind him, bamboo on the upper right, a quiet lake below, a small pavilion on a rocky outcrop at the lower right, sparse trees on the left shore, and delicate drifting petals near the ground. Add thin meandering gold decorative lines across the background and foreground. The overall palette is restrained, soft, and atmospheric, with a literati painting mood and cinematic character-poster polish. Include exactly 4 text elements integrated into the design: large vertical black calligraphy on the upper left reading "韩立", a small red seal near it, one vertical poetic line below it reading "青衫临风,道心如渊", a small Romanized name "Han Li" beneath, and one small centered line of Chinese text at the bottom reading 行于凡尘之外,心向大道之巅. Make the image feel like a premium series poster for 凡人修仙传, with accurate brush-calligraphy typography, soft mist depth, flowing cloth motion, and an ethereal immortal-hero presence.

entries.title: Monochrome Anime Horror Film Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A haunting monochrome Japanese animated movie poster in gritty ink-wash and charcoal style, high contrast black, white, and gray only, with a tall vertical composition. The scene is viewed from inside a dark room toward an open doorway. On the right stands a young boy in silhouette, seen from behind in three-quarter view, with short messy hair, wearing a black-and-white horizontal striped T-shirt, loose dark pants, and sneakers, quietly staring out through the door. The left side shows the open wooden door itself, rough and weathered, with a visible round knob and a vertical line of Japanese text painted on it that reads 「開けたのは、ぼくじゃない」. Beyond the doorway is a surreal towering mountain or jagged monolith, centered in the distance, painted like a hand-drawn ink illustration, with a glowing white zigzag path or crack snaking from the base to a bright opening near the summit. Small floating rock fragments hover around the mountain. At the foot of the mountain, exactly 4 tiny human silhouettes stand together on a dark ridge facing it. The bright doorway light spills into the room and transforms into a long black shadow stretching toward the viewer across the wooden floor; at the end of that shadow is a demonic face shape with exactly 2 white almond-shaped eyes embedded in the darkness. The floorboards and walls are crosshatched and heavily textured, creating an eerie psychological horror atmosphere. Add Japanese festival-style laurels and release copy on the upper right in 3 stacked award blocks with elegant serif typography, plus large release date text reading "8.28 ROADSHOW". Place the film title huge across the lower middle in distressed white hand-painted letters: "RAISE", with smaller katakana beneath it reading 「レイズ」. Add a Japanese tagline centered along the bottom above the credits: 「君の『影』が、世界を救う。」 Include dense, tiny Japanese credit lines and a website at the very bottom, styled like a real theatrical poster. Overall mood: ominous, poetic, surreal coming-of-age horror fantasy, indie anime film poster, dramatic negative space, cinematic poster design, unsettling but beautiful.
entries.description: This prompt generates a stylized Japanese horror-fantasy movie poster, ideal for fictional film branding, trailer key art, or cinematic concept development.

entries.prompt:
Subject: A sharp, high-contrast side-profile portrait of a handsome man with a defined jawline, short stubble, and voluminous, textured dark hair styled upwards.

Style & Composition: A fusion of realistic photography and abstract digital glitch art. The subject is rendered in stark black and white, set against a clean, minimalist white background.

Color Palette: Strictly monochromatic (deep blacks and bright whites) with aggressive, vibrant splashes of crimson red.

Texture: Gritty, ink-wash textures and distressed digital overlays that suggest a modern noir or cyberpunk editorial feel.

Details: Hyper-realistic skin texture, individual hair strands visible, high-grain film aesthetic.

Aspect ratio is 9:16

entries.title: Rain-Soaked Anonymous Cowboy
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic black-and-white portrait of a solitary cowboy standing and walking directly toward the camera on a flooded dirt road in open countryside during heavy rain. He is centered in the frame, full body visible, wearing a dark wide-brimmed cowboy hat, a long soaked leather trench coat layered over dark clothes, and heavy boots splashing through shallow water. His face is completely obscured by a smooth rectangular blur or censor block, creating an anonymous, unsettling presence. To the left side of the road stands 1 simple wooden cross planted in the grass. The background is a bleak flat landscape with low grasses, a winding muddy track disappearing into the distance, and dramatic storm clouds hanging low across the sky. Emphasize wet textures, reflective puddles, raindrops streaking downward, moody contrast, gritty realism, and a stark ominous atmosphere like a neo-western thriller still. Shot straight-on at eye level with symmetrical composition, centered subject, slight depth haze in the distance, high detail, monochrome, photorealistic.

entries.title: Rain-Soaked Dark Western Gunslinger
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic black-and-white neo-western scene in heavy rain: a lone cowboy gunslinger walks directly toward the camera down a muddy road, centered in the frame, full body visible. He wears a dark wide-brim cowboy hat, a long soaked leather duster coat, dark shirt, dark pants, gloves, and boots, with rainwater glistening across every surface. His face is obscured in deep shadow for an anonymous, intimidating presence. In one hand he carries a revolver pointed downward. Behind him on the right side of the road stands or slowly follows a dark horse, also wet from the rain, slightly out of focus but clearly visible. On the left side of the road is a single wooden grave cross planted in the ground. The landscape is flat, barren, and desolate, with open fields stretching into the distance beneath low storm clouds. The road is filled with puddles and reflective wet mud, with visible splashes around the cowboy's boots. Use dramatic storm lighting, high contrast, deep blacks, silvery highlights, and a gloomy, brooding atmosphere. Composition should feel like a dark western movie poster, symmetrical and confrontational, with the central figure dominating the image, rain streaks falling vertically across the whole frame, sharp texture on the coat and mud, shallow depth of field in the background, and an overall gritty, somber, menacing tone.

entries.title: Neon GPT 5.5 Celebration Party
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vibrant celebratory party poster-style illustration set inside a packed nightclub or event venue, viewed from behind a central person in a light beige or white hoodie and dark jeans, standing in the foreground with one arm raised triumphantly toward the stage. The scene is filled with colorful confetti, curled streamers, balloons, neon signs, and warm marquee lights, with a festive purple, pink, blue, and gold color palette. At the center top, a large glowing marquee sign with a black background and round incandescent bulbs reads "Hosted by" in warm golden script above huge neon letters reading "GPT 5.5," with "GPT" in electric blue and "5.5" in bright pink-purple. Around the venue are exactly 6 visible text elements besides the main marquee: a tall vertical banner on the left reading "5/5 LET'S CELEBRATE," a digital clock-like sign in the upper right reading "5:55 PM" with a small party hat icon, a circular neon sign on the right reading "5/5," a large purple balloon on the lower right reading "LET'S PARTY!," a framed checklist sign on a small round table at lower left reading "TODAY'S PLAN:" followed by 5 checked lines - "GOOD VIBES," "GREAT PEOPLE," "AWESOME MUSIC," "UNLIMITED FUN," and "POWERED BY GPT 5.5" with a small heart - and a gift box at lower right labeled "THANK YOU" on top and "FOR BEING PART OF THE FUTURE" on the side. Include a cheering crowd with many raised hands and silhouettes facing a stage with purple-blue concert lighting beams. Add exactly 7 prominent balloon elements: a cluster of 4 balloons on the left in gold, purple, red, and teal; 2 balloons on the lower right in teal and gold; and 1 large purple text balloon on the right. Include a disco ball in the upper right corner, a person on the left wearing a dark cap and dark T-shirt with a glowing robot logo and the text "GPT 5.5" on the back, and a matching branded takeaway cup on the table. The atmosphere should feel like an energetic tech-company celebration or product launch party, cinematic, glossy, highly detailed, whimsical, and polished, with dramatic backlighting, glowing reflections, saturated neon, and a sense of motion from the falling confetti and dancing crowd.

entries.title: Japanese Collage Portrait in Crimson
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A refined vertical fine-art portrait of a Japanese actress and singer shown from about the waist up, centered and facing forward, with dark black wavy mullet-length hair brushed back from the forehead and softly framing the ears and neck, wearing a dramatic deep crimson chiffon blouse or dress with oversized translucent ruffles at the collar, chest, and sleeve cuffs. Her hands are gently folded at the lower center of the frame in a calm formal pose. The face area is deliberately obscured by a flat rectangular skin-toned block with no facial features visible, creating an anonymized editorial-art effect. The background is an elaborate Japanese-inspired collage made of torn washi-paper textures and gilded surfaces, with exactly 2 red torii gates on the right side at different scales, exactly 1 dark five-story pagoda on the left side, red maple leaves across the upper right, bamboo silhouettes on the upper left, and delicate gold botanical motifs in the lower corners. Use a rich palette of burgundy, vermilion, burnt umber, black, teal, parchment, and gold leaf, with painterly brushwork, softly blended shadows, antique screen painting aesthetics, and luxurious museum-quality lighting. The composition should feel elegant, moody, and ceremonial, mixing contemporary portrait photography with traditional Japanese byobu and nihonga influences.

entries.title: Japanese Collage Fashion Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A stylized waist-up to three-quarter portrait of a Japanese woman inspired by Non, Nōnen Rena, centered and facing forward with a calm, poised expression and her hands gently clasped at her waist. She has medium-length dark black hair, softly layered and swept back from the face with a slightly tousled crown, and fair skin. She wears a luxurious deep crimson velvet dress with a dramatic oversized ruffled collar, intricate vertical lace trim down the bodice, and matching lace-trimmed cuffs, giving the look a romantic vintage elegance. Render the figure in a painterly, polished editorial illustration style with realistic anatomy, soft shading, rich fabric texture, and subtle highlights on the velvet. Place her against a handmade torn-paper collage background themed around Japan, composed of layered textured paper in indigo blue, teal, sage green, cream, and gold leaf tones. Include exactly 5 visible torii gate silhouettes scattered across the background, exactly 3 pagoda silhouettes on the right side and lower right, and painted bamboo leaves integrated into several paper layers. The collage should feel artisanal and refined, with irregular ripped edges, overlapping papers, and decorative gold accents. Vertical composition, full image dominated by the figure, with the background serving as a cultural, elegant backdrop. No text, no border, no extra objects, sophisticated museum-poster aesthetic.

entries.title: Cyber Bunny Visor Space Warrior
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic anime sci-fi action illustration of a floating girl in deep space, centered in a full-body dynamic pose as if lunging toward the viewer. She has black short slightly messy bob hair and wears a sleek black futuristic visor headset with 2 glowing horizontal cyan display bars across the eyes, a small red HUD readout showing a heart icon and "356 bpm," and a small yellow "42" indicator on the lower left of the visor. The headset has 2 upright bunny-ear antennae and round ear-cover side modules. Her expression is calm and confident with only the lower half of her face visible. She wears a long dark high-collar coat with a fitted silhouette, subtle armored folds, and 1 thin glowing blue seam running vertically down the front, along with black gloves and black boots. Her left arm is thrust toward the camera holding 1 oversized futuristic energy pistol with a massive barrel, faceted mechanical body, and intense electric-blue glowing core and muzzle, rendered with strong foreshortening. In her right hand she holds 1 dark katana-like sword angled backward. The coat flares outward in motion, creating a sense of zero gravity and speed. Background is a star-filled cosmic field with a bright orange-and-blue nebula halo directly behind her head and torso, plus several small rocky asteroids scattered around the frame. Dark palette overall with neon blue highlights, high contrast rim lighting, cinematic composition, ultra-detailed anime painting, sharp linework, glossy tech surfaces, action poster energy, vertical portrait format.

entries.title: Dark Japanese Alt-Rock Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic Japanese alternative rock album promotional poster in a dark cinematic photorealistic style, vertical 2:3 composition, with three young male rock band members posed heroically in the foreground. The center figure stands slightly lower and closest to camera, wearing a black leather biker jacket open at the chest, layered necklaces, a black choker, pale skin, shaggy black hair, and a moody rebellious expression. The left figure is tall and slim with messy ash-blond hair, extensive neck and chest tattoos, a distressed black shirt under a black leather jacket, layered chains, and a belt. The right figure is tall and slim with tousled light brown hair, a gray distressed military-style jacket over a black skull graphic shirt, layered necklaces, rings, visible hand tattoos, and a belt. Behind them is a ruined urban battlefield at dusk or night with smoke, sparks, tattered flags, birds or crows in the sky, crumbling buildings, backlight halos behind the two standing figures, and a gritty apocalyptic atmosphere. Add scratched film texture, cracked glass overlays, dust, embers, and high-contrast moody lighting with desaturated blacks, charcoal gray, sepia bronze, and muted steel tones. Include 13 visible text blocks integrated like a premium music poster: at the very top, small English text reading "ALTERNATIVE ROCK NEW ERA BEGINS"; 3 mid-poster song callouts, left "地上" with romanization "CHIJOU" and two lines of small Japanese copy beneath, center "解放" with romanization "KAIHOU" and two lines of small Japanese copy beneath, right "掲げろ" with romanization "KAKAGERO" and two lines of small Japanese copy beneath; one huge central Japanese headline reading "この声が、時代を変える。"; beneath it one English line "ALTERNATIVE ROCK"; beneath that one Japanese tagline line "三つの歌が、ひとつの未来を創る-"; beneath that one English tagline line "3 SONGS. 3 SOULS. 1 REVOLUTION"; then 3 bottom release blocks labeled "解放", "地上", and "掲げろ", each with its romanization and the date "2025.06.01 RELEASE"; and at the very bottom a boxed banner reading "NEW ALBUM - 2025.06.01 ON SALE". Make the typography metallic, weathered, and luminous, with the large Japanese headline dominating the lower middle. The overall feeling should be epic, rebellious, emotional, and like a high-budget visual key art poster for a Japanese alternative rock album titled around the songs 地上, 解放, and 掲げろ.
entries.description: A cinematic promotional poster for a Japanese alternative rock release, useful for album, single, or music video campaign key art.

entries.title: Anime AI Idol Magazine Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A glossy Japanese anime magazine cover for a fictional next-generation AI idol magazine, packed edge to edge with bold cover lines and neon cosmic energy. The main masthead is huge serif lettering reading "YUMEKAIRO" across the top in white with a purple glow, with a small pink banner near the top right reading "ゆめかいろマガジン". At the very top, add a slogan in Japanese: "夢がカラフルに動き出す!次世代AIアイドルマガジン". Feature 2 full-body anime girls standing together in the center, holding hands and smiling confidently at the viewer. The left girl has deep navy blue very long wavy twin-tail hair with star hair clips, large blue-green eyes, a black choker with a gold bow and star charm, an off-shoulder white frilled crop top, dark denim short shorts with a white belt and gold star accessories, black garter straps, galaxy-gradient thigh-high stockings in purple and blue with tiny stars, and white sneakers. The right girl has very long silver-lilac hair, soft teal eyes, futuristic over-ear headphones with glowing accents, an oversized white and lavender hoodie draped off the shoulders, a ribbed gray turtleneck mini dress with side cutout, white thigh-high stockings with lavender stripe markings on one leg, chunky purple sneakers, and a long purple strap accessory with a ring pendant. Give both girls a polished modern VTuber idol aesthetic, slim proportions, youthful faces, gentle blush, crisp cel shading, luminous highlights, and highly detailed fabric folds and accessories. The background is a vivid dreamy space scene with purple, pink, and electric blue nebula swirls, stars, sparkles, light streaks, and glossy magical gradients. In the top right corner, include a publication info block with "発行日 2026/4/29", price "¥777", and publisher text "ゆめかいろ出版". Put a realistic barcode at the bottom right with the digits "4 595315 007777" and along the bottom left add the website and social handle: "https://www.yumekairo.jp" and "@yumekairo_ent". Make it look like a premium commercial manga/anime magazine cover, extremely vibrant, high contrast, dense layout, polished print design, sharp focus, and stylish idol branding.

entries.title: Anime-Style Cinematic Character Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A premium anime-style cinematic character poster in vertical 9:16 composition, inspired by Japanese key visuals and double-exposure storytelling. Top section: two large opposing side-profile faces of the main characters (left and right), highly detailed, soft expression, forming a dominant silhouette composition. Their hair and outlines dissolve into ink, dust, and particles. Center: a full-body character standing confidently (hero pose), slightly below center, acting as the visual anchor. Outfit detailed, dramatic lighting, subtle glow. Inside the large silhouettes: intricate double-exposure collage showing multiple scenes - cityscapes, battlefields, architecture, symbolic environments, supporting characters, and emotional story moments. Blend everything seamlessly using fog, ink wash, smoke, and layered transparency. Mid-lower section: secondary characters arranged in cinematic grouping, dynamic poses, depth layering, slightly faded into atmosphere. Bottom: a symbolic landscape (tree, ruins, or city) emerging from mist, adding depth and narrative closure. Style: Japanese ink wash + watercolor texture + soft grain + cinematic anime rendering. Muted color palette (beige, sepia, gray, soft blue tones). High detail but soft edges. Paper texture background with large negative space. Edges dissolving into ink splatter and dust. Composition: Strong vertical flow guiding eye from top → center → bottom. Balanced symmetry left vs right. Clean, minimal, high-end poster design. Lighting: Soft diffused lighting, subtle glow highlights, atmospheric haze. Typography (optional): Minimal Japanese vertical text on sides. Small cinematic title at bottom center. Quality: Ultra-detailed, 4K, sharp focus, cinematic depth, masterpiece

entries.title: Japanese Urban Horror Novel Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark psychological horror novel cover illustration in a cinematic, gritty digital-painting style. Create a wide, ominous composite scene set in a decaying modern Japanese environment, blending a commuter train interior on the left and a late-night office on the right, with a ghostly female figure standing in the exact center foreground, shown from behind. Her long dark hair is messy and damp-looking, and her face is completely obscured by a solid black rectangular void. The palette is cold blue-gray, charcoal, dirty white, and desaturated brown, with harsh fluorescent overhead lighting and deep shadow. On the left side, show the inside of a crowded train car with 4 visible commuters: 2 standing men in business suits holding or standing beneath hanging straps, 1 seated woman in muted officewear with her face blurred or obscured, and 1 more distant passenger near the door. Include a row of hanging hand straps above them, grimy metal poles, scratched windows, and a claustrophobic perspective. In the bottom left foreground, place 1 large cracked white flowerpot containing 1 dead, withered plant with curled brown leaves and dry soil. In the center, use the female apparition as a dividing figure between the two spaces; her body and hair merge into black stains and shadow. On the right side, depict a bleak office with 3 visible workers at desks in the background under fluorescent lights, computer monitors, papers, and glass partitions. In the right foreground, show 1 cropped salaryman from chest to thigh, wearing a wrinkled white shirt and loosened dark tie, holding papers at his side; his head is cut off by the top frame, adding unease. Spread black cracks, grime, ink-like tendrils, and water-stain textures across walls, floor, and image borders so the whole scene feels infected or haunted. Add subtle motionless dread, like a cursed presence hiding in everyday life. Overlay large distressed white Japanese title text across the middle: 隙間、そのもの. Beneath it, add smaller white subtitle text: 第1日:月曜日. Use eroded, cracked, horror-style typography with rough edges, centered over the figure. The overall result should feel like a disturbing literary cover or promotional key art for a terrifying Japanese urban horror story.
entries.description: A haunting wide-format horror cover image showing a faceless female apparition between a commuter train and an office, ideal for scary novel art or thriller promotion.

entries.title: Anime Shrine Maiden Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image, turn it into a dramatic Japanese theatrical movie poster while keeping the same shrine maiden archer-swordswoman, fiery portal, bow, quiver, lightning sword, and shrine setting as the base. Push the image into a much darker, high-contrast, more detailed cinematic poster style with intense red-and-black grading, denser embers, stronger rim lighting, and a more ominous supernatural atmosphere. Add 2 demonic guardian cats in the foreground at the character's feet: 1 white cat on the left with blue glowing eyes and an open snarling mouth, and 1 black cat on the right with red glowing eyes and an open snarling mouth, both wrapped in crackling red energy. Add shadowy monster and oni faces emerging from the dark forest edges on both sides. Increase the number of flying arrows, talismans, sparks, and glowing red energy trails around the character. Preserve the central heroic composition, but format the whole image as a full Japanese film poster with layered typography. Add the top tagline in Japanese: "禁断の力が、闇を裂く-". Add 2 vertical side taglines: left side "その巫女神より授かりし退魔の刃。" and right side "闇を祓い、すべてを護るために-". Add a small genre line above the title: "退魔×巫女×神域バトルアクション". Add the main title near the bottom center in large distressed kanji: "退魔巫女", with the subtitle beneath it: "-紅蓮の神剣-". Add a credits block in small Japanese text below the title, then add the website "taimamiko-movie.jp" and the release line at the very bottom: "2025.夏 全国ロードショー". Include a small dark rectangular logo block in the top-right corner. Make it look like a polished fantasy-horror action poster for a fictional movie.

entries.title: Tianjin City Promotional Poster Prompt
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A 2026 Tianjin city promotional poster filled with a festive Spring Festival atmosphere, while combining elegant style and urban cultural heritage.
The overall image uses a 'Guochao' (national tide) illustration + double exposure artistic technique. The composition continues an S-shaped flow, with natural and smooth visual guidance, combining modern design sense with Eastern aesthetic charm.

On a pure white high-grade textured background, the image maintains large areas of white space, making the overall feel fresh, elegant, and transparent.
In the bottom right corner stands a miniature figure in traditional Chinese clothing, with a dynamic posture, waving a long red silk dance ribbon.
This red silk has a soft, elegant, and tense texture, spiraling upward in the air and naturally extending to the top left, forming a highly visually impactful flow trajectory.

As the red silk extends, it gradually transforms into a magnificent Haihe River water vein, while integrating the cultural context and geographical imagery of Tianjin, like an urban scroll connecting the past and present.
In the visual subject formed by the intersection of this 'river' and the silk, a hand-drawn panoramic map of Tianjin city is overlaid, in Guochao style, with rich layers, magnificent momentum, and exquisite, shocking details.

Key landmarks and urban elements of Tianjin are highlighted in the frame:
Tianjin Eye (prominent landmark, highly recognizable)
Haihe River (core water system running through the frame)
Jiefang Bridge (embodying urban history and industrial beauty)
Jinwan Plaza architectural complex (showing modern urban prosperity)
Century Clock (iconic landscape)
Ancient Culture Street (embodying traditional culture)
Five Great Avenues villa complex (embodying the historical style of blending East and West)
Drum Tower (embodying Tianjin's ancient charm)
Italian Style District (adding urban romance and exotic flavor)
Tianjin Port and ocean freighter elements (embodying the city's character of openness, port, and global connectivity)
Appropriately integrate cultural symbols like Yangliuqing New Year paintings, Niren Zhang clay sculptures, crosstalk culture symbols, and fried dough twists (Mahua) as decorative details to enhance regional identity.

The entire image presents a visual mood of 'river, city, bridge, port, and the fusion of past and present,' with light clouds and misty water vapor, carrying the ethereal feel of Eastern aesthetics.
Colors are mainly Chinese red, gold, elegant white, green, and light blue, with warm gold accents in some areas; the overall feel is festive but not vulgar, rich but not cluttered.

Image Requirements:
Rich details, complex structure, clear layers.
The city landscape is fully visible, providing a sense of shock and artistry.
Maintain a Spring Festival atmosphere, modern aesthetics, and promotional poster quality.
Obvious hand-drawn feel, exquisite and beautiful, with collectible visual quality.
Has both the momentum of a city promotional film poster and the high-end feel of tourism posters.

Text Layout Requirements:
Elegant typography in the bottom left for the English title: 'SPRING 2026'.
Accompanied by vertical Chinese promotional slogans, such as:
'River and Sea Jinmen, Charming Tianjin'
or
'Jinmen Hometown, Open Tianjin'
or
'Ancient and Modern Fusion, Myriad Tianjin'.

Text Requirements:
Beautiful and generous layout.
Clear and complete handwriting.
High-end poster design sense.
Harmonious combination of Chinese and English.
No garbled characters, no typos.

Overall Meaning:
Showcase the unique charm of Tianjin as a famous historical and cultural city, an important northern port city, and a modern international metropolis, reflecting the charm of the Haihe River, the ancient charm of Jinmen, and the open and inclusive urban spirit.

Poster Size: 9:16 vertical.
entries.description: A highly detailed, professional prompt for generating a promotional poster for Tianjin city using a blend of traditional Chinese illustration and double exposure styles.

integrating the cultural context and geographical imagery of tianjin, like an urban scroll connecting the past and present. in the visual subject formed by the intersection of this 'river' and the silk, a hand-drawn panoramic map of tianjin city is overlaid, in guochao style, with rich layers, magnificent momentum, and exquisite, shocking details. key landmarks and urban elements of tianjin are highlighted in the frame: tianjin eye (prominent landmark, highly recognizable) haihe river (core water system running through the frame) jiefang bridge (embodying urban history and industrial beauty) jinwan plaza architectural complex (showing modern urban prosperity) century clock (iconic landscape) ancient culture street (embodying traditional culture) five great avenues villa complex (embodying the historical style of blending east and west) drum tower (embodying tianjin's ancient charm) italian style district (adding urban romance and exotic flavor) tianjin port and ocean freighter elements (embodying the city's character of openness, port, and global connectivity) appropriately integrate cultural symbols like yangliuqing new year paintings, niren zhang clay sculptures, crosstalk culture symbols, and fried dough twists (mahua) as decorative details to enhance regional identity. the entire image presents a visual mood of 'river, city, bridge, port, and the fusion of past and present,' with light clouds and misty water vapor, carrying the ethereal feel of eastern aesthetics. colors are mainly chinese red, gold, elegant white, green, and light blue, with warm gold accents in some areas; the overall feel is festive but not vulgar, rich but not cluttered. image requirements: rich details, complex structure, clear layers. the city landscape is fully visible, providing a sense of shock and artistry. maintain a spring festival atmosphere, modern aesthetics, and promotional poster quality. obvious hand-drawn feel, exquisite and beautiful, with collectible visual quality. has both the momentum of a city promotional film poster and the high-end feel of tourism posters. text layout requirements: elegant typography in the bottom left for the english title: 'spring 2026'. accompanied by vertical chinese promotional slogans, such as: 'river and sea jinmen, charming tianjin' or 'jinmen hometown, open tianjin' or 'ancient and modern fusion, myriad tianjin'. text entries.title: Gothic Anime Figure Before Cathedral
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A full-body dark gothic anime illustration of a slender young man standing confidently in front of a towering ruined cathedral, centered in a vertical composition. He has messy, slightly wavy short hair in silver white, pale skin, and an androgynous elegant presence. His expression is shadowed and understated, with the face partially obscured by dramatic lighting. He wears an all-black layered outfit: a long tattered overcoat with sharp asymmetrical panels, a high-collared inner jacket, a textured dark shirt, loose cropped trousers gathered at the calves, and polished black lace-up boots. One hand is in his coat pocket while the other arm hangs naturally, giving him a calm, aloof, aristocratic stance. Behind him rises a massive gothic church facade with 5 visible spires including a central cross-topped peak, rendered as if painted in black ink and watercolor washes. The environment is monochrome charcoal, ash gray, and black, with subtle muted brown undertones, heavy paint drips, splattered ink textures, foggy haze, and wet reflective ground at his feet. Use strong backlighting from the upper left to create a halo-like glow around the figure and silhouette the cathedral. The mood is bleak, solemn, mysterious, and cinematic, combining gothic fashion editorial, dark fantasy, and ink wash concept art. Highly detailed fabric folds, painterly brushwork, dramatic contrast, textured grunge background, elegant composition, no text, no extra characters.
entries.description: This prompt generates a moody full-body dark fantasy character portrait, ideal for gothic anime key art, concept illustration, or dramatic cover imagery.

entries.title: Anime Suspense Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic Japanese movie poster in a polished anime-cinematic style, vertical one-sheet composition, set at night over a glowing futuristic Tokyo and Gunma-themed cityscape filled with blue holographic HUD graphics, star-like particles, and surveillance interface overlays. The poster features 5 visible character elements: 1 dominant oversized close-up of a mysterious woman occupying the entire upper-right background, shown in profile with long dark hair and a huge elegant white wide-brim hat with a dark ribbon, her expression serious and unreadable; 3 teenage students grouped in the left-center foreground wearing Japanese school uniforms with dark blazers, white shirts, and red striped ties - one tall messy-haired boy in the middle, one girl with a black ponytail on the left turned partly away, and one short-haired girl on the right facing forward; and 1 smaller supporting figure in the lower-right corner, a pale-haired violinist in a heavy fur-trimmed winter coat playing the violin. Add a luminous holographic map of Japan across the lower middle with a red target reticle centered over Gunma, plus coordinate and data callouts. Include visible English interface text in small red and blue typography such as "OPERATION AKATSUKI," "THE BONDS NEVER DIES," "IN PROGRESS," "TARGET: AKATSUKI CITY," "AKATSUKI CITY," "GUNMA PREFECTURE," "JAPAN," and coordinate strings. The skyline on the left should include a Tokyo Tower-like landmark glowing orange-red. Use intense blue, black, silver, and crimson lighting, wet glossy highlights, drifting snow or ash particles, layered depth, and high-contrast painterly detail. At the bottom, create a large bold Japanese title in metallic red, white, and blue: 私立 あかつき学園, with a large metallic silver English subtitle beneath it: THE BONDS NEVER DIES. Add small Japanese credit lines above the release date, including faux director, screenplay, character design, and cast credits, and place a centered release line at the very bottom reading 12.20 ROADSHOW. The overall mood should feel like a high-budget suspense drama, youth ensemble mystery, and techno-thriller anime film poster.
entries.description: Generates a dramatic anime-style Japanese film poster with an ensemble cast, holographic city-map overlays, and bold theatrical typography for promotional key art.

entries.title: Whimsical May Garden Calendar Wallpaper
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vertical whimsical spring calendar illustration in a soft pastel anime storybook style, designed like a cute phone wallpaper for May. The scene is a warm sun-dappled garden with creamy golden bokeh light, a narrow stone path, clover patches, tiny white daisies, ferns, and a few small ripe strawberries near the bottom right. Large fresh green maple leaves hang from the upper left, and cascading clusters of pale purple wisteria frame the left and right edges. Near the top right, place elegant hand-lettered script reading May with small lily-of-the-valley doodles integrated into the lettering, a tiny swallow silhouette above, and the smaller text "5月" beneath it. Below that, add a clean mini calendar for May with the weekday row "S M T W T F S" and dates 1 through 31 arranged in a simple grid, using soft brown-gray text. Scatter tiny decorative hearts, dots, sparkles, and simple floral doodles around the calendar area. In the lower half, show a chibi child character standing on the path in a penguin kigurumi onesie with a dark charcoal body, white belly, yellow beak hood, and little yellow feet. The character has a short ash brown bob peeking out from the hood, two silver hairpins on one side, and a large metal zipper ring pull at the neck. Replace the face with a smooth centered rectangular blur block as a privacy censor, keeping the rest of the head and hair visible. The character holds a bouquet of white lily-of-the-valley flowers in one hand and extends the other arm outward as if enjoying the breeze. Add pink flower petals drifting nearby, a red ladybug resting on a green leaf above the character, several floating maple seeds with dotted spiral motion trails, delicate white swirl lines suggesting wind around the character, and a few extra lily-of-the-valley sprigs around the composition. Use a soft cream, sage green, lavender, and warm beige palette, gentle linework, subtle shading, and a dreamy cute seasonal mood.
entries.description: A cute spring-themed vertical wallpaper illustration featuring a May calendar, a penguin-costumed chibi child, and a dreamy flower-filled garden, ideal for seasonal phone backgrounds.

entries.title: Japanese Creator Interview Magazine Spread
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a polished two-page magazine spread in Japanese, styled like a contemporary creator profile feature in a premium design and culture magazine. The layout is a clean editorial interview spread with a white background, navy blue accents, thin rule lines, elegant typography, and a balanced grid. The overall feeling is sophisticated, modern, and slightly masculine, like a feature on a handsome AI visual creator.

On the left page, place a very large stacked English headline at the top left reading "CREATOR INTERVIEW" in bold condensed sans-serif, with small vertical issue text along the outer margin such as "VOL.23 / MAY 2024." Beneath and across most of the left page, use a large cinematic photo of a male AI visual creator sitting at a desk in a dark hoodie in a moody studio workspace. The face is intentionally soft-blurred or anonymized. The room is warm and dimly lit, with multiple monitors showing image-editing or visual-generation work, a desk lamp, and walls covered in concept art, posters, sketches, and fantasy artwork. Overlay the lower-left of the photo with a large Japanese feature title in white Mincho-style serif text: "Xで世界観を育てる、AI表現の実験室。" Add smaller Japanese body text beneath introducing the account @multusdim_AI and describing an experimental AI art practice that values atmosphere, prompt design, and visual worldbuilding. At the bottom of the left page, include a horizontal block of smaller Japanese editorial text summarizing the creator's focus and interview context.

On the right page, create 5 clearly separated editorial sections. Section 1 is the main interview column titled "INTERVIEW" at the top in blue uppercase sans-serif. Below it, format 4 Q&A entries in Japanese, each beginning with a blue "Q." and "A." The questions and answers should discuss the creator's reason for posting on X, what they care about when making work, recurring motifs, and what they observe in audience reactions. Midway down this same interview column, add a large blue pull quote in Japanese with oversized quotation marks: "AIでつくるのは画像ではなく、空気ごと伝わる体験。" Section 2 is a top-right image card with a warm café portrait of a soft, elegant maid-themed woman holding a drink, paired with the visible label "MAID" and a short Japanese blurb. Section 3 is a second image card below it showing a rainy retro-futuristic city street with a car and neon reflections, labeled "RETRO FUTURE" with a short Japanese blurb. Section 4 is a third image card below that featuring a detailed steampunk city or giant clockwork structure with smoke and brass machinery, labeled "STEAMPUNK" with a short Japanese blurb. Section 5 is a fourth image card at the bottom showing a casual everyday snapshot of a young woman outdoors in warm sunset light, labeled "EVERYDAY SNAP" with a short Japanese blurb.

At the bottom of the right page, add 3 boxed information panels. The first is a "PROFILE" box with the account name "@multusdim_AI" and several lines of Japanese profile text describing an AI visual creator focused on atmosphere-rich work blending photorealism, retro future, maid aesthetics, and steampunk. The second is a "KEYWORDS" box listing exactly 6 keyword items in Japanese separated by slashes: "フォトリアル / プロンプト設計 / メイド / レトロフューチャー / スチームパンク / X運用 / AIアート" with the same editorial feel. The third is a dark blue horizontal follow banner reading "Follow: @multusdim_AI". Add page numbers 26 and 27 at the bottom corners and small footer text like "CREATOR INTERVIEW" and "MAY 2024 / VOL.32". Use realistic magazine print spacing, sharp editorial hierarchy, and a highly believable Japanese magazine layout.
entries.description: A stylish two-page Japanese editorial spread presenting an AI creator interview, useful for magazine mockups, profile features, and social-media creator showcases.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自YouMind 全量搜索库的海报条目《Japanese Creator Interview Magazine Spread》。 关键词：magazine、editorial、street、studio。可直接作为灵感底稿，再去高级编辑细调。

entries.title: Fictional Triple Crown Horse Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic Japanese horse racing champion poster in a cinematic, high-contrast, premium sports-advertising style. The main subject is a powerful dark bay to nearly black Thoroughbred racehorse with a glossy coat, a slightly windswept mane, and a small white star on its forehead, shown in a dominant three-quarter full-body pose facing right-of-camera. The horse wears racing tack and a deep blue saddlecloth marked with a large white number 7 and the horse name in Japanese, コントロール. Use a dark navy, black, and metallic gold color palette with glowing highlights, mist, sparks, and a night-sky atmosphere to create a legendary, triumphant mood. The layout should feel like an elite championship poster: oversized gold Japanese headline text at the upper left reading 三冠制覇。, with a smaller gold subtitle beneath it reading 「その名は、頂点の制御者。」. On the left side, include 3 laurel-wreath achievement callouts stacked vertically, each in gold: 1) 「皐月賞」 with smaller text 「中山競馬場 芝2000m」, 2) 「日本ダービー」 with smaller text 「東京競馬場 芝2400m」, 3) 「菊花賞」 with smaller text 「京都競馬場 芝3000m」. Across the bottom left to center, place the horse's name in huge textured metallic gold Japanese lettering, コントロール, with the romanized name CONTROL in spaced serif capitals below it. Beneath that, add a pedigree line in gold Japanese text: 「牡・青鹿毛 父:チープコンパクト」. On the right side, add a large semi-transparent portrait of an older male trainer in a cap and glasses emerging from the dark background, serious and authoritative, with vertical white slogan text along the far right edge reading 「心を制し、レースを支配する。」. Near the trainer portrait, include handwritten-style white calligraphy for the trainer credit: 「調教師」 followed by a large signature-like name 夕造, and a smaller white phrase beneath: 「信念は、勝利を支配する。」. At the bottom right, show 3 smaller action panels or cutout scenes of the same horse racing with jockey, each tinted in cool blue tones and labeled in gold beneath them: 「皐月賞」, 「日本ダービー」, 「菊花賞」. The composition should be dense but elegant, with layered smoke, stadium lights, gold dust, and sharp contrast, resembling a luxury commemorative poster for a fictional Triple Crown racehorse.
entries.description: This prompt generates a dramatic Japanese-style commemorative poster for a fictional Triple Crown racehorse, ideal for sports-themed character worldbuilding or premium mock promotional art.

entries.title: Surrealist Satirical Illustration Prompt
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Surrealist satirical illustration, minimalist composition.
A single standing figure. The head is not a face, but replaced with a product label or barcode. The label contains no readable text, symbolizing identity being defined and commodified by external forces.
Clean background with large negative space. Low saturation or black-and-white palette.
Objects rendered realistically, but with illogical or paradoxical relationships.
Calm, restrained visual tone. A single, clear metaphor.
In the style of Magritte-like surrealism, with a subtle philosophical undertone.
entries.description: Generates a minimalist, surrealist illustration in the style of Magritte, featuring a figure with a barcode head as a metaphor for identity being commodified.

entries.title: Surreal Molten Gold Liquid Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Ultra-detailed cinematic close-up of a woman's face in profile, eyes closed, serene expression, partially submerged in flowing liquid that looks like molten gold and water fusion. The fluid wraps around her face dynamically, with glowing orange and deep blue tones, creating a contrast between heat and coolness. Hyper-realistic skin texture with visible pores and droplets. entries.title: Spherical Miniature World Cityscape
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Design a visually striking "miniature world" composition of CITY NAME, where the city's most recognizable landmarks and architectural elements wrap organically around a compact, globe-like terrain, creating the illusion of a self-contained urban planet.

Blend the skyline and environment so they curve naturally with the surface, forming a cohesive spherical composition rather than a flat panorama. The perspective should feel elevated and slightly angled, as if captured from a drifting aerial viewpoint, enhancing depth and dimensional distortion.

Incorporate bold, contemporary 3D lettering that spells "CITY NAME", embedding it seamlessly into the cityscape; for example, integrated into streets, rooftops, or terrain, so it feels like a structural part of the environment.
Illuminate the scene with soft daylight under a lightly overcast sky, allowing diffused lighting to create subtle shadows and realistic highlights across buildings, vegetation, and roads.
Surround the miniature planet with an expansive, atmospheric sky that gently transitions into abstract, swirling cloud formations, adding a dreamlike quality without distracting from the central subject.

Use a balanced, lifelike color scheme tailored to CITY NAME, featuring natural greens, sky blues, and grounded architectural tones, while maintaining vibrancy and clarity.

Render the final image in ultra-detailed photorealism, emphasizing texture accuracy, depth, and environmental realism, with a polished cinematic finish.
entries.description: A highly detailed prompt for creating a 3D spherical 'miniature world' of a specific city, integrating iconic landmarks and custom typography.
