entries.title: Cyberpunk Mythology Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic ultra-detailed sci-fi movie poster for KALKI PROTOCOL, designed as a vertical one-sheet with a mythic cyberpunk India aesthetic. Show a back-facing central figure occupying most of the frame, a mysterious warrior in a dark futuristic long coat with a high collar, standing upright and looking toward a sprawling neon megacity. The figure has dark curly hair tied into a rough bun, a glowing circular earring on one ear, and a powerful silhouette with the face mostly hidden in profile shadow. Behind the head, place a huge radiant golden-orange halo made of concentric rings inscribed with Sanskrit-style sacred text and arcane symbols, giving the character a divine, prophetic presence. Inside and around the silhouette, blend a futuristic version of Mumbai: dense skyscrapers, holographic billboards, elevated structures, reflective waterways, and a cool blue-violet night atmosphere contrasted against the warm halo. Include exactly 3 flying vehicles: 2 high-speed hoverbikes racing across the lower and middle right area with bright magenta engine trails, and 1 small hovering aircraft farther back in the sky on the right. Add one prominent illuminated billboard reading MUMBAI with a smaller Devanagari line beneath it. Scatter additional vertical neon signs with Devanagari text along the buildings. The color palette should be electric cyan, deep indigo, magenta, orange, and gold, with wet reflective surfaces, volumetric haze, dramatic rim lighting, and a polished blockbuster poster finish. Place large futuristic glowing title typography across the lower middle reading KALKI PROTOCOL. Under it, add the tagline THE FINAL ERA BEGINS, then a release line reading "COMING 3125.11", then a multilingual credit line listing "HINDI - TELUGU - TAMIL - KANNADA - MALAYALAM - ENGLISH", and a small hashtag line at the bottom. High contrast, epic scale, premium concept art, seamless double-exposure composition, cyberpunk Mumbai meets Indian mythology, action-packed and divine.

entries.title: Vintage Hong Kong Actress Tribute Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vintage Hong Kong cinema tribute poster in elegant 1980s-1990s magazine style, featuring a glamorous close-up half-body portrait of Rosamund Kwan seated indoors against a soft neutral beige background. She has voluminous dark brown wavy shoulder-length hair with a side part, luminous skin, a poised gentle expression, one hand raised lightly near her cheek, and wears a creamy white blazer with large round pearl earrings. Use warm diffused studio lighting, soft focus, refined film-like texture, subtle grain, and luxurious nostalgic color grading in beige, ivory, sepia, and deep plum. Design the composition like a memorial or star-profile poster with typography integrated around the portrait: on the far left, very large vertical Chinese calligraphy-style name text in deep plum reading 關之琳; to its right, a slim vertical line of smaller Chinese text reading 絕代佳人・風華永恆. Below the large title on the left, place the English name in elegant italic serif script reading Rosamund Kwan. Under that, add a two-line Chinese quote in smaller serif text. In the lower left corner, include exactly 3 stacked rectangular film still thumbnails with thin borders, each showing the same actress in different roles; each thumbnail has a narrow vertical Chinese caption strip on its left edge. On the lower right beside the portrait, place a text block with the large Chinese surname and given name split across two lines, the English name beneath, then a birth line and 2 more lines of Chinese descriptive text. Add a handwritten autograph-style signature in dark plum near the bottom right. Along the bottom center, add 2 lines of Chinese slogan text in classic serif style, separated from the main layout with ample negative space. Overall look: classy, sentimental, high-end editorial poster, authentic retro Hong Kong actress homage, balanced typography, premium print design, portrait-dominant layout.

entries.title: Showa Day Scrapbook Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A soft, airy Japanese lifestyle poster with a warm nostalgic mood on a light beige textured paper background. On the right side, show a young woman sitting in a relaxed side pose with one knee raised, wearing an oversized white long-sleeve shirt and blue jeans. Her dark brown hair is tied in a messy bun with loose wisps around the face, and one hand lightly touches her forehead. The face should be de-emphasized or obscured so the overall feeling and styling matter more than identity. Use gentle natural daylight, high-key exposure, and a delicate editorial-photography look mixed with hand-drawn doodles. On the left half, place handwritten Japanese text in a crayon or colored-pencil style. At the top, large orange text reads 4月29日 and below it 昭和の日. Under that, add a short handwritten message in gray Japanese: "なつかしい風が 心をふわっと ほどいてくれる日。" Below, add 3 small info lines with icons: 1 smiling face icon with "先負", 1 crescent moon icon with "月齢 11.6", and 1 sun icon with "晴れ 20°C". Then add a dashed divider and a handwritten list headed "今日は何の日?" with exactly 4 bullet items: "昭和の日", "畳の日", "ナポリタンの日", and "国際盲導犬の日", each accompanied by tiny doodles such as a flag, tatami mat, pasta plate, and dog. At the bottom left, draw 1 pink cloud-shaped speech bubble containing the handwritten quote きみのえがおが いちばんだいすきだよ by ○○より. Decorate the composition with exactly 2 white cloud doodles near the upper right, 1 yellow sun doodle in the top-right corner, several small green leaf doodles drifting in the air, a few faint wind-swoosh lines near the woman's head, and exactly 4 flower doodles near the bottom edge around her legs in pink, yellow, and orange. Keep the palette muted and pastel, with orange, pink, olive, gray, cream, and denim blue. The overall result should feel like a sentimental handwritten scrapbook calendar page for a Japanese national holiday, combining minimalist portrait photography with cute childlike illustrations.
entries.description: A nostalgic Japanese holiday poster-style image combining a soft portrait of a seated young woman with handwritten calendar notes, doodles, and seasonal scrapbook decorations.

entries.title: Kessoku Band Gritty Anime Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic anime rock-band poster in a gritty splash-ink promotional style, featuring the four girls of Kessoku Band on stage in a single wide composition with dynamic concert energy. The background is a chaotic black concert backdrop filled with paint splatters, sparks, smoke, neon-like color streaks, and a huge rough white brush-lettered band name across the top reading KESSOKU BAND. In the upper left, add a large comic speech bubble with bold hand-drawn English text reading KESSOKU BAND WERE CRUSHING IT. Show exactly 4 band members standing shoulder to shoulder in performance poses, each wearing dark band T-shirts and casual stage outfits, with stylized colored lighting around them. On the far left is Yamada Ryo with short dark blue hair, holding a cream-colored bass guitar, calm expression, blue paint splash behind her, and her name displayed in Japanese and English: "山田リョウ" and "YAMADA RYO". Second from left is Ijichi Nijika with blonde twin ponytails, energetic pose with one hand raised in a peace sign, warm yellow splash behind her, a large red ribbon at the collar, and her name displayed as "伊地知虹夏" and "IJICHI NIJIKA". Behind the center area place a red drum kit with the band logo on the bass drum. Second from right is Kita Ikuyo with long vivid red hair, playing a blue electric guitar, red splash behind her, and her name displayed as "喜多郁代" and "KITA IKUYO". On the far right is Gotoh Hitori with long flowing pink hair, playing a black electric guitar, pink splash behind her, and her name displayed as "後藤ひとり" and "Gotoh Hitori". At the bottom left, place a huge hot-pink Japanese title in aggressive brush lettering reading "結束バンド", with smaller white Japanese tagline text beneath it. At the bottom right, add a diagonal hot-pink paint-stroke banner with bold black handwritten English slogan text reading LIVE IS OUR LIFE, LOUDER THAN YESTERDAY. STRONGER TOGETHER.. Use a high-contrast manga poster aesthetic, saturated blue-yellow-red-pink accents for each girl, rough halftone texture, distressed paintbrush typography, explosive stage-light atmosphere, and polished anime character rendering. Keep the composition dense, edgy, and poster-like, as if for an official movie or concert key visual.

entries.title: Ibaraki Travel Guide Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A refined Japanese travel guide magazine cover illustration in a soft watercolor-and-ink editorial style, vertical A4 layout, airy pastel palette, elegant tourism-poster composition. The cover headline is dominated by very large serif blue text reading IBARAKI, with large Japanese title text below reading "茨城県 旅行ガイド" and a pale pink cursive English subtitle reading "Ibaraki Travel Guide". At the top left, include two lines of small Japanese copy about nature, history, scenery, and gourmet travel in Ibaraki, accented with a tiny pink cherry blossom icon. At the top right, place a large circular badge with fine dotted border containing Japanese text and the phrase "完全保存版" in the center with a small ribbon flourish underneath. The main subject is a young Japanese woman shown from the chest up, placed slightly right of center, facing left in three-quarter view. She has a chin-length wavy bob in deep dark brown to black, delicate loose strands, soft natural texture, and a calm neutral expression. She wears a light blue cardigan over a white ruffled blouse with a high gathered neckline, plus a thin beige shoulder bag strap. Her face is intentionally obscured by a plain vertical rectangular gray censor block centered over the face area. Surround her with a collage of iconic Ibaraki scenery blended seamlessly into the cover art: a vast field of blue nemophila flowers across rolling hills in the upper right with a Ferris wheel in the distance and tiny visitors along the ridge; a traditional temple or pavilion among pink cherry blossoms at mid-right; a bright waterfall and landscaped stream at lower right; a torii gate standing in shallow ocean water at sunset in the lower left; and a mountain landscape near the bottom left center. Add abundant blue flowers in the foreground along the bottom edge and soft pink cherry blossoms framing the right side. Along the left side, include exactly 7 vertically stacked destination list entries in Japanese, each with a colored heading line and smaller descriptive subtext: "国営ひたち海浜公園", "偕楽園", "袋田の滝", "大洗磯前神社", "筑波山", "水郷・霞ヶ浦", and "グルメ・カフェ・おみやげ". At the lower left, place a blue circular badge with white Japanese text reading "モデルコース 4" and smaller itinerary copy below. At the lower right, include exactly 3 horizontal white label tabs with Japanese text and small icons: "絶景スポット", "ご当地グルメ", and "おみやげセレクション". Add a pink ribbon banner near the bottom right with small Japanese promotional text. Use a clean white background for the upper left, elegant magazine typography, delicate linework, dreamy spring atmosphere, polished tourism-cover design, high detail, premium print look.

entries.title: Chinese Ink Painting with Calligraphy
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vertical traditional Chinese ink-wash painting on aged off-white rice paper, minimalist monochrome palette with soft gray washes and deep black brushwork. The composition combines large expressive Chinese calligraphy on the left and center with a misty shanshui landscape on the right. Write the quote in bold hand-brushed characters: "照人如照水,切玉如切泥。" arranged in 2 vertical columns, with 4 large characters in the left column and 4 large characters plus punctuation in the center-right column, each character painted with energetic dry-brush and wet-brush variation, visible tapering strokes, splashes, and ink texture. Add 2 red seal stamps: one small oval seal near the upper left beside the calligraphy, and one square seal near the lower left corner. On the right half, paint towering craggy cliffs with sparse pine trees, drifting fog, and 2 thin waterfalls descending into a calm river. In the lower right foreground, show 2 ancient Chinese scholars in flowing hanfu robes and topknots, seated across a flat stone table on river rocks, leaning over a board game or manuscript in quiet discussion; their forms should be small relative to the landscape. Include still water reflections, distant low islets, and layered atmospheric mist. Overall feeling: contemplative, literati painting, poetic solitude, elegant scholarly mood, Song-dynasty-inspired ink illustration with masterful calligraphy.

entries.searchText: chinese ink painting with calligraphy this prompt generates a classical chinese literati-style ink painting with a large poetic inscription and a misty mountain landscape, suitable for cultural art prints or poetic editorial imagery. a vertical traditional chinese ink-wash painting on aged off-white rice paper, minimalist monochrome palette with soft gray washes and deep black brushwork. the composition combines large expressive chinese calligraphy on the left and center with a misty shanshui landscape on the right. write the quote in bold hand-brushed characters: "照人如照水,切玉如切泥。" arranged in 2 vertical columns, with 4 large characters in the left column and 4 large characters plus punctuation in the center-right column, each character painted with energetic dry-brush and wet-brush variation, visible tapering strokes, splashes, and ink texture. add 2 red seal stamps: one small oval seal near the upper left beside the calligraphy, and one square seal near the lower left corner. on the right half, paint towering craggy cliffs with sparse pine trees, drifting fog, and 2 thin waterfalls descending into a calm river. in the lower right foreground, show 2 ancient chinese scholars in flowing hanfu robes and topknots, seated across a flat stone table on river rocks, leaning over a board game or manuscript in quiet discussion; their forms should be small relative to the landscape. include still water reflections, distant low islets, and layered atmospheric mist. overall feeling: contemplative, literati painting, poetic solitude, elegant scholarly mood, song-dynasty-inspired ink illustration with masterful calligraphy. poster / flyer editorial

entries.title: Chinese Ink Swordsman and Calligraphy
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic vertical Chinese ink-wash painting on aged rice paper, minimalist monochrome with soft warm parchment tones, showing a lone ancient swordsman standing on the edge of a steep dark cliff at the right side of the composition, seen mostly from behind in three-quarter back view. He wears flowing historical robes and a long wind-whipped cloak, with long dark hair tied in a topknot and loose strands streaming sideways in the wind, and he holds a straight sword lowered in his right hand. Below and to the left stretches a vast misty landscape with 1 distant walled frontier city, faint watchtowers and rooftops, a winding river or plain, and layered mountain silhouettes fading into haze. Use expressive black brushwork, splattered ink textures, dry-brush edges, atmospheric empty space, and a powerful contrast between the dense dark figure and cliff and the pale open background. Add 2 large vertical columns of bold black calligraphy on the left half, reading "愿将腰下剑" and "直为斩楼兰。", plus 1 smaller vertical inscription to the far left reading "塞下曲六首 李白", and include 2 small red seal stamps, one near the small inscription and one near the upper right corner. The mood is heroic, lonely, contemplative, and defiant, like a Tang-dynasty poet-warrior poster rendered as traditional sumi-e.

entries.title: Chinese Ink Warrior on Horseback
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic vertical Chinese ink wash painting in monochrome black, charcoal, and soft gray on off-white rice paper, in the style of expressive shan shui brush art and heroic historical wuxia illustration. On the right side, a lone armored general sits upright on a dark warhorse atop a rocky cliff, viewed from behind and slightly in profile, looking out over a vast army below. The warrior wears layered black lamellar armor, a flowing windblown cloak, and a topknot with long trailing ribbons; he holds a straight sword angled downward beside the horse. The horse is muscular and glossy black, standing firmly near the cliff edge with its tail and mane subtly swept by the wind. Below and across the lower half of the scene, a dense battlefield mass of soldiers appears as misty silhouettes with upright spears and several battle flags, partially obscured by fog. In the distance, steep mountain peaks emerge through drifting mist on the upper right, with 7 small birds flying across the pale sky near the center. On the left side, include 2 large vertical columns of bold black Chinese calligraphy in wild cursive brush strokes: the main quote reading "一身转战三千里,一剑曾当百万师", with a smaller vertical signature "王维" below, plus a small red seal stamp. Emphasize strong negative space, textured ink bleeding, splattered brush edges, atmospheric haze, epic solitude, martial grandeur, and a solemn, contemplative mood.

entries.title: Minimalist No Longer Human Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A minimalist literary book cover in a refined East Asian editorial style, portrait orientation, with a warm off-white paper background and subtle grainy print texture. The composition is vertically split into 2 large abstract fields: a rough torn gray paper shape occupying the upper left half, and a deep black painted block occupying the lower left corner. Emerging from the black area is 1 stark white theatrical mask shape with a single black eye slit, cropped large and angled upward, suggesting alienation and hidden identity. At the center-bottom where the gray and white fields meet, place 1 tiny solitary human figure in a long dark coat standing on a narrow triangular ledge, facing forward, emphasizing isolation and vulnerability. From near the top center, let 1 thin red thread descend vertically with a slight waviness, ending around the middle in 1 muted red circular seal-like disc, aligned above the figure. Set 1 large vertical title in bold expressive black Chinese calligraphy on the right-center: 人间失格. Add 1 small vertical Japanese reading beside it: "にんげんしっかく". On the far right margin, add 1 vertical quote in fine black text: "-- 我的不幸,恰恰在于我缺乏拒绝的能力 --". On the upper left, add 1 vertical author and translator credit in small black type: "【日】太宰治|著 杨伟|译". Below that, add 1 short two-line Chinese phrase in black: "生而为人
我很抱歉". On the lower right, add 1 small red vertical note: "太宰治
代表作". Beneath it add 1 small publication block in black with 3 lines: "人间失格", "太宰治", "だざい おさむ". On the lower left, add 1 publisher block in small black text: "上海译文出版社
2024" with a short horizontal line beneath. Use restrained negative space, asymmetrical balance, raw paper collage edges, sumi-ink and gouache textures, muted charcoal black gray and faded vermilion palette, elegant literary melancholy, premium contemporary Chinese novel cover design.
entries.description: A moody minimalist literary book cover prompt for generating an elegant East Asian edition of a classic novel with collage textures and symbolic imagery.

entries.title: Minimalist Literary Novel Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A literary book cover in a refined minimalist editorial style, vertically oriented, with a muted palette of deep black, dark green, sepia, and warm cream. The composition is divided by large flowing curtain-like abstract shapes that create dramatic negative space and diagonal wedges of light. On the right side, show an elderly butler-like man seen from behind, standing upright in a formal black tailcoat or tuxedo jacket, white shirt cuffs visible, hands clasped behind his back, facing a tall softly glowing window with sheer curtains. His posture is reserved, dignified, and solitary. On the lower portion, within a triangular beam of light, place a dim still life on a table: exactly 3 objects, a wine glass, a teapot, and a plate, all partially obscured in shadow. The left side should carry elegant vertical Chinese title typography reading 长日将尽, set large in pale gold serif-like characters. Beneath it, include smaller Chinese author and translator lines, and a short Chinese quote in small text. Near the lower left, add small English text reading The Remains of the Day and Kazuo Ishiguro, plus a small publisher line and the year 2024. The image should feel like an award-winning contemporary literary fiction cover: quiet, melancholic, restrained, cinematic, with paper grain texture, soft vignette, subtle painterly shading, and highly intentional asymmetrical layout. Keep the typography integrated into the design, with generous negative space and no bright colors.
entries.description: This prompt generates a sophisticated modern book cover for literary fiction, ideal for classic novels, translated works, and prestige publishing mockups.

entries.title: Minimalist Literary Cover for The Vegetarian
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A minimalist literary book cover for 素食者, designed in an elegant East Asian art-book style with muted dark forest green and warm off-white as the only main colors. The composition is vertical and highly refined, with a split layout: the left two-thirds are textured off-white paper, while the right third is a deep green field divided by a rough organic torn-paper edge running vertically from top to bottom. On the lower center-right, place a grayscale side-profile portrait of an East Asian woman facing right, her head slightly tilted upward, eyes closed or nearly closed, with black hair tied in a low bun. Her figure should feel quiet, fragile, and contemplative. The upper part of her head is visually replaced by a torn white paper shape that merges into the page, creating a surreal collage effect. From inside the opening around her head and neck, thin wild plant stems with tiny leaves and buds grow upward diagonally, as if vegetation is emerging from her body. Add subtle paper grain, print texture, and soft tonal fading for a poetic, fine-press look. Set the main Chinese title vertically in very large dark green serif-style characters on the far left: 素食者. Near the upper middle-left, add vertically arranged author and translator credits in Chinese, small and elegant: "[韩] 韩江 著" and "胡椒筒|译". In the upper right on the dark green area, add small Korean and English text in a delicate serif font: 채식주의자, "The Vegetarian", and Han Kang. On the mid-to-lower right, add a short vertical Chinese quote in small type: 我的身体里 有一片荒芜的森林 它枯萎了 我不想吃的东西. At the bottom right, place the publisher and year in small Chinese text: "四川文艺出版社" and "2022". Include one small solid dark green dot on the left side below the title as a graphic accent. The overall mood is restrained, melancholic, intelligent, and literary, like an award-winning modern novel cover.
entries.description: This prompt generates a refined, surreal modern book cover with torn-paper collage, female profile, and botanical imagery, ideal for literary fiction and translated novel designs.

entries.title: Luxury Concept Poster Design
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
What you will generate is not a regular illustration, but a high-end concept poster that expresses the meaning and symbolism of the person and name "ELON MUSK" as a visual metaphor.

Place the giant letters "ELON MUSK" as the main protagonist of the entire screen. The letters should be thick, powerful sans-serif characters with an overwhelming presence. The background should be deep black, and the characters a slightly yellowish off-white, with paper texture, graininess, and light scuffs like vintage silkscreen printing or old posters.

At the bottom center, place a monochrome portrait of a man reminiscent of Elon Musk. It should have an atmosphere similar to the person himself, with an expression looking up at the future. The face should not be too realistic, but expressed with strong shadows in a print/poster style.

In the upper right, include a composition where a rocket is launching diagonally upward. Use red as an accent color for the rocket's exhaust flames and smoke, and have it pass through the giant letters as if cutting through them. This visualizes the meaning of "breaking through to the future," "breaking through existing frameworks," and "large-scale challenges."

Make the overall design a minimalist and powerful graphic poster. Do not add too many elements; compose it only with the text, the person, the rocket, and the red smoke. The composition should be bold and designed to leave an impression at a glance, even from a distance.

In the lower left, add small auxiliary text like "VISION / SCALE / MOTION," and in the lower right, "BUILD THE FUTURE." You may discreetly place small symbols associated with Tesla or X if necessary, but the main focus remains the symbolism of the name "ELON MUSK" and the person.

Unify the colors around three main colors: black, off-white, and red. Create a concept poster with a strong visual memory that conveys luxury, futurism, ambition, solitude, a sense of scale, and the energy of destruction and creation.
entries.description: A highly detailed prompt for creating a minimalist, high-end conceptual poster featuring a subject and thematic metaphors like a rocket launch.

entries.title: 1960s Art-House Film Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a vertical poster composition on aged cream paper with a handmade analog feel. Use rough ripped paper edges, layered magazine cutouts, photocopy grain, halftone texture, ink bleed, and slightly imperfect screen-print registration. Keep the subject as the main black-and-white photographic portrait, placed prominently in the center or upper center.

Surround the subject with graphic blocks of deep red, cobalt blue, warm yellow, black, and ivory. Add supporting collage fragments such as a rainy European street, film-strip borders, newspaper clippings, urban silhouettes, and cinematic details, arranged like a handmade 1960s art-house movie poster.

Use bold condensed typography with a strong visual hierarchy. Add large headline text: "[MAIN TITLE]". Add smaller subtitle text: "[SUBTITLE]". Add bottom text: "[BRAND NAME / EVENT NAME / COMING SOON / DATE]". If needed, include a small top line reading "[TAGLINE]".

The final result should feel cinematic, intellectual, rebellious, and editorial - like a lost 1960s European film poster with a strong point of view. Keep it raw, tactile, printed, imperfect, and handmade. Avoid a glossy modern finish.
entries.description: A detailed prompt for creating a vintage-style 1960s European art-house film poster with collage elements, bold typography, and a raw, tactile aesthetic.

entries.title: Cinematic Typography Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A minimalist cinematic poster on a tall vertical canvas with an off-white textured paper background and a dark matte stage platform at the bottom, dominated by giant condensed black sans-serif letters spelling SAM ALTMAN across nearly the full height of the composition, with the first word stacked above and overlapping the second. Replace one central vertical letterform with a glowing open doorway, outlined in warm orange-red light, revealing a bright sunrise sky and a distant cityscape beyond. On the stage, place 1 lone adult man seen from behind in three-quarter profile, walking toward the doorway, wearing a dark crewneck sweater, dark pants, and light sneakers, with realistic proportions and subtle dramatic rim lighting. To the upper right of the typography, add 3 small lines of spaced uppercase text reading AI., POWER., and POSSIBILITY.. In the lower left corner, add 1 small orange credit line reading OPENAI CEO. Use strong scale contrast, lots of negative space, editorial magazine-cover styling, clean modern layout, muted neutral tones with one warm orange accent, realistic lighting, subtle film grain, and a sophisticated futuristic mood.
entries.description: This prompt generates a bold editorial poster with giant typography, a glowing doorway, and a lone figure, ideal for magazine covers, keynote visuals, or tech-profile artwork.

entries.searchText: cinematic typography poster this prompt generates a bold editorial poster with giant typography, a glowing doorway, and a lone figure, ideal for magazine covers, keynote visuals, or tech-profile artwork. a minimalist cinematic poster on a tall vertical canvas with an off-white textured paper background and a dark matte stage platform at the bottom, dominated by giant condensed black sans-serif letters spelling sam altman across nearly the full height of the composition, with the first word stacked above and overlapping the second. replace one central vertical letterform with a glowing open doorway, outlined in warm orange-red light, revealing a bright sunrise sky and a distant cityscape beyond. on the stage, place 1 lone adult man seen from behind in three-quarter profile, walking toward the doorway, wearing a dark crewneck sweater, dark pants, and light sneakers, with realistic proportions and subtle dramatic rim lighting. to the upper right of the typography, add 3 small lines of spaced uppercase text reading ai., power., and possibility.. in the lower left corner, add 1 small orange credit line reading openai ceo. use strong scale contrast, lots of negative space, editorial magazine-cover styling, clean modern layout, muted neutral tones with one warm orange accent, realistic lighting, subtle film grain, and a sophisticated futuristic mood. poster / flyer cinematic editorial magazine film realistic city

entries.title: Beijing Cultural Heritage Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A refined vertical cultural exhibition poster on a warm ivory textured paper background, designed with abundant negative space and an elegant museum-catalog aesthetic. The centerpiece is one monumental piece of Chinese calligraphy formed as sculptural 3D architectural typography, reading 北京 as two large interconnected characters built entirely from miniature Beijing heritage landmarks and traditional decorative elements. The strokes are constructed like carved lacquer and wood architectural fragments in rich vermilion red, aged gold, jade green, turquoise blue, stone gray, and ivory, with exquisite relief detail, soft shadows, and a handcrafted collectible feel. Across the calligraphy, integrate iconic Beijing imagery: palace roofs with glazed tiles, temple pavilions, stairways, carved balustrades, watchtowers, a winding section of the Great Wall, ornamental clouds, guardian lion sculptures, small old trees, golden ginkgo branches and leaves, hanging red lanterns, a Beijing opera mask, a skewer of glossy candied hawthorn, the Temple of Heaven, and a plated roast duck tucked into one lower stroke. Make the composition feel like a cultural miniature world embedded inside each brushstroke, with realistic depth, crisp surface detail, and subtle museum lighting from the upper left. Add sparse typography around the main artwork in a sophisticated editorial layout: at upper left, a tiny emblem and the words "BEIJING CHINA", beneath it "2024" and "CITY CULTURE SERIES" in small thin serif capitals; at upper right, a vertical Chinese title reading "北京 一座城的壮阔史诗" with several smaller vertical lines of Chinese copy and a red seal stamp; at lower left, large elegant serif text reading BEIJING and beneath it ETERNAL GLORY, followed by smaller text "EXHIBITION POSTER", "NO.2024-001", and tiny heritage-themed footer copy; at lower right, tiny small-cap text reading TIMELESS HERITAGE and "CULTURAL LEGACY OF A THOUSAND YEARS". Keep the overall style luxurious, poetic, highly detailed, and premium, blending Chinese traditional culture, architectural miniature art, and contemporary poster design.
entries.description: This prompt generates a premium city-culture exhibition poster featuring Beijing-themed architectural calligraphy and elegant editorial typography, ideal for tourism, museum, or heritage branding.

entries.title: Anime Folding Bike Event Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A bright, cheerful anime-style promotional poster for a folding bike cycling event, designed like a polished Japanese advertisement with dense typography, stickers, callouts, and event info panels. The scene shows a sunny riverside promenade under a vivid blue sky with fluffy clouds, green tree branches framing the top right, flower beds, bunting, drifting petals, and a distant modern city skyline across the water. In the foreground, a cute teen/young adult anime girl with light chestnut brown shoulder-length wavy hair, side-swept bangs, and two colorful hairpins smiles directly at the viewer and winks with one eye. She is posed in dynamic perspective, reaching one hand toward the camera as if inviting the viewer to join her. She wears a yellow hooded windbreaker, a white T-shirt printed with colorful bicycle lettering, dark blue shorts, black thigh-high stockings, and a light blue backpack. Beside her is a mint-green compact folding bicycle labeled "FOLDY," shown unfolded and parked on the promenade with visible small wheels, frame hinge, handlebars, saddle, pedals, and kickstand, emphasizing portability and urban leisure cycling. Use a glossy, high-saturation anime poster aesthetic with clean linework, soft facial rendering, energetic lighting, and playful graphic decoration.

Fill the poster with Japanese ad-style layout elements. At the top left, a huge multicolored headline reads "Let's FOLDING RIDE!" in oversized playful bubble and block lettering, with a smaller curved Japanese line above it reading "さあ、いっしょに出かけよう!" and a blue ribbon-like subtitle below reading "フォールディングバイクで、もっと自由に、もっと遠くへ!". At the upper right, place a yellow burst badge with a tiny flag icon containing the text "フォールディングバイク サイクリングイベント 開催!". Add a white speech bubble near the girl's face with pink outline and handwritten-feel Japanese text: "ねえ、キミ! 折りたたみは どこへでも行けるよ♪ 一緒に 行こっ!". Near the bicycle, include a small angled sticker with text "コンパクトにたためて 持ち運びラクラク♪". Near the lower center-left, add a section label "イベントの楽しみポイント♪" followed by exactly 4 round icon features in pastel circles: 1) a pink bicycle icon with text "折りたたみで 持ち運び自由!" 2) a blue camera icon with text "フォトスポットで 思い出を残そう!" 3) a yellow drink icon with text "カフェタイムで ほっとひと息♪" 4) a purple gift icon with text "オリジナルグッズ プレゼント!".

On the lower right, add a rounded white information card with green accents titled "FOLDING BIKE サイクリングイベント" and large pink date text "6.15(日)". Inside the card, present exactly 4 event detail rows with colored circular icons: 1) calendar row: "開催日 2025. ※雨天時は6.22(日)に順延" 2) location row: "集合所 みなとみらい 臨港パーク" with smaller note "(神奈川県横浜市)" 3) course row: "コース みなとみらい〜湾沿いの気持ちいいルートを走ります" with smaller note "(約20km、初心者安心!)" 4) fee row: "参加費 3,000円" with smaller note "(保険・記念品付き) ※レンタルバイクあり(要予約)". At the bottom of this card, add a pink strip reading "初心者歓迎!ひとり参加も大歓迎!". Along the very bottom of the poster, create a wide pink banner with large Japanese copy "さあ、次の休日は一緒に走ろう!" and smaller text on the left "お申し込み・詳細は公式サイトへ!". In the center-bottom place a search-bar style box containing フォールディングライド 2025. To its right, add a black-and-white QR code and a pink label reading "エントリーはこちらから!". In the bottom-right corner, include a small inset photo-style illustration of two cyclists riding together with a handwritten note "たのしいかも♡". Maintain a lively, magazine-quality event poster composition with exactly 1 main character, 1 folding bike, 1 large event info card, 1 speech bubble, 1 yellow burst badge, 1 angled portability sticker, 4 feature icons, 1 QR code, and 1 inset image.
entries.description: A colorful Japanese-style anime poster advertising a folding bicycle cycling event, ideal for recreating eye-catching promotional key visuals.

entries.title: Anime Museum Poster with Kannon Statue
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A polished Japanese museum exhibition poster in a contemporary anime illustration style, vertical layout, warm ivory and gold color palette with pastel confetti accents, designed like a high-end promotional ad for a spring holiday event. The composition features 4 school-age to young adult female characters in the foreground and one monumental Buddhist statue in the background. At center back is a towering gilded Thousand-Armed Kannon statue with a radiant halo, intricate carved details, many arms fanning outward symmetrically, and hands pressed together in prayer at the chest, glowing with sacred golden light. In the foreground on the right is the largest figure, a friendly young woman guide or older student reaching one hand dramatically toward the viewer in forced perspective; she has dark brown shoulder-length hair, a blue striped blouse, a cream sweater draped over her shoulders, and a light skirt, with a warm inviting expression. Across the lower middle are 3 younger schoolgirls in matching uniforms: short-sleeve pale blue shirts with navy ribbon ties and dark blue skirts. The left girl points upward excitedly with one arm raised and wears a small shoulder bag; the center girl holds an exhibition booklet upright; the right girl drinks from a clear water bottle while looking toward the scene. Give all 4 girls lively anime-style faces, glossy hair, soft shading, and energetic museum-outing body language. Fill the poster with dense Japanese typography and decorative graphic shapes. Place a large bold main headline on the left reading 国宝を見に行こう!, with oversized gold and black calligraphy-style characters and one red-highlighted character. Above it, add smaller text: "千手観音、祈りの宇宙". Add a red circular callout near the top left that says "はじめての美術館にもおすすめ!" and a white cloud-shaped speech bubble near the top right that says "いっしょに新しい発見をしよう!". Add a gold ribbon banner under the main headline reading "アスキー美術館 GW開催". Include a pale blue circular information box on the left with 5 lines of Japanese copy describing the statue: "国宝 千手観音立像", "千の手が、千年の祈りを", "伝える", "圧巻のスケールを、", "その目で感じてみて。". In the lower left, place a dark rectangular exhibition plaque with gold trim and 5 text lines: "アスキー美術館 GW特別展", the large title "国宝展", then "千手観音、祈りの宇宙", then the date line 2026.4.26 SAT - 6.15 SUN. Along the bottom center, add the museum name in large text: アスキー美術館, followed by a smaller address line and nearest-station access text in Japanese. Add a red-and-black slogan along the bottom right: "心に残る体験が、きっとここに。". In the lower right, include 3 circular benefit icons with captions: one peach circle with a ticket icon and text "学生はお得! 学生証提示で当日券200円OFF!", one blue circle with a camera icon and text "撮影OK! 一部の作品は写真撮影OK!", and one gold circle with a gift icon and text "来場者プレゼント! オリジナルしおりをプレゼント!". Scatter subtle sparkles, halftone dots, abstract blobs, and confetti shapes around the page. Overall mood: inviting, educational, elegant, and exciting, combining sacred cultural grandeur with cheerful youthful discovery, like a fictional premium museum advertisement generated as a complete poster with integrated typography.
entries.description: This prompt generates a fictional Japanese-style museum exhibition poster combining anime characters, a grand Thousand-Armed Kannon statue, and fully integrated promotional typography for editorial or advertising use.

entries.title: French New Wave Torn Poster Collage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vintage 1960s French New Wave cinema poster collage on aged beige paper, designed like a torn-paper art-house one-sheet with analog grain, distressed print texture, rough ripped edges, ink wear, halftone imperfections, and slight misregistration. Center the composition around a large black-and-white portrait of a woman with messy dark hair, hand raised to her face, holding a cigarette, cropped from the chest up, with her face obscured by a rectangular blur block. Use a layered collage layout with exactly 8 major paper elements: 1) a top-left black text block reading "LES FILMS DU CARREFOUR présentent" above the large stacked name "ANNA KARINA" and smaller text "dans un film de JEAN-LUC GODARD"; 2) a red torn quote panel on the left reading "Il faut essayer d'être jeune comme on peut. - GODARD"; 3) a blue torn panel in the upper right with a black label reading "PRIX JEAN VIGO 1962"; 4) a narrow torn newspaper clipping on the upper right reading "l'amour est plus fort que la mort"; 5) a yellow torn panel on the mid-right showing a black silhouette of a man in a hat facing a woman, beside a vertical black filmstrip border with white sprocket holes; 6) a bottom-left black-and-white Paris street photo with wet pavement, a lamppost, pedestrians, and a visible sign reading "HOTEL DU NORD"; 7) a small bottom-left review text block reading '"LE FILM QUI A CHANGÉ LE CINÉMA" - CAHIERS DU CINÉMA'; 8) a bottom-right cropped black-and-white portrait of a man in a suit with his face obscured by a rectangular blur block, partially covered by a red torn paper shape. Across the lower middle, place the huge torn-paper title in bold condensed uppercase: "À BOUT DE" in black and "SOUFFLE" in red, slightly angled and spanning most of the width. Under the title, add a blue torn strip with white uppercase text "UNE HISTOIRE D'AMOUR ET DE LIBERTÉ". At the bottom center, add "COMING SOON" in black uppercase and below it "LES FILMS DU CARREFOUR". Limit the palette to faded cream, black, deep ultramarine blue, muted poster red, and mustard yellow. The overall mood is rebellious, romantic, and cinematic, like an iconic French New Wave poster made from ripped magazines, street photography, and bold typography.
entries.description: This prompt generates a distressed 1960s-style French art-house movie poster collage, ideal for retro cinema branding, editorial artwork, or vintage film-inspired cover designs.

entries.title: Guangzhou Ink-Wash City Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A refined vertical poster in contemporary Chinese ink-wash aesthetics, designed like a cultural city branding cover for 广州. Use a soft warm ivory paper background with large areas of negative space, delicate gray watercolor clouds, mist, and sweeping semi-abstract brushstroke arcs edged with muted metallic gold. The composition blends traditional Jiangnan-style ink painting with a modern skyline: on the right-center, depict the Guangzhou skyline emerging from haze across calm water, with the Canton Tower as the dominant tallest structure, slender and highly detailed, surrounded by several modern skyscrapers in pale gray-beige tones. In the lower left over the water, place 1 small traditional covered wooden boat with 1 standing boatman wearing a conical hat, rendered in dark ink silhouette with a subtle reflection. On the lower right foreground, include 1 flowering plum branch extending diagonally inward, with dark twisting bark and small vivid red blossoms. In the open upper-middle sky, add exactly 4 tiny flying birds. Keep the water smooth, reflective, and misty, with the city fading softly into the atmosphere. Along the left side, create elegant vertical typography in a minimalist poster layout: the large main Chinese title 广州, a small red seal-style label reading 南粤, two slim vertical text columns reading "千年商都" and "烟火与潮涌共生", a thin divider line, and small English text "GUANGZHOU" and "CANTON" beneath. Add 2 small seal marks in red near the lower-left text area and 1 tiny minimalist mountain line icon. At the very bottom center, place a faint small Chinese sentence 城在水上,梦在云间,心归岭南。. Overall mood: serene, elegant, poetic, high-end editorial poster, balanced asymmetry, light haze, restrained palette of ivory, charcoal gray, warm beige, black ink, cinnabar red, and brushed gold accents.
entries.description: This prompt generates a vertical New Chinese aesthetic poster that combines Guangzhou's modern skyline with traditional ink painting elements for cultural branding or editorial cover art.

entries.title: Lin Daiyu Ink-Wash Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical poster in elegant Chinese new aesthetic style, blending ink-wash painting and refined digital illustration on a warm off-white rice-paper background. The composition features a single young ancient Chinese woman seated in profile facing left, calm and scholarly, wearing a soft light gray-white hanfu with subtle floral embroidery and long flowing sleeves. She holds an open stitched book in both hands near her lap. Her hair is styled in a classic updo with a low gathered bun and long dark strands trailing behind, decorated with delicate gold and pearl floral hairpins. The face area should remain unobstructed in the final image, with a serene, graceful expression. Build the scene around a dramatic black-and-gray ink rock formation that wraps behind and beneath her like a seat, with soft smoky watercolor edges and a thin winding metallic gold contour line running from upper right to lower center. Add a blossoming plum branch rising diagonally from the right side with small white flowers and dark bark. Near the lower left, include a small pool ripple with one visible water droplet splash. Scatter a few pale falling petals around the woman's hands and lower left midground. Keep the palette restrained: ivory, ink black, ash gray, muted taupe, and subtle gold accents. The layout should feel airy and asymmetrical with large blank negative space on the left and top. Add Chinese typography integrated into the poster design: on the upper left, 3 very large vertical characters reading 林黛玉; beneath them, the romanized name in small spaced serif capitals reading "LIN DAIYU"; beside the name, place a slim vertical poem column in Chinese; on the right lower midsection, add another short vertical Chinese text column; at the bottom center, add one small horizontal Chinese sentence. Include exactly 4 red seal stamps placed as traditional accents: 1 near the left poem column, 1 near the lower left by the water ripple, 1 beside the right text column, and 1 small seal-like accent integrated with the typography area. Also include exactly 2 minimalist gold line ornaments in the lower right quadrant. The overall mood is poetic, fragile, pure, melancholic, and literati-inspired, with museum-poster elegance and high-end editorial polish.

entries.title: Ethereal Hijab Portrait in Golden Light
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dreamy, ethereal portrait of a modest woman in side profile wearing a soft flowing hijab and layered scarf in pale blush beige, standing against a deep midnight-dark background with faint architectural shadows. Her face is mostly turned away and softly obscured, keeping the mood anonymous and serene. She wears a loose long-sleeved dress or abaya in matching light fabric with delicate folds. Surround her with luminous golden particle trails and fine sparkling filaments that sweep diagonally around her body like magical wind, blending into clusters of glowing flowers and butterfly-like forms. The light effects should feel highly detailed and three-dimensional, with warm champagne, rose-gold, and ivory highlights against navy-black shadows. Place approximately 18 visible blossoms floating around and behind her, mixed in size, some sharp and some softly blurred, integrated into the swirling light. Add approximately 6 butterfly-like glowing forms, especially near the lower right and mid-body area, partially abstract and made of glittering light. The composition is vertical, elegant, cinematic, and painterly-photorealistic, with soft focus, bokeh, subtle lens bloom, and rich contrast. Emphasize grace, spirituality, femininity, and wonder, as if the figure is emerging from a constellation of light and flowers. Premium fantasy portrait aesthetic, ultra-detailed fabric texture, fine spark particles, gentle rim lighting, refined color grading, high-end digital art.
entries.description: This prompt generates a luminous fantasy portrait of a hijab-wearing woman surrounded by swirling floral light effects, ideal for elegant spiritual art and cinematic social media visuals.

entries.title: Cyberpunk Anime Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic Japanese anime movie poster for a fictional cyberpunk sci-fi film, vertical one-sheet composition, centered on a young anime girl standing in a ruined neon-lit alley at night beneath a huge glowing full moon. She has a pale face, a serious melancholic expression, bright magenta-pink glowing eyes, and short teal-to-cyan hair in messy twin braids with wispy bangs and luminous highlights. She wears a dark futuristic school-uniform-inspired outfit: a fitted black top, pleated skirt, utility belt with holsters and hanging devices, a loose open coat with insignia patches on the sleeves, and a high-tech glowing collar or headset around her neck. One arm is visibly cybernetic with exposed machinery and pink energy glowing through transparent panels. Her chest has a circular neon core-like device emitting pink light. The environment is dense with holographic screens, broken signage, cables, shards, sparks, and floating pink-blue particles, with towering dark structures framing her and strong rim lighting from the moon behind her head. Use a moody palette of deep indigo, violet, black, cyan, and hot pink, with ultra-detailed painterly anime rendering, glossy reflections, cinematic contrast, volumetric light, drifting debris, and a haunting futuristic atmosphere. Include Japanese poster typography integrated into the artwork: on the right side, a tall vertical tagline in white with one key phrase highlighted in pink; on the upper left, exactly 3 stacked award blurbs in Japanese, each framed by laurel wreaths; near the lower middle, a small line of Japanese text above the title; a giant central title in white kanji reading 未来×回線 with a glowing pink X in the middle; directly below it, romanized subtitle text reading MIRAI KAISEN; below that, a pink Japanese subtitle line reading -終焉のコード-; near the bottom center, a single Japanese promotional sentence with one word highlighted in pink; at the bottom right, a large theatrical release date reading 7.18 with small [FRI] and ROADSHOW beneath it; and fine-print credits plus a copyright line along the bottom edge. Make it feel like a premium original animated feature poster, emotionally intense, polished, and award-winning.

entries.title: Fantasy Anime Movie Poster at Sunset
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A breathtaking vertical Japanese anime film poster for a fantasy adventure movie, painted in a luminous cinematic style with dramatic sunset lighting, painterly clouds, and highly detailed background scenery. The composition features 4 human figures total: 2 large upper-body character portraits dominating the top half, and 1 small full-body girl in the foreground plus 1 tiny implied city crowd only as environmental scale. The main featured characters are a teenage girl and a teenage boy shown back-to-back in profile near the upper center, both facing opposite directions with calm, wistful, serious expressions. The girl has short windblown dark navy-blue hair with soft highlights, a school uniform-style outfit in deep blue with a white collar and a red ribbon bow, and she is positioned larger on the left. The boy is slightly smaller on the right, with tousled light brown hair, a dark high-collar coat or cloak, and a contemplative look. The lower center shows a younger girl standing on a stone overlook from behind, wearing a dark blue coat or dress, ankle socks, dark shoes, and a long red scarf blowing strongly in the wind; beside her sits 1 black cat, both gazing toward the horizon and the city below. The setting is an expansive fantasy city at golden hour, with warm sunlight breaking across a river valley and rooftops, and a towering ornate spiral-like clocktower or fantastical cathedral spire rising on the right side. In the sky are 6 floating islands of varying sizes covered with grass and rocky undersides, scattered across the upper left and upper right sky. Also include 5 white birds flying across the middle and lower sky, plus 1 large gliding bird-like silhouette on the left midground. Frame the foreground with soft blue and white flowers and foliage along the bottom corners. Use a dreamy palette of violet, lavender, peach, gold, and soft blue, with glowing rim light, atmospheric haze, epic scale, emotional fantasy-adventure mood, and premium hand-painted anime poster finish. Add Japanese movie-poster typography integrated into the image: a large vertical tagline in white on the upper right, a large central title in white kanji reading 星を紡ぐ旅人, smaller subtitle text beneath it, 3 award-laurel callout blocks in white on the upper left, a release date block on the lower left reading 7.18 FRI above ROADSHOW, a short promotional quote in white on the lower right, and a line of film staff credits across the bottom center. Include a small copyright line at the very bottom. Make it feel like an original blockbuster anime movie poster by a prestigious studio, emotionally uplifting, nostalgic, magical, and grand in scale.
entries.description: A cinematic Japanese-style animated film poster featuring two main characters, a girl with a cat overlooking a fantasy city, floating islands, and elegant promotional typography, ideal for fictional movie key art.

entries.title: Cyberpunk Anime Announcement Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic Japanese anime announcement poster set in a rain-soaked futuristic neon megacity at night, with a wide cinematic composition and glossy cyberpunk lighting in electric blue, magenta, violet, and red. At the top center, a huge metallic silver sci-fi logo reads FORMULA NEO, with a sharp emblem to the right and small Japanese subtitle text beneath it. Across the middle, place a large beveled gold banner with bold black Japanese text TVアニメ化決定!. Under that, add a white release line in Japanese reading 2027年4月放送開始予定. In the foreground, line up exactly 8 anime characters shoulder to shoulder, full body, facing forward like a cast reveal: 1) a tall figure in a white futuristic racing-style coat and suit with cyan glowing trim, white hair, and a cool aura; 2) a red-haired young man in a black and orange jacket with flame motifs, dark pants, sneakers, and fiery effects around one arm, holding a thick book or tablet-like object; 3) a mysterious person in a long purple robe or coat with gold trim, elegant and mage-like; 4) a central protagonist in a dark navy or black racing jumpsuit with subtle cyan piping and a serious stance; 5) a shorter tech-oriented character in a dark outfit with glowing cyan holographic interface panels around one hand; 6) a silver-haired rugged man in gray-black tactical streetwear with crossed arms, gloves, utility straps, and a hardened expression; 7) a green-haired young woman in a casual green-and-white hoodie and pants, shy posture, holding an object close to her chest; 8) a blond young man in a mustard-yellow vest over a shirt with black tie and decorative starry or dotted dark pants, standing next to a small pink-haired girl in an oversized pastel hoodie and shorts, looking down at a handheld device. The city background should include towering skyscrapers packed with neon signage, glowing Japanese and Roman-letter billboards, motion blur, wet reflective pavement, and several futuristic race cars speeding through the street on the left and right with red taillights and cyan highlights. Add small Japanese production-credit text centered along the bottom edge, including a clearly visible fiction disclaimer in Japanese. The image should feel like an official anime adaptation key visual for a fictional racing-and-cyber fantasy franchise, hyper-polished, high contrast, poster-ready, and slightly tongue-in-cheek but convincing.
entries.description: This prompt generates a fictional Japanese TV anime adaptation poster with an eight-character ensemble cast in a neon cyberpunk racing city, ideal for parody announcements and franchise-style key visuals.

entries.title: Cyberpunk Japanese Manga Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic Japanese weekly manga magazine cover, glossy print design, packed and chaotic like a real shonen magazine issue. The cover title at the top left is a huge red-and-white masthead reading "週刊 MAGAZINE NEO" with thick black outlines, and at the top right a black issue box reading "2027年 18号". Add a small price box on the left that says "特別定価 450円" and a barcode beneath it. The overall theme is a near-future cyberpunk racing manga launch issue with saturated neon lighting, rain-slick reflections, and a high-energy editorial layout full of starbursts, callouts, and teaser boxes. The central background shows a futuristic city street at night with magenta, cyan, and blue neon signs and wet pavement, and in the upper right background a sleek black Formula-style race car with glowing cyan accents speeding through the city. In the center foreground, place 1 main protagonist: a young anime man with messy black hair, wearing a black high-tech racing suit traced with glowing cyan circuit lines, headphones around his neck, and a small chest patch that says "NEO.JP"; he stands facing forward in a heroic pose. On the right side, place the large vertical series title in distressed white letters: "FORMULA NEO" with smaller vertical Japanese text "フォーミュラネオ". Near that, include a credit box reading "原作・F1NEO.jp" and beneath it "/漫画・". Add a large yellow circular burst at the upper right with bold magenta and black text: "巻頭カラー 64p!! 超ボリュームで開幕!!!". Add a jagged yellow burst on the upper left-middle that says "ぶっちぎりの新連載!!" and a diagonal magenta ribbon nearby that says "2089年 最速の物語が始まる―". In the lower half, arrange 7 supporting characters around the hero: 1 silver-haired man in a white futuristic coat with blue glowing lines on the left; 1 red-haired tough-looking young man in a black-and-red jacket at bottom left with fire blazing from his right fist; 1 hooded figure in a purple cloak holding a glowing purple book left of center; 1 short blue-black-haired girl in a dark tech outfit at center holding a transparent holographic interface; 1 brown-haired young man in a gray racing jacket with arms crossed at right center; 1 green-haired gentle-looking girl in a pale top near lower right center; and 1 blond youth in a yellow outfit on the far right holding up a small cube or die. In front near the bottom center, add 1 small pink-haired chibi-like or younger character in a pale pink hoodie with hands clasped. Add a black jagged burst on the lower left that says "描き下ろし特別ポスター付録!!". Across the lower middle, add a bold promotional line in white, cyan, and red: "今号も激アツ新連載&人気作が勢揃い!!". Along the very bottom, include 4 rectangular teaser panels for other manga series, each with a colored banner tag at the top and Japanese titles: panel 1 red tag "新連載!" with title "覇の剣聖" and subtitle "~宿命の刃~"; panel 2 blue tag "新連載!" with title "アストラル・コード" and subtitle "~銀河の記憶~"; panel 3 pink tag "激推し!" with title "エリクシア・ハート" and subtitle "~魔法少女再起動!~"; panel 4 green tag "激推し!" with title "喧嘩王キング" and subtitle "~頂上決戦編~". Near the lower right, add a small inset image of the same magazine volume with text beside it reading "最新単行本 第1巻 4月15日発売!!". At the very bottom, place a white disclaimer line across a black strip: "※これはファンメイドのフィクションです。実在の雑誌・出版社とは関係ありません。". Use bold manga cover typography, exaggerated Japanese magazine composition, dense overlapping text, thick outlines, explosive bursts, glossy highlights, gritty neon cyberpunk atmosphere, and polished anime illustration.

entries.searchText: cyberpunk japanese manga cover this prompt generates a dense faux japanese weekly manga magazine cover for a futuristic cyberpunk racing series, ideal for magazine mockups and anime-style promotional art. create a dramatic japanese weekly manga magazine cover, glossy print design, packed and chaotic like a real shonen magazine issue. the cover title at the top left is a huge red-and-white masthead reading "週刊 magazine neo" with thick black outlines, and at the top right a black issue box reading "2027年 18号". add a small price box on the left that says "特別定価 450円" and a barcode beneath it. the overall theme is a near-future cyberpunk racing manga launch issue with saturated neon lighting, rain-slick reflections, and a high-energy editorial layout full of starbursts, callouts, and teaser boxes. the central background shows a futuristic city street at night with magenta, cyan, and blue neon signs and wet pavement, and in the upper right background a sleek black formula-style race car with glowing cyan accents speeding through the city. in the center foreground, place 1 main protagonist: a young anime man with messy black hair, wearing a black high-tech racing suit traced with glowing cyan circuit lines, headphones around his neck, and a small chest patch that says "neo.jp"; he stands facing forward in a heroic pose. on the right side, place the large vertical series title in distressed white letters: "formula neo" with smaller vertical japanese text "フォーミュラネオ". near that, include a credit box reading "原作・f1neo.jp" and beneath it "/漫画・". add a large yellow circular burst at the upper right with bold magenta and black text: "巻頭カラー 64p!! 超ボリュームで開幕!!!". add a jagged yellow burst on the upper left-middle that says "ぶっちぎりの新連載!!" and a diagonal magenta ribbon nearby that says "2089年 最速の物語が始まる―". in the lower half, arrange 7 supporting characters around the hero: 1 silver-haired man in a white futuristic coat with blue glowing lines on the left; 1 red-haired tough-looking young man in a black-and-red jacket at bottom left with fire blazing from his right fist; 1 hooded figure in a purple cloak holding a glowing purple book left of center; 1 short blue-black-haired girl in a dark tech outfit at center holding a transparent holographic interface; 1 brown-haired young man in a gray racing jacket with arms crossed at right center; 1 green-haired gentle-looking girl in a pale top near lower right center; and 1 blond youth in a yellow outfit on the far right holding up a small cube or die. in front near the bottom center, add 1 small pink-haired chibi-like or younger character in a pale pink hoodie with hands clasped. add a black jagged burst on the lower left that says "描き下ろし特別ポスター付録!!". across the lower middle, add a bold promotional line in white, cyan, and red: "今号も激アツ新連載&人気作が勢揃い!!". along the very bottom, include 4 rectangular teaser panels for other manga series, each with a colored banner tag at the top and japanese titles: panel 1 red tag "新連載!" with title "覇の剣聖" and subtitle "~宿命の刃~"; panel 2 blue tag "新連載!" with title "アストラル・コード" and subtitle "~銀河の記憶~"; panel 3 pink tag "激推し!" with title "エリクシア・ハート" and subtitle "~魔法少女再起動!~"; panel 4 green tag "激推し!" with title "喧嘩王キング" and subtitle "~頂上決戦編~". near the lower right, add a small inset image of the same magazine volume with text beside it reading "最新単行本 第1巻 4月15日発売!!". at the very bottom, place a white disclaimer line across a black strip: "※これはファンメイドのフィクションです。実在の雑誌・出版社とは関係ありません。". use bold manga cover typography, exaggerated japanese magazine composition, dense overlapping text, thick outlines, explosive bursts, glossy highlights, gritty neon cyberpunk atmosphere, and polished anime illustration. poster / flyer magazine editorial phone camera street street city

entries.title: Gestural Ink Fashion Illustration
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
ASPECT_RATIO: [3:4]

SOURCE_IMAGE: [uploaded photo]

ACCENT_COLOR: [single vivid highlight color]

Use the uploaded photo as the base image and the only identity source. Keep the person exactly the same and clearly recognizable. Ignore the original framing and always recompose into a tight close-up or upper-body editorial crop, with the face dominating the frame. Transform the image into a gestural editorial ink fashion illustration. The style must be built from bold black brushwork, not delicate sketch lines.

Use:

very thick black brush strokes

broad dry-brush sweeps

large asymmetrical black ink masses

long loose calligraphic lines

broken contours

scratchy secondary linework

strong black-on-ivory contrast

smooth monochrome skin

The thick strokes must be clearly dominant. Do not render the portrait mainly with thin contour lines. Do not make it neat, polished, or softly illustrated. The image should feel painted with a loaded brush and finished with sharp expressive pen marks.

Keep the portrait stylish and high-fashion.

Use one hero accessory, preferably oversized translucent tinted sunglasses.

The accent color [ACCENT_COLOR] must live mainly inside that accessory, especially in the lenses, as a bold luminous tint. Only tiny supporting traces of the same color may appear elsewhere.
entries.description: An advanced image-to-image prompt that transforms a photo into a bold, high-fashion black ink illustration with a specific color accent.

entries.title: Parody Isekai Edgelord Novel Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic parody anime light novel cover in a dark gothic romantasy style, designed like an absurdly over-the-top isekai web novel volume cover. Center a handsome young male antihero from the chest up in a heroic three-quarter pose with arms crossed, face mostly obscured by shadow, messy black emo hair, pale skin, and a cold brooding presence. He wears glossy black armor with large shoulder plates, a black cloak and scarf wrapped high around the neck, dark gauntlets, a diamond-patterned tunic beneath the armor, and a small silver crest pinned at the chest. A massive black battle axe is strapped over one shoulder, with a sword hilt visible near the lower left side. Set him inside a ruined cathedral or castle archway with towering stone columns and a huge circular gothic window behind him, backlit by cold silvery moonlight. In the distant background, show sharp fantasy castle spires fading into mist. Use a palette of black, steel blue, silver, and antique gold, with high contrast rim lighting, subtle magical sparkles, and painterly anime illustration detail. Surround the entire cover with an ornate filigree gold border and elegant flourishes in every corner. Add lavish gold serif and script typography layered over the character like a real fantasy paperback cover. The main title should dominate the lower half in stacked lines with decorative swashes and mixed font sizes: The Absurdly Overpowered, Excessively Edgelord, Emotionally Constipated, Black-Haired, Red-Eyed, World-Saving, Dragon-Slaying, Harem-Accidentally-Collecting Demon Lord (Who Just Wanted a Nap). In the upper right, add author text reading: TISAYAI. In the upper left, place a small ornate badge with the number 1. Include 3 side text blurbs in small gold type: upper left blurb, "I came to this world to flex my red eyes, emo hair, and godly plot armor. You're welcome."; lower left oval blurb, "Villains Tremble. Heros Whine. He Yawns."; lower right blurb, "I don't chose the isekai life, the isekai life made a huge fuss over me." The overall tone is ironic, melodramatic, gorgeous, and intentionally ridiculous, like a premium fake bestselling isekai romance-action novel cover. Portrait orientation, highly polished, ultra-detailed, cinematic, decorative, readable typography integrated into the artwork.
entries.description: A lavish fake anime light novel cover featuring an absurdly brooding black-armored isekai hero, ideal for parody fantasy book art and ironic romantasy web novel visuals.

entries.title: Authentic Japanese Delivery Flyer
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A delivery flyer for a Japanese Chinese restaurant (3:4 aspect ratio). B5 size, double-sided style.

Flyer characteristics (following the logic of real delivery flyers):
- Loud red and yellow color scheme.
- Large text at the top: "Delivery Available! Mona Restaurant" (shadowed Gothic font).
- An illustration of a Chinese girl (red cheongsam, brown short bob) holding ramen and saying "Welcome!" (with a speech bubble).
- A menu photo grid (4x3) featuring various dishes: various ramen, fried rice, gyoza, sweet and sour pork, chili shrimp, mapo tofu, liver and leek stir-fry, tenshinhan, twice-cooked pork, spring rolls, annin tofu, and fried rice sets.
- Name and price for each dish.
- A large yellow banner saying "Free delivery for all orders over ¥1,000!".
- "Order by phone! ☎ 072-XX-XXXX" highlighted with a red circle.
- Business hours: "11:00-22:00 (Closed on Tuesdays)".
- Delivery area map (simple schematic map).
- Coupon (perforated line): "One free plate of gyoza with this flyer!".

Cheap paper texture finish. Includes fold lines. High accuracy indistinguishable from real Japanese delivery flyers.
entries.description: An elaborate prompt that replicates the specific visual language of Japanese neighborhood Chinese restaurant delivery flyers, including typography, layout, and paper texture.

entries.title: Farmer in Deep Work Aura
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic, hyper-detailed rustic interior scene of a solitary older farmer sitting at a wooden table, intensely focused on a modern laptop as if entering deep work mode. He wears a weathered straw hat, a light sage-gray work shirt with rolled sleeves, and blue denim overalls. The composition is centered and symmetrical, medium shot from the front, with both forearms resting on the table behind the laptop. A dramatic golden energy aura explodes outward from behind and around his body, forming radiant sparks, glowing streaks, electric filaments, and a halo-like outline that makes him look powerfully energized and unstoppable. The room is a warm, moody farmhouse workspace with 1 large multi-pane window on the left casting soft natural light, 1 metal cup holding several pens and pencils, 1 ceramic mug, 1 open notebook with 1 pen in the foreground, 1 closed book at the lower left edge, and 3 stacked books on the right side of the table. In the dim background, include 2 faint ghostlike or memory-like human figures, one on the left and one on the right, subtle and partially obscured by the glowing energy. Use rich amber and sepia tones, dust motes, dramatic backlighting, high contrast, shallow depth of field, textured wood grain, and a heroic, surreal atmosphere blending rural life with modern productivity. Photorealistic, ultra-detailed, cinematic lighting, square composition.
entries.description: This prompt generates a dramatic photorealistic image of a rural worker using a laptop while surrounded by explosive golden energy, ideal for illustrating intense focus, productivity, or solitary work time.

entries.title: Noir Melting Ink Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A minimalist vintage poster in a vertical 9:16 composition on an off-white paper-textured background. Center a single male figure in side-profile facing right, shown from hat to upper thighs, styled like a 1940s noir intellectual wearing a dark fedora with a light hatband, a black suit jacket, white dress shirt, and dark tie. Use dramatic high-contrast Rembrandt lighting and deep shadows so the face is mostly obscured in black silhouette, with a refined film noir mood. Place 1 large vivid red circle directly behind the head and upper shoulders like a bold halo, perfectly clean and graphic. The lower half of the torso and jacket should dissolve into long vertical black ink drips and splatters, with some gray wash streaks mixed in, creating a melting ink effect that extends downward toward the bottom of the poster. Keep the palette restricted to true red, deep black, gray wash, and off-white. Add 1 bold uppercase sans-serif title centered near the bottom reading THE MID-CENTURY INTELLECTUAL. Overall style: mid-century modern poster design, cinematic noir, minimalist editorial art, clean negative space, elegant, haunting, graphic, museum-poster quality.
entries.description: A striking mid-century noir poster of a suited man in profile with a red halo and melting ink drips, ideal for editorial art, wall prints, or cinematic poster design.

entries.prompt: A full-body cinematic portrait of an anthropomorphic squirrel child standing centered on a city pedestrian street in autumn, facing the camera with a calm, charming presence and hands tucked into the coat pockets. Dress the character in a red beret, a blue plaid button-up shirt, brown corduroy overalls, a beige trench coat, and brown leather lace-up boots. The background is a softly blurred urban shopping street with indistinct pedestrians, storefronts, and hints of red awnings, with fallen leaves scattered on the pavement. entries.title: Personalized TIME magazine cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create an ultra-realistic magazine cover inspired by TIME.
A confident young woman named [Name] is featured as the main cover star. She stands centered, making direct eye contact with a powerful, calm expression.
She is styled in modern, elegant fashion - minimal yet bold (e.g., tailored blazer, sleek dress, or contemporary couture). Her hair is perfectly styled, and makeup is natural but editorial-grade.

entries.title: Futuristic Animation Trade Magazine Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a futuristic professional magazine cover for the animation industry, portrait orientation, high-end editorial design, cinematic and polished. The masthead dominates the upper left in huge bold white sans-serif letters split across two lines: FRAME RATE. Above it, a small yellow all-caps tagline reads: THE INDUSTRY TRADE MAGAZINE FOR ANIMATION PROFESSIONALS. Below the masthead, a smaller white subtitle reads: THE BUSINESS, TECHNOLOGY & ART OF ANIMATION. In the upper right, place issue text in stacked bold type: VOL. 23 in yellow and SUMMER 2026 in white. The cover image shows a stylized humanoid female-coded robot or digital mannequin in a dynamic running pose, facing right, shown full body, with one leg lifted behind and one arm extended. Her body is semi-transparent dark mesh with glowing orange internal joints, spine, and limb mechanisms, accented by blue and purple neon tracing lines and circular motion rings around wrists, ankles, hips, and feet. She has messy tied-up blue hair and a smooth simplified face with minimal features, like a CG character prototype. Set her in a dark animation studio interior with blurred monitors, desks, and concept art pinned in the background, lit with low moody ambient light so the neon figure becomes the focal point. Add reflective flooring beneath her with concentric holographic rings under both feet in green, yellow, and orange. On the left side, arrange editorial cover lines in a clean magazine layout. A small yellow label says COVER STORY. Below it, a large bold white stacked headline reads: PIPELINES THAT LEARN. STORIES THAT MOVE.. Beneath that, a yellow subhead reads: HOW AI IS TRANSFORMING EVERY STAGE OF ANIMATION PRODUCTION. In the lower left, include 3 secondary article listings, each with a short yellow rule above it: 1) INBETWEENING 2.0, with small white teaser text: Inside the new generation of AI Inbetweening models changing the industry standard., and page number p. 24 in yellow. 2) CONSISTENCY AT SCALE, with small white teaser text: Maintaining character performance with AI-assisted interpolation., and page number p. 38 in yellow. 3) ARTIST ORCHARD, NOT REPLACEMENT, with small white teaser text: How top studios integrate AI tools while keeping artists in the loop., and page number p. 52 in yellow. Near the lower right, add a black circular badge outlined in yellow containing yellow and white text: WORKFLOW SPOTLIGHT on top, DreamFrame Studios on building a proprietary AI animation stack beneath, and p. 60 at the bottom in yellow. In the bottom right corner, place a white barcode box with pricing above it reading: US $12.99 EUR €14.99, plus small issue code numbers. Use a color palette of black, charcoal, white, vivid yellow, electric orange, blue, and violet. The overall feeling should be premium, forward-looking, tech-savvy, and credible, like a real trade magazine cover about AI-driven animation pipelines.
entries.description: This prompt generates a polished editorial magazine cover featuring a glowing humanoid animation robot and realistic cover lines for a professional AI-and-animation publication.

entries.title: Epic Fantasy Double-Exposure Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vertically oriented epic fantasy poster in the style of a prestige television series one-sheet, designed like a Chinese theatrical promotional poster for Game of Thrones. The composition is a dramatic double-exposure silhouette of a woman in left-facing side profile occupying most of the frame, her braided hair forming the crown and upper contour of the silhouette. Inside and around the silhouette, blend a vast dark medieval fantasy world with storm clouds, smoke, mountains, castles, dragons, armies, and fire. At the top inside the head area, place 1 grand stone city or castle complex glowing with pale golden light beneath turbulent clouds, and 3 dragons in the sky: 1 large dragon flying prominently on the upper right and 2 smaller distant dragons near the top edge. In the midsection, show 2 fur-cloaked heroic figures standing close together in a bleak winter atmosphere, one centered and one slightly left, with a looming iron-throne-like structure behind them. In the lower right interior, include 1 icy blue-eyed undead king emerging from darkness. Across the lower half, transition from cold mist and coastal water on the left into burning ruins and orange fire on the right, with 1 medium dragon flying near the center-lower area above the battlefield. Scatter tiny marching soldiers and riders along ridgelines and paths to imply war across the landscape. Use a muted palette of ash white, charcoal black, slate blue, steel gray, sepia, and ember orange, with cinematic high contrast, volumetric fog, painterly photo-collage realism, and intricate textured detail. Leave negative space around the silhouette on a warm off-white paper-like background. Add vertical Chinese slogan text along the upper left margin reading 风暴降临前 传奇永不终结. Add a small English logo area on the left reading GAME OF THRONES. Place a large Chinese title near the lower left reading 冰与火之歌, with the English subtitle "A SONG OF ICE AND FIRE" beneath it. Add small credit text below for the novel author George R. R. Martin. Along the bottom, display 5 house sigils in a horizontal row with bilingual labels: Stark, Lannister, Targaryen, Baratheon, Tarly. Beneath them, add the tagline THE SEVEN KINGDOMS, ONE THRONE.. Premium, moody, majestic, collectible poster design.
entries.description: A cinematic fantasy series poster prompt for generating a dark double-exposure silhouette composition with dragons, castles, war, and bilingual title typography.
