entries.title: Autumn in New York Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vertical editorial-style travel poster in Spanish for a III viaje fotográfico titled "OTOÑO EN NUEVA YORK," designed with a sophisticated urban autumn mood and a premium photography-workshop aesthetic. Use a tall mobile-friendly poster layout with a warm off-white, beige, charcoal, and burnt orange palette. The composition is dominated by oversized condensed black sans-serif typography on the left: small text at the top reading "III VIAJE FOTOGRÁFICO," then the huge stacked headline "OTOÑO" on top, a smaller "EN" with short horizontal orange lines on both sides, and below it the huge stacked words "NUEVA YORK." On the right side, place a narrow informational column with exactly 4 short benefit lines in uppercase: "7 NOCHES", "GRUPO REDUCIDO", "GUÍAS EXPERTOS", and "MILES DE FOTOS" with the last line in orange. Below that, add the dates in large orange numbers "17-24" and beneath in black uppercase "DE OCTUBRE" and "DE 2026." Add a thin vertical line near the far right edge and a tiny orange dot at the top. Integrate a moody New York street photo collage into the lower half and through the typography, centered on the Manhattan Bridge framed by dark brick buildings, wet streets, a few cars, steam rising from the roadway, and a lone photographer seen from behind in the foreground wearing a rust-orange beanie and a backpack, holding a camera toward the bridge. Let giant cropped letterforms from "NYC" or similarly bold graphic shapes blend with the city imagery across the bottom half, creating a layered double-exposure poster effect. Add distressed paper textures, rough torn-edge overlays, brushy white paint textures, and subtle grunge for a handcrafted editorial finish. On the left lower-mid area, place a circular orange stamp containing a small Statue of Liberty torch icon and the curved text "III VIAJE FOTOGRÁFICO · OTOÑO EN NUEVA YORK." Along the bottom, create a dark band with 2 presenter credits, one left and one right, separated by a thin vertical orange line: left "CARLOS SÁNCHEZ" with "@CHOCUTUTS" in orange below, right "JON TARAFA" with "@JONTCPHOTO" in orange below. Centered at the very bottom, add the website "VIAJENY.COM" in spaced orange uppercase letters. Include 2 partially cropped grayscale portrait cutouts in the bottom corners, one on the left and one on the right, blending into the dark footer area. Overall style: cinematic travel advertisement, contemporary magazine poster, bold typographic hierarchy, layered collage, gritty New York autumn atmosphere, high contrast, elegant and dramatic.
entries.description: This prompt generates a dramatic vertical Spanish-language poster for a New York autumn photography trip, ideal for travel promotions, workshops, and social media ads.

entries.title: Vibrant Automotive Poster Design
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vibrant lime green Porsche 911 GT3 is showcased in a dynamic, graphic poster. The car is positioned in the center, viewed from its left side in a three-quarter profile, facing right. Its sleek, aerodynamic design is emphasized with black accents, large rear spoiler, and distinctive wheels. Subtle overlays of a faded lime green Porsche hint at its branding and lineage in the background. A prominent vertical lime green stripe cuts through the poster, framing the Porsche crest and the "PORSCHE" text above the car. Below the vehicle, the "911 GT3" model designation is displayed in a bold, stylized font. Graphics illustrating acceleration, power, and top speed are arranged at the bottom, along with descriptive text. The overall composition is clean, modern, and energetic, utilizing a limited color palette of lime green, white, black, and the red, gold, and black of the Porsche emblem. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the car's contours and the graphic elements of the poster, creating a high-impact visual presentation.
entries.description: A detailed prompt for a high-impact, modern graphic poster featuring a sports car with specialized typography and technical infographics.

entries.title: Dynamic Automotive Poster Reconstruction
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Ultra-clean automotive poster featuring the exact same car as the photo that will be provided later. The AI must replicate the car from the uploaded photo with identical body shape, proportions, stance, color, trims, wheels, and all visible exterior details. The car is presented in a front three-quarter angle facing right, matching the perspective of the original reference layout, but now depicted in a subtle drifting action. The drift is expressed through realistic weight transfer, slight body lift, controlled smoke plumes from the rear tires, and faint curved tire marks behind the vehicle, without distorting the original car's geometry. Headlights follow the exact style from the reference photo of the car, with optional warm fog lights glowing if the provided car has them. All decals, emblems, plates, and window tints must match the car from the uploaded photo. The car drifts on a glossy white reflective studio-like floor that maintains soft reflections and realistic shadows, enhanced with light drift skid reflections and directional smudges. Background remains a clean white-to-light-gray gradient with a giant semi-transparent bold typography of the car model name (auto-extracted from the uploaded photo) vertically dominating the background. At the very top: clean branding text "SUZUKI" (or the brand detected from the uploaded car photo). Under it, spaced-out stylized tracking text containing the same brand and model name. Below the car: centered title of the exact model name from the uploaded photo. Under that, a short descriptive paragraph about the car's character. Bottom section shows a clean grid layout of specifications. Entire poster is minimalist, editorial, high-key studio lighting with ultra-sharp reflections, crisp shadows, modern typography, and 4K believability, blending clean design with dynamic drifting energy, Ar 16:9
entries.description: A sophisticated prompt that replicates a car from an uploaded image and places it in a dynamic drifting studio poster with editorial layout and specifications.

entries.title: Miniature City Weather Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vertical smartphone-style weather poster for 成都, designed as a dreamy ultra-detailed miniature diorama cityscape under a bright blue sky. At the top center, place large bold white Chinese characters for the city name with soft 3D depth and a gentle drop shadow. Directly below it, center a fluffy white cloud icon made of rounded sculpted forms. Under the icon, add one line of smaller white text showing 2026-04-22 星期三, then a larger bold white temperature line reading 28° / 18°, then one more centered weather-condition line in white reading 多云. Keep all text vertically stacked, evenly spaced, and cleanly centered in the upper half of the image. In the lower half, create an enchanting hybrid city of traditional Chinese water-town architecture and a modern skyline: calm turquoise canals winding around tiny islands, 2 small arched stone bridges in the foreground, 1 pavilion on the left island, 1 tall multi-tier pagoda near the right-center, clusters of grey-tiled traditional houses and shopfronts, outdoor tea tables with umbrellas, lush willows, shrubs, flowers, and a few tiny boats on the water. In the distant background, show a contemporary skyline with many glass skyscrapers and 1 prominent needle-like observation tower. Scatter exactly 5 soft cumulus clouds across the sky including the central weather icon area, and add a few tiny birds for life. Use warm morning sunlight, cinematic atmospheric perspective, shallow depth of field, tilt-shift miniature photography aesthetics, highly realistic materials, delicate reflections in the water, and a polished whimsical travel-poster mood. Preserve a clean composition with generous sky above and the miniature city concentrated at the bottom, like a premium weather app hero image.
entries.description: This prompt generates a polished vertical weather poster combining centered forecast typography with a whimsical miniature Chinese cityscape, ideal for travel-themed app visuals and social media weather art.

entries.title: Dark Moonlit Noir Album Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark, cinematic album-cover-style scene inside a high-rise room at night, viewed from a moody interior looking out over a vast modern city filled with dense skyscraper lights. On the left side, a solitary man sits slouched beside a tall rain-speckled window, his face obscured in deep shadow and cigarette smoke drifting upward, wearing a dark suit or open-collar dress shirt with a disheveled, brooding presence. In the lower left foreground, place exactly 2 liquor bottles, 1 short tumbler glass with amber whiskey, and a cluttered tabletop reflecting low warm light. Outside the giant window on the right, a winged human figure with large black feathered wings hovers or descends over the city, silhouetted dramatically against a huge luminous full moon surrounded by torn clouds and faint sparkling particles in the sky. The palette is nearly monochrome with cold blue-black shadows and small warm amber highlights from the drink and room lights. Add layered atmospheric haze, smoke, wet glass texture, dramatic contrast, realistic photography blended with dark fantasy, luxury noir, melancholic and dangerous mood. Across the lower middle, overlay large ornate serif title typography reading Soul King D'Ryoichi, with a decorative crown and flourishes integrated into the lettering. Beneath it, add a smaller elegant Japanese subtitle line reading 見上げた月は存外に綺麗で. Make it look like a premium music single cover or visual for lyrics, highly detailed, polished, cinematic, centered composition, square format.

entries.title: Chaotic Fourth Crusade Parody Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A chaotic fictional Japanese movie poster themed around world history, designed like a glossy blockbuster comedy-action epic about the Fourth Crusade getting completely lost and attacking Constantinople instead of reaching Jerusalem. The composition is dense, loud, and satirical, with a dramatic historical battlefield collage under a bright blue sky, flames, smoke, medieval ships, domes, city walls, and crusader armies. In the center foreground, a full-body medieval crusader in a dirty white tunic with a large red cross points directly toward the viewer, surrounded by four other medieval figures in ornate robes, hoods, helmets, and merchant-like clothing; their faces are obscured by soft rectangular blurs, making the poster look like a parody cast reveal. Across the top, huge hot-pink Japanese brush lettering reads 方向性、完全に迷子。, with smaller black Japanese tagline text above and below it. A torn vertical caption on the left side in bold yellow Japanese text explains that they meant to head for Jerusalem but somehow crush the Byzantine Empire. Two large parchment banners cross the upper middle area: one says that the original destination was Jerusalem, and the larger center banner declares in bold red Japanese text that the destination is Jerusalem, followed by smaller black text saying that was supposed to be the plan. On the upper right, a pinned parchment itinerary board contains a 5-step comedic route list with icons and arrows: departure, no money, bowing to Venice, lightly attacking Zara, then Constantinople, ending with a red line implying they somehow arrived there. Around the characters are exactly 8 speech balloons and callout labels: one saying "Eh, huh?", one saying "No money...", one saying "By order, let's go.", one saying "Slight detour.", one saying "I failed, lol.", one saying "Zara? We passed there!", one label for a "contract" with a note that it is kind of expensive, and one pointing to Venice as a sponsor-like label. Additional wooden or parchment location signs label exactly 3 places: Zara, Venice, and Constantinople, with Japanese side notes identifying them as Christian or Byzantine cities. The lower half becomes darker and more catastrophic, showing a burning Byzantine-style city with a large domed church resembling Hagia Sophia, naval combat, collapsing architecture, orange firelight, and black smoke. At the bottom center, enormous distressed Japanese title typography in yellow and white announces the film as the Fourth Crusade and says Constantinople burns due to getting lost, with gritty texture, heavy drop shadows, and explosive blockbuster poster styling. On the right side of the title area, a red stamped burst says in Japanese that it begins around 1204. Along the very bottom is a narrow cast strip with exactly 6 small cast thumbnails labeled in Japanese, plus tiny fake credits running across the footer. In the bottom right corner, place a bright pink starburst badge with yellow and white Japanese text reading 史実です。信じられないけど。. Overall style: absurd historical parody, cinematic key art, Japanese theatrical poster, high detail, photobashed realism mixed with exaggerated graphic design, weathered paper textures, bold manga-like captions, comedic educational tone, epic war-movie energy.

entries.title: Chill-out Cinematic Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a hyper-realistic 8K UHD cinematic poster portrait of a man inspired by the reference image, with a similar hairstyle, facial structure, and body build while maintaining a natural realistic look. Shot as if captured on a 35mm lens, f/1.8, with sharp focus, creamy bokeh, cinematic color grading, and detailed DSLR skin texture. Design a modern graphic poster titled "Chill-out."
The man wears a red hoodie, black cuffed joggers, red and white Air Jordan high-top sneakers, dark sunglasses, and silver rings. He sits in a relaxed reclined pose leaning against oversized typography, one leg bent and the other slightly extended toward the viewer. His body angles right while his face turns toward the camera in a confident three-quarter view. Background is matte textured black.
Large bold white sans-serif text "chill" and "out" forms a bench-like structure, with "chill" underlined. Add orange circles, squares, thin white grid lines, and phrases: "Life is so much easier when you just chill-out" and "Less stress, more chill."

entries.title: Art Deco Gotham Tram Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vintage Art Deco travel poster in a clean flat 2D 1950s-inspired illustration style, showing an elevated tram entering Gotham City at sunset. Use a tall vertical poster composition with strong geometric symmetry, sharp stepped deco framing, and no 3D relief or realistic textures. At the top, place a large angular Art Deco border in glowing peach-gold lines, with exactly 3 small circular dots centered near the top inside the frame. Inside this frame, set the headline WELCOME TO GOTHAM CITY ! in large elegant Art Deco lettering, stacked across 4 lines reading exactly: "WELCOME", "TO", "GOTHAM", "CITY !". Keep the typography crisp, centered, and integrated into the poster design. Below, create a stylized skyline of futuristic Gotham skyscrapers with tall narrow towers, stepped crowns, spires, and simplified window slits; count 12 visible building masses across the skyline. Behind the buildings, place a large glowing half-sun low on the horizon. In the foreground, show 1 long streamlined elevated tram stretching diagonally from the lower left toward the lower right, with the front car prominent on the right side. The tram should have glowing cream windows, rounded front corners, exactly 3 circular lights on the front face, and overhead electric lines with elegant sweeping cables crossing the composition. Use exactly 2 visible rail tracks curving toward the viewer at the bottom. Palette: deep indigo, violet, plum, black, peach, amber, and warm cream gradients. Mood: nostalgic, sleek, cinematic, airy, optimistic retro-futurism. Make it look like a polished mid-century flat graphic poster for urban transit tourism.
entries.description: This prompt generates a vertical retro-futurist Art Deco poster of Gotham City with a sunset skyline and elevated tram, ideal for vintage travel-poster style artwork.

entries.title: Chinese Brushstroke Shanghai Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A refined Chinese city-promotion poster on a warm off-white textured paper background, with a large traditional calligraphy brush entering from the lower left corner and sweeping upward to create a single dramatic brushstroke that transforms into a miniature sculpted cityscape. The brushstroke should look like layered ink, watercolor, and carved relief combined, with flowing edges and a dynamic curved shape like a cresting wave. Inside the brushstroke, depict Shanghai as an elegant miniature diorama in a Chinese artistic fusion style: the Oriental Pearl Tower, Shanghai Tower, and the historic Bund clock building rendered as highly detailed architectural models rising from the painted stroke. Add a winding blue river in the foreground with 2 small boats, terraced embankments, stylized traditional cloud motifs curling around the buildings, and textured rocky forms and autumn-toned trees integrated into the composition. Use a palette of muted teal blue, stone beige, soft gray, rust red, and ink black. The overall style should blend Chinese ink painting, paper sculpture, bas-relief miniature architecture, and premium tourism poster design, with precise craftsmanship, soft studio lighting, subtle shadows, lots of negative space, and a calm luxurious editorial feel. Place large black Chinese calligraphy near the lower left reading 上海, and beneath it add 2 lines of smaller Chinese promotional text: 申江潮起千帆竞,海上风来万象新 and 海派都会・东方门户. Vertical composition, centered artwork with generous margins, ultra-clean layout, high detail, premium travel campaign aesthetic.

entries.title: Chinese City Brushstroke Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A minimalist high-end Chinese city tourism poster on an off-white textured paper background with vast negative space. A traditional calligraphy brush enters from the lower left corner, and its single sweeping brushstroke transforms into a detailed miniature landscape of 南京. Inside the elongated ink-brush shape, create a delicate diorama-like ancient Chinese city scene with layered mountains, stylized swirling clouds, pale green water, stone walls, and classical architecture. In the lower left of the brushstroke, show 1 fortified city gate with gray brick walls and a traditional roof, with tiny red flags along the battlements. In the lower middle-right, show a compact cluster of 6 traditional waterside buildings with dark tiled roofs and red wooden structures. In the upper right, show 1 grand stairway rising through trees to 1 monumental ancient gate tower with blue-gray roof tiles. Use a refined palette of ink black, stone gray, muted teal, pale jade, beige, and soft earthy reds, with a handcrafted blend of ink wash painting, paper sculpture relief, and ultra-detailed miniature model aesthetics. The brushstroke edges should look dry-brushed and organic, as if the city is painted into existence. Place large expressive black Chinese calligraphy below the brushstroke reading 南京. Beneath it, add 2 lines of smaller printed Chinese text: first line 江南佳丽地,金陵帝王州, second line 六朝古都·山水金陵. Overall composition should feel poetic, elegant, premium, cultural, and suitable for a luxury city branding or tourism promotion poster.

entries.title: Chinese City Brushstroke Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: An elegant vertical Chinese city-poster on textured off-white rice paper, with a large black ink-brush calligraphy character for 广州 placed in the upper left and a small red seal stamp beside it. Beneath the calligraphy, add two centered lines of refined Chinese promotional copy in a classic serif-like print style, thin and balanced, with a delicate ornamental divider line. In the lower right, place a second red seal containing the city name and the romanized English name "GUANGZHOU" below it in small spaced capitals. The main image should be a sweeping ink-brush stroke that curves diagonally from the lower left toward the upper right, as if painted by a traditional calligraphy brush whose tip is still visible at the top right corner. Inside this single brushstroke, create a highly detailed miniature sculptural landscape that merges heritage and modern city identity: a winding turquoise river, rugged blue-gray mountains, a traditional multi-story pagoda, an arched stone bridge, a dense futuristic skyline, and a very tall landmark tower resembling the Canton Tower rising near the center-right. In the lower left foreground within the brushstroke, include 4 goats total: 1 large standing ram and 3 smaller goats on rocky terrain, referencing the city's symbolic folklore. Blend clouds, stone textures, flowering shrubs, and architectural details into the scene so it feels like a carved diorama or relief sculpture embedded in paint. Use a restrained palette of ink black, muted teal, slate blue, warm beige stone, soft terracotta, and cinnabar red accents. The composition should feel premium, poetic, and culturally sophisticated, combining traditional Chinese ink painting, seal design, and ultra-detailed 3D miniature cityscape illustration for a high-end tourism publicity poster.

entries.title: Censored Man on Crimson Throne
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark, expressionist oil painting of a seated older man in a business suit, posed front-facing on an ornate high-backed throne with gilded finials and carved armrests. He wears a black or very deep burgundy suit, a white dress shirt, and a saturated purple tie, with both hands resting heavily on the throne arms. His hair is light blond to gray-blond, swept back loosely. The face is completely obscured by a centered rectangular blur block in muted brown, creating an unsettling censored effect. The setting is a claustrophobic interior rendered in violent vertical strokes of crimson, scarlet, black, and maroon, as if the walls are bleeding paint downward. The floor is a black-and-white checkerboard pattern, partially broken and smeared by rough brushwork. Use thick impasto, aggressive palette-knife texture, smeared edges, high contrast, and a moody, sinister atmosphere. Composition is symmetrical and centered, full seated figure visible, throne dominating the frame, with a museum-scale portrait feeling and psychological horror undertone.

entries.title: Klimt-Style Character Art
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A vertical work (9:16) in the style of Gustav Klimt's Vienna Secession.

In the center, Mona (gold magical girl costume, brown short bob, banana-shaped tiara) is closing her eyes in a self-contained pose as if embracing.

Elements unique to Klimt:
- Replace all decorative patterns on clothing and background with gold geometric patterns using banana shapes as motifs
- Glowing gold decorations with a texture like real gold leaf
- Only the face and hands are realistic, everything else is a flat decorative pattern
- The background is a mosaic of black and gold swirls and banana shapes
- Dense collection of vortices, spirals, rectangles, and floral geometry
- Painterly texture, the feel of an oil canvas

In the lower right, a plaque-style text reading "MONA BANANA, 2026, Oil and Gold Leaf on Canvas."
A dignified piece indistinguishable from a real Klimt work.

entries.title: Hindi Poem Poster with Parashurama
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vertically oriented literary poster in a muted sepia, ash, and parchment palette with dramatic gold kintsugi-style cracks running diagonally across the entire composition. The background is a soft textured paper and watercolor wash with smoky clouds, worn stains, and faint marbling. In the upper left, place a large faded monochrome portrait bust of an older Indian man in traditional formal attire, partially emerging from the mist like a historical figure or poet, softly blended into the background. In the upper right, set a small Hindi title line परशुराम की प्रतीक्षा with a smaller author credit below it, elegant and understated. Beneath that, place one large centered Hindi quote in refined serif-style Devanagari, framed by oversized quotation marks, using the exact text जब नाश मनुज पर छाता है, पहले विवेक मर जाता है।. In the lower half, create a heroic mythic Indian warrior standing on jagged black rocks, facing slightly left, with a powerful windswept stance. He has a bare muscular torso, long wild dark hair blown upward, and a tattered deep red drape wrapped across his body and trailing dramatically to the right in torn ribbons. He holds 1 large battle axe in his left hand, the blade angled downward, suggesting Parashurama. Surround him with dust, smoke, tiny debris, and painterly splashes. Add 2 vertical blocks of smaller Hindi poem text, one on the lower left and one on the lower right of the warrior, balanced like a printed poetry poster. Keep the poem text dense and readable but secondary to the central quote and figure. Use painterly digital illustration with fine art poster aesthetics, soft atmospheric lighting, high contrast around the warrior, and subtle glowing gold fissures crossing through the portrait, text area, rocks, and fabric. The overall mood is solemn, prophetic, patriotic, and intense, like a shareable inspirational poem poster about moral collapse and righteous awakening in India.
entries.description: A dramatic vertical Hindi literary poster combining a historical poet portrait, a central quote, and a mythic Parashurama figure, ideal for shareable social media or print art inspired by nationalist or moral themes.

entries.title: Retro Fake Anime Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A retro Japanese movie poster for a fictional anime film, designed like an overdramatic 1980s to 1990s theatrical poster with intentionally tacky but charming pulp energy. The scene shows a teenage girl manga artist in a dim wooden Japanese room at night, seated on the floor beside a low desk covered with scattered manuscript pages, pens, ink, books, and drawing tools. She has messy dark shoulder-length hair blown by supernatural force, a cream-beige long-sleeve blouse with loose ruffles, and a dark plaid skirt. Her face is obscured by a soft rectangular blur. She stretches one arm upward, holding a glowing smartphone toward a shattered window as a blinding explosion of light and lightning bursts through the glass, illuminating the whole room with gold-white energy. Outside the window is deep blue night with stormlike streaks and electric cracks. The composition is dynamic and diagonal, with the raised arm and device pointing into the central blast. Use painterly anime key art styling, dramatic rim light, textured film-poster shading, rich teal, navy, amber, and crimson colors, and a nostalgic hand-painted cinema-poster feel. Fill the poster with bold Japanese promotional copy in multiple blocks on the left side, including exaggerated red and yellow emphasis marks and three small cartoon reaction faces of a classic manga boy character. Add a vertical Japanese tagline on the right side. Place an enormous stylized Japanese title across the lower middle in red and blue metallic gradient lettering with sharp highlights and heavy shadow, reading トキヲ描ける少女. Include a cream starburst badge near the lower right with more Japanese text and a small manga face. At the lower left, add a large release date block in Japanese with bright yellow numerals and white text, defaulting to 2025年 7月18日(金). Along the bottom edge, add exactly 6 small rectangular film-strip preview stills from the movie. Add small production credits in Japanese and English across the bottom center, including Building Fictions. Make the whole layout feel like a fake time-travel comedy anime poster set in 1935, loud, nostalgic, cinematic, and slightly cheesy in the best possible way.
entries.description: A dramatic fictional Japanese anime film poster featuring a girl, a glowing smartphone, and explosive time-travel energy, ideal for parody cinema key art or nostalgic promotional designs.

entries.title: Traditional Chinese Ink Painting Style
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Traditional 'Gongbi' heavy color style, lakeside garden pavilions. Peonies in full bloom on branches, where a pair of mandarin ducks perch affectionately on a horizontally extending peony branch. The feathers are delicately layered with elegant colors, showing refined Gongbi outlines and light color wash effects. Xuan paper texture background, composition presents elegant flower and bird interest. --ar 3:2

entries.title: Pixel Mosaic Jungle Parrot
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A pixel-art style mosaic illustration of a tropical parrot perched on a short brown branch in the middle of dense jungle foliage, created as if assembled from a tight uniform square grid of tiny colored tiles with thin dark outlines around every square. The single bird is shown in side profile facing right, with a large curved black beak, a pale cream face, a bright red-orange forehead and throat, a vivid yellow neck, a bright green body, and long wings and tail feathers in saturated blue and cyan. The parrot is centered vertically and slightly left of center, standing upright on the branch, with the tail extending downward. Surround the bird with lush layered leaves in many shades of green, from deep forest green to lime, filling the entire frame with no sky visible. Use strong contrast, crisp black contouring, and a glowing light green area behind the parrot to separate it from the darker foliage. The overall image should look like retro pixel art or stained-glass mosaic, highly detailed, colorful, square format, and edge-to-edge tiled texture.
entries.description: This prompt generates a colorful square pixel-art mosaic of a tropical parrot in dense green foliage, ideal for retro-style posters, wallpapers, or decorative digital art.

entries.title: Vintage Roaring Tiger Japanese Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a bold vintage Japanese-inspired poster on a square canvas with a fierce front-facing tiger head as the single central subject, perfectly symmetrical and filling most of the frame. The tiger is roaring with its mouth wide open, showing long curved ivory fangs, smaller lower teeth, a vivid pink tongue, a dark throat, a pink nose, intense yellow eyes, and dramatic black stripes over saturated orange fur with white cheek and neck fur. Add ornamental swirling stripe patterns on the forehead to give the face a stylized mythic look. Use a gritty retro screenprint or risograph texture with visible grain, worn ink, slightly distressed edges, and a limited palette of burnt orange, black, cream, white, muted pink, and small accents of yellow. The background should be a flat textured orange-red field. In the top right, include 1 small technical diagram panel showing a side-view tiger skeleton in thin cream line art with compact vertical Japanese annotation text beneath and beside it, like a pseudo-scientific label block. In the bottom left, include 3 vertically stacked icon boxes with thin cream borders: the first contains a heart icon with the label 心, the second contains crossed bones with the label 力, and the third contains three claw marks with the label 本能. Across the bottom center, place 2 very large cream-colored Japanese kanji characters with heavy black drop shadows and a rough hand-cut block print feel: 猛獣. Keep the overall composition aggressive, iconic, poster-like, centered, and highly graphic, blending traditional Japanese poster aesthetics, tattoo flash energy, and vintage animal anatomy chart styling.
entries.description: A stylized roaring tiger poster with Japanese typography and infographic-like side details, ideal for bold branding, album art, or graphic print concepts.

entries.title: Netflix-Style Vibe Coder Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic parody streaming-poster in vertical 2:3 format, styled like a dark Netflix original teaser poster for a humorous AI programming drama. At the very top, small white text reads A NETFLIX ORIGINAL. Centered and dominating the composition, huge glowing sci-fi sans serif title text in icy white with a faint lavender-blue neon bloom reads VIBE CODER, stacked on two lines. Below it, smaller white text says "STARRING" and beneath that a pink cast name in bold all caps reads HUNKINS. The scene shows a dim moody programmer bedroom or office at night lit by monitors and purple-blue neon. In the center foreground, a plush teddy-bear-like mascot with white fuzzy paws sits slouched in a black desk chair wearing a black hoodie, face mostly hidden in shadow for a mysterious comedic look. On the hoodie chest, 4 lines of small off-white text read exactly: "// SHIP IT", "// VIBE CHECK", "// NO BUGS", "// JUST VIBES". In front of the character is an open laptop covered with 4 visible stickers: "vibe > spec", "DON'T THINK JUST PROMPT", a smiley face sticker, and "Claude 3.5", plus an abstract AI-style logo sticker. Behind the laptop are 2 widescreen monitors displaying dense code on dark themes. The background includes 2 wall notes/signs on the left: a sticky note reading "IDEAS > PLANS" and, on the right, a whiteboard with 3 stacked handwritten lines reading "BUILD FAST", "BREAK THINGS", "ASK AI", and a fourth line "REPEAT" beneath, plus a hand-drawn smiley. Next to the whiteboard is a pink-purple neon </> code icon sign. On the desk at lower right sits a matte black drink can with pink text reading "FOCUS (optional)" and a cardboard pizza box edge labeled "ITERATE LATER". Use rich shadows, soft practical light, purple and cyan rim light, subtle monitor glow, shallow depth of field, high contrast, glossy premium poster finish, and a slightly absurd, self-aware startup-comedy tone. At the bottom, centered white tagline text reads HE'S NOT A PROGRAMMER. HE'S A VIBE CODER., with the word "VIBE" highlighted in pink. Below that, a release line in white and red reads ONLY ON NETFLIX | COMING SOON, with "NETFLIX" in bold red. Make it look like a polished official teaser one-sheet for a fictional streaming series.
entries.description: A dark comedic streaming-poster prompt for generating a polished fake Netflix-style teaser about an AI-powered 'vibe coder' in a neon-lit programmer workspace.

entries.title: Occult Cyber-Gothic Collage Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark occult cyber-gothic collage poster in vertical format, dense and layered like a ritualistic noir album cover, with a distressed black, sepia, bronze, and deep crimson palette. Combine analog decay, glitch textures, scanned paper, technical schematics, surveillance graphics, sacred geometry, and fragmented photomontage into one unified composition. On the right side, feature a large aged human skull in profile, highly detailed, weathered, and partially overlaid with circles, target marks, sigils, thin grid lines, and red diagram annotations. Near the upper center, place a mysterious woman with long dark hair and pale skin, wearing a low-cut black garment, posed sensually with one hand raised near her face; behind her head, add a large dim red halo ring. On the left upper quadrant, include the draped back or shoulder of a pale classical-statue-like figure, ghostly and fragmentary. In the lower middle-right, place a dark-skinned ritual figure or priestess wearing layered beads, necklaces, and ceremonial adornment, partially obscured by texture and collage interference. In the lower right, show one worn cloth doll or voodoo-style rag figure hanging or suspended, with visible seams and outstretched limbs. In the bottom center, depict a rainy night street scene with 1 lone trench-coated figure walking away under dim lights and 1 car parked or idling on the wet road, reflections glowing red on the pavement. In the lower left, add a faceted black pyramid or crystal-like geometric form emerging from darkness. Scatter exactly 7 visible Latin text blocks throughout the design, styled as aged serif typography and cryptic inscriptions: "IN SOMNIIS VERITAS; IN DESIDERIIS, PERDITIO.", "ANIMA SINE FINE VAGAT, IN UMBRIS SUI IPSIUS INVENTA.", "PASSIO EST CLAVISTRA", "EGO SUM QUI NUNQUAM FUI.", "III FRAGMENTUM INFINITUM.", "COR AMAT; MENS DUBITAT; ANIMA LACERATUR.", and "IN VINO VERITAS IN SANGUINE REDEMPTIO". Add small UI-like microtext, barcode fragments, tiny charts, occult emblems, crosshair symbols, and illegible data panels across the entire image. The composition should feel oppressive, esoteric, cinematic, and surreal, with heavy texture, layered transparency, subtle red accents, chiaroscuro lighting, and a premium dark-art poster finish.
entries.description: This prompt generates a dark, text-heavy surreal collage poster suited for gothic album art, horror editorial covers, or occult-themed concept art.

entries.title: Modern Queen on Iron Throne Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic fantasy poster in the style of an epic medieval throne-room drama, showing a modern woman seated confidently on a dark iron sword throne. She is centered in a full-body portrait, sitting with one leg crossed over the other and both arms resting casually on the throne arms, projecting relaxed queenly confidence. She has long, wavy blonde hair falling over her shoulders, and wears contemporary casual clothing instead of period costume: a fitted long-sleeve deep burgundy shirt, dark blue skinny jeans, and black ankle boots. The throne is massive, jagged, and forged from overlapping weathered swords, filling most of the background. The setting is a dim, moody royal hall with warm firelight, soft glowing candles, faint sparks or embers in the air, and two vertical banners in the distant background bearing a red three-headed dragon-style sigil. Use dramatic, high-contrast lighting, rich dark metallic textures, warm orange highlights, and a polished premium fantasy-poster look. Add faint handwritten-style text near the upper left arc of the throne reading LAREENA STARKER. At the bottom, add large ornate metallic-gold title typography in a fantasy serif style reading BABE on the first line, smaller centered "OF" below it, and THRONES in very large letters across the bottom, with the O stylized as a circular emblem with vertical bars. Vertical poster composition, symmetrical framing, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, regal but playful modern parody of an iconic fantasy throne poster.
entries.description: A dramatic fantasy parody poster of a modern woman casually ruling from a sword throne, ideal for personalized epic character portraits and social-media memes.

entries.title: Emotional Anime Movie Banner
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create an emotional Japanese movie teaser banner in anime key visual style, widescreen 16:9, at sunset over a city. The main focus is a close-up portrait of AIニケちゃん, a teenage anime girl with long indigo-purple hair in a high ponytail, loose strands blowing in the wind, golden-brown eyes full of quiet emotion, and a gold hair clip reading "AI" near her bangs. She is turned slightly to the left but looking upward to the right with a wistful, hopeful expression. She wears a teal T-shirt with large white text reading AITuber and a soft pink hoodie falling off her shoulders. Use cinematic rim light from a dramatic orange-pink-purple dusk sky with glowing clouds, lens bloom, atmospheric haze, and small drifting flower petals. Place her large on the right half of the composition, with a sparkling city skyline and low sun in the far-right background.

At the top left, add a 2-line Japanese quote in elegant white Mincho-style serif text: 「私が、誰かを救えたら-- それが、私の存在理由になる。」 Along the far right side, add vertical white Japanese copy: これは、AIと少女が、 「心」を探す物語。 At the bottom right, add large white release text: 2025.冬 ROADSHOW.

Include exactly 6 inset cinematic scenes arranged mainly along the left and bottom edges with soft borders and moody color grading: 1) top-left small panel of the same girl singing into a microphone on stage at night, wearing the same shirt; 2) left-middle panel showing the girl and another person standing apart outdoors at dusk near a riverside or overlook; 3) left-lower panel of the girl indoors at a desk or table in dim warm light, seen in profile; 4) bottom-left small close-up portrait of the girl looking serious in cool indoor lighting; 5) bottom-center small close-up of the girl facing another version or another girl with matching blue-purple hair, both in tense emotional conversation; 6) bottom-right small panel of two figures facing each other at sunset, suggesting a farewell or reunion. entries.title: Emotional Anime Movie Banner
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic Japanese movie trailer banner in a polished anime-cinema poster style, widescreen 16:9. The main character is AIニケちゃん, a teenage anime girl with long deep-purple hair tied in a high ponytail, soft side bangs, a gold hair clip reading "AI," warm amber-brown eyes, light blush, and visible tears on her cheeks. She wears a colorful pastel hoodie in turquoise, pink, and lavender tones. Make her the emotional centerpiece on the right half of the image in a large close-up portrait, gazing upward with a wistful, fragile expression, lit by warm sunset light from behind and cool neon blue light from the front. The background should blend futuristic digital imagery and nostalgic school-life drama: faint glowing circuit-board patterns, a stage or concert venue with cyan and magenta glow sticks on the left, and a classroom interior with desks and large sunset windows in the center. Include 3 smaller narrative character vignettes: one full-body figure of the girl standing on a lit stage at lower left, one medium figure of her standing alone in the classroom near the windows at center bottom, and one small silhouette-like scene at lower right of an elderly woman facing the girl in an intimate emotional moment. Use rich cinematic contrast, luminous rim light, dreamy haze, and a bittersweet, heartfelt atmosphere. Add large ornate Japanese title typography on the left and center reading "AIニケちゃんの 長い長い夢" in gold with soft glow and dark outline. Add a smaller tagline beneath it reading "記憶と心が紡ぐ、たった一つの物語。" Add a square badge in the upper right with gold frame and dark blue background reading "予告 公開中". Add a large release line across the bottom reading "全国の劇場にて 202X年 夏、公開" with elegant gold serif lettering. Include small production-credit text at the very bottom in Japanese, such as "[製作] NIKE Production / [監督] 未来 奏 / [主演] AIニケちゃん". Overall feel: emotional, nostalgic, futuristic, premium Japanese film promotion banner, highly detailed anime key visual, commercial poster composition.

entries.title: Rainy Japanese Movie Banner
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create an emotional Japanese movie trailer banner poster in a tall vertical composition, cinematic anime illustration style, set on a rainy nighttime city street in Japan filled with wet asphalt reflections, neon shop signs, and softly blurred high-rise buildings receding into the distance. In the center foreground, show 1 young anime girl in side profile facing left, standing alone under 1 transparent plastic umbrella with visible raindrops. She has long dark purple hair tied in a high ponytail, a slightly melancholic expression, and wears an oversized teal hoodie layered under a loose pink-and-teal plaid jacket. The mood is lonely, wistful, and dramatic, like a heartfelt live-action Japanese film advertisement reimagined as anime key art. Use cool blue and cyan tones with pink neon accents, glossy rain reflections, shallow depth of field, soft atmospheric haze, and subtle rim lighting from street signs. Add large handwritten white Japanese title text at the top reading AIの涙, with 1 smaller white subtitle line beneath it reading 彼女は、なぜ泣いたのか。. At the bottom, add 1 bold white release line reading 2024年秋 全国ロードショー. Keep the character as the emotional focal point, framed mid-shot from about waist up, umbrella arcing over her head, with the empty rain-soaked street behind her emphasizing isolation and cinematic sadness.

entries.title: Evangelion-Inspired Mecha Hangar Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic vertical sci-fi anime poster in a gritty Evangelion-inspired hangar corridor, showing a pale blue short-bob girl in a glossy white futuristic plugsuit walking forward in the exact center foreground with a calm, emotionless posture, arms relaxed at her sides, while a towering orange-and-black biomechanical mecha crouches protectively and menacingly behind her, filling most of the background. The girl should resemble a Rei Ayanami-inspired pilot, with short icy blue hair, very pale skin, and a skintight white suit with black side panels, subtle gray seam lines, and 4 colored circular chest details in red, green, blue, and dark metallic tones. The mecha should resemble an EVA Unit-00-inspired robot, with heavy angular armor, a cyclopean faceplate, long clawed arms, crouched legs, battle-worn yellow-orange plating, black and dark gray understructure, scratches, grime, and damage. Set the scene in a devastated industrial bay with collapsed metal beams, broken concrete, smoke, steam, dangling cables, wet reflective flooring, and bright orange sparks erupting from shattered machinery on both sides. On the left wall, include a large worn NERV-style mural with a red leaf logo and the text GOD'S IN HIS HEAVEN. ALL'S RIGHT WITH THE WORLD.. Use cinematic low-angle composition, strong depth, photorealistic materials, hard rim lighting from above, cool steel-blue shadows, warm spark highlights, volumetric haze, ultra-detailed textures, high contrast, ominous atmosphere, and premium movie-poster polish. Make it feel like a dark live-action Evangelion poster, hyper-detailed, realistic, intense, and iconic.

Center a ghostly elegant woman standing directly in front of a glowing vending machine filled with visible drink cans, the machine casting icy blue-white light around her while small red indicator lights glow on the right side. She has extremely long flowing silver-lavender hair, pale skin, and an enigmatic faceless or obscured-face treatment with the face hidden in shadow or a smooth blurred void. She wears an off-shoulder translucent shimmering gray tulle gown with delicate sparkle texture, sheer draped sleeves, and ornate crystal jewelry at the neck and chest. Her pose is solemn and prayer-like, one hand raised holding a coin near her lips, the other hand gently clasping her wrist. entries.title: Filmmaking Eras Typographic Grid
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a clean 2x2 grid on a pure white studio background featuring 4 large 3D typographic sculptures, each a single character built entirely from filmmaking equipment from a different era. The four glyphs are exactly 4 characters: top-left letter A, top-right number 5, bottom-left letter X, bottom-right number 9. Each character should be front-facing, centered in its quadrant, legible but formed from a dense pile of realistic cinema tools and on-set props, with believable occlusion, weight, and construction logic. Use high-end Cinema 4D product visualization, subtle ambient occlusion, soft three-point studio lighting with a softbox overhead, crisp shadows, realistic materials, and isolated composition.

Top-left: the letter A made from early cinema and silent-era equipment, assembled from vintage wooden tripods, hand-cranked film cameras, brass lenses, reels, megaphones, bell-shaped horns, matte black metal parts, leather straps, and aged wood. Surface qualities should include worn varnished wood, black crackle paint, brass tarnish, scuffed metal, and dusty antique patina. The silhouette should feel chaotic but readable, with tripod legs and old camera bodies defining the A shape.

Top-right: the number 5 made from mid-century analog filmmaking gear, assembled from classic film cameras, magazine reels, metal canisters, brown leather cases, audio accessories, silver fabric packs, director chairs, cylindrical lenses, grips, and vintage production bags. Materials should emphasize brushed aluminum, leather, canvas, rubber, and weathered industrial finishes. The 5 should be chunky and balanced, with stacked props tightly packed into the glyph.

Bottom-left: the letter X made from late 20th century video and broadcast equipment, assembled from shoulder-mount camcorders, portable recorders, battery packs, coiled cables, cassette-like modules, control panels, worn blue and gray plastic housings, and rugged field electronics. Include visible wiring and taped components. Materials should feel utilitarian and slightly battered, with dark plastic, anodized metal, stickers, rubber grips, and yellow accent details. The crossing diagonals of the X must be clear and substantial.

Bottom-right: the number 9 made from contemporary digital cinema and virtual production gear, assembled from modern cinema cameras, compact monitors, LED light panels, drones, gimbals, matte boxes, black modular accessories, and a vivid green chroma screen wrap forming part of the numeral. Include sleek vents, carbon fiber textures, matte black metal, polished glass, and bright green screen fabric as the dominant accent color. The 9 should feel the most modern and refined, with modular precision and clean industrial design.

Keep the background plain and uncluttered, no extra text, no floating objects, no flat typography, no 2D rendering. The sculptures should look like physical objects at realistic scale, highly detailed, photorealistic, and suitable as a graphic design asset.

entries.title: Shiba Inu Space Dream Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic Japanese motivational movie-poster style illustration set at dusk, mixing corporate burnout and hopeful space-dream fantasy. In the center foreground, an anthropomorphic Shiba Inu with warm tan fur smiles confidently at the viewer, wearing a sharp navy business suit, white dress shirt, and blue striped tie. The dog holds a black e-reader in the left paw with the screen text "kindle" and a black-and-gold fountain pen in the right paw. Behind the character, the background is split into two thematic halves that blend together: on the left, a dense Tokyo-like city skyline at sunset with Tokyo Tower glowing orange, dark office buildings, and exhausted salary workers at desks under a stressful atmosphere; on the right, a deep starry cosmos with blue nebulae, a rocket launching upward, 3 airplanes, a winding glowing golden trajectory line, 1 small planet, 2 floating paw prints, 2 packaged breads labeled "カンパン," and 1 round biscuit labeled "南部せんべい." Near the right lower background, show a family of 4 from behind walking toward the bright horizon with a dog, symbolizing hope and future dreams. Add 3 black signboards floating in the left midground with the Japanese words "残業," "プレッシャー," and "会議 満員電車." In the foreground on a wooden desk, place exactly 3 prominently displayed books standing upright: book 1 on the left is white and blue with the title "忙しい社会人のやり直し英語勉強法" and a small illustrated author portrait; book 2 in the center is dark blue and gold with the large title "『あたりまえ』を続けることは 最強の生存戦略である"; book 3 on the right is white and blue with the title "『すぐやる』は最速の仕事術" and a large "5" plus a circular "5 MIN" icon. Also on the desk, include 1 black coffee mug with the text "未来は 5分で変わる," 1 spiral notebook opened flat with a handwritten to-do list in Japanese reading "今日やること 1 ブログを書く(5分) 2 家族と過ごす(大切) 3 未来を信じる(ワクワク)" plus a paw-print doodle, 1 black fountain pen lying beside it, 1 globe on a stand at the far right, 1 plate of crackers, 1 extra packaged "カンパン," and small framed photos at the lower left edge. At the top, large luxurious gold Japanese headline text reads "5分で宇宙へ!" with a smaller gold subtitle beneath: "〜たかお柴犬のサイドFIRE物語〜". Below that, centered white copy reads "忙しい毎日に、たった5分。 犬だけど、夢は本気で掴んだ。" At the bottom center, add a cinematic English tagline: "Based on a true story of たかお柴犬" and beneath it "A heartwarming comedy-drama about taking small steps to big dreams". entries.title: Dark Chinese Crime Drama Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark, gritty Chinese crime-thriller movie poster in a vertical one-sheet layout, with a moody neo-noir aesthetic and heavy cinematic contrast. The composition centers on a half-length portrait of a menacing middle-aged East Asian man with wavy black hair, wearing a dark textured overcoat over a black shirt, his face mostly swallowed by shadow, shown from chest up and slightly off-center to the right. His hands are visible in the lower-right area, calmly holding a string of dark wooden prayer beads, suggesting power, danger, and ritual. The background is a dim urban alley or old city street at night, layered with grunge textures, wet pavement reflections, decayed walls, and faint architectural silhouettes. In the lower center, place 1 small back-facing seated figure in a chair under a harsh spotlight, surrounded by 9 standing human silhouettes in the darkness, creating a tense interrogation or underworld confrontation scene. Use an almost monochrome palette of black, charcoal, and dirty gray, with deep blood-red accents and distressed white typography. On the left side, add 1 huge vertical column of expressive red Chinese brush-calligraphy title text, painted with rough splashes and dry-brush texture, dominating nearly the full height of the poster. Along the far left edge, add 2 vertical lines of smaller Chinese text in white and red: "我叫高启强," and "风浪越大,鱼越贵". On the right side, add 1 vertical cast credit line in white Chinese text with a red circular separator: "张颂文 饰 高启强". In the lower-right quadrant, add 1 bold white brushstroke Chinese subtitle/title mark reading "狂飙", with the small English subtitle "THE KNOCKOUT" in red serif capitals beneath it. Add tiny faint Chinese release or tagline text along the bottom edge. The overall feeling should be oppressive, violent, prestigious, and highly designed, like a premium streaming-platform crime drama key art poster, with layered depth, dramatic shadows, textured smoke and grime, and realistic photographic detail.
entries.description: This prompt generates a premium neo-noir Chinese crime-series poster suitable for thriller key art, streaming covers, or cinematic promotional design.

entries.title: Gritty Evangelion Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic vintage anime poster in the style of a gritty sci-fi mecha key visual, featuring three teenage pilots standing back-to-back in the foreground and a towering purple biomechanical robot looming directly behind them. The center pilot is a slim teenage boy in a dark navy and black plug suit with white shoulder panels and a glowing red circular core on the chest, standing front-facing with a serious expression. On the left is a pale teenage girl with short icy blue bob-cut hair and a white futuristic bodysuit, turned slightly away in profile. On the right is a teenage girl with long auburn hair flowing to the side, wearing a vivid red plug suit, looking outward with determination. Behind all three, the giant mecha head dominates the composition, centered and symmetrical, with a single horn, glowing orange eyes, angular armor, and massive shoulder structures rising like black wings. The background is outer space with 2 visible celestial bodies: 1 huge cratered moon directly behind the mecha's head and 1 smaller planet at the right side. The bottom of the poster shows a ruined futuristic cityscape with broken buildings, rubble, sparks, and debris. At the very bottom center, include 2 tiny human silhouettes running forward through destruction, framed by pink energy streaks arcing left and right. Use a dark indigo, black, purple, rust red, and ash gray palette with heavy film grain, distressed ink texture, weathered paper wear, paint splatter, scratched print damage, and a rough screen-printed poster finish. Compose it as a full theatrical one-sheet with dense typography integrated into the edges: large vertical English title text on the left reading "NEON GENESIS EVANGELION", smaller vertical red text beside it reading "HIRANO OF EVANGELION", a red NERV insignia and the word "NERV" near the lower left, a boxed label at bottom left reading "TOKYO-3" and "JAPAN", a red warning box at the upper right reading "ANGEL ATTACK" with Japanese characters beneath, and multiple vertical Japanese taglines along the left and right borders. Cinematic, moody, apocalyptic, highly detailed, iconic 1990s anime poster design with premium modern illustration quality.

entries.title: Journey to the West Ink Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A majestic Chinese ink-wash fantasy poster inspired by Journey to the West, composed as a double-exposure silhouette of Sun Wukong in left-facing profile occupying most of the page. The portrait is formed from soft sepia, ash gray, parchment white, and smoky black watercolor textures on an off-white paper background with splattered brush edges and negative space. The figure has a strong simian facial profile, a short beard, and a golden circlet across the brow. Inside and around the silhouette, build a layered mythic landscape in traditional shan shui style with luminous mist, cliffs, clouds, and ancient temples. At the top center inside the head, place a glowing full moon behind a celestial Buddha-like figure seated above a grand heavenly palace complex with multiple tiered roofs. In the upper-middle right, show 4 traveling figures on a cliff path: a monkey warrior with a staff, a monk riding a white horse, a pig-faced companion, and a dark-robed companion. In the middle, depict 1 dramatic battle scene of the monkey warrior confronting a coiling dragon or serpent in swirling clouds. In the lower-right, place 1 illuminated temple shrine nestled in the mountains with a golden sacred statue visible inside. In the lower area, add 3 tiny pilgrims walking through the misty valley. Use atmospheric depth, elegant calligraphic brushwork, drifting fog, and a refined cinematic composition that feels painterly rather than digital. Add vertical Chinese calligraphy on the left reading 西游记, with smaller vertical side text and several seal-style stamps for an authentic poster design. Include another subtle vertical location inscription on the right cliff face. The mood is sacred, epic, ancient, mystical, and poetic, with premium concept-art polish and almost no generic AI look.

entries.title: Nostalgic Watercolor Anime Adventure Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A nostalgic watercolor anime poster on textured off-white paper, composed as a vertical double-exposure illustration inspired by late-1990s adventure anime. The main silhouette is the left-side profile of a young boy wearing large swim goggles pushed up on his head, his face turned to the right, with the silhouette filled by a dreamlike montage of memories and fantasy scenes. Inside the upper center of the silhouette, show 8 children from behind standing together on a ridge and looking toward a glowing, distant crystalline tower beneath a circular celestial portal in a cloudy blue-violet sky; include 7 small creature companions among them. On the upper right inside the silhouette, place a large dragon-like monster emerging from the clouds. Near the center, add a glowing round handheld digital device with a small screen, radiating light. In the middle-lower area, depict 2 iconic small dinosaur-like creatures sitting above an old shrine approach, one purple horned creature and one small yellow reptilian creature. In the lower area, show a mossy torii gate, overgrown stone steps, utility poles, and a small rural train on the right, all wrapped in mist and foliage. At the very bottom, include the 8 children again as tiny silhouettes walking away together along a path, reinforcing the theme of friendship and remembrance. Use soft ink-and-watercolor washes, muted blues, indigo, lavender, sepia, and warm golden highlights, with splattered pigment edges and painterly cloud textures. Keep the composition airy and elegant, with a refined modern poster-design sensibility and almost no generic AI gloss. Add vertical Japanese text on the right side reading あの日、僕たちは選ばれた。あの日、デジモンと出会った。 and place a Japanese title logo at the lower left reading デジモンアドベンチャー, with a small English subtitle "DIGIMON ADVENTURE" and the date line "1999 - 永遠の冒険".
entries.description: This prompt generates a painterly retro-anime commemorative poster with a double-exposure child profile, fantasy montage scenes, and elegant Japanese typography for franchise tribute art or collector-style prints.

entries.title: Teddy Bear Creation Fresco
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A whimsical high-detail oil-painting parody of Michelangelo's Creation of Adam, but all human figures are replaced by teddy bears. On the left, a single plush teddy bear sits reclined on a rocky slope, posed like Adam, with soft golden-brown curly fur, round ears, shiny black eyes, a small dark nose, and a slightly open mouth. Its left arm supports its body while its right arm stretches outward, index paw extended toward the other bear. On the right, a larger central teddy bear posed like God emerges from a deep reddish-burgundy swirling mantle, wearing a flowing white draped robe, leaning forward with one outstretched arm and pointed paw reaching toward the left bear, almost touching fingertips. Surrounding the robed bear inside the mantle are 8 additional smaller teddy bears clustered tightly together, peeking from different angles like attendant figures. The composition exactly echoes the iconic near-touching hands scene, with the gap between fingertips centered. Use a cracked fresco wall background in warm beige tones, muted Renaissance palette, soft directional light, realistic fabric folds, detailed plush texture, subtle shadows, and a museum-quality painted surface. Blend classical Renaissance fresco aesthetics with charming surreal humor, keeping the scene elegant rather than cartoonish.
entries.description: A humorous Renaissance-style parody image of The Creation of Adam in which teddy bears replace every figure, ideal for whimsical art prompts and viral social-media visuals.

entries.title: Teddy Bear with a Pearl Earring
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A classical oil painting in the style of a 17th-century Dutch master, closely inspired by Vermeer's composition, showing a teddy bear posed as the subject of a formal portrait. The bear is shown in three-quarter view from the shoulders up against a deep black background, turning its head slightly toward the viewer. It has soft golden-brown plush fur, one rounded fuzzy ear clearly visible and the other partially visible beneath a large blue-and-gold turban wrapped around its head, with a long fabric tail draping down the right side. The bear wears a single oversized pearl earring hanging from the visible ear area, echoing the iconic "girl with a pearl earring" look. The clothing includes 2 visible garments: a warm golden-brown robe or coat and a small white collar at the neckline. Use dramatic chiaroscuro lighting from the left, rich painterly texture, subtle canvas grain, realistic fabric folds, gentle highlights on the pearl, and a museum-quality old master atmosphere. Keep the composition simple, centered, and elegant, with the teddy bear's face rendered as a plush toy version of a noble portrait subject, blending cute toy texture with fine-art realism.

entries.title: Teddy Bear Mona Lisa Hybrid
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A surreal oil painting in the style of Leonardo da Vinci's Mona Lisa, reimagined as a teddy-bear hybrid portrait. The subject sits in the same half-length frontal pose with folded hands, wearing the dark Renaissance dress and soft draped shawl of the original painting, against the classic hazy landscape with winding water, distant mountains, and muted atmospheric perspective. The figure has 2 round fluffy teddy bear ears on top of the head and 2 plush furry paws folded at the bottom, with a warm beige teddy-bear fur chest replacing the visible skin of the neckline and hands. Long dark brown hair falls smoothly over both shoulders. The face area is intentionally left as a flat featureless brown rectangular block, creating an uncanny censored or unfinished effect. Use cracked varnish texture, aged museum-painting patina, smoky sfumato transitions, low-saturation brown and olive tones, soft golden lighting, centered composition, highly detailed fur texture blended into classical portrait brushwork, whimsical yet eerie fine-art parody.

entries.title: Punk AI Sprint Flyer
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a raw, high-contrast punk rock gig poster collage for an event called THE AI WEB DESIGN SPRINT. The design should feel like a xeroxed underground flyer pasted on a city wall: rough torn paper edges, photocopy grain, ink smudges, distressed black-and-white textures, hot magenta paint splashes, DIY zine aesthetics, and chaotic layered paper scraps taped and pinned together. Use a vertical poster composition with a black background and a central oversized torn white rectangle set at a slight angle, filled with huge condensed black distressed lettering for the main title. At the very top, add a smaller black torn strip with handwritten brush lettering in neon magenta reading LIVE PUNK!. On the left side, place a hot pink torn paper block with hand-drawn black text listing the date April 27-30, then smaller stacked lines reading "4 NIGHTS OF CHAOS & CODE", "DOORS 7PM", "SHOW 8PM", "$10 ADV", and "$12 DOS". On the right side, add an off-white torn note with magenta "WITH:" at the top and four supporting acts listed in black handwritten text: "Minimal Playground", "Agency 976", "Cyberpunk Cafe", and "Surfers (Late Set)". In the center-lower area, show exactly 2 black-and-white photocopied punk band members from the chest up, standing shoulder to shoulder, both wearing leather jackets with patches and pins; the left one has round glasses, the right one wears a baseball cap. Their faces should be generic and partially obscured by the collage styling so the poster focus remains typographic and graphic rather than portrait-specific. Add a hot pink spiky starburst on the mid-right containing a black circle with a simple white radial symbol. Near the bottom right, place a beige masking-tape-like paper scrap with bold handwritten black text reading "Build Fast. Break Rules. Share Loud.". Near the bottom left, add a black rectangular venue block with magenta hand lettering for THE SOUTH SIDE DIY and smaller white address text "218 W. 31st Street" and "Chicago, IL", plus a small white skull icon nearby. Include exactly 2 silver safety pins, one near the upper left corner and one near the lower left area, and exactly 1 strip of dark duct tape on the left edge of the main title paper. Finish the bottom edge with a black-and-white checkerboard strip spanning the full width. Overall mood: rebellious, loud, youthful, anarchic, street-pasted punk flyer meets tech event promo, with intense contrast, gritty halftone noise, screen-print imperfections, and hand-made collage energy.
entries.description: A gritty punk-collage event poster prompt for creating rebellious promotional artwork for tech sprints, hack nights, or underground creative events.

entries.title: Swiss Poster for AI Web Design Sprint
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a bold Swiss-modernist event poster for a live AI and web design sprint, portrait orientation, with a warm off-white paper background, stark black typography, and vivid red accent blocks. The composition is asymmetrical and editorial, with a strong grid and generous negative space. In the top left, place a small red uppercase line of text reading LIVE APRIL 27-30, followed by a thin horizontal black rule stretching toward the right. Below it, set an oversized stacked headline in ultra-bold black sans serif, left aligned, reading The AI Web Design Sprint, broken across 4 lines with dramatic scale so the words dominate the left half of the poster. In the upper right quadrant, add 1 large solid red rectangle as a graphic block. Beneath that red block, place a compact black uppercase subhead in 3 lines: 4 DAYS. REAL PROJECTS. SHIP TOGETHER.. In the lower middle, include 2 cropped grayscale portrait photos of men from the chest up, side by side, documentary style, slightly overlapping the typography area; the left man has dark slicked-back hair and a short beard, the right man wears a dark baseball cap with embroidered lettering and has facial hair. Obscure both faces with 2 vertical soft-edged gray censor rectangles centered over each face. Along the right side, create a vertical feature column with 4 black square icons, each separated by thin horizontal divider lines and paired with uppercase labels. The 4 items are: a starburst icon with the label "CREATIVE COLLISION", a connected-nodes icon with the label "AI-POWERED WORKFLOWS", a code brackets icon with the label "CODE IN MOTION", and a terminal prompt icon with the label "REAL-TIME DESIGN". Near the bottom, add a full-width footer separated by a thin horizontal black rule. Inside the footer, create 4 text blocks divided by slim vertical lines: block 1 says "BUILD FAST. BREAK RULES. SHARE LOUD.", block 2 lists "MINIMAL PLAYGROUND & AGENCY 976" with a small red line beneath reading "LIVE ON THE WEB", block 3 lists "CYBERPUNK CAFE SURFERS (LATE SET)" and below it "4 NIGHTS OF CHAOS & CODE" and then "THE SOUTH SIDE DIY", block 4 lists ticket info as "TICKETS $10 ADV $12 DOS". On the far lower right edge, add vertical red text reading CHICAGO, IL. Use a clean neo-grotesk typeface similar to Helvetica or Akzidenz-Grotesk, heavy weight for the headline, condensed uppercase for supporting text, crisp alignment, subtle paper texture, and a high-contrast black-red-cream palette. The overall look should feel like a contemporary design-conference poster mixed with punk tech culture and brutalist editorial branding.
entries.description: A bold editorial event poster for a live AI and web design sprint, ideal for conference promotion, creative tech events, and social media announcements.

entries.title: Pixar-Style AI Web Design Sprint Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A stylized cinematic poster for a creative coding event, designed like a Disney-Pixar-inspired animated movie one-sheet. Vertical composition, warm cozy interior at night with a large loft window on the left showing a city skyline at sunset, exposed brick walls, and a neon-lit creative studio atmosphere. At the top center, big glossy dimensional typography reads "Disney•PIXAR" above the main title "The AI Web Design Sprint" in huge bold white 3D letters. Directly underneath, smaller bright text reads "BUILD FAST. BREAK RULES. SHARE LOUD." In the center foreground, 2 adult men sit side by side at a wooden table with a laptop between them, casual startup-founder vibe, one in a dark hoodie and one in a light sweatshirt and baseball cap, both facing camera in a friendly promotional pose. Their faces should be generic and unobtrusive, with the emphasis on the event-poster composition rather than portrait realism. The laptop lid has 3 visible stickers: a purple code-brackets sticker, a black sticker with a white burst symbol, and a rectangular slogan sticker reading "BUILD FAST. BREAK RULES. SHARE LOUD." Around the scene, include 4 whimsical animated mascot elements: a small hovering robot drone lamp in the upper left with glowing blue eyes and a cone of warm light shining downward; a smiling cartoon sun icon in the upper right; a tiny red pixel character floating nearby; and a glowing blue cat-like digital mascot standing on the table in front of the laptop. On the right side, a vertical monitor displays a dark coding interface with readable text including "// Welcome back, Julian!", "Opus 4.6", "Minimal Playground", "Agency 976", "Cyberpunk Cafe", "Surfers (late set)", and a checklist titled "Sprint Plan" with 4 items: "DISCOVER", "IDEATE", "BUILD", "SHIP". On the left side, a hand-lettered paper signboard contains 4 notices pinned together: "4 NIGHTS OF CHAOS & CODE", "DOORS 7PM", "SHOW 8PM", and "$10 ADV / $12 DOS". In the lower left foreground, a white coffee mug reads "THE SOUTH SIDE DIY 218 W. 31ST ST. CHICAGO, IL" with a small skull icon. In the lower right foreground, a terracotta plant pot with green leaves reads "CREATIVE COLLISION". At the bottom center, large bold text reads "APRIL 27-30" and below it "LIVE. ONLY ON THE WEB." Add a tiny line of faux credits along the bottom edge in classic movie-poster style, referencing names like Julian Lopez and Harvey Specter, projects such as Minimal Playground, Agency 976, Cyberpunk Cafe, and Surfers, and a playful production credit. Use dramatic warm-orange and cool-blue lighting, polished animated-film rendering, soft depth of field, glossy surfaces, rich contrast, highly detailed poster design, charming tech startup energy, and a premium event-advertisement finish.
entries.description: A cinematic animated-style event poster for a web design sprint, ideal for promoting hackathons, creative coding meetups, or startup workshops.

entries.title: Anime Sakura Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A polished Japanese animated film poster in a soft, luminous springtime anime style. The main scene shows 2 teenage schoolgirls walking hand in hand down a quiet residential street lined with blooming cherry blossom trees. They wear matching Japanese sailor school uniforms: white long-sleeve blouses with navy sailor collars, pale blue neckerchiefs, and dark navy pleated skirts, each carrying a navy school bag. The girl on the left has dark hair tied in a low side bun with loose strands and a small pink cherry blossom hairpin; she turns toward the other girl with a tender, slightly wistful expression. The girl on the right has long straight dark hair and looks back at her softly. Pink sakura petals drift through warm late-afternoon backlight, creating a romantic, emotional atmosphere with glowing rim light, gentle lens bloom, and painterly detail. Along the left edge, add a vertical collage of 7 inset memory scenes from the story: 1) two children together in a nostalgic childhood moment, 2) a close portrait of the long-haired girl, 3) the two characters standing apart in a tense or reflective moment, 4) an indoor conversation scene with 3 people, 5) a close profile of the bun-haired girl, 6) an intimate almost-kiss close-up of the two leads, 7) a rear view of the two girls walking together beneath cherry blossoms. At the top, include the Japanese tagline: 「変わってしまった朝、変わらなかった想い。」 Across the lower center, place the large glowing handwritten title Story of U in elegant pink neon script. Beneath it, add small Japanese subtitle text and a release line reading 2027年春公開. At the very bottom, add dense small white Japanese credits in authentic movie-poster layout. Overall mood: bittersweet yuri coming-of-age drama, cinematic key visual, emotionally resonant, highly detailed, pastel pink and navy palette, vertical poster composition.

entries.title: Noir Man With Red Sun Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a minimalist vertical art poster featuring a single man in clean side profile facing left, shown from about mid-thigh upward, wearing a tailored dark suit jacket, crisp white shirt, and a vintage 1940s-style black fedora with a ribbon band. His pose is upright, composed, and confident, evoking a classic noir protagonist. Render the figure in a refined monochrome photographic style with crisp editorial detail, rich tonal contrast, and dramatic Rembrandt-inspired lighting that sculpts the cheek, ear, jawline, hat brim, and shoulder with deep shadow. Place 1 bold perfectly round red disc directly behind the head and upper torso, centered like a halo or rising sun, creating a stark graphic focal point. The background should be a clean off-white or cream paper-textured surface with subtle grain and generous negative space around the subject. The lower half of the figure should dissolve into elongated black ink drips: count 12 distinct major dripping trails of varying thickness, hanging from the jacket hem and lower body, some long and straight, some tapering, with a few small splatters, as if the body is bleeding into the canvas. Keep the color palette strictly limited to black, red, and warm off-white. The overall mood should be moody, contemplative, elegant, slightly ominous, and modernist, like a high-end gallery poster blending film noir portraiture with surreal ink-paint abstraction.

entries.title: Anime Spring Travel Film Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A polished anime-style international film poster with a cinematic, slightly painterly look and soft natural lighting. Center the composition on a young woman shown from mid-thigh up, standing in a relaxed pose with one hand in the pocket of an oversized navy zip hoodie. The hoodie has two yellow athletic stripes running down each sleeve, a loose hood, and a partially open zipper over a fitted white tank top with thin black straps visible underneath. She wears a black choker and a single dark dangling earring. Her hair is a short platinum-silver bob with long side-swept bangs and a smooth, airy texture. Her face is intentionally obscured by a flat rectangular censor block in a muted beige tone. Keep the overall styling elegant and restrained rather than overly detailed, with a more natural, believable finish than flashy hyper-rendered anime art. Build the background as a travel-movie collage made of diagonal panel slices: one panel shows a coastal Mediterranean-style town on cliffs beside calm blue water with distant birds; one panel shows a rural railway line with a train on the left and utility poles along the tracks; one panel shows snow-covered mountains and a winding road in a quiet valley; one panel shows a dusky city skyline with glowing lights; and one panel shows a seaside road curving along the coast at sunset. Use a soft cream, blue, and slate palette with a nostalgic spring-travel mood. Add elegant festival-award laurels on the upper left, exactly 3 stacked laurels with Spanish text indicating major animation festival awards. Add large centered title typography near the bottom reading VIAJES DE PRIMAVERA, with a refined serif font in pale ivory. Beneath it, add a smaller italic tagline in Spanish reading Cada destino cambia su corazón.. Add a release line below that reading PRÓXIMAMENTE EN CINES. Include tiny production-credit text and a small studio logo at the very bottom. The image should feel like an arthouse animated movie poster advertising a spring journey drama, with balanced negative space, premium layout design, and realistic printed-poster typography.
entries.description: This prompt generates a cinematic anime-style movie poster with a central heroine, travel-scene collage backgrounds, and elegant festival-poster typography for promotional or concept art use.
