entries.title: Luxury Austria Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A luxurious vintage-style travel poster for Austria, designed like a premium tourism advertisement. Use an elegant, symmetrical poster layout with thin gold decorative border lines and small ornamental corner details. At the top center, place a minimalist gold mountain emblem above the word "DISCOVER", then a very large refined serif title reading AUSTRIA in deep burgundy red. Beneath it, add a small uppercase tagline in gold: "TIMELESS BEAUTY. RICH HERITAGE. UNFORGETTABLE EXPERIENCES." and below that an italic script line: "Where Tradition Meets Breathtaking Nature." Place a small horizontal Austrian flag motif between the lines. The main image should be a breathtaking composite alpine lake scene at golden hour: on the left, a dramatic hilltop fortress resembling Salzburg Castle perched on a rocky cliff above the water; in the center distance, a calm reflective lake leading into a valley of towering snow-capped Alps; on the right, a picturesque Austrian lakeside village resembling Hallstatt with steep-roofed houses, a tall church spire, a hillside church, and clustered wooden buildings descending to the water. Warm sunlight from the left, crisp blue sky, glowing highlights on the mountains, rich reflections in the lake, romantic cinematic atmosphere, ultra-detailed, majestic and inviting. Along the lower middle, show exactly 5 gold icon-and-label tourism highlights spaced evenly: 1 castle icon with "ICONIC LANDMARKS", 1 classical column icon with "RICH HERITAGE", 1 music note icon with "VIBRANT CULTURE", 1 heart icon with "WARM HOSPITALITY", and 1 mountain icon with "BREATHTAKING LANDSCAPES". At the bottom, create a horizontal food strip with exactly 5 framed culinary photos separated by thin dividers under the centered heading "SAVOR THE TASTE OF AUSTRIA". The 5 dishes are: Wiener Schnitzel, Appelstrudel, Kaiserschmarrn, Sachertorte, and Melange. Each food image should be realistic, warmly lit, plated attractively, and labeled in uppercase serif text beneath the image. Overall style: high-end European travel campaign poster, polished editorial design, romantic nostalgia, refined typography, harmonious gold and burgundy accents, photorealistic scenery blended with luxury brochure aesthetics.

entries.title: Romantic Paris Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A luxurious vintage-travel-poster style illustration of FRANCE with PARIS as the destination, designed like an elegant tourism advertisement. Use a grand, romantic Paris cityscape at golden-hour sunset with a glowing pastel sky in peach, pink, lavender, and soft gold. Make the Eiffel Tower the dominant central landmark, tall and detailed, rising above the city. Include 4 additional iconic Paris landmarks: the Louvre Pyramid on the left, the Arc de Triomphe near the center background, Notre-Dame Cathedral to the right of the Eiffel Tower, and Sacré-Cœur Basilica on the far upper-right hillside. In the foreground, fill the scene with dense blooming lavender in vivid purple, creating a dreamy, painterly foreground leading into the city. Add a river and elegant stone bridges beneath the Eiffel Tower with warm reflected sunset light. The composition should feel idealized, cinematic, and slightly fantastical, combining multiple landmarks into one harmonious panoramic view.

Overlay refined editorial typography in the upper-left to upper-center area: a very large serif title reading FRANCE, with a smaller spaced serif subtitle reading PARIS. Above the subtitle, place a small gold fleur-de-lis ornament; below it, add a tiny horizontal French tricolor accent. Under the main heading, include the two lines of promotional copy exactly: "TIMELESS BEAUTY. ENDLESS INSPIRATION." and "Where Every Moment Becomes a Memory" in elegant small caps and italic script. Add a thin decorative gold border around the whole poster with delicate ornamental corner details.

At the bottom, create a soft cream misted panel blending into the image, with the phrase "THE FRENCH ART OF LIVING" centered above a row of 3 food-and-drink items: 1 buttery croissant on a plate, 1 glass of red wine with 1 wine bottle, and 1 crème brûlée in a ramekin topped with berries. Label them "CROISSANT", "FINE WINE", and "CRÈME BRÛLÉE". To the right, add 4 small gold line icons with labels beneath them: "ICONIC LANDMARKS", "RICH HERITAGE", "AUTHENTIC CUISINE", and "UNFORGETTABLE EXPERIENCES". Overall style: ultra-detailed, polished travel poster, romantic European tourism ad, painterly realism, warm luminous atmosphere, premium print design, balanced composition, high-end magazine aesthetic.

entries.title: Retro Mince and Tatties Action Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A bold retro propaganda-style poster illustration with a limited palette of red, black, and warm cream on a lightly aged paper texture. The composition features a dynamic anime-inspired action scene in the center: a martial artist in a white gi with a black belt carries a long-haired woman over one shoulder in a fireman's carry or wrestling throw pose. The fighter is shown from the knees up in a powerful wide stance, facing left, with the woman draped horizontally across the shoulders, her bare legs lifted and bent, her long dark hair flowing downward, and a black wide-brim cowboy hat still on her head. Render both figures in high-contrast inked line art with thick black shadows and sharp graphic contours, mixing manga character design with vintage screen-printed poster energy. Behind them, fill the background with aggressive geometric rays and wedges: 6 major red and black angular shapes radiating outward across the cream backdrop, creating a sense of impact and motion. In the top right corner, add 1 circular emblem containing a fierce gorilla or ape head icon with red accents. Across the lower third, place large bold condensed block typography integrated into the composition: the smaller line reads "SCOTTISH RECIPE:" and the huge main title reads "MINCE AND TATTIES". Make the text red on cream and cream on black in layered diagonal banner panels, with the words occupying 3 text groupings total: "SCOTTISH RECIPE:", "MINCE AND", and "TATTIES". Emphasize dramatic diagonal layout, posterized shadows, distressed print texture, and the feeling of a vintage Soviet constructivist or pulp exploitation food poster fused with martial arts manga aesthetics.

entries.title: Japanese Roman Typeface Specimen Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a refined vintage-modern type specimen poster for a fictional typeface named KASEI, designed as an elegant fusion of Roman and Japanese typography. Use a tall portrait layout on warm ivory textured paper with thin gray divider lines, black letterforms, and muted vermilion accent text and seals. Center the composition around a large serif Latin wordmark "KASEI" above 2 oversized Japanese kanji, "華世", set in a matching high-contrast classical style. Above the title, place the small heading "INTRODUCING" with a tiny ornamental diamond. To the right of the title area, add a vertical Japanese tagline reading "古典の美、未来の書体。". Under the main kanji, add the subtitle "A ROMAN × JAPANESE TYPEFACE" and below it a Japanese line in vermilion: "ローマの精神、日本の美。". On the far left, create a narrow sidebar with the stacked English text "A TYPEFACE HARMONIZING ROME AND JAPAN", a small circular crest, the Japanese text "製作 - MMXXIV", and "CREATED IN KYOTO, JAPAN".

Build the lower two-thirds as a meticulous type specimen sheet with exact labeled sections. In a left column, include 2 sections: "WEIGHTS" with 5 items - Light, Regular, Medium, Semibold, Bold - and "POINT SIZES" with 9 items - 8pt, 10pt, 12pt, 14pt, 18pt, 24pt, 36pt, 48pt, 72pt. In the main area, include a section titled "ROMAN CHARACTERS" showing 4 specimen lines: uppercase alphabet A through Z, lowercase alphabet a through z, numerals 0 through 9, and a punctuation/symbol line with slashes, commas, semicolons, exclamation mark, question marks, apostrophes, quotation marks, em dash, parentheses, brackets, braces, ampersand, at sign, dollar sign, asterisk, dagger, and double dagger. Below that, include a section titled "JAPANESE CHARACTERS" with 4 lines: 19 kanji "日 月 山 川 花 鳥 風 林 火 水 土 金 木 道 心 時 空 光 夢 永", 23 hiragana "あ い う え お か き く け こ さ し す せ そ た ち つ て と な に ぬ ね の", 21 katakana "ア イ ウ エ オ カ キ ク ケ コ サ シ ス セ ソ ン タ チ ツ テ ト ナ ニ ヌ ネ ノ", and a symbols line including Japanese punctuation, corner brackets, wave dash, middle dot, parentheses, angle brackets, double angle brackets, black lenticular brackets, postal mark, reference marks, and iteration mark.

Along the next row, add 4 compact specimen panels: "LIGATURES" with 10 items - Æ, AE, AJ, Œ, KA, KE, KI, KO, KU, and "st ct fi fl ft fb"; "STYLISTIC ALTERNATES" with 12 items - A, A, A, R, R, K, K, a, a, g, g, y, y, J, J, Q, Q, t, t - arranged as a neat sampling grid; "SPACING STUDY" showing the word "KASEI" with wide tracking above the kanji string "華世永美"; and "NUMERAL STYLES" with 4 lines - lining figures 0123456789, oldstyle figures 0123456789, and small caps combinations "H 0123" and "H 0123". Add tiny red Japanese captions beneath some of these sample boxes.

At the bottom, create 3 feature panels. Left panel titled "WORDS" with 3 entries: "HARMONIA" with the red Japanese and English gloss "調和 HARMONY", "VERITAS" with "真実 TRUTH", and "FORTITUDO" with "勇気 COURAGE". Center panel with a large Japanese quote "時を越え、美は残る。" above the English statement "BEAUTY ENDURES\nBEYOND TIME." and a small signature line "- KASEI" in red. Right panel titled "DETAILS" with a large kanji "永" over faint construction circles and guide lines, plus 4 right-aligned Japanese annotation callouts connected by fine dotted leader lines.

Finish with a footer containing 4 blocks: a small crest and "KASEI TYPE FOUNDRY" with "WWW.KASEIFOUNDRY.JP"; a centered language support note "SUPPORTING 200+ LANGUAGES" and "LATIN / GREEK / CYRILLIC / JAPANESE / SYMBOLS"; a right-side statement "DESIGNED WITH RESPECT\nCRAFTED FOR THE FUTURE"; and a square vermilion seal bearing "華世". Overall style should feel like a premium Japanese foundry specimen sheet, balancing editorial Swiss-grid precision, classical book typography, subtle Japanese branding, generous margins, restrained luxury, and museum-poster elegance.

entries.title: Vintage Fantasy Postcard of Beacon Hollow
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vintage fantasy travel postcard poster for BEACON HOLLOW, designed like a large-letter souvenir postcard from the 1950s-1960s. The composition is a single richly detailed horizontal scene with heavily weathered paper texture, rounded postcard corners, faded inks, creases, scratches, foxing, and worn edges. Across the top and center, huge dimensional block letters spell "BEACON HOLLOW" in classic retro postcard style, with warm cream outlines and red-brown extruded shadows; each letter contains miniature painted scenic vignettes of the destination, including alpine peaks, waterfalls, pine forests, a magical manor, glowing towers, and valley landscapes. In the upper left, hand-painted script text reads "GREETINGS FROM" in dark red. In the upper right, include a circular black postal cancellation stamp reading "BEACON HOLLOW / MAY 18 / 1967 / CREATIVE RETREAT," overlapping a vintage postage stamp labeled "BEACON HOLLOW" and "CREATIVE RETREAT" with "7c," depicting a moonlit mountain and a lighthouse-like beacon tower. Beneath the title, place a small curved ribbon banner reading a magejosh destination with tiny compass-star ornaments. The main background should show a majestic golden-hour mountain valley with a winding river, distant snowy peaks, dense evergreen forests, and on the right a large timber-and-stone fantasy lodge perched on a cliff, warmly lit from within, with stairs descending the slope. Scatter subtle magical blue lights and faint arcane circular glyphs around the lodge and foreground for a worldbuilding-meets-magic atmosphere. In the lower left, place exactly 3 foreground desk objects: a dark ceramic mug with a compass emblem, an open sketchbook spread, and a fountain pen resting diagonally across the pages. The left page of the sketchbook is titled "Campaign Ideas" and lists 3 bullets: "The Forgotten Vale," "Clockwork Pilgrims," and "Echoes of the First Light," with a small castle drawing below; the right page shows a tree illustration and the handwritten text "Beery world Hollow." Across the lower center, add an old illustrated map spread out on the table, showing mountain icons and hand-drawn cartographic details. In the lower right, place exactly 5 more foreground elements: a closed leather journal embossed with a star compass and the phrase "Ideas Become Legends," a cluster of 4 polyhedral dice, a rustic wooden signpost with 4 directional slats reading "STORY," "GAME DESIGN," "WORLD BUILDING," and "AI FOR CREATORS," a glowing glass lamp or tube device, and a nearby floating arcane target-like sigil. Add a pinned handwritten note left of center on aged paper reading, "Wish you were here - building worlds, chasing wonder, and turning ideas into adventures. - magejosh" in blue cursive. Use painterly illustration with high detail, nostalgic Americana postcard design, fantasy concept art sensibility, warm sunset lighting, muted teal sky, sepia aging, and an inviting creative-retreat mood.
entries.description: This prompt generates a weathered retro travel-postcard illustration for a fantasy destination, ideal for creative worldbuilding promotions, fictional tourism art, or nostalgic branded concept pieces.

entries.title: Cinematic Red Heist Team in Bank
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic, gritty heist-team group portrait inspired by a Spanish crime thriller, showing exactly 5 robbers standing shoulder to shoulder in a grand historic bank interior. The scene is framed symmetrically in a low-angle medium full-body shot, with the tallest figure centered in front as the leader and 2 teammates on each side. All 5 wear identical deep red hooded jumpsuits zipped up the front, black straps and backpack harnesses, and their hoods up, creating a menacing anonymous look. The far-left and far-right robbers stand with arms crossed; the second-left and second-right robbers stand with arms relaxed at their sides; the center robber stands squarely facing camera with hands down and a dominant posture. Their faces are intentionally obscured and featureless, hidden in shadow and blur beneath the hoods. The setting is an opulent old bank hall with dark polished wood, brass safety deposit boxes lining both side walls, ornate columns, balcony railings, classical architectural details, and warm globe lamps. A bright golden overhead light pours down from the ceiling behind the group, creating dramatic backlighting, rim light on the red suits, long shadows, and a tense high-contrast atmosphere. Color palette: crimson red, black, dark brown, brass, and warm gold. Style: ultra-realistic cinematic photography, suspenseful crime-drama poster aesthetic, highly detailed fabric texture, moody lighting, symmetrical composition, shallow haze in the background, sharp focus on the team. Add a white Pollo.ai logo in the top-right corner.
entries.description: This prompt generates a dramatic movie-poster-style image of a five-person masked heist crew in red jumpsuits inside a grand old bank, ideal for thriller promos and crime-series-inspired visuals.

entries.title: Pastel Anime Blueberry Cake Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dreamy pastel anime movie-poster illustration set in a narrow outdoor alley completely covered in dense floral mosaic wall art, rendered with glittering sparkles, soft haze, and romantic shoujo color grading in lavender, pink, periwinkle, and cream. In the foreground, show a cute teenage girl from a rear three-quarter view, her face mostly hidden, with short silvery-lavender bob hair and a large mauve bow hair accessory decorated with tiny flowers. She wears an oversized translucent lavender hoodie with embroidered floral appliqués on the sleeves, a layered pastel skirt, and carries a shiny lilac backpack covered with charms, ribbons, plush pom-poms, pins, and star details. She is holding a plate with a blueberry pound cake loaf that has been sliced open, and the center is dramatically overflowing with glossy dark-purple blueberry filling that pours out in thick syrupy streams down the cake and plate. Scatter whole blueberries around the cake and lower foreground. Make the scene whimsical, delicate, and slightly comedic despite the beautiful presentation. Design the image as a Japanese film poster with many decorative text overlays and laurels. Across the top, include 3 small award lines with laurel wreaths. Add a huge hand-lettered Japanese title in layered pink, white, and purple lettering with glow and sticker-like outlines reading: 「冷凍したブルーベリー使ってパウンドケーキ焼いたら中身溢れて失敗した件。」 Below it, add a smaller subtitle line: 「〜甘くて、ちょっぴり切ない青春のレシピ〜」. On the right side, place 1 vertical white quote box with Japanese text: 「うまくいかない日だって、人生のスパイスになるんだ。」 In the lower left, add 1 pinned pink note card that says "Sweet but clumsy." and 1 torn recipe memo sheet with handwritten Japanese checklist items. Add a small speech bubble near the cake that says "Oops!". Include a circular stamp-style seal near the lower right that reads "Blueberry disaster". At the bottom, add film-credit style text in white, including "A FILM BY YUMEIRO PASTEL", and a large release line in pink and white: "2024.6.30(SUN) ROADSHOW". Under that, add the Japanese tagline: 「失敗は、最高の思い出になる。だから、また挑戦しよう。」 Frame the whole poster with lace, stickers, scraps of paper, and scrapbook-style decorations. Make it ultra-detailed, glossy, sentimental, kawaii, cinematic, and intentionally over-the-top like a fake coming-of-age movie poster about a baking failure.
entries.description: A whimsical Japanese-style anime poster showing a pastel girl carrying a disastrously overflowing blueberry pound cake, ideal for parody film-poster art and cute cinematic social media visuals.

entries.title: Pastel Blueberry Cake Anime Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dreamy pastel-purple Japanese movie poster illustration in a glossy shoujo anime style, packed with blueberry dessert chaos and soft sparkles. The scene shows 1 seated teenage girl with a short silver-lavender bob haircut, side bangs, a small lavender bow hair clip, and alternative cute fashion, sitting on the floor in a messy kitchen or baking workspace. Her face is intentionally covered by a centered square censor block in muted lavender-gray. She wears an oversized translucent lavender jacket with black ribbon details on the sleeves, a light purple graphic top, layered silver necklaces, a purple plaid skirt, slouchy white leg warmers decorated with lavender heart patches and black bows, and chunky lavender platform sneakers with ribbon accents. She holds 1 blueberry near her mouth with one hand and 1 metal mixing bowl smeared with vivid purple blueberry batter in the other. In front of her is 1 large golden pound cake split open dramatically, overflowing with dark glossy blueberries and purple filling, spilling across 1 cooling rack and the tabletop. Counted blueberries are scattered throughout the composition as floating and resting props, creating a whimsical suspended effect. The environment is cluttered with baking tools and notes: 1 spiral notebook page in the upper right labeled in English with a handwritten recipe for blueberry pound cake, 1 whisk in the lower right, 1 small pinned photo print in the lower left showing 2 anime girls, and 1 handwritten note card in the lower right with Japanese writing and a small bunny doodle. Use a monochrome palette of lilac, violet, periwinkle, cream, and deep blueberry purple, with luminous highlights, soft haze, translucent overlays, and romantic glitter. Add large expressive Japanese calligraphy text dominating the left half of the poster, reading vertically and diagonally like a dramatic light-novel or film advertisement, plus a ribbon banner near the cake with the date text "2026年7月メロードショー", vertical copy on the right side, small production-credit text across the bottom, and a final tagline line at the very bottom. Make the composition feel like a cute disaster: beautiful but failed baking, sweet melancholy, fashionable messiness, and cinematic promotional poster energy.

entries.title: Golden Wuxia Palace Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic vintage Chinese martial-arts movie poster in a luxurious dark-gold and amber palette, styled like a classic historical epic. Center the composition on a young imperial man seated in front, wearing an ornate black-and-gold dragon robe and a Qing dynasty red-tasseled official hat, posed with one hand near his mouth in a sly, playful, confident manner. Surround him with exactly 8 beautiful court women in layered silk hanfu and gauzy robes, arranged tightly around him in a glamorous harem-like group portrait, with 4 women in the upper row and 4 women in the lower row. Each woman has an elegant updo with elaborate gold hairpins, floral ornaments, dangling earrings, and soft warm makeup; their expressions are alluring, gentle, or curious. Render the women in champagne, blush, peach, rose, and pale jade fabrics with translucent sleeves, embroidered bodices, and richly textured jewelry. Behind the group, place a large aged wooden plaque with carved golden Chinese calligraphy reading "鹿鼎记", with a smaller line above it reading "金庸武侠经典". Add vertical cast-name text in Chinese placed beside different figures: on the far left "苏荃", below left "陈圆圆", upper middle-left "阿珂", upper middle-right "建宁公主", far right upper "沐剑屏", right middle "方怡", lower right-middle "双儿", and far lower right "曾柔". Also add a vertical poetic slogan along the upper left margin in Chinese: "小人物,大智慧,游走江湖庙堂,玩转天下,抱得美人归". At the bottom, blend in a secondary cinematic scene: an ancient palace gate and courtyard with soldiers and banners forming a grand processional crowd, with one lone figure centered in the foreground walking toward the viewer. Finish with a narrow line of Chinese tagline text across the bottom edge: "一部颠覆传统的英雄传奇 一段令人捧腹的江湖神话". The whole image should feel opulent, theatrical, romantic, and slightly mischievous, with smoky sepia shadows, glowing rim light, rich texture, symmetrical poster composition, and polished high-end period-drama key art.
entries.description: A lavish historical Chinese movie-poster prompt for generating an ensemble wuxia court drama image with one imperial man, eight women, ornate typography, and an epic palace backdrop.

entries.searchText: golden wuxia palace poster a lavish historical chinese movie-poster prompt for generating an ensemble wuxia court drama image with one imperial man, eight women, ornate typography, and an epic palace backdrop. a dramatic vintage chinese martial-arts movie poster in a luxurious dark-gold and amber palette, styled like a classic historical epic. center the composition on a young imperial man seated in front, wearing an ornate black-and-gold dragon robe and a qing dynasty red-tasseled official hat, posed with one hand near his mouth in a sly, playful, confident manner. surround him with exactly 8 beautiful court women in layered silk hanfu and gauzy robes, arranged tightly around him in a glamorous harem-like group portrait, with 4 women in the upper row and 4 women in the lower row. each woman has an elegant updo with elaborate gold hairpins, floral ornaments, dangling earrings, and soft warm makeup; their expressions are alluring, gentle, or curious. render the women in champagne, blush, peach, rose, and pale jade fabrics with translucent sleeves, embroidered bodices, and richly textured jewelry. behind the group, place a large aged wooden plaque with carved golden chinese calligraphy reading "鹿鼎记", with a smaller line above it reading "金庸武侠经典". add vertical cast-name text in chinese placed beside different figures: on the far left "苏荃", below left "陈圆圆", upper middle-left "阿珂", upper middle-right "建宁公主", far right upper "沐剑屏", right middle "方怡", lower right-middle "双儿", and far lower right "曾柔". also add a vertical poetic slogan along the upper left margin in chinese: "小人物,大智慧,游走江湖庙堂,玩转天下,抱得美人归". at the bottom, blend in a secondary cinematic scene: an ancient palace gate and courtyard with soldiers and banners forming a grand processional crowd, with one lone figure centered in the foreground walking toward the viewer. finish with a narrow line of chinese tagline text across the bottom edge: "一部颠覆传统的英雄传奇 一段令人捧腹的江湖神话". the whole image should feel opulent, theatrical, romantic, and slightly mischievous, with smoky sepia shadows, glowing rim light, rich texture, symmetrical poster composition, and polished high-end period-drama key art. poster / flyer portrait cinematic

entries.title: Dark Fantasy Isekai Novel Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark fantasy anime light-novel cover in a vertical composition, painted with detailed dramatic brushwork and moody cinematic lighting. Show three young women posed in a triangular arrangement against a ruined medieval city engulfed in flames at night, with smoke, embers, collapsed timber buildings, and a large stone castle on a rocky hill in the upper background. In the foreground center, place a beautiful young woman with long flowing powder blue hair, wearing an off-shoulder blue corset dress with white frilled sleeves and lace-up bodice, one hand lightly gripping her chest, her expression serious and vulnerable. Behind her on the left, place a tall woman with silver-white hair tied in a high ponytail and a white headscarf, wearing a modest black dress with a high collar and front fastenings, standing in profile with a stern, unreadable presence. Behind her on the right, place a blonde girl with twin braids under a brown hooded cloak, pale blue-green eyes, holding a black book with a star-like emblem on the cover close to her chest, looking sideways with a guarded expression. Use layered character overlap, strong contrast, and slightly desaturated colors except for warm firelight and deep reds. Add large vertical Japanese title typography along the left side in distressed calligraphic style: 「異世界辺境伯領」 in black and dark red, plus two smaller vertical text blocks near the lower left reading 「現代の倫理観を捨て」 and 「権力と暴力で泥臭く生き延びます」. Add a decorative compass-like emblem near the lower left and a large bold vertical subtitle 「転生」 at the bottom left. Ornate corner filigree, gritty light-novel cover design, intense isekai war atmosphere, high detail, premium illustrated novel cover.
entries.description: This prompt generates a dramatic anime-style dark fantasy light-novel cover with three heroines, burning medieval ruins, and bold vertical Japanese title text for book cover or promotional art use.

entries.title: Vintage Japanese Crime Film Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vintage late-1970s Japanese crime film poster in the style of a Nikkatsu theatrical one-sheet, vertically composed on aged beige paper with visible grain, faint stains, and slightly faded ink. The main image is a large, moody half-body portrait of 原田芳雄 occupying the upper right and center, turned partly away from camera, with thick curly dark hair, a serious expression, and a wrinkled light gray suit jacket over an open-collar white shirt; his face is mostly in shadow. Behind him is a bleak industrial waterfront with cranes, low factory structures, and heavy gray smoke rising into a washed-out sky. Across the lower middle, place a huge hand-brushed red Japanese title reading 影の街, painted diagonally and aggressively, partially overlapping the portrait and the lower scene. In the lower half, add a second scene: a rainy urban street at dusk or night with wet reflective pavement, a dark police car at left with a glowing red roof light, and 6 men in suits and trench coats walking forward, with 1 central detective figure in a beige trench coat and loosened tie leading the group. On the far right, include a vertical strip of 5 stacked inset cast portraits framed in thin borders, each a dark cinematic still with different characters. Add vertical Japanese typography: on the upper right, the actor credit "原田芳雄 主演"; on the upper left, a 2-line tagline column reading "その男、刑事。 正義より、真実を追う。"; and near the lower right of the main image, another vertical blurb reading "誰が敵で、誰が味方か。闇に消えた事件の中で、ただひとつの真実を掴むまで-". At the bottom, include dense small Japanese credits spanning the width, plus a large release date on the lower right reading 11.23 with "日活ロードショー" beneath it and a small studio mark. Use muted charcoal, sepia, smoky blue-gray, and off-white tones, with the red title as the only vivid color. The overall feeling is hard-boiled, melancholic, gritty, and cinematic, like a lost 1970s Japanese detective movie poster.
entries.description: A gritty retro Japanese theatrical poster for a hard-boiled detective film, useful for generating faux 1970s movie key art with authentic typography and layout.

entries.title: Anime Concert Interview Magazine Spread
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A high-impact anime promotional interview poster designed as a glossy two-page magazine spread for a futuristic live music event. The scene shows a packed nighttime concert arena filled with a crowd holding glowing light sticks in neon yellow, blue, and purple, with a huge illuminated stage in the background, laser beams, bokeh lights, haze, and a giant triangular play-icon screen reading "AI SUPERLIVE SUMMER 2026". In the center foreground are 2 anime-style female presenters seen from a dramatic side and back angle, both looking toward the stage. The left character is ソラ, wearing a dark oversized hooded jacket with black and acid-lime accents, large lime-green headphones marked "06", and raising a bright yellow glow stick overhead; her face is partially obscured by a rectangular privacy block. The right character is ナギ, with a short silver-white bob haircut and fair skin, wearing a pale oversized hooded coat, softly lit by stage lights, holding a white-blue glowing baton near her chest, with an emotional profile expression as she watches the show. Use cinematic rim lighting, richly saturated purple-blue concert colors, reflective fabric highlights, and detailed anime rendering with a polished editorial-advertising finish. Compose the layout like a Japanese special interview feature with dense text overlays, translucent dark panels, thin neon-yellow borders, and bold sans-serif typography. Include 8 distinct text blocks: 1 small header tag at top left reading "/ SPECIAL INTERVIEW /"; 1 large Japanese headline at upper left reading "この夏、AIと音楽の未来がステージで輝く!"; 1 event logo block at upper right reading "AI SUPERLIVE SUMMER 2026" and "2026.7.18 SAT @ FUTURE ARENA ODAIBA"; 3 question-and-answer panels stacked on the left with yellow-framed headers beginning with "Q."; 3 question-and-answer panels stacked on the right with yellow-framed headers beginning with "Q."; plus 2 character intro name boxes near the figures labeled "ソラ" and "ナギ". Add a bold closing Japanese tagline across the bottom left and center reading "AIと音楽が響き合う、新しい夏がはじまる。 一緒に、未来を体験しよう!". At the bottom right, include a footer block repeating the event name and date, plus a visible QR code and a small caption indicating the official website. The overall style should feel like a premium Japanese event flyer, interview article, and key visual combined, energetic, futuristic, emotional, and festival-like.
entries.description: A cinematic anime-style promotional spread for a futuristic live music event, ideal for concert posters, interview features, and event marketing visuals.

entries.title: Vintage Red Propaganda Fight Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A bold vintage propaganda-style poster with a limited red, black, and cream palette, printed on slightly textured aged paper. The composition shows 2 women in a dramatic action scene across the center: on the left, a woman with long wavy red hair in a white martial arts gi performs a very high side kick; on the right, a curvy woman in a black cowboy hat and a black lace bodysuit recoils and raises her arms defensively as the kick strikes her face. Use heavy black shadows, sharp angular shapes, screenprint-like ink coverage, and a graphic mid-century pulp poster aesthetic. Behind them, place a large diagonal red geometric banner spanning from upper left to lower right, plus 2 black speed lines on the left and 3 white speed lines on the right to emphasize motion. In the upper right corner, include a circular emblem with a stylized black-and-white screaming monkey or ape face inside a red disk. At the bottom, add oversized condensed block typography in an aggressive poster layout: the first line reads SCOTTISH RECIPE: in red and black, and the second line reads MINCE AND TATTIES in very large red, white, and black letters over a black diagonal banner. Keep the overall look satirical, confrontational, retro, and highly graphic, like a fake exploitation movie poster or anarchic punk zine cover.
entries.description: This prompt generates a stylized retro poster with two women in a dramatic fight pose and bold diagonal typography, ideal for fake pulp covers, satirical posters, or punk-inspired graphic art.

entries.title: Japanese Realist Romance Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Japanese realistic romance movie poster style, inspired by 'We Made a Beautiful Bouquet', a pair of young Japanese couple in their twenties standing in a daily urban scene (street or intersection), maintaining a subtle and realistic distance from each other, no physical contact, like a moment of gradual estrangement in a relationship. The mood is quiet and restrained, with unuttered emotions and a sense of time passing. The composition is the main visual of a movie, characters located at the bottom or to one side, retaining a large area of white space to emphasize space and atmosphere. Light is natural (overcast or dusk), low-saturation gray-blue, beige, and warm gray tones, realistic photography texture. The image has fine film grain and a slight sense of daily life, not intentionally aesthetic, not over-decorated, like a frame from a real movie. A small amount of natural floral materials can be added at the edges or foreground as a metaphor (restrained, not excessive, not decorative). Add the title '花束みたいな恋をした' in the white space area, thin Mincho font, simple and sparse layout; add 'We Made a Beautiful Bouquet' in a smaller font size below. Overall requirements: Real Japanese movie poster texture, artistic, restrained, everyday life, emphasizing relationships over romantic symbols, avoiding sugary romance, avoiding flower piles, avoiding internet celebrity aesthetics, avoiding crowded compositions, avoiding the 'exquisite but hollow' AI feel. Negative prompt: AI feel, over-aesthetic, sea of flowers, romantic filters, excessive lighting effects, high saturation, neon lights, intimate couple embrace, posed feel, photobooth composition, internet celebrity style, illustration feel, 3D rendering, cluttered elements. Japanese minimalist artistic movie poster style, inspired by 'Love Letter', winter snow scene, a close-up of a young woman's face, face close to or semi-buried in the snow, tiny snowflakes falling naturally. The composition is a restrained close-up side profile or slightly tilted face, with the person occupying a large proportion of the screen but not overly sharp, edges slightly softened or slightly out of focus. Expression is calmness after sadness, with tears or tear marks in the eyes, emotions introverted and restrained, like having just cried and slowly returning to silence, eyes not looking at the camera, with a sense of memory and void. Light is winter natural scattered light or overcast soft light, cool white, light gray, pale blue tones, low saturation, low contrast, no strong shadows, no dramatic lighting effects. The snow and air form a clean background. The image texture is between real photography and film, with fine grain, slight mist, slightly white or slightly overexposed, like an old photo faded by time or a movie still. Skin not overly detailed, no skin smoothing, no sharpening, no retouching. Asymmetric composition, face can be partially cropped, minimalist background, retaining appropriate white space. Add the minimalist title 'Love Letter' or 'ラヴレター' in the white space area, thin Mincho or thin serif font, wide character spacing, sparse layout, color light gray; add 'Love Letter' in a tiny font size below. Overall requirements: Real Japanese artistic movie poster texture, quiet, subtle, restrained, like a memory covered by snow, avoiding photo studio feel, avoiding internet celebrity aesthetics, avoiding refined filters, avoiding lighting effects, avoiding high contrast and high saturation, avoiding sharp digital feel, avoiding theatrical emotions, avoiding 'pretty but hollow'. Negative prompt: AI feel, skin smoothing, sharpening, HDR, high contrast, high saturation, dreamy light effects, lens flare, filter feel, photo studio style, internet celebrity face, posing, looking directly at the camera, exaggerated emotions, 3D rendering, illustration style, complex background.
entries.description: A highly detailed prompt for a Japanese movie poster aesthetic, focusing on composition, natural lighting, and emotional distance inspired by classic romance films.

entries.title: Epic Shiva Tandava Fire Dance
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A monumental mythological fantasy painting of Lord Shiva performing the Tandava in the center of a fiery sacred arena, full-body, dynamic dancing pose with one leg raised and the other foot pressing down on a fallen figure beneath him. Shiva has ash-blue skin, a powerfully muscular physique, long wild flowing dark hair exploding outward in all directions, a high matted topknot, and a white crescent moon tucked into the hair. His expression is intense and divine. A cobra is coiled around his neck, and he wears multiple rudraksha bead necklaces, bracelets, and armlets, large circular earrings, and sacred ornaments. His clothing is a tiger-skin loincloth with dramatic red-orange cloth sashes whipping through the air. One raised hand holds a small damaru drum, one front hand is lifted in a blessing gesture with the Om symbol visible on the palm, and another hand conjures a bright flame above the open palm. Behind his head is a large glowing circular halo inscribed repeatedly with Sanskrit mantra text, creating a radiant mandala effect. The setting is an apocalyptic Himalayan temple landscape with dark storm clouds, smoke, embers, rocky mountains, waterfalls, and ancient stone shrines and temple towers on both the left and right sides. A trident wrapped with red cloth stands upright on the left side of the scene. Around Shiva is a circle of exactly 10 worshippers and ascetics, split across both sides, shown chanting, kneeling, raising arms, carrying torches, and playing drums in devotion. Beneath Shiva is exactly 1 fallen dark-skinned male figure lying on the stone ground. The ground is cracked and molten, with a blazing ring of lava and fire encircling the dance platform. Use dramatic cinematic lighting, glowing orange firelight against deep charcoal shadows, highly detailed anatomy, intricate jewelry and textures, swirling hair and fabric motion, devotional epic fantasy realism, painterly brushwork, symmetrical central composition, ultra-detailed, high contrast, vertical poster format.
entries.description: A dramatic devotional fantasy artwork of Shiva dancing in a fiery sacred arena, ideal for mythological poster art, album covers, or spiritual concept illustration.

entries.title: Constructivist GPT Image 2.0 Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vintage political-propaganda-style poster collage on aged beige paper with a worn, slightly stained texture and torn-paper edges throughout. The composition is a bold vertical poster with a strong constructivist and Soviet-inspired graphic design, using only black, red, blue, yellow, and off-white. At the very top, centered in bold black sans-serif text, place the headline Image generation with a point of view. In the center, reserve a large vertical rectangular area as the dominant focal block, slightly taller than wide, filled with a plain muted beige-to-taupe gradient like a blank poster insert. Around it, build a torn-paper photomontage from 4 visible collage zones: on the left, a red paper field with a black-and-white cutout of a person in a dark coat seen from behind or in profile, next to fragments of French poster text; at the top behind the central rectangle, a partial black-and-white face or head fragment peeking out; on the right, a blue paper field with a black-and-white Paris-like street scene including 1 tall ornate lamppost, old buildings, 1 car, and 1 walking man; at the bottom center, a yellow torn-paper field with a cropped black-and-white figure holding a newspaper, wearing a striped shirt. Add a vertical strip of black rectangular blocks near the upper right edge of the central rectangle, like cut graphic bars. At the bottom, place the main title in huge heavy condensed typography: GPT Image, with "GPT" in black and "Image" in bright red. Beneath and to the right, add an enormous 2.0 in vivid blue. Below the left title area, add a rough horizontal black brushstroke underline. Centered near the bottom, in smaller black text, write Coming soon. The overall look should feel like mid-20th-century avant-garde poster art, rough torn collage, distressed print, high contrast halftone photography, imperfect paper registration, and bold editorial typography.

entries.title: Vintage Newspaper Front Page Generator
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create the most realistic front page design of a vintage newspaper featuring the main character. The layout should be made in the style of a real printed newspaper with a cinematic black-and-white aesthetic. The main photo should be prominently placed in the center, framed, like the image in the title of the article. The subject in the photo should remain unchanged and clearly distinguishable in natural light and slightly increased contrast in order to match the spectacular editorial style. Create a bold, attention-grabbing headline at the top (create a unique title that matches the spirit of the photo - it can be romantic, mysterious, funny, or dramatic). Add a smaller subtitle under it, which will look like a real newspaper caption. Add realistic newspaper elements: Columns of small text (in the style of lorem ipsum, but framed like real news) At the top is the fictitious name of the publication (for example, "The Daily Prompts", "AI Times" or similar - think creatively, according to the picture) Date, issue number and location Decorative lines, dividers, and vintage typography Small additional articles or captions to the main image Optional stamps, doodles, or editorial notes to add personality. Style: Black and white or slightly faded monochrome paper Fine paper texture, grain, and ink defects Small shadows and creases that mimic real printed paper The aesthetics of a clean but slightly worn vintage newspaper Mood: Give the design personality, expressiveness and plot, as if the plot is part of the main article. Aspect ratio: 4:5 or 1:1 High-detail, ultra-realistic hybrid of editorial photography and print design.
entries.description: A highly detailed prompt for creating realistic vintage newspaper designs with customizable headlines and cinematic black-and-white photography.

entries.title: Minimalist Film Noir Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Subject & Composition:

Central Figure: A sharp profile view of a man wearing a classic 1940s fedora and a formal suit.

Melting Effect: The lower half of the man's torso should dissolve or "drip" into long, vertical black ink streaks and splatters, creating a surreal, liquid-bleed effect against the background.

Graphic Element: A large, solid vibrant red circle is positioned directly behind the man's head and shoulders, creating a "halo" or "rising sun" motif that anchors the composition.

Style & Color Palette:

Color Scheme: A strict minimalist palette of True Red, Deep Black, and Off-White/Cream.

Photography Style: High-contrast, black and white film noir photography for the subject. The texture should look like a high-resolution fashion editorial with a shallow depth of field.

Background: A clean, slightly textured off-white paper or canvas background to give it a premium, physical poster feel.

Technical Details:

Lighting: Strong "Rembrandt" lighting to define the facial contours, emphasizing the bridge of the nose and the jawline with deep shadows.

Atmosphere: Somber, intellectual, and high-stakes. The design should feel modern yet period-accurate to the mid-20th century.

Framing: Vertical poster orientation (A-frame), with significant negative space on the left and right to emphasize the central vertical axis.

Aspect ratio is 9:16

entries.title: Cute Japanese Romcom Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A flashy Japanese romantic comedy movie poster in a cute-but-dramatic pop anime mascot style, designed like a theatrical film teaser. Center the composition on a full-body cartoon bunny girl mascot named パン子, with a large white face, black body and one black ear, one bright red ear, thick black outline, half-lidded glamorous eyes with long lashes, pink blush circles on her cheeks, a tiny red nose, a small tongue peeking out, and a pink bow with white polka dots on top of her head. She wears a sleeveless pink dress with white polka dots and a black scarf-like neck detail, posing with one hand near her cheek in a confident, slightly flirty stance. The background is a dreamy sunset waterfront city skyline with golden reflections on the water, pastel pink-orange-blue sky, sparkles, soft bokeh, and a ferris wheel on the left. Place 2 male silhouette figures in the midground, one on the left standing casually and one on the right in a suit-like pose, suggesting potential love interests. Add lush tropical flowers and leaves around the borders, especially pink hibiscus blossoms in the corners, plus floating hearts and glitter effects throughout. Use a bold, layered Japanese poster layout packed with decorative typography and stickers. At the top, handwritten-style Japanese text reads: 「笑って、泣いて、恋をして。アラサーの私、まだまだ諦めない!」 with pink emphasis and doodled heart lines. On the upper left, include a bright pink scalloped badge that says 「2026年 夏公開」. Along the right side, place vertical Japanese text: 「私の幸せ、探しにいきます。」. Near the lower left, add a pink ribbon label reading 「劇場版!」. Across the bottom center, create the large main title in bold decorative Japanese lettering: 「アラサー パン子の 婚活奮闘記」 with pink and dark navy text, white outlines, and a cute heart accent. Beneath it, add a pink slogan banner with yellow-highlighted text: 「恋に迷って、人生はもっとキラキラする♥」. Include small faux credits at the bottom in Japanese film-poster style. Around the lower area, place 4 small polaroid-style inset snapshots of the bunny character: 2 on the lower left and 2 on the lower right, each showing different cute situations such as a close-up pose, sitting at a cafe table, wearing sunglasses, or posing outdoors. Add a small notebook page labeled "Today's Mission" with checklist hearts in the lower left, and a plastic iced drink cup with straw plus sunglasses in the lower right. Overall feeling: feminine, comedic, inspirational, sparkly, over-the-top, and nostalgic, like a parody of a live-action romance film poster starring a mascot heroine. Use vivid pinks, peach sunset tones, sky blue, white, and navy, with glossy highlights and a polished promotional-poster finish.
entries.description: A sparkly Japanese-style theatrical poster for a mascot heroine romantic comedy, ideal for parody film promos, character branding, or social media key art.

entries.title: Gothic Anime Witch Library Ensemble
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A lavish dark fantasy anime illustration of 11 elegant young women gathered in a grand gothic library at night, composed like an elite magical academy coven portrait. The room is filled wall-to-wall with towering wooden bookshelves, rolling ladders, crimson velvet banners with occult gold sigils, carved paneling, candlelight, a warm table lamp on the far left, red upholstered armchairs and sofas, stacked antique books, potion bottles, crystal orbs, brass instruments, and a tall arched window showing a deep violet night sky. The overall palette is black, crimson, gold, and purple, with dramatic low-key lighting, rich shadows, glossy highlights, and a luxurious, sinister atmosphere. All 11 characters wear coordinated occult-school uniforms: black tailored jackets with gold embroidery and crest details, white shirts, red ties or ribbons, layered belts and chains, short skirts or fitted bottoms, black thigh-high stockings, and black capes lined in dark red. Place 3 seated prominently in the middle on ornate red chairs and sofa, 3 in the back row standing among the shelves, 3 in the front row on the floor or leaning close to the table, and 2 reclining at the far left and far right edges. Vary their hair colors and styles across the group, including blonde, silver, black, red, blue, brown, and purple; use long wavy hair, twin tails, straight long hair, side ponytail, and loose layered cuts. Give each woman a calm, confident, slightly dangerous expression, as if they are genius witches or aristocratic students. Count and include 6 clearly visible magical effects or props being actively handled: 1 red flame floating above a raised hand in the back center, 1 glowing purple orb held by a standing girl near the upper right center, 1 swirling purple magic circle over an open book at the lower left, 1 faint purple arcane flame near the lap of the seated silver-haired girl on the right-center, 1 dark violet smoky aura around the far-right reclined girl, and 1 glowing purple crystal lamp or alchemical vessel on the central coffee table. Also include 4 additional glass vessels in the foreground and side tables: 1 crystal ball at the bottom left, 1 tall red potion bottle at the bottom right, and 2 smaller laboratory bottles beside it. Add multiple open and closed grimoires across laps, tables, and the floor, with at least 8 visible books in total. The central focal character is a poised blonde girl seated in the largest armchair, legs crossed, hand near her face, framed as the leader. Render in highly detailed polished anime style, ultra-detailed fabrics, intricate gold trim, subtle facial shading, luminous eyes, cinematic composition, wide group shot, fantasy key art quality, moody gothic academia, magical sisterhood, sharp focus, ornate environment, no modern objects.
entries.description: This prompt generates a cinematic dark-academia anime group portrait of eleven stylish magical schoolgirls posed in an opulent gothic library, ideal for fantasy key art or ensemble character posters.

entries.title: Chinese Ink Fury Character Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic Chinese ink-wash fantasy portrait based on the single Chinese character 嗔, showing a male xianxia or wuxia warrior from the back in three-quarter profile, turning slightly to the side. He has long, windswept black hair tied in a high half-up topknot with an ornate dark metallic hair crown, with several thin red ribbons threaded through the hair and trailing in the wind. His clothing is a black embroidered robe with subtle gold patterning on the shoulder and collar, layered and heavy, with flowing fabric merging into the surrounding brushwork. The face is mostly obscured by angle and hair, creating a mysterious and intense mood. The overall composition is vertical poster art with a pale parchment background, textured with gray and black ink splashes, a large faded circular brushstroke halo behind the figure's head, and violent red paint streaks sweeping across the lower half and right side like blood-red calligraphy in motion. Use a limited palette of black, charcoal gray, parchment beige, and deep crimson red. Add 2 calligraphic text areas: a vertical poem column in black Chinese calligraphy on the upper left with a small red seal stamp beneath it, and a very large bold red Chinese character 嗔 painted at the lower left. Beside the large red character, place a vertical Romanized label reading CHEN. The style should feel like expressive ink painting mixed with ultra-detailed cinematic character illustration, with flying hair strands, splattered brush textures, emotional tension, and a dark, wrathful, elegant atmosphere.

entries.title: Dark Chinese Fantasy Desire Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark epic Chinese fantasy poster centered on the single gold calligraphy character 欲 dominating the upper left, rendered in huge textured brushed gold ink with rough edges and metallic leaf-like highlights. The scene is a cavernous infernal passage in deep black, bronze, and molten amber tones, lit by a blinding sacred glow at the top of a long stone staircase. At the top center-right stands an ornate golden lotus lamp or ritual chalice radiating holy light like a sun halo. In the lower center, show 1 lone ragged human figure from behind, slim and exhausted, wearing tattered dark robes shredded by the wind, reaching one arm upward toward the light while standing on a cracked stone path that becomes stairs. Flowing through the composition are 6 visible crimson silk ribbons or smoke-like fabric strands curling dramatically from left, right, and foreground, adding motion. Carve or inscribe 5 clearly visible Chinese characters onto broken stone slabs along the path and lower foreground: 情, 贪, 嗔, 痴, 慢, each glowing faintly in warm gold. Build the cave walls from writhing organic rock and shadow, with 3 large ghostly human faces emerging from the stone on the left and right sides, as if embodiments of temptation and suffering. Include 2 monstrous clawed hands reaching inward from the lower right toward the traveler. On the left side beneath the large title character, place 1 vertical block of elegant Chinese poem text in small gold calligraphy, plus 1 red seal stamp beside it. Along the bottom margin, add 1 horizontal line of small gold Chinese text with decorative dividers and the central highlighted character 心, plus 1 additional small red seal at the lower right. The overall style is cinematic, ultra-detailed, mythic, spiritual, and ominous, mixing Buddhist allegory, dark fantasy, and premium poster design; volumetric lighting, glowing dust, dramatic contrast, intricate brush typography, high detail, vertical composition.
entries.description: This prompt generates a dramatic vertical Chinese mythic poster with giant calligraphy, a lone seeker climbing toward a radiant relic, and symbolic stone inscriptions for use as concept art or literary poster imagery.

overall style is cinematic, ultra-detailed, mythic, spiritual, and ominous, mixing buddhist allegory, dark fantasy, and premium poster design; volumetric lighting, glowing dust, dramatic contrast, intricate brush typography, high detail, vertical composition. poster / flyer cinematic

entries.title: Cinematic Spinning Top Street Duel
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic live-action action scene in a narrow old European stone street at golden-hour sunset, shot from an extremely low, close-up perspective with a dramatic wide-angle lens. In the center-left foreground, a dynamic male fighter inspired by Luffy lunges forward in mid-motion, wearing a straw hat, an open red shirt, a light tank top, and dark pants. His body is twisted aggressively as he launches a spinning-top battle attack with a handheld launcher. In the right foreground, a sharply dressed gangster-like man in a dark suit and white shirt leans in, also firing a launcher, with two more suited men behind him and a crowd of onlookers filling the street. In the immediate foreground, exactly 2 spinning tops collide on a glossy dark surface, producing showers of bright orange sparks and multiple circular light trails that arc around them, emphasizing speed and impact. The environment is dense and atmospheric: weathered stone buildings rise on both sides, the street is packed with spectators, and a grand baroque cathedral dome and towers stand in the sunlit background. Use intense warm amber and copper lighting, deep shadows, high contrast, dust and spark particles, gritty texture, dramatic motion blur, shallow depth of field, and an epic blockbuster tone. The composition should feel like a hybrid of underground battle, street duel, and anime-inspired live-action adaptation, with kinetic energy, tension, and hyper-detailed realism.

entries.title: Surreal Futurist Japanese Collage Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dense surreal collage poster blending retro Japanese street culture, dystopian futurism, environmental collapse, and cosmic dream imagery in one vertically stacked composition. The image should feel like layered mixed-media street art made from torn posters, ink illustration, manga textures, watercolor washes, newspaper print, spray paint, and graphic design fragments. The overall palette combines deep midnight blues, black, cream paper tones, neon magenta, crimson red, cherry blossom pink, and industrial gray. In the upper left, show a large red sun behind Mount Fuji with cherry blossom branches crossing the corner, and a small airplane in the sky. Along the left side and lower left, depict a crowded Tokyo-like city street packed with pedestrians, glowing signs, dense buildings, and a tall cylindrical building with a smiley face near the top and a vertical sign reading AI IS WATCHING YOU. Include stylized Japanese-style signage on nearby buildings. Add a giant wave motif and a pagoda integrated into the urban scene. In the upper center, place a dark industrial skyline with multiple smokestacks releasing massive black clouds, transitioning into a giant astronaut floating forward with one hand reaching out. In the upper right, transform the sky into outer space with stars, a swirling purple-and-blue nebula, and a black hole. Beneath that, create a futuristic eco-city of sleek skyscrapers mixed with lush trees, cliffs, and cascading waterfalls. Add a glowing neon sign on the far right that reads DREAMING IS FREE. Near the astronaut, place a torn poster with the text THE FUTURE IS UNWRITTEN in large type and below it But we are the authors in smaller type. Across the center, layer floral elements including cherry blossoms and large roses around a partially obscured central human portrait to give the sense of fragmented identity. In the lower center, show a person from behind wearing a dark hooded jacket with graffiti-style text reading QUESTION EVERYTHING. Around them, include additional cutout portrait fragments, a Mondrian-inspired geometric block of red, blue, yellow, white, and black rectangles, a classical marble bust fragment, a white dove in flight, a small protest sign that reads EQUALITY ≠ EQUITY, and a seated figure looking toward the futuristic landscape. In the lower left corner, include part of a noir-style person in a dark hat and coat, and in the lower right, part of a manga-style female face in profile. Scatter graffiti, torn edges, ink splatters, layered paper textures, and poster remnants throughout. The composition should be extremely busy, cinematic, and thought-provoking, balancing hope and anxiety, tradition and technology, nature and urban overload, in the style of a high-detail contemporary collage mural.
entries.description: A richly layered mixed-media poster prompt for generating a dense editorial collage that merges Tokyo street life, space-age symbolism, protest art, and eco-futurist cityscapes.

entries.title: Anime Girl Reaching Through Flowers
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dreamy anime-style low-angle illustration of a young schoolgirl standing in a flower field under a vivid clear blue sky, viewed from near ground level as if the camera is among the blossoms looking up at her. She has a short platinum-blonde bob with soft bangs, bright blue eyes, pale skin, and a calm slightly serious expression. She wears a round yellow sunhat with a blue ribbon tied at the back, an oversized light blue smock-like dress with a white collar, a visible name tag pinned to her chest reading 兀華, and a mustard-yellow crossbody satchel. One hand is extended toward the viewer with the palm open, creating strong foreground foreshortening. Surround her with exactly 6 prominent flowers in the composition: 2 large white cosmos flowers in the left foreground, 1 large blue flower in the right foreground, 1 white flower in the upper right background, and 2 smaller blue blossoms near the bottom center. Use soft painterly watercolor textures, delicate linework, airy lighting, gentle depth of field, and a luminous pastel palette dominated by sky blue, white, and yellow. The mood should feel innocent, nostalgic, fresh, and slightly magical, like a children's book illustration mixed with high-end anime key art.

entries.title: Blue Football Legend Tribute Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic vertical football tribute poster in a monochrome royal-blue palette for Cruzeiro. Show 2 male footballers layered in the foreground, both wearing blue Cruzeiro home jerseys from different eras. The front player is larger, centered slightly right, shown from the waist up in a dynamic running pose with his right index finger raised, muscular build, serious triumphant expression, modern blue jersey with white shoulder stripes, white sponsor logos, and the club's white stars crest on the chest. The back player is slightly smaller, positioned left and behind, also in motion, wearing a vintage blue jersey with a retro white collar and a classic soda sponsor logo, evoking an earlier era of the club. Their faces should be generic and not identifiable. In the background, place a huge circular Cruzeiro crest centered behind them, a packed stadium crowd with blue lighting, and exactly 2 waving flags: one in the upper left with the club badge, and one in the upper right with large supporter text. Add atmospheric smoke, vignette shadows, and layered light effects for a heroic, celebratory sports-design look. Include exactly 4 Portuguese text elements integrated into the composition: on the left, "O INÍCIO DE UM FENÔMENO" in stylized white lettering; on the right, "O MAIOR DE TODOS" with a small crown icon; across the lower center in very large white brush-script, FENÔMENO; and at the very bottom in spaced uppercase text, ONTEM UM SONHO. HOJE UMA LENDA. with the last word highlighted in brighter blue. Add a handwritten signature under the main headline with the number 9. Use high-contrast sports poster compositing, gritty texture, sharp jersey fabric detail, dramatic rim lighting, and an epic fan-culture mood suitable for a club legend celebration.

entries.title: Epic FC Barcelona Heritage Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic vertical football tribute poster in a dark cinematic mixed-media style, combining fine-art portraiture, sports branding, textured grunge painting, and premium editorial typography. The central subject is a waist-up portrait of Rabindranath Tagore reimagined as an FC Barcelona icon, facing slightly to the right, with long wavy silver-gray hair, a long flowing beard, aged features, and a calm legendary presence. Dress him in a classic FC Barcelona home jersey with deep red and navy vertical stripes, visible Nike swoosh on the left side, and the FCB crest on the chest. Use moody rim lighting and painterly highlights around the hair and shoulders so the figure feels monumental and almost divine. Set the background as an abstract brush-texture composition in Barcelona colors, dark indigo, crimson, burgundy, and muted gold, with 3 major graphic elements behind the portrait: a large faded FC Barcelona crest near the top center, a vertical block of handwritten Bengali manuscript text on the left side, and a large gold handwritten signature-style script running vertically on the right. At the top left, place 5 lines of elegant serif text: the first line reads "RABINDRANATH", the second much larger line reads "TAGORE", the third line reads "1861-1941", the fourth line is the quote "Where the mind is without fear and the head is held high...", and the fifth line is a cursive signature reading "Rabindranath Tagore". In the middle-lower area, add 5 centered text lines in a refined poster layout: "MORE THAN A POET.", then a large gold handwritten line reading "A timeless spirit.", then "A CULER FOREVER.", then a thin horizontal red-and-blue accent line, and then a small centered FCB crest beneath it. At the bottom, show a wide view of Camp Nou at dusk with glowing stadium lights and a dramatic sunset horizon, packed stands, and a giant crowd mosaic reading exactly MES QUE UN CLUB. In the foreground place 1 football centered on the wet reflective pitch with the Barcelona crest visible on the ball. The entire image should feel like a luxury fan-made heritage poster, ultra-detailed, painterly, emotional, reverential, high contrast, textured, epic, and suitable for a premium social media football graphic or wall poster. Use a tall 2:3 poster composition with layered depth, subtle sparks, paint streaks, and gold accents. Optionally replace the visible club identity with FC Barcelona while preserving the same elite tribute-poster aesthetic.
entries.description: This prompt generates a cinematic football tribute poster blending a historical cultural icon with FC Barcelona branding for premium fan art, social posts, or dramatic sports prints.

entries.title: Cinematic Sci-Fi Action Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a hyper-realistic cinematic action movie poster at golden-hour sunset, showing a rugged adult male action hero standing on the shattered glass edge of a skyscraper rooftop high above a futuristic megacity. He is positioned on the left side of the frame in a powerful full-body pose, wearing a dark fitted T-shirt, black jeans, and a dark open jacket, with windswept short brown hair. His face is intentionally obscured with a smooth rectangular blur block, as if censored. In one hand he holds a glowing blue holographic device projecting a transparent sci-fi interface with maps, targeting graphics, and a digital countdown timer reading 00:18:43. The background features a dramatic skyline of tall modern towers stretching to the horizon, with the sun low in the center-right casting warm orange light across the city. Fill the sky with explosive blockbuster action: 1 large helicopter in the upper right exploding midair with fire, smoke, debris, and spinning rotor fragments; 1 damaged passenger aircraft on the lower right banking downward trailing flames and black smoke; and 2 fast military jets streaking across the upper left sky leaving bright missile trails. Add flying embers, sparks, drifting debris, and intense volumetric smoke clouds for a high-stakes disaster atmosphere. Place a huge metallic 3D movie title across the upper-middle right reading TIMEFALL, angled slightly with bold steel texture and cinematic shadowing. entries.title: Cinematic Shiba Squat Hero Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a hyper-detailed cinematic parody movie poster featuring an anthropomorphic Shiba Inu as an extreme bodybuilding powerlifting hero, centered in a full frontal deep squat while holding a massively overloaded barbell across his shoulders. The dog has a realistic Shiba Inu head with a calm, confident expression, warm orange-and-cream fur, upright ears, and direct eye contact. The body is exaggeratedly muscular and humanlike, with huge deltoids, chest, arms, abs, quads, and calves, rendered with glossy dramatic highlights and dense texture in the fur and skin. He wears only tight black lifting shorts and a dark lifting belt. The squat stance is low and powerful, knees bent wide, feet planted on a wet reflective rooftop or industrial platform at night. Put a modern city skyline in the background with illuminated skyscrapers, bluish haze, smoke, and two bright stadium floodlights in the upper left and upper right creating strong rim light and a heroic sports-arena mood. The composition should be perfectly centered and symmetrical, with the barbell extending horizontally across the frame and stacked with many large black weight plates on both sides. Use a high-contrast teal, amber, black, and gold color palette with intense cinematic grading, sharp focus on the character, and atmospheric glow around the lights. Add stylized poster typography: at the very top, a gold all-caps tagline reading NO PAIN. MUCH GAIN. SUCH LEGEND.. Add 2 blocks of small white Japanese copy, 1 on the left of the character and 1 on the right, each set in 2 lines. At the bottom, place a gigantic cracked stone-textured gold title in all caps reading SQUAT HERO. Beneath it, add a red all-caps subtitle reading LEG DAY IS DESTINY.. Add a small red stamp-like Japanese label near the lower right of the title. Include dense tiny mock film-poster credits in white across the lower center, a ratings box in the lower left, 3 tiny studio or audio logos in the lower right, and a centered release line near the bottom reading COMING SOON TO A GYM NEAR YOU. Make it look like a polished blockbuster action-comedy sports film poster with absurdly epic intensity, photoreal rendering, dramatic shadows, volumetric smoke, reflective ground, and premium theatrical poster design.

entries.title: Juventus Cinematic Player Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic luxury sports poster for Bernardo Silva as a Juventus football star, in a dark cinematic black-and-gold editorial style. Vertical composition, high contrast, moody stadium atmosphere, premium poster design with layered photomontage. The background is a massive waving Juventus flag filling the upper half of the image, black fabric with broad white stripes and a large metallic gold Juventus "J" crest on the right side, topped by exactly 3 gold stars. In front of the flag, place an oversized close-up half-body portrait of the player wearing a classic Juventus home kit, facing slightly left, with wet textured hair, visible neck tattoos, dramatic rim lighting, and the face partially obscured by shadow for a mysterious heroic look. In the foreground, place a full-body action pose of the same player running forward with a soccer ball at his feet on a floodlit pitch, centered near the bottom, wearing the black-and-white striped Juventus jersey with white shorts, white socks, black boots, gold number 20 on the shorts, gold Adidas details, and the Jeep sponsor logo clearly visible. The stadium should wrap across the lower half with bright white floodlights, dark packed stands, light fog, and subtle smoke near the ground. Use elegant magazine-poster typography integrated into the composition: top left small gold text "JUVENTUS" and "FOUNDED 1897", with exactly 3 gold stars beneath; along the upper left a vertical list of 4 words in white caps: "CLASS", "VISION", "INTELLIGENCE", "WORK RATE"; beneath that a gold handwritten signature and the year split across two lines as "20" and "26"; center-left large serif player name text with the first name smaller and the last name huge, reading "BERNARDO" and "SILVA" in white; below that smaller gold text "JUVENTUS"; lower right exactly 3 gold stars above 3 stacked white words: "TRADITION", "PASSION", "GLORY"; bottom center exactly 3 gold stars above the phrase "THE OLD LADY" and smaller text "SINCE 1897". Color palette limited to black, white, charcoal, and metallic gold. Add subtle rain haze, fabric texture, vignette, glowing highlights on the crest and text, and a polished Champions League poster aesthetic.
entries.description: A premium black-and-gold football poster featuring a Juventus player in layered portrait and action poses, ideal for club-themed athlete edits and social media sports graphics.

entries.title: Dark Anime Legends Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic dark-anime crossover poster titled DARK LEGENDS, showing 4 iconic male antihero figures standing in a ruined gothic nightmare city at night beneath an enormous blood-red full moon. The composition is a wide dramatic group shot with the characters lined up across the foreground, each facing a slightly different direction with confident, ominous body language. On the far left, 1 soldier-like young man with short dark hair wears a dark green hooded military cloak billowing in the wind, visible tactical harness straps and gear around his waist, and holds 2 steel blades pointed downward; a winged insignia is visible on the back of his cloak. In the center-left, 1 tall white-haired man with spiky hair wears a sleek high-collar black outfit and stands casually with one hand in his pocket, looking dominant and calm. In the center-right, 1 slim brown-haired young man in a wrinkled white button-up shirt holds 1 black notebook close to his chest with the visible cover text "Death Note," posing with quiet intelligence. On the far right, 1 pale white-haired ghoul-like young man wears torn dark clothing; one glowing red eye is visible and monstrous red-black fleshy tendrils coil outward behind and beside him in 2 large swirling masses. The background is filled with towering ruined cathedral spires and shattered gothic skyscrapers, with many windows glowing crimson from within. The sky is stormy, cloud-choked, and nearly black, lit by the giant red moon centered high behind the group, creating a backlit halo effect and strong rim lighting. Use a dark palette of black, charcoal, deep crimson, and muted steel gray, with high contrast, gritty textures, subtle bloodlike embers, and a hyper-detailed illustrated anime style. Add distressed epic serif typography across the bottom spelling DARK LEGENDS in huge cracked stone-like letters with red glow and weathered texture. The overall feeling is apocalyptic, stylish, menacing, and mythic, like a premium movie or game crossover key art.
entries.description: A dramatic gothic crossover-style anime poster featuring four dark male characters in a ruined city under a blood moon, ideal for cinematic key art or promotional poster generation.

entries.title: Dark Anime Villains Crossover Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark, cinematic anime villain poster in an ultra-detailed gothic horror style, arranged as a single dramatic collage against a ruined infernal city. Use a wide landscape composition with a black, crimson, and electric violet palette, heavy smoke, ash, embers, magical lightning, and chaotic painterly energy. Feature 4 major villain figures. In the center foreground, a massive obese pirate emperor with a huge grin, wild black beard, open red captain coat, bare scarred chest and belly, layered necklaces, belt, and multiple pistols tucked at his waist, holding 2 flintlock pistols outward in a triumphant pose. Behind him at upper center, a tall pink muscular demon-like humanoid with a smooth head and a single curled head tentacle, standing with arms slightly spread, glowing with purple aura and lightning. On the left foreground, a pale long-haired Japanese swordsman in loose light robes, head bowed slightly, surrounded by a giant coiled serpent rising behind him with open mouth; add the vertical Japanese text "大蛇丸" near this figure and the vertical text "魔人ブウ" near the upper-center figure. On the right, a tall elegant demon lord in layered dark kimono-like robes, long flowing hair, calm sinister posture, framed by 8 smaller dark red moons plus 1 large full red moon above the head, for a total of 9 moons; add the vertical Japanese text "黒ひげ" near the pirate and "鬼舞辻無惨" near the right figure. The background should be a hellish apocalypse of shattered towers, burning ruins, and shadowy architecture fading into smoke. At the bottom, place huge aggressive brush-painted title text reading RISE OF VILLAINS in blood red with magenta highlights, rough torn edges, and glowing texture. Make the whole image feel like an epic crossover key art poster, extremely high contrast, ominous, supernatural, and menacing.

entries.title: Epic Shonen Crossover Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A hyper-detailed cinematic anime crossover poster featuring 4 legendary shonen-inspired heroes charging forward in a single epic battle composition under a dramatic apocalyptic sky. The scene is wide, symmetrical, and explosively energetic, with a glowing break in the storm clouds at the top center sending intense golden sun rays downward across the characters. From left to right: a blond ninja-inspired teenage hero in an orange-and-black outfit with a forehead protector, crouched in an attack stance and forming a glowing spinning energy orb in one hand, surrounded by orange chakra flames and several floating black spheres behind him; a muscular black-haired martial artist in an orange gi at left-center, twisting mid-strike while charging a bright blue energy sphere in his hand, wrapped in crackling blue aura and electric arcs; a lean pirate-inspired young man at right-center wearing a straw hat, sleeveless red vest, blue shorts, and sandals, lunging forward with a fierce grin, one arm extended, with white steam-like energy curling around his body; a dark-haired swordsman at far right in a flowing black-and-red checkered haori, drawing or swinging a katana with a sweeping arc of fiery red-orange energy around him. The background is a chaotic fantasy battlefield of shattered rock, sparks, lightning, embers, molten light, and swirling elemental effects, with orange fire dominating the left and right edges, cool blue energy concentrated around the martial artist, and white vapor around the pirate hero. Use extreme contrast, ultra-saturated colors, sharp inked anime linework, painterly textures, dynamic foreshortening, intense motion blur in the effects, and premium poster-quality rendering. Add a massive title across the bottom foreground reading SHONEN LEGENDS in oversized distressed brush lettering, bright yellow-gold with thick black shadows and rough torn edges, partially overlapping the characters and debris. Make it feel like a blockbuster key art poster for legendary shonen anime crossover, with thunderous energy, heroic rivalry, and unstoppable momentum.
