entries.title: Fantasy Library Poster for Epix & Ria
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic fantasy anime poster in a tall vertical composition, showing two childlike adventurer characters standing in a vast magical library-cathedral with impossibly high gothic arches, towering bookshelves on both sides, floating pages, glowing dust, and a grand staircase rising in the center toward a radiant portal-like window filled with intricate celestial magic-circle patterns. The viewpoint is low and dramatic, looking slightly upward, with both characters reaching one hand toward the viewer in an inviting gesture. On the left is a slightly taller child with short silver-white hair, soft bangs, and large green leaf-like ear ornaments or animal-like ears, wearing a navy hooded jacket over a warm orange top, dark pants, sturdy boots, and a black crossbody satchel; keep the face partially obscured by framing or angle. On the right is a shorter child with a matching design language, short silver-white bob hair with green-tinted ends, large teal-green eyes, and the same green leaf-like ear features, wearing a navy hooded jacket, orange inner layer, short dark bottoms, boots, and a mauve-purple shoulder bag decorated with small charms including a star. Between their outstretched hands, create a bright burst of magical light where two energies meet: luminous cyan-blue streams curling around the left character and warm pink-gold streams curling around the right character, with spark particles and ribbon-like trails. Split the lighting mood into cool blue on the left side and warm golden-magenta on the right side, blending at the center into a brilliant white flare. Add dense atmospheric detail: glowing motes, magical filaments, floating sheets of paper, layered architecture, and a sense of wonder and discovery. At the top, include centered Japanese tagline text in elegant white serif style: "わかることと、感じること。2つの力で世界をひらく。" At the bottom, place a very large luminous gold serif title reading "Epix&Ria" with ornate cinematic poster typography. High-detail, polished key visual, fantasy adventure film poster, richly textured, radiant, emotional, awe-inspiring, premium illustrated promotional art.

entries.title: UFC-Style Women's Fight Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic UFC fight-poster style sports promotion for UFC 305, designed as a high-contrast vertical matchup graphic with two female MMA fighters facing inward in orthodox guard poses. The left fighter is a fit blonde woman with shoulder-length messy beach-wave hair, tan skin, a black sports bra, black UFC gloves, and black fight shorts, shown from upper thigh to head, turned slightly right. The right fighter is a fit dark-haired woman with long straight black hair, tan skin, a black sports bra, black UFC gloves, and black fight shorts, shown from upper thigh to head, turned slightly left, with a large detailed black-and-gray tattoo sleeve on her right arm and script tattoo text on the inner upper arm. Both fighters are sweaty, intensely lit, and centered close together with fists raised near chest height. Use a split background: fiery orange sparks and smoke on the left, icy blue-white sparks and haze on the right, with a dark black center seam. At the top center, place a black rectangular logo box with gold trim containing the gold text UFC 305. Beneath it, in stacked condensed white uppercase type, add the tagline: "TWO ICONS. ONE OCTAGON." Along the far left edge, place the surname "SWEENEY" vertically in large distressed gold letters; along the far right edge, place the surname "FOXX" vertically in large distressed silver-gray letters. In the center, overlay huge distressed white condensed sans-serif typography with the matchup names stacked exactly as SYDNEY SWEENEY above a small gold "VS" and MEGAN FOXX. Below that, add a small gold subtitle reading "BANTAMWEIGHT BOUT". At the bottom center, show a small realistic UFC octagon cage seen from a slightly elevated front angle, embedded into the poster. In front of the cage, place a black date card with gold trim containing stacked gold text: "JUNE 14", "SATURDAY", "10PM ET / 7PM PT". Below the card, add white text "LIVE ON" and the ESPN+ logo. Bottom left, add small gold and white ticket text reading "TICKETS ON SALE APRIL 25" with the Ticketmaster logo beneath. Bottom right, add the Rogers Arena logo and white text "ROGERS ARENA" with gold text "VANCOUVER, BC" below. Professional manga tankobon cover art.

- High contrast color palette with vibrant accent glows.
- Composition: Vertical 2:3 aspect ratio, balanced for a book spine and front cover.

entries.title: Cinematic Anime Movie Poster Prompt
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
16:9 theatrical anime movie poster. Boundary area of a night forest. In the center-left foreground, a Japanese girl in her late teens. Black hair ponytail, slender, wearing a dark-colored practical winter outdoor jacket and a research backpack. 3/4 rear view showing her back, looking back over her shoulder. Calm tension and strong will.
Above the forest in the upper right, a giant spherical paranormal phenomenon emitting white-blue light. An energy sphere intertwined with countless luminous filaments and electrical outlines. Foggy white light inside, surrounded by fine pale blue particle light. Mt. Fuji emitting plumes of smoke in the far left background. In the middle ground, forbidden entry tape with Japanese warnings, realistic disaster response staff, and emergency vehicles on both sides. No military feel required.
Ground is muddy mountain forest, with shallow water streams and wet ground reflecting the light. Tall trees on the left and right frame the scene. Sky is full of stars, with subtle city lights at the foot of Mt. Fuji. An atmosphere where mystery and disaster coexist.
Triangular composition of the girl, the giant light sphere, and Mt. Fuji. Slightly low cinematic viewpoint. The girl and the light sphere are clearly shown as the two main protagonists. Based on cold night blue, the main light source is the white-blue emission from the giant light sphere. Strong rim light on the trees, ground, water surface, and the girl. Secondary light sources are starlight and the faint orange glow of the distant eruption. The girl's face is not too dark and her expression is readable. High contrast.
High-end key visual for the latest Japanese theatrical anime. Movie poster grade completion. High-density, delicate background, precise light expression, atmospheric perspective, beautifully organized anime drawing leaning towards realism. Overall tone is dark navy, white-blue emission, and faint volcanic orange. Solemn, unsettling, mysterious, and high drama.
Small Japanese copy in the top center: "It was not a miracle. It was a disaster that connected to the beyond."
Large elegant English serif title in bottom center with pale light close to white: "Re:Connect Worlds"
Directly below it, a small Japanese subtitle: "Forest of Boundaries"
Characters are accurate and highly readable. Do not include characters, logos, or watermarks other than specified. Do not include unnecessary people, monsters, mechs, or unnecessary flashy particles or noise.

entries.title: Cyberpunk FPV Drone Racer Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A gritty cyberpunk anime illustration of Miyamoto Iori, a 19-year-old FPV drone racer, standing in three-quarter back view inside a vast ruined industrial racing arena at night. She has black hair tied in a messy high ponytail, pale skin, and wears a glossy black tactical flight suit covered in patches, straps, cables, and sponsor markings. A massive hard-shell backpack radio rig with long antennas and decals is mounted on her back, and an ID badge hangs from her waist. Her face is mostly hidden in profile and partially obscured, creating a mysterious mood. The environment is dense with steel beams, catwalks, hanging wires, broken windows, concrete pillars, wet reflective floors, and layered signage. Multiple FPV racing drones are actively flying through the arena, leaving bright curved light trails in white, cyan, and red that loop through the scene and guide the eye into depth. Include exactly 6 visible drones in the distance and midground. Add large weathered signs reading "SECTION C", "FREEDOM, SPEED, ONLY", and "LAP 07 KEEP FLYING", plus a vertical character info block in the upper left with the text "MIYAMOTO IORI", "AGE: 19", "FPV DRONE RACER", the Japanese quote "私は、飛ぶ者だ。" and the English line "I am the one who flies." Also include a short stat list reading "RANKING // 2", "WINS // 11", "PODIUMS // 23", and "STYLE // GHOST". On her suit and gear, show readable decals including "AXIS", "Fly Beyond", "BRX", "IORI 027", and an ID card labeled "PILOT MIYAMOTO IORI". Use a dark monochrome palette with steel gray, black, and muted brown, punctuated by neon racing trails and small white light sources. Cinematic backlighting, rain-soaked reflections, heavy texture, intricate linework, urban decay, high contrast, moody atmosphere, highly detailed anime-concept-art aesthetic, vertical poster composition.

entries.title: Anime Ensemble Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A polished Japanese anime theatrical movie poster in vertical one-sheet format, painted with high-end cinematic detail and luminous natural lighting. The composition features exactly 6 youths arranged in a dramatic ensemble portrait against a bright blue sky with soft clouds, distant white birds, reflective water, lush green foliage in the foreground, and a partially overgrown futuristic eco-city ruin on the left background, blending nature and advanced science. At the top center, two main characters stand back-to-back as the visual anchor: on the left, a tall teenage boy with messy short white hair, pale skin, a calm serious expression, and a white lab coat over a shirt and tie, shown in side profile facing left; on the right, a tall teenage girl with black hair in a neat bun, pale skin, a composed expression, and a dark school-uniform-inspired outfit with a white collar and ribbon at the neck, shown in side profile facing right. Below them in the center foreground stands a schoolgirl with a straight black bob haircut, pale skin, and a black uniform with a large deep red bow, facing forward with a quiet, introspective presence. On the mid-left stands a dark-haired teenage boy in a dark suit and tie, shown in side profile facing left. On the mid-right stands a tousle-haired brown-haired teenage boy wearing a blue hoodie under a dark jacket, shown in side profile facing right. On the lower left stands a light-brown-haired teenage girl with long soft waves, wearing a pale pink cardigan over a light top, one hand near her chest, looking gentle and slightly anxious. Make every character anatomically consistent and clearly separated, with elegant hair rendering, refined fabric folds, and emotionally restrained expressions. Use warm rim light and soft atmospheric glow, with subtle lens bloom and painterly highlights to create a hopeful, contemplative mood. Include Japanese poster typography integrated into the design: a vertical tagline on the upper left reading "その選択が、未来の景色を変える。", a vertical tagline on the upper right reading "自然と、科学と、心をつなぐ旅へ。", small text above the title reading "劇場アニメーション映画", a large glowing main title near the lower center reading "エコテイクノート", a subtitle below it reading "― 未来への選択 ―", exactly 3 award laurels arranged in a row beneath the title with small Japanese festival text inside each, a row of exactly 6 character name labels near the bottom above the credits, dense small Japanese credit lines across the bottom, social and website text in very small print, and a large release date at the lower right reading "8.22 FRI" with a smaller line below reading "全国ロードショー". Keep the overall look like a premium contemporary anime key visual poster for an emotional science-and-nature coming-of-age ensemble film.

entries.title: Gothic Sorceress in Ruined Cathedral
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark gothic fantasy scene inside a vast abandoned cathedral, vertical full-body composition. In the exact center stands a mysterious sorceress in an elegant Victorian-inspired black gown with a fitted corset bodice, intricate silver embroidery, sheer lace sleeves, long draping lace panels from the arms, black gloves, and a long trailing skirt. Her hair is styled in a neat dark updo with a subtle ornamental hairpiece, and she wears delicate jewelry. She holds an open spellbook in one hand and raises the other hand in a poised spellcasting gesture. Surround her with low-lying mist and curling smoke. The cathedral interior is immense and decayed, with towering pointed arches, ribbed vaulted ceilings, cracked stone floors, broken tombs or altars on both sides, and thick twisted roots spreading across the ground and wrapping around the stone structures. Place exactly 2 large gargoyle statues perched symmetrically on elevated side structures, one on the left and one on the right, looming over the scene. Add many black candles with warm orange flames scattered across the foreground and midground, creating ritual ambience. In the background, show tall stained-glass windows with cold bluish daylight streaming through them in dramatic god rays, contrasting with the candlelight. Mood is haunting, arcane, cinematic, solemn, and highly detailed, with realistic textures, deep shadows, volumetric lighting, atmospheric haze, dark blue-gray color palette, and ultra-detailed gothic architecture.

entries.title: Dark Gothic Ritual in Cathedral
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic dark fantasy scene inside a vast gothic cathedral at night, centered on a mysterious woman in a floor-length black ceremonial gown standing in the middle of a glowing occult circle. The composition is perfectly symmetrical and frontal, with the woman placed dead center beneath a huge rose window and a bright full moon visible through the stained glass. She wears an ornate, form-fitting black gown with lace, embroidered filigree, semi-sheer sleeves, a corseted bodice, and a long flowing train spreading across the stone floor. Her pose is regal and ritualistic, arms slightly extended at her sides with open hands, as if summoning smoke or dark magic. Her face is obscured and indistinct, with dark updo hair and a high gothic collar or headpiece. Around her feet is a large circular sigil inscribed in glowing amber-gold lines, with intricate symbols and concentric rings. Place exactly 30 black candles of varying heights around the circle and foreground, all lit, with warm flames casting low orange highlights. Fill the air with drifting smoke and mist, especially around her hands, the lower floor, and the side aisles. The cathedral interior is towering, shadowy, and highly detailed, with ribbed vaults, pointed arches, weathered stone, elaborate carvings, and deep blue-black darkness. On the left and right sides, include exactly 2 massive gargoyle or demon statues perched on ornate pedestals, one per side, leaning inward protectively or menacingly. Behind the woman, a raised altar and clusters of additional candles recede into darkness. Lighting is moody and high-contrast, dominated by cold moonlight from above and warm candlelight from below, creating metallic highlights on the dress and architecture. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, dramatic volumetric fog, gothic horror atmosphere, occult elegance, epic scale, sharp textures, realistic shadows, and a haunting, majestic mood.

entries.title: Blockbuster Anime Sky Fantasy Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A breathtaking Japanese anime movie poster in the style of a blockbuster theatrical key visual, ultra-detailed and emotionally grand, with a delicate luminous sky reminiscent of prestige modern anime cinema. The scene shows 2 characters from behind on a flower-covered cliff overlooking a glowing coastal fantasy city at sunset and twilight: a teenage boy in a dark school uniform with a loosened tie and windblown short dark hair stands on the left, and a teenage girl in a long flowing pale dress with very long silver-white hair stands on the right. Both face the horizon in awe. Above them, an enormous celestial sky fills most of the composition, painted with vivid deep blue, indigo, violet, magenta, and gold clouds, a brilliant comet-like meteor streak slashing diagonally from upper center toward the horizon, scattered stars, sparkling particles, and a glowing circular magic-like ring constellation in the upper right sky. The sea and city below shimmer with reflected light, with slender fantasy skyscrapers and towers rising from the coastline and a radiant sunlit gap at the center horizon. Foreground flowers are saturated blue and purple with glowing highlights, and white-pink petals drift through the air. Use dramatic rim light, cinematic backlighting, lens-glow sparkle effects, highly polished anime rendering, crisp linework, atmospheric depth, and a vertical poster composition. Include Japanese poster typography integrated into the design: giant embossed gold headline text across the top reading 興行収入100億円突破, a gold subheadline block at upper left reading 大ヒット上映中, a vertical white tagline on the upper right reading あの日、君と見上げた空が、世界を変える。, and a very large glowing white-lavender Japanese film title at the bottom center reading 星屑の約束. Beneath the title, add small elegant romanized subtitle text reading Hoshikuzu no Yakusoku, plus dense small production credits, cast lines, website text, release-copy lines, and cinema format logos along the bottom edge in authentic Japanese movie-poster layout. Add 2 gold laurel emblems flanking the top headline, one on the left and one on the right. Make it feel like a fictional anime film that earned 10 billion yen at the box office, sweeping, romantic, bittersweet, magical, and destined to make audiences cry.

entries.title: Little Prince Shanghai Rain Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic vertical poster inspired by The Little Prince, set on a rainy city street at blue hour in modern Shanghai. In the center foreground, a small child in Little Prince styling stands in side profile facing right, with messy curly golden-blond hair, a long flowing mustard-gold scarf blowing dramatically to the left, and a muted sage-green ankle-length coat tied at the waist. The child holds 1 single red rose upright in both hands. The face is simplified and softly obscured, with no detailed facial features. The wet pavement reflects neon lights, traffic, and the evening sky. In the background, the Oriental Pearl Tower rises softly out of the dusk with glowing pinkish lights, surrounded by blurred city buildings, storefronts, pedestrians, and car headlights, creating a dreamy bokeh urban atmosphere. On the upper right, include 1 street sign mounted on a traffic pole reading 星球大道\nPLANET AVE.. Also on the pole, include 1 red pedestrian traffic light showing a standing human figure. On the left side, place large handwritten brush-style Chinese quote text in warm pale yellow: 重要的东西,\n用眼睛是看不见的。, with a smaller signature line beneath reading -- 小王子. Scatter a few tiny hand-drawn star doodles and 1 small planet doodle around the text. Near the lower left, add 3 lines of small warm-yellow Chinese dedication text above a stylized script title reading Le Petit Prince. On the right side near the pole, tape 1 small paper note with handwritten Chinese text about not seeing truly important things with the eyes, plus a simple doodle. Add 1 vertical storefront sign on the left reading "咖啡". The composition should feel poetic, nostalgic, gentle, and premium, like an art-house movie poster or literary inspirational street poster. Color palette: twilight blue sky, amber street glow, soft gold typography, muted green clothing, vivid red rose. Shallow depth of field, glossy rain reflections, soft cinematic lighting, highly detailed illustration with realistic urban atmosphere and storybook character design.

entries.title: Epic Gugugaga Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic fictional movie poster for GUGUGAGA, designed like an epic prestige film one-sheet with dark golden-brown cinematic lighting and a serious award-winning tone. The composition is vertical and symmetrical. In the center, a plush black-and-white penguin mascot with a round body, big glossy eyes, a yellow beak, and small yellow feet is held aloft in a ritual-like presentation by multiple African tribal warriors surrounding it from all sides. Exactly 6 visible warriors are arranged around the penguin, with muscular arms reaching inward and upward to support the mascot, creating a radial halo of hands and bodies. Their skin is richly lit with warm highlights, and they wear colorful beaded necklaces, bracelets, headbands, and traditional adornments. The background is a dense, dimly lit ceremonial setting with warm firelight, earthy shadows, fabric banners, and a textured amber glow, giving the scene an ancient, mythic atmosphere. At the very top, centered Japanese copy reads: 「知られざるググガガの誕生秘話。」 On the left side, a vertical Japanese tagline reads: 「モフモフが、世界を変えた。」 On the right side, place exactly 5 stacked gold laurel award blocks with Japanese text, each framed by laurel wreaths. The 5 award texts are: 「第38回 モフモフ オブザイヤー 受賞」, 「アフリカン タッチ映画祭 グランプリ」, 「世界ぬいぐるみ 協会賞 最優秀賞」, 「国際もふもふ アカデミー賞 主演賞」, and 「ぬいぐるみが 選ぶ映画賞 観客賞」. Across the lower middle, place the huge metallic gold serif title GUGUGAGA, with smaller gold serif subtitle beneath it reading THE MOVIE. Below that, add a small centered line reading: STARRING (声の出演). Along the lower section, include exactly 5 circular cast medallions with tiny laurel-like frames and labels beneath them. The 5 cast items are: a fluffy white pomeranian-like dog labeled 「モフリン」, a giraffe labeled 「カワウーソン」, an orange tabby cat labeled 「ニャンバラ」, a blue round toy-like character labeled 「トゥクトゥク星人」, and a scholarly baboon or monkey figure labeled 「バオバブ先生」. Beneath the cast row, add small Japanese-style credit lines including director, screenplay, and music in a fine poster-credit style. At the bottom center, display a large gold release date line reading 7.7 FRI ROADSHOW. Along the bottom edge, include small production and distribution credits reading 「制作:gugugagaTokyo」 and 「配給:AI Studio Tokyo」. Put a black-and-white QR code in the bottom-right corner. Use ultra-detailed photorealistic poster rendering, dramatic contrast, gilded typography, luxurious texture, prestige cinema marketing design, and a tongue-in-cheek parody of an Oscar-bait adventure drama.

entries.title: Warm Penguin Fantasy Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A heartwarming fictional movie poster in a soft cinematic Japanese drama style, photographed at golden hour with dreamy backlight and gentle lens glow. A person seen from behind and slightly below, wearing a cozy cream knit sweater, lifts a plush penguin toy high toward a bright sunset sky. The plush is centered and fills much of the frame: black fuzzy body, white belly, small yellow beak, yellow feet, outstretched stubby wings, and a humanlike anime-girl face framed by short dark brown bobbed hair with hairpins, creating a cute surreal mascot character. The background is an outdoor field with warm bokeh trees and a glowing sun low on the horizon, all in creamy beige, honey, peach, and gold tones. Several white feathers float through the air; show exactly 5 visible feathers scattered around the composition. Make the mood tender, nostalgic, hopeful, and slightly fantastical, like a family fantasy film poster. Add Japanese poster typography integrated into the design: at the top center, the tagline "この出会いが、世界をやさしく変えていく。"; along the left side vertically, "ずっと、いっしょだよ。"; near the bottom center, a large handwritten glowing title "GUGUGAGA" in warm white neon-like script with a small pink heart above it; directly below in elegant serif capitals, "THE MOVIE". Beneath that, place a pink ribbon banner with the Japanese line "ずっと、いっしょだよ。". At the very bottom, add small centered Japanese credit text in a realistic film-poster layout, including cast and staff lines and production/distribution credits; include "gugugagaTokyo" and "AI Studio Tokyo" on the final line. Use a vertical one-sheet poster composition, polished commercial key art, shallow depth of field, soft filmic contrast, premium cinematic lighting, sentimental fantasy-drama aesthetic.

entries.title: Japanese Fantasy Winged Pig Film Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic Japanese fantasy movie poster in a painterly, ultra-detailed cinematic illustration style. The poster is vertically composed like a theatrical key visual, with a warm gold title at the bottom and multiple emotional vignettes layered into one unified scene. The central character is a small fluffy pig-like creature with soft pale cream fur, oversized pink inner ears, a tiny snout, a curled tail, and large feathered angel wings glowing with golden light. It stands upright on a rooftop or elevated wooden platform overlooking a vast Tokyo cityscape at sunset, holding a whiskey glass in one hoof with the other hoof on its hip, posed like a weary but resilient middle-aged salaryman. In the distance are the Tokyo skyline, water, bridges, floating lanterns, and Tokyo Tower glowing orange-red under a radiant sky filled with clouds lit in gold, peach, violet, and deep blue. Around the center are 4 supporting vignette scenes: 1) top left, the winged pig sits alone at a narrow bar counter in a nostalgic lantern-lit Japanese alley at night, looking exhausted and melancholy, with a bottle and a glass nearby; 2) top center, the winged pig sits drinking with 2 human adults in an izakaya-like nightlife setting, warm lights surrounding them; 3) upper right, the winged pig walks away down railway tracks toward a brilliant ocean sunset, carrying a small suitcase, seen from behind; 4) left middle, the winged pig walks alone through a rain-slick neon-lit city street at night, seen from behind, surrounded by glowing signs and reflections. The whole image should feel bittersweet, magical, lonely, and hopeful, like a prestige animated film poster about adulthood, solitude, and emotional survival. Use lush lighting, dense environmental detail, sparkling reflections, glowing lanterns, cinematic atmosphere, and rich blue-orange color contrast. Include Japanese poster typography integrated into the art: at the very top, the tagline "ひとりで生きてきた。だけど、ひとりじゃ涙は止まらない。"; above the title, the line "独身オヤジ、最後の青春。"; a very large main title at the bottom center reading "翼のオヤジ" in bold brushed calligraphic characters; below it, the tagline "笑って、泣けて、明日また頑張れる。この冬、いちばんやさしい奇跡。"; on the bottom right, a circular badge reading "秋公開" and "今"; add small fine-print credits across the lower edge in the style of a Japanese film poster. Include 2 visible vertical lantern/shop signs in the street scenes reading "居酒屋" and 1 bottle label reading "黒豚". High detail, emotional fantasy poster, premium animated-film aesthetic, Japanese urban nostalgia mixed with magical realism.
entries.description: A text prompt for generating a richly detailed Japanese animated movie poster featuring a winged pig-like protagonist in a bittersweet urban fantasy montage.

2) top center, the winged pig sits drinking with 2 human adults in an izakaya-like nightlife setting, warm lights surrounding them; 3) upper right, the winged pig walks away down railway tracks toward a brilliant ocean sunset, carrying a small suitcase, seen from behind; 4) left middle, the winged pig walks alone through a rain-slick neon-lit city street at night, seen from behind, surrounded by glowing signs and reflections. the whole image should feel bittersweet, magical, lonely, and hopeful, like a prestige animated film poster about adulthood, solitude, and emotional survival. use lush lighting, dense environmental detail, sparkling reflections, glowing lanterns, cinematic atmosphere, and rich blue-orange color contrast. include japanese poster typography integrated into the art: at the very top, the tagline "ひとりで生きてきた。だけど、ひとりじゃ涙は止まらない。"; above the title, the line "独身オヤジ、最後の青春。"; a very large main title at the bottom center reading "翼のオヤジ" in bold brushed calligraphic characters; below it, the tagline "笑って、泣けて、明日また頑張れる。この冬、いちばんやさしい奇跡。"; on the bottom right, a circular badge reading "秋公開" and "今"; add small fine-print credits across the lower edge in the style of a japanese film poster. include 2 visible vertical lantern/shop signs in the street scenes reading "居酒屋" and 1 bottle label reading "黒豚". high detail, emotional fantasy poster, premium animated-film aesthetic, japanese urban nostalgia mixed with magical realism. poster / flyer film cinematic street street city

entries.title: Vintage Malta Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vintage travel poster illustration for MALTA, with the subtitle MEDITERRANEAN PARADISE centered near the top. The composition is a sunlit Mediterranean coastal cityscape viewed from a curving seaside road in the foreground, painted in a richly textured retro poster style with warm cream stone architecture, saturated turquoise-blue sea, and a bright azure sky with soft white clouds. On the left, a hillside of tightly packed historic limestone buildings rises above the waterfront, including colorful enclosed wooden balconies, a large domed church with a reddish terracotta roof, and a slender church spire. In the foreground on the road, place a classic mid-century white sedan seen from the rear three-quarter angle, driving along the curve, with a dark license plate reading MTA 1964. A low stone seawall runs along the right edge of the road beside the harbor. In the bay, include exactly 4 boats: 2 colorful Maltese luzzu fishing boats in the near and mid water, plus 2 smaller distant boats farther back. Add exactly 4 white seagulls gliding across the sky above the water. Frame the scene with lush flowering bougainvillea branches in vivid magenta-pink arching across the upper right and lower right corners, and leafy tree branches along the upper left edge; include a spiky agave plant in the lower left foreground. The distant shoreline across the bay should show a pale sunlit city stretching along the horizon. Use a nostalgic 1950s-1960s tourism poster aesthetic, painterly brushwork, crisp composition, romantic travel mood, and elegant typography with the main title in large cream serif capitals and the subtitle in smaller dark sans-serif capitals.
entries.description: A retro-style Mediterranean tourism poster showing Malta's waterfront road, historic city, fishing boats, and a classic car, ideal for travel art, poster prints, and destination promos.

entries.title: Tang Dynasty Aesthetic CG Illustration
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Chinese style CG illustration, Tang Dynasty aesthetics, exquisite ancient woman, half-body close-up shot, focus on face and upper body, high-end portrait composition, cinematic camera language and spatial perspective.

Character Setting:
East Asian classical beauty, cold white transparent skin, fine and real skin texture, soft shimmer; exquisite and three-dimensional facial features but natural and not exaggerated, narrow phoenix eyes, slightly tilted eye corners, affectionate and shy eyes, slightly tipsy and hazy, long eyelashes casting subtle shadows; lip color like rouge, slightly parted lips, soft and emotional tension, presenting 'subtle Oriental beauty'.

Styling Design:
Pink-toned gorgeous Tang-style clothing, softly fitting the body curves, rich layers but not over-stacked; moderate low-neck design emphasizing collarbone and neck-shoulder lines, natural visual guidance; exquisite phoenix crown (metal, pearls, gems, tassels), realistic material reflection, moving slightly with action.

Dynamics and Pose:
Slightly side-turned or lightly rotating posture, neck extension, shoulder lines stretched, hands forming soft guide lines, enhancing picture rhythm and feminine soft tension.

Lighting System:
Cinematic lighting. Key light: warm gold front-side light focusing on face and skin highlights. Fill light: cold ambient light shaping volume and space. Rim light outlining hair and neck silhouette. Highlights controlled without overexposure, shadows retaining details, soft transition of facial light and shadow.

Art Style:
Ultra-realistic CG portrait merged with Oriental freehand charm, slight hazy aesthetics.

Atmosphere and Texture:
Dreamy, subtle, high-end atmosphere of Oriental aesthetics; blurred background to weaken environment and strengthen character; slight film grain + soft focus glow to enhance emotion and texture.

Color System:
Main colors: rouge pink, gold. Auxiliary colors: cold blue-gray. Overall low saturation and high quality, avoiding gaudiness.

Lens parameters:
85mm portrait lens, f1.4-f2, shallow depth of field, cinematic framing.

Quality:
ultra detailed, 8K-16K, extreme detail, high resolution, cinematic lighting.

Aspect Ratio:
9:16

entries.title: Astronaut Beside Living Earth
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic surreal space scene showing 1 astronaut floating in open space beside Earth, with the planet dominating the left side of the frame and the astronaut on the right, drifting backward with bent legs and one arm reaching toward the planet. The astronaut wears a realistic white EVA-style spacesuit with a dark reflective visor, a backpack unit, and a shoulder patch in red, yellow, and green. Earth is shown from the Atlantic side with North and South America clearly visible, lit by a cool blue rim glow against a deep black star field with sparse tiny stars. Across the continents and faintly across the oceans, organic branching root-like or neural vein structures spread over the surface, especially dense across North America and extending into South America, creating a dark biomechanical or living-planet effect. Use dramatic low-key lighting, strong contrast, moody shadows, photorealistic textures, ultra-detailed cinematic realism, a quiet ominous atmosphere, and a wide composition with large negative space.

entries.title: Anime Sunset Film Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A breathtaking anime movie poster at golden-hour sunset, vertical theatrical one-sheet composition, painted in the polished cinematic style of a Makoto Shinkai-inspired youth drama. The scene overlooks a Japanese coastal hillside town descending toward a glowing bay, with the sun low on the horizon and its reflection stretching across calm water. The sky dominates most of the image: a vast deep-blue to lavender twilight gradient filled with countless stars, wispy pink and peach clouds, and one especially bright star near the upper right. In the foreground on the right, a teenage schoolgirl stands in three-quarter side profile facing left toward the sea, shown from mid-thigh up, with shoulder-length dark hair blowing in the breeze, a short-sleeved white sailor-style school blouse, a red ribbon at the collar, and a navy pleated skirt; her expression is contemplative and wistful. Farther down the steep stone stair street in the center-left, a teenage schoolboy stands with his back to the viewer, wearing a short-sleeved white shirt and dark trousers, also looking toward the sunset and ocean. At the lower right, include 1 black cat sitting on a wall or rooftop edge in silhouette, looking toward the town. At the lower left, include 1 old-fashioned streetlamp and a dense cluster of blooming hydrangeas in blue and violet along a stone wall. The town below is packed with tiled rooftops, narrow streets, warm window lights, and layered houses, with distant mountains framing the bay. Use dramatic rim light, luminous atmospheric perspective, sparkling highlights, delicate cloud detail, and emotional, nostalgic color grading in indigo, ultramarine, pink, peach, and gold. Design it explicitly as a Japanese animated film poster with elegant typography integrated into the artwork: large hand-brushed Japanese title text across the upper-left to center reading 星をつなぐ約束のうた, smaller English subtitle beneath it reading The Song of Promises, a small award-laurel line in Japanese at the top left, 1 vertical Japanese tagline along the upper-right edge, 4 cast names in Japanese centered near the bottom, a release date at the lower left reading 8.23 with "ROADSHOW" below, 1 pink Japanese tagline across the lower center, and a website/social handle at the lower right. Ultra-detailed anime key visual, romantic and melancholic, premium feature-film poster finish.

entries.title: 108 Chibi Fantasy Mandala
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A gigantic ultra-detailed fantasy mandala poster featuring exactly 108 distinct chibi characters arranged in concentric circular rings around a radiant central emblem. The composition is perfectly symmetrical overall and fills a wide horizontal canvas like an ornate collectible mural. In the center, place a glowing golden core with 9 chibi animal-fantasy mascots clustered in a circular medallion, each with oversized heads, tiny bodies, expressive eyes, and luxurious costume details. Surround this center with multiple evenly spaced concentric rings containing the remaining 99 characters, each character occupying its own wedge-like segment and designed as a unique elemental or mythical variation. Include fox-like, rabbit-like, cat-like, wolf-like, lion-like, bird-like, dragon-like, deer-like, and hybrid beast characters, all rendered in a cute super-deformed style but with epic high-fantasy armor, robes, crowns, feathers, horns, gems, capes, staffs, and magical accessories. Make every character visually distinct through color, silhouette, species traits, and elemental theme, while preserving a unified painterly anime-fantasy aesthetic.

Use a rich palette dominated by luminous gold, ivory, cream, violet, indigo, sapphire, and soft amber, with accents of crimson, icy cyan, emerald, and sunset orange. Give the image the feel of a sacred celestial chart or zodiac wheel, with each circular band separated by elegant gilded borders and arc dividers. Add glowing magical energy, sparkles, halos, swirling fire, mist, snow, clouds, water splashes, lightning curls, floral motifs, and celestial particles around many of the characters. Around the outer perimeter, place several larger decorative guardian illustrations integrated into the border: a bright sun medallion at the upper left, a white phoenix-like bird in a circular panel at the upper right, a floral or starburst medallion at the lower right, and a fiery character cluster in a circular panel at the lower left, plus additional large elemental beast figures embedded along the left and right edges. Frame the entire artwork with an elaborate antique ornamental border inspired by illuminated manuscripts and fantasy tarot designs, using filigree, corner medallions, geometric trim, and arcane motifs.

The rendering should be extremely dense and crisp, like a 4k fantasy illustration meant for a poster print, with tiny readable character silhouettes across the whole image, intricate linework, soft watercolor-textured shading, glowing highlights, and a polished collectible-card-game concept art finish. Emphasize abundance, harmony, and radial order: exactly 108 chibi figures total, arranged as a majestic mandala of mythical elemental mascots.
entries.description: A highly detailed wide fantasy poster showing exactly 108 unique chibi mythical creatures arranged in concentric mandala rings, ideal for decorative key art or showcase illustrations.

entries.title: Vintage Malta Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vintage travel poster illustration for Malta, designed like a mid-century Mediterranean tourism advertisement with elegant painterly realism and slightly textured printed-poster grain. At the top center, place the large headline MALTA in oversized cream serif capitals, with the subtitle MEDITERRANEAN PARADISE directly below in smaller dark navy sans-serif capitals. Show a sunlit coastal road curving along a stone waterfront in Valletta, viewed from slightly above and behind a classic white 1960s sedan driving away from the viewer in the lower left foreground; the rear license plate reads MTA 1964. Across the harbor, depict warm honey-colored limestone buildings climbing the hillside, including 1 large domed church, 1 tall narrow church spire, rows of historic townhouses with several colorful enclosed wooden balconies, and distant city walls stretching across the opposite shoreline. In the bay, include exactly 3 traditional Maltese fishing boats in vivid blue, yellow, red, and green, plus 2 tiny white sailboats farther back. Add exactly 4 white seagulls flying across a brilliant turquoise-blue sky with soft white clouds. Frame the whole composition with dark leafy trees and abundant bright magenta bougainvillea blossoms arching in from the top and right edges, with more flowers in the lower right corner, creating a lush border around the scene. Include a palm tree among the waterfront buildings and a spiky agave plant in the lower left foreground. Use warm golden sunlight, saturated coastal colors, romantic vacation-poster composition, clean readable typography, and a nostalgic, idealized Mediterranean atmosphere.
entries.description: This prompt generates a nostalgic illustrated tourism poster of Malta with bold headline text, a coastal road, classic car, harbor boats, and sunlit historic architecture for travel branding or wall art.

entries.title: Dark Space Emperor Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dark epic sci-fi movie poster for EMPIRE OF THE VOID, in a highly cinematic photorealistic space-opera style. Centered composition with a tall alien emperor standing behind a massive circular command table, viewed from slightly below to make the figure feel imposing and godlike. The emperor wears ornate black and gunmetal biomechanical armor with sharp layered pauldrons, engraved metallic filigree, a long dark cloak, and a regal elongated helmet-crown. The face is mostly obscured in shadow, giving a mysterious, intimidating presence. One large clawed hand rests prominently on the glowing table in the foreground. The command table displays a luminous spiral galaxy hologram in blue-violet tones, with concentric interface rings and subtle cosmic light. The setting is the bridge of a colossal starship or throne room, with two curved panoramic windows framing outer space. Outside the windows are 8 visible spacecraft total: 4 on the left side and 4 on the right side, including several large battleships and smaller escort vessels. A huge planet fills much of the left background, while the right background shows a purple-blue nebula and starfield. Two secondary alien officers are seated in the mid-background, 1 on the left and 1 on the right, each at glowing futuristic control consoles. The color palette is deep black, steel gray, indigo, violet, and cold blue, with dramatic rim lighting, glossy metallic reflections, and dense atmospheric shadows. The layout should feel like a premium blockbuster poster: a centered top tagline in small uppercase text reading INTELLIGENCE. DOMINION. DESTINY. THE GALAXY BOWS TO NONE., the giant title near the bottom in elegant spaced serif capitals with the words EMPIRE on the first line and OF THE VOID below it, with the letter O stylized as a glowing black-hole eclipse. Beneath that, add a glowing imperial trident-like emblem centered above the release line COMING SOON. At the very bottom, include a dense strip of tiny production credits in authentic movie-poster typography. Ultra-detailed, symmetrical, ominous, imperial, galactic conquest mood, vertical one-sheet poster, premium VFX key art, sharp focus, high contrast, dramatic sci-fi lighting.
entries.description: A cinematic sci-fi poster showing an armored alien ruler on a starship bridge, ideal for blockbuster space-opera key art and film promotion.

entries.title: Celestial Anime Fantasy Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A dramatic Japanese fantasy anime movie poster, vertical one-sheet composition, centered on a beautiful teenage girl with very long flowing silver-white hair, glowing golden eyes, and a calm inviting smile, reaching one hand toward the viewer. She wears a black-and-white celestial dress with a fitted corset bodice, white chest panel, black ribbon lacing at the front, detached black sleeves with soft white ruffles, a black belt at the waist, layered skirt panels decorated with exactly 3 gold crescent moon ornaments, and a black choker with a gold crescent moon pendant. She also has exactly 1 gold crescent moon hair clip near her bangs. Behind her is a luminous night sky filled with stars, nebula-like clouds, and a huge eclipsed moon halo directly above her head, plus exactly 3 floating crescent-ring light effects around the left side of her hair. The background shows an ornate fantasy city with towering gothic palace architecture, spires, observatory-like structures, and glowing windows, all bathed in cool moonlight. Use a rich palette of deep indigo, violet, midnight blue, silver, and gold, with sparkles, magical particles, rim lighting, glossy highlights, and a slightly dense, painterly modern-anime poster finish.

Design it as a fully typeset Japanese film poster with elegant serif display typography in gold and white. At the very top, place a centered headline in Japanese: 夜が欠けるたび、忘れていた真実が目を覚ます。. On the right side, set a large vertical Japanese tagline in gold: 最後の月光が消える前に、世界の記憶をつなぎ直せ。. On the left side, arrange 4 stacked blocks of smaller Japanese body copy separated by decorative divider lines and crescent motifs. Add a circular gold burst badge on the lower right with Japanese promotional text inside. Across the lower middle, place the large glowing Japanese title in ornate gold-white lettering: 月蝕のリグレット. Beneath the title, add a smaller centered Japanese subtitle line. Below that, place a horizontal feature line with exactly 3 gold-separated phrases in Japanese: "記憶", "月光", "観測魔法". At the very bottom, add 3 short Japanese teaser lines spread left, center, and right, and a large glowing release line centered under them: 近日公開. The overall feeling is epic, melancholic, magical, celestial, romantic, and nostalgic, like a high-budget fantasy anime film poster.
entries.description: This prompt generates a fully typeset Japanese fantasy anime film poster featuring a silver-haired moon-themed heroine, ideal for cinematic key art and promotional poster concepts.

entries.title: Epic Senna vs Prost Gladiator Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: An epic cinematic poster in a dark golden bronze palette, styled like a mythic gladiator movie poster merged with vintage Formula 1 iconography. Two legendary rival drivers face away from each other in mirrored side-profile bust portraits at the top half of the image, one on the left inspired by Ayrton Senna and one on the right inspired by Alain Prost, both depicted as heroic Roman gladiators with weathered bronze armor, dramatic shoulder plates, and racing colors draped as cloaks. The left figure wears green, yellow, and blue accents, and the right figure wears blue, white, and red accents. Their faces are mostly in shadow, lit by intense backlight through storm clouds, creating a solemn, monumental mood. Behind each driver hangs 1 vertical banner, for a total of 2 banners: the left banner is dark green with a large gold S, the text "SENNA", "#12", and a cursive signature; the right banner is dark blue with a large gold P, the text "PROST", "#1", and a cursive signature. Centered near the top, in elegant serif French text, place the line "DEUX LÉGENDES. UN SEUL TRÔNE." with a small gold Formula 1 emblem and laurel motif below it. In the central sky, add 2 stacked lines of French text reading "RIVAUX SUR LA PISTE." and "LÉGENDES POUR TOUJOURS." The main title dominates the middle in huge metallic serif lettering: "SENNA vs PROST", with a sword-like vertical separator for "vs". Beneath it, a subtitle in French reads "LE COMBAT ULTIME DE LA F1". The lower half shows a colossal Roman colosseum packed with spectators, flags, arches, dust, smoke, and dramatic perspective lines converging on the center. At the exact center of the arena stands 1 large victory banner with the words "VICTOIRE GLOIRE HONNEUR" in gold. In the foreground, place 2 front-facing late-1980s Formula 1 cars charging toward the viewer on a dirt-covered arena floor, throwing dust. The left car is associated with Senna and features red-and-white Marlboro-inspired livery, Shell branding, and the number 12 on the nose, with the driver wearing a yellow helmet. The right car is associated with Prost and features matching red-and-white Marlboro-inspired livery, Shell branding, and the number 1 on the nose, with the driver wearing a white helmet. At the very bottom, add the line "1988. 1989. 1990." and below it "L'HISTOIRE S'ÉCRIT À PLUS DE 300 KM/H." Include a small ornamental laurel decoration under the final line. Use hyper-detailed textures, dramatic storm clouds, god rays, flying dust, intense contrast, symmetrical composition, ultra-polished poster design, heroic scale, and a timeless legendary atmosphere.
entries.description: A dramatic vintage-style motorsport poster depicting Senna and Prost as mythic gladiator rivals, ideal for recreating cinematic tribute art or high-impact F1 legend posters.

the right banner is dark blue with a large gold p, the text "prost", "#1", and a cursive signature. centered near the top, in elegant serif french text, place the line "deux légendes. un seul trône." with a small gold formula 1 emblem and laurel motif below it. in the central sky, add 2 stacked lines of french text reading "rivaux sur la piste." and "légendes pour toujours." the main title dominates the middle in huge metallic serif lettering: "senna vs prost", with a sword-like vertical separator for "vs". beneath it, a subtitle in french reads "le combat ultime de la f1". the lower half shows a colossal roman colosseum packed with spectators, flags, arches, dust, smoke, and dramatic perspective lines converging on the center. at the exact center of the arena stands 1 large victory banner with the words "victoire gloire honneur" in gold. in the foreground, place 2 front-facing late-1980s formula 1 cars charging toward the viewer on a dirt-covered arena floor, throwing dust. the left car is associated with senna and features red-and-white marlboro-inspired livery, shell branding, and the number 12 on the nose, with the driver wearing a yellow helmet. the right car is associated with prost and features matching red-and-white marlboro-inspired livery, shell branding, and the number 1 on the nose, with the driver wearing a white helmet. at the very bottom, add the line "1988. 1989. 1990." and below it "l'histoire s'écrit à plus de 300 km/h." include a small ornamental laurel decoration under the final line. use hyper-detailed textures, dramatic storm clouds, god rays, flying dust, intense contrast, symmetrical composition, ultra-polished poster design, heroic scale, and a timeless legendary atmosphere. poster / flyer cinematic portrait mirror

entries.title: Vintage Kyoto Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vintage travel poster for KYOTO, Japan, designed in a nostalgic mid-century tourism style with a faded paper texture, softly worn edges, and warm sun-aged colors. Use a vertical poster layout with rounded corners and a cream border. At the top, place the large headline KYOTO in oversized elegant red serif letters, with "JAPAN" centered below in dark blue serif type and thin decorative divider lines. Add an italic tagline beneath it reading Timeless Beauty. Endless Memories.. The main image should show a dramatic low-angle view of a traditional five-story Japanese pagoda in vivid vermilion red with dark wooden eaves and black railings, standing on a stone base with a wooden walkway in the foreground. Surround the pagoda with green wooded hills, a bright blue sky, and soft cream-colored clouds. On the left side, include a vertical red label with white Japanese characters reading "京都、日本". Also add a blooming cherry blossom branch entering from the left, with clusters of pale pink flowers. In the upper right corner, include a postage stamp featuring a pagoda silhouette in muted red tones, partially overlapped by a circular postal cancellation mark reading "KYOTO JAPAN" with the kanji "京都" in the center and a few wavy postmark lines extending rightward. At the bottom, add a centered vintage footer slogan in serif capitals reading DISCOVER TRADITION. EMBRACE KYOTO.. The overall look should feel romantic, collectible, slightly distressed, and like a classic Japanese tourism print from the 1950s or 1960s.
entries.description: This prompt generates a retro-style Kyoto tourism poster, ideal for travel art prints, editorial covers, or destination-themed wall decor.

entries.title: Maximalist Create Everything Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A richly layered maximalist collage poster in portrait orientation, designed as a celebration of art, science, history, and human creativity. At the exact center, place a large irregular black ink-splatter or torn-paper void with radiant multicolored streaks around it, containing elegant large serif typography reading Create Everything at Once in warm ivory. Surround the center with a dense scrapbook-style arrangement of exactly 33 visible items overlapping edge to edge like a curated mood board: 1 illuminated medieval manuscript page with ornate floral border in the top left, 1 botanical mushroom study sheet near it, 1 star chart or astronomical diagram page, 1 solar system illustration across the upper top center with planets on orbit lines against deep space, 1 periodic table chart in the upper middle-left, 1 circular night-sky constellation map in the upper middle-right, 1 cluster of blue crystals, 1 alpine mountain landscape painting, 1 geometric mosaic tile fragment in the top right corner, 1 blue-and-white ceramic teapot on the right edge, 1 antique tribal mask on the right-center, 1 torn vertical calligraphy page with multilingual writing, 1 small isometric polyhedron or gemstone drawing, 1 pixel-art rocket icon card, 1 multicolored wayfinding sign with arrows and transport symbols, 1 black-and-white architectural sketch page along the right side, 1 iridescent feather in the lower-right edge, 1 underwater coral reef photo in the bottom-right corner, 1 purple amethyst cluster, 1 triangular geometric mosaic textile or tile pattern, 1 colorful woven textile swatch, 1 circular carved stone calendar disk, 1 black-and-white city skyline print, 1 botanical flower drawing near the bottom center, 1 stained-glass window illustration, 1 blue architectural blueprint sheet, 1 color wheel chart, 1 abstract blue cell-like or mineral micrograph image, 1 Great Wave-style Japanese seascape print on the lower left, 1 ancient Greek pottery fragment, 1 anatomical human muscle illustration on the left side, 1 butterfly specimen card, and 1 vintage silver camera just left of center. Add a second small botanical flower sketch near the lower-left center and a parchment map fragment tucked behind the camera area as subtle fillers while keeping the total primary featured objects at 33. Blend media styles including engraving, scientific diagrams, vintage prints, fine art painting, photography, textile patterns, blueprints, and digital design UI. Near the bottom left, include 1 dark computer interface panel showing node-based creative software and color grading tools with charts and a circular color selector, suggesting modern AI-assisted creation. Use torn paper edges, aged parchment textures, ink stains, saturated jewel tones, deep blues, golds, creams, and pops of neon cyan, magenta, orange, and violet. The composition should feel exuberant, intelligent, and inspirational, with every object sharply readable and carefully arranged into a seamless museum-meets-studio collage. High detail, editorial poster design, premium print look, balanced chaos, dramatic contrast, soft paper shadows, subtle depth from layered overlaps, no empty background beyond the collage.
entries.description: A dense editorial collage poster centered on a bold inspirational headline, ideal for generating artwork about creativity spanning science, art, culture, and technology.

entries.title: Satirical Spanish Sports Front Page
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A satirical Spanish sports newspaper front page designed like a tabloid cover, full-frame and perfectly frontal, on slightly aged off-white newsprint with subtle paper texture, faint stains, and narrow black border lines. The masthead is a huge red SPORT logo across the top on a bright yellow banner. In the upper right, include 1 small interview promo box with a headshot of a footballer and the text block in Spanish: "ENTREVISTA CUBARSÍ 'ESTOY PARA COSAS GRANDES'". Under the masthead, add a yellow strip with bold black text "EXCLUSIVA MUNDIAL" and a small red lightning bolt. The main headline dominates the page in gigantic black condensed uppercase letters over 2 lines: "LAMILE FICHA POR LA PEÑA DEL BINGO". Beneath it, add the subheadline in italic black Spanish text: "El crack pide dorsal el 10 y bocadillo de calamares en el contrato". The main photo occupies the left-center and lower-middle of the page: a young footballer seen mostly from the back wearing a Barcelona home jersey in blue and garnet stripes, with the name "LAMILE" and the number "10" in large yellow lettering, standing in a celebratory stadium scene with confetti, bright lights, blurred fans, and people around him. He is holding or presenting a large bingo card board with the word "BINGO" at the top and "BINGO!" at the bottom. On the right side, create a vertical sidebar with 4 stacked content blocks: first, a photo of a calamari sandwich on a plate with the caption "El motivo del fichaje"; second, a red info box listing 3 humorous transfer facts in yellow and white text, exactly "EDAD: muy joven", "FICHAJE: 4 cartones", and "CLÁUSULA: una partida de parchís"; third, a quotes column with 3 stacked mini-items, each with a small portrait and Spanish caption: "XAVI: 'No me lo esperaba, pero respeto'", "LAPORTA: 'Renegociaremos en el próximo bingo'", and "EL VESTUARIO: Le preparan línea y bingo de bienvenida"; fourth, a small motorsport teaser at the bottom with a driver image and the text "FÓRMULA 1 ALONSO SUEÑA CON EL PODIO EN YEDA". Along the bottom strip, include 3 small teaser panels: 1 woman footballer holding a trophy with the text "CHAMPIONS FEMENINA LA REINA AITANA QUIERE OTRA CORONA", 1 basketball panel with two Barça players and the text "BÁSQUET EL BARÇA, A UN PAS DE LA FINAL FOUR", and the Formula 1 teaser panel already integrated at the right edge. Add tiny newspaper metadata below the masthead on the left in Spanish, including issue number, date, and price, such as "No 16.743 MIÉRCOLES 22 DE ABRIL DE 2026 2,00 EUROS". The overall style should be hyper-realistic printed newspaper cover photography and editorial layout, with authentic magazine typography, strong black headlines, saturated sports-photo colors, comedic transfer-rumor parody tone, and seamless believable print design.
entries.description: This prompt generates a realistic parody sports newspaper cover in Spanish, ideal for humorous football transfer mockups and tabloid-style editorial images.

entries.title: Classical Cover for The City of God
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A minimalist, elegant vintage book cover design on warm ivory textured paper for La Ciudad de Dios. Center the title near the top in large classical serif typography, dark navy blue, with refined spacing and a literary feel. Directly below it, place 1 small eight-point star in gold. In the upper middle, illustrate a heavenly walled city floating on clouds, drawn as delicate gold line art: a symmetrical sacred city with 1 central domed cathedral, many clustered towers, spires, walls, and gates, surrounded by soft clouds, with radiant sunburst lines spreading outward behind it. From the central gate of the celestial city, send down 1 vertical column of thin golden light beams toward the lower half of the cover. In the bottom third, depict an earthly ancient Roman landscape in fine blue-gray ink line art: 5 main architectural ruins and monuments arranged horizontally, including a long arcade on the left, a classical temple with columns near left-center, a domed building in the middle, a bell tower and surrounding ruins near right-center, and a colosseum-like ruin on the far right, plus a broken fallen column drum in the right foreground and sparse shrubs and ground texture. Keep the composition airy, symmetrical, and contemplative, with abundant negative space between heaven and earth. Place the author name SAN AGUSTÍN DE HIPONA centered at the bottom in spaced small caps serif, dark navy blue. Use only 3 visible text elements total: the title, the author name, and no subtitle. Palette limited to ivory, gold, and dark navy blue, with precise engraved linework and a sacred, timeless, classical theological mood.
entries.description: This prompt generates a refined literary book cover with celestial gold line art above Roman ruins, ideal for classic theology, philosophy, or historical works.

entries.title: Surreal Skull and Tree of Consciousness
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A surreal, ultra-detailed fantasy illustration of a large weathered human skull rising from dark water, centered in the frame, with the top of the skull opened like a pedestal supporting a giant transparent glass sphere. Inside the sphere stands an intricate luminous tree made of twisting golden branches and roots, with exactly 1 main trunk, dozens of tiny warm glowing orbs embedded among the branches, and many metallic bronze leaves. The roots spread across the base inside the globe and wrap around a small ladder built into the trunk. At the lower left inside the globe, depict exactly 1 translucent seated human figure in a contemplative pose, knees drawn up, head resting on one hand, holding a small glowing flower or crystalline bloom in the other hand. On the lower right inside the globe, include exactly 1 miniature architectural tower-like structure made of delicate gold framework. Surrounding the sphere and background are ornate branch networks with hanging crystal ornaments, faceted gemstones, suspended droplets, circular glass forms, and metallic leaves, all arranged symmetrically but organically. The skull is highly realistic with deep eye sockets, detailed teeth, cracked bone texture, and fine copper-like tubes and circuitry extending from both sides near the temples. In the skull's right eye socket, show exactly 1 glowing mechanical orrery-like light structure. Place the whole composition in a dreamlike seascape at dusk with calm reflective water, distant rock spires, soft clouds, and a blue-to-gold sky. Use cinematic lighting, high contrast, sharp focus, mystical atmosphere, luxurious gold and bronze filigree, crystal transparency, and a color palette of deep teal, midnight blue, ivory bone, warm amber, and metallic gold. Make it feel like symbolic metacognition, consciousness contained within mortality, blending dark surrealism, baroque ornament, and ethereal sci-fi fantasy.
entries.description: A richly detailed surreal fantasy artwork of a skull topped by a glass sphere containing a glowing golden tree and contemplative figure, ideal for concept art about consciousness, mortality, and dreamlike symbolism.

entries.title: Chaotic Road Trip Comedy Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A bright, chaotic theatrical comedy movie poster in a polished Hollywood one-sheet style, vertical composition, with a retro yellow Mini Cooper speeding straight toward the viewer down a sunny palm-lined city street. The car is packed with exactly 5 vacationing friends: 2 visible in the front seats, 2 partially visible squeezed in the back, and 1 man sprawled on the roof luggage, pointing dramatically forward with a wild grin. Everyone wears colorful casual vacation clothes, including tropical prints, relaxed shirts, and sun hats. The scene feels loud, reckless, and fun. On the roof are stacked suitcases and travel bags. A police car with flashing lights chases from the rear right background. On the left side, a crooked wooden signpost has exactly 3 signs reading "BEACH", "MOUNTAINS", and "WHAT COULD GO WRONG?". A squawking seagull perches on top of the signpost. On the right side, a giant roadside donut shop sign reads "DONUT" and a folded paper map flies through the air. The street is full of motion blur, dust, debris, and tire energy, with a saturated blue sky and fluffy clouds above. At the very top, place exactly 4 actor names in black condensed caps: "DAVE JOHNSON", "LILY WANG", "KEVIN HARTLEY", and "AMY CHEN". Beneath that, add a stacked tagline in bold caps: "THEY CAME. THEY SAW." in dark navy, and "THEY MESSED EVERYTHING UP." in red. The main title dominates the upper middle in huge playful 3D typography: "VACATION MODE", with "VACATION" in bright yellow and "MODE" in white, heavy blue shadowing, and the O replaced by a simple smiling face wearing sunglasses. Add small doodle-like yellow accent marks around the title. Across the lower right of the title, place a tilted hot-pink banner reading "A COMEDY ABOUT BAD IDEAS & GOOD TIMES" with a hand-drawn curved arrow pointing down. The car license plate reads "NO PLAN ALL FUN". Near the bottom, add a glowing pull-quote in yellow: "LAUGH-OUT-LOUD FUNNY!" and below it "- MOVIE BUZZ". At the bottom center, add the release line "ONLY IN THEATERS" and then "JUNE 20" in large bold yellow caps. Add tiny legal credits along the very bottom edge and small production logos in the corners, including "GOOD TIME FILMS" on the lower left and "NO PLAN ALL FUN" on the lower right. Use high-contrast lighting, exaggerated perspective, glossy commercial poster finish, vibrant summer colors, and a goofy road-trip comedy tone.

entries.title: WWII D-Day Cinematic Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A gritty cinematic World War II movie poster in a vertical one-sheet layout, designed like a modern prestige war film advertisement. At the top, two centered tagline lines in condensed uppercase text read COURAGE. BROTHERHOOD. SACRIFICE. and VICTORY COMES AT A PRICE.. The main composition features 4 American WWII soldiers in the foreground wearing dark olive uniforms and large netted M1 helmets: 1 dominant central soldier shown from the chest up, facing forward, flanked by 3 slightly smaller soldiers receding behind him, one on the left and 2 on the right. Their faces are shadowed, dirty, battle-worn, and dramatic, with intense low-key lighting and smoky backlight. Behind them, a stormy war-torn sky filled with heavy smoke columns, sparks, embers, and 2 aircraft groups: 1 group of 3 planes on the upper left and 1 group of 5 planes on the upper right. In the middle, a small centered line of text says INSPIRED BY TRUE EVENTS. Below it, an enormous distressed title in bold block letters reads D-DAY, with a star used as the separator between the two D letters. Under the title, a red condensed date line reads JUNE 6, 1944. The lower half shows the D-Day beach landing from the viewpoint inside an open landing craft, with 2 dark metal ramp walls framing the left and right edges. In the surf, exactly 8 soldiers are wading toward shore with rifles and packs, surrounded by Czech hedgehog beach obstacles, rough water, smoke, distant fires, and an embattled coastline under bombardment. At the very bottom is a dense strip of tiny production credits, and beneath that a bold red release line reading COMING SOON, followed by a smaller white line, "HONOR THEIR SACRIFICE.". Color palette is charcoal gray, steel blue, muddy brown, and fire orange with red accent typography. Ultra-detailed, photoreal, high contrast, moody, epic, historical, dramatic theatrical poster design, realistic film grain, volumetric smoke, distressed textures, symmetrical composition, premium blockbuster key art.

entries.title: Revenge Action Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A gritty, high-contrast cinematic action movie poster in a vertical one-sheet layout for a revenge thriller titled DEADLINE VENGEANCE. The composition is dominated by a large foreground figure of a tough middle-aged man with short dark hair, rugged stubble, and a black leather or tactical jacket, aiming a semi-automatic handgun directly at the viewer from the left side of the frame with strong foreshortening so the gun appears oversized and close to camera. His face is partially obscured in shadow for a mysterious, menacing look. Behind him is a dark modern city skyline at night under stormy clouds, with 1 helicopter in the upper right sky and 1 massive fireball explosion on the right side near the buildings, sending smoke, sparks, and debris into the air. Across the very top, small red uppercase text reads REVENGE IS HIS MISSION. On the left-center area, add a stacked white uppercase tagline in 4 lines: THE PAST TOOK EVERYTHING. HE'LL TAKE EVERYTHING BACK., styled as 2 short blocks separated by thin red accent lines. Place the main title huge across the lower middle, with 2 words: the first word in enormous distressed metallic-white block letters, and the second word in slightly smaller bold red uppercase letters. In the bottom third, show 1 lone male figure from behind standing in the middle of a wet reflective street, holding a pistol, facing the burning city. Surround him with 4 police vehicles total, 2 on the left and 2 on the right, with flashing lights, plus 2 additional helicopters in the distant sky near the horizon, making 3 helicopters total in the full poster. Include flames along both lower corners, wreckage, smoke, embers, and silhouettes of several armed figures in the distance. At the bottom center, add red uppercase release text COMING SOON with smaller white text underneath reading EXPERIENCE IT IN IMAX. Add a dense strip of tiny fake production credits and a film rating box at the very bottom. Color palette: black, charcoal, steel gray, orange fire, and deep crimson. Style: polished Hollywood blockbuster key art, dramatic rim lighting, photorealistic, ultra-detailed, intense contrast, anamorphic action lighting, smoky atmosphere, explosive urban chaos, premium theatrical poster design.

entries.title: Vintage Chinese SpaceX Propaganda Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vintage socialist propaganda poster in a mid-20th-century Chinese style, printed on aged paper with a warm sepia tint, distressed texture, faded ink, and slightly worn edges. The composition is vertical and heroic. On the right half of the poster, show a large waist-up portrait of a male worker or revolutionary figure wearing a dark cap and a dark utilitarian jacket, facing slightly to the left with a stoic, determined expression. On the left-center, a white reusable rocket rises upward with bright engine flame, depicted like an aspirational symbol of technological progress; the rocket has the word "SPACEX" written vertically on its body and visible landing legs near the base. Behind the rocket, fill the sky with dramatic cream-colored sunburst rays spreading outward across a muted blue background. In the lower left, include a cheering crowd of exactly 6 factory workers or citizens in blue-gray uniforms, raising their hands in celebration, with one large red flag waving beside them. Add faint industrial city elements and launch-tower silhouettes behind the crowd. At the bottom, reserve a wide text panel with large bold red Chinese slogan lettering in two lines reading: "今天回收火箭,明天建设星际家园!". Use a screen-printed poster look, painterly realism, limited palette of dusty blue, cream, brick red, and dark olive, with strong ideological poster composition, triumphant mood, and retro-futurist space-race symbolism.

entries.title: Japanese ClaudeCode Training Banner
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a clean corporate Japanese web banner for an AI training service, wide horizontal format around 1200x247. Use a bright white and pale blue office aesthetic with a modern professional business look. The layout has 5 clear text/icon areas plus one human figure on the right. On the left, place a small top tagline in Japanese reading 「AIはじめてでも安心。実践で身につく。」 in medium blue-gray, aligned near the upper left with a subtle dotted accent mark to its far left. Below it, place a very large bold headline in deep blue reading 「ClaudeCode研修" with the Latin word oversized and the Japanese word continuing on the same line. Under the headline, place 3 evenly spaced rounded white feature boxes with thin blue borders and blue line icons. Box 1 contains an open book icon and the Japanese text 「基礎から丁寧に学べる」. Box 2 contains a laptop icon and the Japanese text 「ハンズオンで実践力がつく」. Box 3 contains a checkmark in a circle icon and the Japanese text 「チーム開発に活かせる知識」. Along the entire bottom, add a full-width deep blue bar with centered white Japanese text 「あなたの開発を、次のステージへ。". On the right side, show 1 professional Japanese businessman from the waist up, wearing a dark navy or black suit, white shirt, and blue striped tie, arms crossed, facing forward with a confident posture; his face is intentionally blurred or anonymized. Behind him, use a softly blurred modern office interior with bright daylight, glass, and green plants. Add a sweeping curved blue accent ribbon along the far right edge framing the subject. Overall style: premium B2B seminar ad, polished typography, soft gradients, minimal clutter, strong hierarchy, high readability, Japanese enterprise branding, subtle shadows, crisp vector icons, and balanced negative space.

entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a sleek Japanese corporate training banner in a wide horizontal web-ad format with a dark navy-to-deep-blue gradient background, subtle glowing network nodes and connecting lines across the upper and middle area, and a high-tech AI/business atmosphere. Place a confident businessman on the right side from waist-up, wearing a dark navy suit, white dress shirt, and blue striped tie, arms crossed, facing forward; crop him partially at the top and right edge. On the left, create a strong typographic hierarchy with a small cyan headline at the top reading AIを活用した開発スキルを、最短で習得, then an oversized bold white main title reading ClaudeCode研修. Along the lower-left area, place exactly 3 rounded rectangular feature boxes outlined in bright cyan with dark interiors and cyan icons: box 1 shows a terminal/code icon and the text "Claude Codeの基本と応用", box 2 shows a rocket icon and the text "開発スピードを飛躍的に向上", box 3 shows a two-person/team icon and the text "現場ですぐに活かせるスキル". On the far right, overlay a large cyan angled polygon callout panel with bold dark text in 2 lines reading 明日からの開発が\n変わる体験を。. Use crisp modern sans-serif Japanese typography, strong contrast, polished marketing design, clean spacing, luminous cyan accents, and a premium AI seminar advertisement look.

entries.title: Japanese AI Coding Training Banner
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a clean Japanese corporate training banner in a wide horizontal web-header format with a white background and deep navy blue branding. The layout is a single unified promotional banner for an AI programming course. On the left, place a small headline in bold Japanese text reading "AIを使いこなす開発者へ" above a very large dominant title reading "ClaudeCode研修" in heavy sans-serif dark navy lettering, with "ClaudeCode" especially large and the final Japanese word attached on the right in the same style. Beneath the title, add a long horizontal blue gradient bar from medium blue to very light blue containing white bold Japanese text: "AI時代の開発を、あなたの武器に。". Along the bottom left, arrange exactly 3 circular navy icon badges in a horizontal row, each with a short two-line caption in Japanese to the right of the icon. Badge 1 shows a code symbol </> and the text "Claude Codeの 基本から実践まで". Badge 2 shows a light bulb and the text "業務効率を高める AI活用スキル". Badge 3 shows an upward bar chart and the text "すぐに使える 実践的な内容". On the right half, place a confident Japanese businessman from the waist up with arms crossed, wearing a dark navy suit, white shirt, and blue striped tie, facing forward; his face is intentionally soft-focused or anonymized. Behind him, add layered geometric navy and blue diagonal shapes sweeping in from the top right and bottom right, plus a dark blue tech-themed panel with faint code lines and a glowing curly-braces symbol {}. Use a polished B2B seminar advertisement style, crisp typography, strong negative space, subtle gradients, high contrast, and a professional AI/engineering training atmosphere.

entries.title: Owl-Shaped Nebula in Deep Space
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A majestic deep-space scene of an owl-shaped nebula floating in a black starfield, centered composition, the cosmic gas and dust naturally forming the clear face of an owl. Two large glowing circular eyes with bright electric-blue star cores, a narrow pointed beak of amber light between them, and two long upward-sweeping ear tufts made of burnt-orange and golden-brown nebula pillars. The body is formed from layered translucent clouds of warm copper, sepia, ivory, and cool smoky blue, with soft luminous edges and intricate filament textures. Surround the figure with many sharp stars of varying sizes, including several bright blue-white stars with subtle diffraction spikes. Make the owl shape unmistakable but still fully made of astronomical nebula structures, realistic space photography aesthetic, dramatic contrast, ultra-detailed, ethereal glow, inspired by a owl formed from a nebula, with amber and blue tones, portrait orientation, centered and symmetrical, cinematic and awe-inspiring.

entries.title: Retro Kids TV Magazine Cover Prompt
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cover image for the April issue of 'Televikun Magazine', a 2000s monthly magazine specializing in children's TV tokusatsu. Place a single live-action bust-up shot of a new Kamen Rider-style tokusatsu hero in the center. Surround it with small cuts of Heisei Ultraman-style and Sentai-style heroes. Include several non-existent fictional TV show titles and images of luxurious bonus items. Ensure all Rider and Ultraman names are creatively invented and do not exist. Use primary colors like red, green, and blue for bold, outlined gradient fonts to create a cluttered, 'everything-included' impression. Format 1:1.414. I want to specify the image generation model as duct-tape-1, duct-tape-2, or 3.
