entries.title: Oriental Aesthetics Ink Wash Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
New Chinese style ink wash landscape poster, vertical 9:16 composition, oriental minimalist aesthetic style. Large areas of white space, overall color palette of a spring morning (cyan-green, misty blue, light gray, pale ink), low saturation, clear and soft, high-end texture. The main subject consists of steep, majestic mountains rising from both sides of a calm lake, occupying the left and right sides of the frame. The mountains are rendered with ink wash techniques showing rich variations in wetness and density, with local pale green tints reflecting spring vitality. Peaks are enveloped in moist, soft morning mist that layers into the pale blue-gray sky, creating atmospheric perspective and spatial depth.

The lake surface is as calm as a mirror with a slight green tint, reflecting the mountains and sky with a soft focus and atomized diffusion effect, enhancing the moist and dreamy spring atmosphere. In the middle ground, a small wooden boat with a curved canopy floats slowly, oars lightly touching the water to create fine ripples that spread naturally, maintaining total stillness. On the boat is a fisherwoman in red, small in scale (distant perspective), simplified into an ink silhouette with light coloring. She wears a low-saturation cinnabar red traditional dress (not bright red), the color softened by the mist. No facial details, only the silhouette and posture (e.g., lightly touching the canopy or holding an oar). The red forms a faint reflection on the water, serving as the only warm visual focus.

The banks are dotted with sparse woods and new spring vegetation, using light ink and pale green dots, combining solid and void to enhance rhythm and life. A few birds soar in the distant sky, lightly and sparsely distributed to enhance spatial hierarchy and nimbleness. Centered at the top is vertical calligraphy: "Oriental Aesthetics", in traditional hand-written running or cursive style (in the spirit of Wang Xizhi), with natural brushstrokes, clear transitions, and ink smudge effects to avoid a digital font feel. Calligraphy color is deep ink-blue or soft black, unified with the scene. Style: Fusion of ink wash and modern minimalist design, spring Zen, ethereal and moist, serene atmosphere, restrained warm-cool contrast, cinematic lighting, high-end artistic poster quality, 8K ultra-clear details.

entries.title: Epic Chinese Cityscape Ribbon Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A stunning vertical poster illustration on a textured cream paper background, featuring a massive, flowing translucent red silk ribbon that spirals diagonally from the bottom right to the top left. At the bottom right, one woman in a flowing traditional red dress holds the end of the ribbon. The ribbon frames a highly detailed, sprawling cityscape that transitions from historic to modern. The lower and middle sections showcase traditional Chinese temples, pagodas, and historic arcade buildings adorned with red lanterns, alongside blooming peonies and golden clouds. Integrated into the left side of the ribbon's flow are three traditional Yingge dancers with painted faces in dynamic poses. The upper section reveals a sweeping teal coastal bay with modern skyscrapers, one long suspension bridge, three ships navigating the water, distant mountains, and seagulls flying near a golden sun. The bottom left corner features elegant typography: "SPRING 2026" in a serif font, large golden Chinese calligraphy reading "汕头", smaller vertical text "百载商埠 · 魅力汕头", and "SHANTOU CHINA" with a small red seal stamp. The art style is a breathtaking fusion of traditional Chinese ink wash painting and modern digital fantasy art, utilizing a vibrant palette of crimson, teal, and gold.

entries.title: Surreal Cityscape Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A breathtaking, surreal travel poster on a white canvas background, featuring a magical, glowing red silk ribbon that flows diagonally from the bottom right to the top left, seamlessly blending traditional and modern elements of a city. At the bottom right, a tiny figure of a woman in a flowing red Hanfu holds the end of the ribbon. As the ribbon winds upward, it transforms into a dynamic cityscape. The lower-middle section features multi-story wooden stilt houses glowing with warm lanterns with a modern monorail train passing through them. The center showcases a vibrant, illuminated modern metropolis with a cluster of futuristic skyscrapers connected by a skybridge, a wide river with boats, a red suspension bridge, and a cable car suspended in the air. The top fades into majestic, misty mountains, traditional pavilions, and a pale red sun. The left side of the poster features elegant typography: large, golden, textured Chinese calligraphy reading "重庆", with the English text "CHONGQING" below it. Further down, the text "SPRING 2026" is displayed in a clean, serif font, accompanied by smaller vertical Chinese text and red traditional seal stamps. The overall style is a masterful blend of traditional Chinese ink wash painting and hyper-realistic, cinematic 3D rendering with soft, ethereal clouds and mist framing the composition.

entries.title: Gothic Mystery Movie Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic, dark gothic mystery movie poster. In the center, a lone man wearing a trench coat and fedora stands with his back to the viewer, looking up at a massive, imposing gothic clock tower. The clock face is illuminated, and the structure around it is shattering with dark fragments falling. The setting is a foggy, wet cobblestone square at night, illuminated by warm yellow streetlamps and glowing windows from surrounding European-style buildings. A full moon shines through cloudy skies. There are exactly 3 ravens: one perched on a stone monument on the left, and two flying in the sky. The monument on the left has engraved text "VERITAS IN UMBRA, TEMPUS NEMINI PARET". On the right, a wooden signpost has 3 directional arrows reading "Marktplatz", "Uhrenturm", and "Alte Gasse", with a small newspaper leaning against it reading "Die Uhr steht." and "Wer lügt?". The poster features elegant, slightly distressed serif Japanese typography. At the top, a horizontal tagline reads 真夜中、時は止まり、嘘が動き出す。. On the upper left, a vertical tagline reads その鐘の音が、真実を葬った。. In the lower center, the large main title reads 時計塔の殺人. Below the title is a smaller tagline "時を欺いたのは、誰だ。" followed by a dense block of realistic movie credits including director, cast, and crew names. At the very bottom, the release text 2025年 秋 全国ロードショー is displayed alongside a website URL and rating logos. The entire poster is framed by a thin, ornate gold border.

Move the main title LEONARDO A LIFE IN ROLES to the top right. Relocate the filmography timeline to the right column beneath the title, and append new era category labels to the far right: "YOUTH 1990s", "ASCENT 2000s", "EXCESS 2010s", and "SURVIVAL 2020s". Shift the blended character montage to the left side and lower middle, featuring exactly 12 distinct smaller character portraits (including a pilot, a man yelling into a microphone, a tuxedoed man toasting, and a bearded frontiersman). In the bottom left corner, introduce new elements not in the reference: a vintage pocket watch on a chain, blood splatter, and an axe handle. HE HOLDS UP A MIRROR TO THE CENTURY. and exactly 2 award laurel graphics reading "ACADEMY AWARD WINNER" and "A CAREER FOR THE AGES". Add a final bottom-center tagline SAME MAN. ENDLESS TRUTHS. above the signature.

entries.title: Calligraphic City Impression Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: 【Background and Skeleton Lines】 Deep black background, a thick and powerful ink calligraphy S-shaped curve winding across the screen, vigorous strokes with varied ink density, forming the visual skeleton and narrative flow. 【Subject: thrush】 Above the curve, a thrush with wings spread occupies the visual core; the body is transparent like glass, reflecting traditional architectural layers inside with blue-green light streams; the outline is edged with fine gold lines. 【Mid-ground: Classical Architectural Sequence】 Below the bird, various scenic spots of Guangzhou are scattered along the ink line: Baiyun Mountain, Chen Clan Ancestral Hall, and the Canton Tower; the main tones are blue-green and pale gold with clear architectural details; Kapok flowers and ink-wash clouds add ethereal layers. 【Foreground: White Cranes and Water Surface】 Lakeside foreground: several white cranes in various elegant poses; the light blue water is mirror-like with sparkling light, creating a serene atmosphere. 【Background: Mountains】 Distant mountains rise and fall in indigo ink shading from thick to light, creating depth of field. 【Composition and Lighting】 Non-linear perspective with the ink curve as the axis; light radiates from the center creating strong contrast; cool tones dominate with warm accents; fusion of Eastern aesthetics and modern imagery. 【Technical Specs】 8K Ultra HD rendering, extreme detail precision, best quality, ratio 9:16

entries.title: Cinematic Mesoamerican Warrior Portrait
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A photorealistic, highly detailed portrait of a muscular Mesoamerican warrior standing proudly. He wears an elaborate headdress adorned with red, green, and black feathers and a carved stone mask. His face features dark painted lines across his cheeks and nose. He is outfitted in heavy, intricate ceremonial armor, including a large stone necklace with a face pendant, armbands, and a detailed belt with a loincloth featuring carved glyphs and faces. In his right hand, he grips a tall wooden spear with a stone tip and red tassels, and in his left hand, he holds a round shield displaying a large carved face with red fringed edges. The background features a towering ancient stepped stone pyramid with steep stairs, banners hanging near the top entrance, and small figures standing on the steps. Lush green jungle foliage surrounds the temple under a partly cloudy sky, with a tall carved stone stela standing in the right foreground, all captured with epic cinematic lighting.

entries.searchText: cinematic mesoamerican warrior portrait generates a highly detailed, photorealistic portrait of an ancient warrior in ceremonial armor standing before a towering stepped pyramid. a photorealistic, highly detailed portrait of a muscular mesoamerican warrior standing proudly. he wears an elaborate headdress adorned with red, green, and black feathers and a carved stone mask. his face features dark painted lines across his cheeks and nose. he is outfitted in heavy, intricate ceremonial armor, including a large stone necklace with a face pendant, armbands, and a detailed belt with a loincloth featuring carved glyphs and faces. in his right hand, he grips a tall wooden spear with a stone tip and red tassels, and in his left hand, he holds a round shield displaying a large carved face with red fringed edges. the background features a towering ancient stepped stone pyramid with steep stairs, banners hanging near the top entrance, and small figures standing on the steps. lush green jungle foliage surrounds the temple under a partly cloudy sky, with a tall carved stone stela standing in the right foreground, all captured with epic cinematic lighting. poster / flyer portrait cinematic realistic

entries.title: Cyberpunk Formula Neo Racing HUD
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A hyper-realistic futuristic racing game splash screen set in a neon-soaked cyberpunk city at night, showing a Formula-style electric race on a rain-slick street circuit from a low third-person chase camera behind the player's car. The main car is a sleek black open-wheel racer with glowing cyan accent lines, cyan-lit wheel rims, and bright red rear light text reading NEO.JP, drifting slightly on wet asphalt and throwing sparks from the underbody. Ahead are 3 opponent cars total, including a red open-wheel car on the right, a darker car in the center distance, and another car farther ahead near the curve. The road curves left through a canyon of tall buildings covered in giant LED billboards and vertical neon signs, with strong reflections in the wet pavement. At the center background, a massive illuminated billboard reads FORMULA NEO with NEO in huge cyan letters. Add yellow illuminated chevron barriers along both sides of the turn and intense motion blur emphasizing speed. Overlay a complete esports racing HUD: top left position indicator showing 2/8 with a small POS label; a left leaderboard with 8 ranked drivers total, listing 1 KAZUKI, 2 NEO DRIVER, 3 REIJI, 4 YUINA, 5 SHO, 6 ALICE, 7 LUCAS, 8 TAIGA, with time gaps next to most names; top right lap info showing LAP 2/3, BEST 00:58.123, LAP 00:21.456, sector times S1 00:21.456, S2 00:36.890, S3 --:--:---; an objective box reading OBJECTIVE and 1位でフィニッシュする; bottom left a track minimap and a DRS meter at 98%; bottom right a circular futuristic speedometer showing 278 KM/H and gear 6. Along the bottom foreground, place a lineup of 8 anime-style team member portraits from the chest up, evenly spanning the width like a character roster overlay: 1 a silver-haired person in a white racing jacket, 2 a red-haired person in a red jacket over a black shirt with a flame emblem, 3 a long purple-haired person in a purple outfit, 4 a black-haired person in a dark Team Neo racing suit, 5 a short blue-black-haired person in a dark suit, 6 a light-brown-haired person in a gray suit, 7 a green-haired person in a white and green outfit with a hand on the chest, 8 a blond person in a yellow jacket, plus at the far right an additional pink-haired hoodie portrait integrated into the bottom lineup for a dense team-banner look; center the text TEAM NEO above the bottom portraits in glowing cyan UI styling. Use a polished AAA game key art aesthetic, ultra-detailed reflections, cinematic contrast, electric blue and magenta lighting, sharp UI graphics, dramatic perspective, and a highly realistic yet stylized promotional poster finish.
entries.description: This prompt generates a high-energy futuristic racing game poster with a full esports HUD, neon city track, multiple race cars, and a Team Neo anime character roster overlay.

entries.title: Dramatic Border City YouTube Thumbnail
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image as the base photo, redesign it into a high-impact Japanese YouTube travel/news thumbnail. Keep the border-gate location recognizable, but crop tighter around the central monument, boost contrast and saturation, add dramatic blue-vs-red lighting split down the middle with a vertical lightning beam marking the border, and make the layout feel like an urgent documentary thumbnail. Reposition the Kazakhstan flag to the top left and the China flag to the top right inside bordered boxes with drop shadows. Add a black-and-gold brush-stroke banner across the top with the main title 一帯一路の要衝. entries.title: Cinematic Character Poster with Layered Depth
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Design a high-end cinematic character poster in a layered depth composition (9:16 vertical) with a strong foreground-midground-background separation instead of silhouette framing.
The character stands slightly off-center in a dynamic, perspective-driven pose, interacting naturally with the environment (wind, light, particles, fabric movement). The camera angle should feel intentional-low-angle for power or slight tilt for tension-creating a sense of motion and presence.
The background should not be contained inside shapes. Instead, build a living world around the character:
atmospheric environments (fog, city lights, ruins, nature, etc.)
light rays, volumetric glow, drifting particles
subtle storytelling elements placed naturally in space (not collage-based)
Introduce floating fragments or layered planes (glass shards, light panels, memories, holographic slices, or torn paper edges) that orbit or intersect the scene, each containing faint symbolic visuals tied to the character's story-keep them minimal and elegant, not cluttered.
Lighting should be cinematic and directional:
strong key light shaping the subject
rim lighting to separate from background
soft gradients and shadow falloff for depth
Color palette should follow a controlled dual-tone system (e.g., teal-orange, violet-gold, crimson-black) with smooth transitions and no oversaturation.
Typography:
place the title in a clean, modern cinematic layout
integrate text subtly into the environment (ground plane, light projection, or floating UI style)
avoid heavy or oversized typography
Overall style: ultra-realistic + cinematic editorial, sharp detail on subject, soft atmospheric depth in background, minimal but intentional storytelling elements, premium movie-poster quality.
Avoid: silhouette fill compositions, heavy collage density, watercolor textures, or ink-wash edges. Focus on spatial depth, realism, and cinematic immersion.
entries.description: A prompt designed to create high-end movie posters featuring a strong sense of spatial depth and cinematic lighting, focusing on a character interacting naturally with an atmospheric environment.

entries.title: Retro Japanese Lovart Event Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A bold Japanese event thumbnail poster on a light gray background in a retro arcade pop-art style. Center the composition around a huge diagonal wordmark reading "LOVART" in oversized white block letters with thick black outline, chunky 3D feel, subtle pixel-stepped inner edges, and yellow halftone shadow accents. Above it, place one line of large Japanese header text in bright yellow with black outline: "AIデザイン運用時培会". Below the main wordmark, add a two-line Japanese subtitle in heavy white lettering with black outline and slight tilt: "最新ツール実銃 ×" on the first line and "プロの暗続力" on the second line. At the lower center, place a pixel-style black text label with a yellow drop shadow reading "speaker kats". On the right side overlapping the main logo, add a bright yellow jagged starburst badge with thick black outline containing 3 stacked lines of black text: "5.10(sat)", "19:00", "START". Decorate the layout with exactly 12 playful gaming-style accent icons and shapes scattered around the logo: 2 yellow five-point stars, 2 pairs of red cherries with green stems, 2 small yellow game controllers, 1 black circle with a yellow gamepad symbol inside, 2 solid yellow triangles, 1 yellow dotted triangle, 1 white outlined polygon, and 1 small black-and-white spiral square. Use a high-contrast palette of yellow, black, white, and light gray, with thick outlines, sticker-like layering, comic halftone dots, and crisp readable Japanese typography.

entries.title: Explosive Japanese X Monetization Thumbnail
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a flashy Japanese YouTube thumbnail in a high-impact anime marketing style, 16:9 landscape, packed with neon green energy effects, gold sparkles, speed lines, lens flares, and thick black drop shadows. The composition is split with bold promotional text dominating the left and center, and a cute chibi anime boy on the right pointing directly at the viewer with an enthusiastic smile. He has tousled dark brown hair with vivid neon green streaks, large bright green eyes, soft blush on his cheeks, and wears a black hoodie layered with a green-trimmed jacket over an orange inner shirt. Use glossy cel-shaded rendering, crisp outlines, high contrast, and exaggerated depth for a clickable social-media-thumbnail look. At the very top, place a curved red ribbon banner with gold trim and a gift box icon on the left; inside the banner put the Japanese headline text 無料10大特典プレゼント in bold white and yellow lettering. In the main center-left area, place huge Japanese text with dramatic 3D styling and metallic gradients: a giant gold "10", a white "日で", a massive neon green "X", then silver-white "収益化", and gold-orange "達成", reading exactly 10日でX収益化達成. Surround this headline with upward green arrows, starburst glints, and explosive light effects. Add 4 floating platform-style icons around the headline area: 1 pink social-like icon with a white heart, 1 blue speech-bubble icon with a white user silhouette, 1 tilted black smartphone displaying a white X logo, and 1 stack of gold coins with a yen symbol coin in front. Along the bottom, place 3 glowing green feature boxes aligned horizontally, each with a distinct icon and Japanese copy: box 1 has a beginner mark icon and text X初心者でも簡単収益化, box 2 has a clock icon and text "1日1時間の作業でOK", box 3 has a calendar icon and text "最短10日で収益化条件達成". At the bottom right, add a large glossy red rounded call-to-action button with a white border glow, white Japanese text 今すぐ受け取る, a white play triangle on the right side of the button, and a clicking hand cursor near the lower-right edge. The entire image should feel explosive, urgent, and optimized for high click-through rate, using saturated greens, reds, golds, black shadows, and metallic highlights.

entries.title: Lisbon Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic travel-poster style aerial photograph of Lisbon, Portugal, viewed from an elevated lookout over a historic city center with warm terracotta rooftops, cream and pastel buildings, a broad plaza with patterned black-and-white paving, a tall monument column, tree-lined squares, and distant hills under a vivid blue sky with scattered soft white clouds. Use golden daylight, crisp realistic detail, slight teal-and-orange travel photography color grading, wide landscape composition, and no people emphasized. Overlay elegant white typography centered in the upper-middle sky: the large handwritten brush-script title "Lisbon" with long sweeping strokes, a thin horizontal decorative divider beneath it with a small diamond ornament in the center, and below that an all-caps spaced sans-serif subtitle reading "A CITY OF LIGHT, COLOR AND CHARM" on two lines. Keep the text clean, bright white, balanced, and legible against the sky, like a premium destination postcard or tourism campaign image.
entries.description: A cinematic Lisbon cityscape travel poster with elegant white script typography for tourism, postcards, or destination marketing.

entries.title: Lisbon Night Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic travel poster photograph of Lisbon at night, showing a steep narrow old European street descending into the distance with wet cobblestones and two parallel tram rails curving down the hill. The viewpoint is from the upper part of the street, looking downhill between tall aged buildings with balconies, barred windows, textured plaster walls, stone doorways, and warm glowing street lamps. The right foreground has a bright vintage wall lantern above a doorway, climbing plants catching golden light, and a small potted plant near the curb. The background fades into deep blue night with soft bokeh city lights and a blurred hilltop landmark. Use shallow depth of field, moody cinematic color grading, strong contrast between warm amber lamps and cool navy shadows, glossy reflections on the rails and stones, realistic photography, 16:9 horizontal composition. Add elegant overlaid typography in the lower-left and center-left: exactly 3 text elements reading Lisbon in very large white handwritten brush script, BEAUTIFUL NIGHTS in small uppercase gold serif lettering beneath it, and UNFORGETTABLE MEMORIES in wider-spaced uppercase gold serif lettering below. Add exactly 3 decorative elements under the subtitles: one thin gold horizontal line on the left, one small gold four-petal fleur-de-lis ornament in the center, and one thin gold horizontal line on the right. Keep the typography crisp and integrated like a luxury travel postcard; no people, no vehicles in the foreground, no extra text, no watermark.
entries.description: A cinematic luxury travel poster featuring a moody nighttime Lisbon street with tram rails, warm lantern light, and elegant overlaid typography.

entries.title: Lisbon Tram Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic travel poster-style photograph of a narrow old European street in Lisbon, viewed from slightly above and looking downhill between tall historic apartment buildings. A classic yellow tram is centered on the tracks, facing the viewer, with cobblestone pavement, overhead tram wires, aged cream and yellow facades, stone window frames, balconies, street lamps, and graffiti-covered walls on both sides. Warm golden-hour sunlight should create long soft shadows and a nostalgic urban atmosphere, with a glimpse of water or distant horizon at the end of the street. Add bold centered typography over the tram: the main headline reads LISBON in large distressed white uppercase block letters with wide spacing. Beneath it, add a smaller handwritten cursive subtitle reading Lost in the right direction. Add thin horizontal divider lines extending left and right under the subtitle, with a small white diamond/star ornament centered between the lines. Use realistic photography, high detail, warm color grading, strong depth, no people, no vehicles other than the single tram, and no extra text or watermark.

entries.title: Lisbon Vintage Tram Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a cinematic travel poster based on a realistic street photograph of two vintage Lisbon trams passing close together on sunlit tracks. The scene should feel like a warm late-afternoon European city street, with deep shadows, golden highlights, parked cars and greenery in the background, and passengers visible through the tram windows. The trams are classic red, yellow, cream, and dark trim, with wooden window frames and authentic advertising panels; include small readable details such as a Coca-Cola style script ad on the left tram and a small route number "56" on the right tram. Compose the image horizontally in a 3:2 aspect ratio, tightly cropped so the tram fronts dominate the frame and overlap near the center. Add large elegant white handwritten brush-script title text across the middle reading Lisbon, slightly slanted and spanning both trams. Beneath it, add a centered uppercase serif subtitle reading WHERE EVERY CORNER TELLS A STORY, with thin decorative horizontal lines on both sides and a small diamond ornament below. Use high-contrast travel editorial color grading, realistic photography, crisp details, natural reflections in glass, and no extra logos or watermarks beyond the tram advertisements.
entries.description: A cinematic travel poster featuring vintage Lisbon trams with elegant destination typography for tourism, editorial, or social media use.

entries.title: Surrealist Architectural Vintage Collage
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vertical 9:16 digital surrealist architectural vintage collage on a warm cream textured paper background with subtle grain, stains, and aged print speckles. Center the composition around a monumental gray concrete arch with two thick vertical legs and a rounded top, realistic brutalist texture with pores and chipped edges. Behind it place one large muted red-orange circle, partially obscured by the arch, like a flat sun or painted paper disk. Suspend a single classical plaster column fragment vertically in front of the arch, slightly left of center, with a capital and base, floating without support. Add exactly 4 floating concrete cubes: one large cube near the upper right, one small cube below-left of it, one tiny cube at lower left, and one medium cube near the lower-left bottom edge. Add exactly 1 irregular broken concrete rock fragment at the lower left. Add exactly 6 birds flying from the right side of the arch toward the upper-right area, rendered like vintage cutout swallows with dark wings and cream bellies. Include abstract drafting marks: dotted construction lines, a rectangular grid behind the upper-left of the arch, thin circular target lines on the right, a dotted diagonal guide on the left, and faint horizontal and vertical alignment lines crossing the collage. At the bottom, layer torn paper shapes: one beige textured scrap under the left arch leg, one olive-green torn paper patch behind the right leg, and one ochre-yellow vertical paint swatch with rough brush edges in front of the lower right leg. Use a restrained palette of warm cream, muted red-orange, gray concrete, olive green, ochre yellow, and charcoal drafting lines. Keep the style as mixed-media vintage editorial collage, surreal but elegant, with generous empty space around the central object, no typography, no frame, no watermark.
entries.description: Generates a vertical mixed-media collage featuring brutalist architecture, classical fragments, birds, drafting lines, and torn paper textures for poster-style artwork.

entries.title: Alexander the Great Historical Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Create a monumental vintage-style historical poster illustration of Alexander the Great standing triumphantly on a rearing black war horse overlooking his empire.
Style: ultra-detailed engraved illustration mixed with classical etching, woodcut printmaking, and antique imperial poster aesthetics. Rich navy blue and gold/ivory duotone palette, high contrast lighting, intricate linework, museum-quality historical artwork, epic cinematic composition, no photorealism.
Composition:
Vertical poster layout.
Massive bold typography at the top reading: "ALEXANDER THE GREAT".
Ancient Greek subtitle text beneath the title.
Alexander centered heroically wearing ornate Macedonian armor, flowing royal cape, leather sandals, and holding a sword.
Powerful black horse posed dynamically on rocky terrain.
Background filled with sprawling ancient Greek cityscapes, temples, mountains, and coastlines.
Faint illustrated map routes across the sky symbolizing Alexander's conquests from Greece to Persia and India.
Large marching Macedonian army formations in the distance carrying banners and spears.
Foreground elements include ancient shields, Corinthian helmet, spears, flags, ruins, and rocky cliffs.
Classical Greek architecture ruins framing the scene.
Art Direction:
Extremely intricate engraved textures and cross-hatching.
Inspired by antique military propaganda posters, classical mythology engravings, and luxury history-book illustrations.
Deep navy background with metallic gold/beige detailing only.
Dramatic heroic atmosphere, imperial grandeur, timeless legendary feel.
Sharp ornamental borders around the poster edges.
Highly detailed line art with layered depth and dense historical storytelling elements.
Aspect Ratio: 3:4 vertical poster.
entries.description: A monumental vintage-style engraved illustration of Alexander the Great on a rearing horse, in a navy and gold duotone palette.

entries.title: Retro Mid-Century Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Design a vertical retro mid-century travel poster of [CITY NAME] showcasing [LANDMARK]. Stick to a tight 3-color scheme: cream-toned paper background, black technical line drawing, plus one [COLOR] accent.
Aesthetic: minimalist isometric top-down aerial perspective with very fine cross-hatching and silkscreen print grain.
Color rules: fill the entire sky in flat solid [COLOR], add small [COLOR] touches on rooftops or street details. Zero gradients allowed.
Typography: large bold sans-serif "[CITY NAME]" at the top in cream, with the city's name in its native language set smaller in cream beneath it.
entries.description: A minimalist isometric travel poster featuring fine cross-hatching and a tight three-color scheme for a vintage mid-century aesthetic.

entries.title: Satoru Gojo Luxury Editorial Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
A minimalist, high-end graphic design poster of Satoru Gojo in an awakened, god-like state. The background is a crisp, solid stark white, creating strong negative space and a luxury editorial aesthetic.

Character: Gojo is floating effortlessly mid-air in a dynamic pose, one hand extended forward as if activating Infinity. His white hair flows upward with subtle glowing energy trails. He wears futuristic monochrome streetwear: an oversized white tactical trench hoodie, loose techwear cargo pants, and sleek high-top sneakers with metallic detailing.

Angle: Dramatic low-angle perspective looking up at Gojo, making him feel untouchable, powerful, and larger than life.

Typography: The word "GOJO" is written in massive ultra-bold black sans-serif typography stretching across the entire frame. The character partially overlaps the letters for cinematic depth. Below it, "LIMITLESS" is written in a smaller elegant spaced-out font. Vertical Japanese text "無限" (Infinity) appears neatly aligned on one side in deep electric blue.

Color Palette: Primarily black and white with sharp accents of electric blue and neon violet only around the eyes, fingertips, and subtle energy outlines.

Style: Clean vector-style illustration with razor-sharp linework, minimal effects, polished editorial composition, modern luxury poster design, high contrast, premium fashion-campaign energy, 8k resolution.

entries.title: Istanbul Typographic Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a premium editorial illustrated travel poster for ISTANBUL, built around 8 enormous tall block capital letters spelling "ISTANBUL" across a wide horizontal cream canvas. Use each letter as a vertical window filled with detailed Istanbul scenery: 1) I shows the Maiden's Tower on the Bosphorus with a Turkish flag and ferry boats, 2) S shows hillside waterfront neighborhoods, domes, minarets, clouds, and birds, 3) T shows Galata Tower above narrow streets with a red vintage tram in the foreground, 4) A shows the Bosphorus with ferries, sailboats, bridges, and distant skyline, 5) N shows Hagia Sophia and layered mosque domes in warm peach and stone tones, 6) B shows the Bosphorus Bridge, water, a ferry, and waterfront palaces, 7) U shows steep historic streets, colorful stacked houses, greenery, and a large tree, 8) L shows Ortaköy Mosque by the waterfront with two minarets and flying seagulls. Above the title, add a thin minimalist skyline strip containing 13 small illustrated elements from left to right: trees, a small domed pavilion, a teal car, a red tram, distant city towers, a ferry, a suspension bridge, Maiden's Tower, another teal car, a grand mosque with multiple minarets, a peach sun, a round green tree, and a final mosque minaret. Style it as a refined mid-century travel poster with clean vector-like illustration, soft muted palette of teal blue, sea green, dusty peach, terracotta, warm cream, and charcoal linework; crisp geometry, subtle paper grain, elegant negative space, tiny birds and clouds, no photorealism, no extra text besides the city name.

The scene is a pedestrian street in Chengdu Taikoo Li, China, drawn with precise thin lines like a hand-rendered urban sketch: traditional Daci Temple architecture with ornate curved tiled roofs and bamboo on the left, modern glass retail buildings with balconies and storefronts on the right, a long paved promenade receding in one-point perspective, dense but lightly drawn crowds walking and sitting at outdoor café tables, bicycles, planters, trees, umbrellas, and distant high-rise towers with a slender landmark tower centered in the skyline. At the top, place a large elegant Chinese headline 成都太古里 in dark reddish-brown serif calligraphy, with a smaller centered subtitle below reading 中国 · 四川 · 成都 flanked by thin horizontal lines. Include exactly 3 visible sign text elements in the street scene: a vertical stone sign in the lower left reading 大慈寺 with small English "Daci Temple LI" beneath it, a hanging vertical shop sign on the right reading 成都太古里 with small English "TAIKOO LI" beneath it, and a traditional temple plaque on the left gate reading 古大慈寺. Keep the composition airy with large blank space in the upper half, no heavy colors, no photorealism, no thick outlines, no messy hatching, and no extra title text beyond the specified signs.
entries.description: A vertical sepia architectural line-art travel poster of Chengdu Taikoo Li for city branding, editorial covers, or presentation visuals.

entries.title: Minimalist Line Art Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Generate an ultra-high-resolution minimalist line-art travel poster of Tokyo, treating the city as a stylish slice of everyday urban life instead of a touristy postcard shot. CORE COMPOSITION: - Center the frame on the city's most recognizable street, intersection, alley, tram corridor, or pedestrian avenue - Populate the foreground with locals, commuters, cyclists, travelers, shoppers, students, people sitting at cafés - Let the figures naturally embody the city's local fashion and daily lifestyle - Fill the background with realistic local signage, cafés, restaurants, transit signs, storefronts, and architectural detail - Weave landmarks organically into the everyday scene, never exaggerated or hero-shot - Include authentic local-language type and culturally specific visual cues - Large bold typography centered at the top: "TOKYO" - Subtitle directly below: local language + country name STYLE: ultra clean vector illustration, Swiss modernist travel poster, minimal line art, monoline drawing, mid-century editorial feel, architectural illustration, Japanese graphic poster aesthetic, precise geometric perspective, extremely clean negative space, premium travel branding look LINE STYLE: - monochrome line-based illustration only - thin, highly precise linework - minimal fill areas - city-map-like detail density - rhythmic layering of signs, buildings, windows, and street objects - visually dense yet tightly organized composition COLOR SYSTEM - VERY IMPORTANT: - use only ONE main color + ONE background color - pick a color that best captures the city's atmosphere - monochrome silkscreen poster vibe - no rainbow palettes - no excessive neon - color should mirror the city's architecture, climate, nightlife, and cultural identity COMPOSITION: - vertical poster layout - frontal street-level perspective - pedestrians crossing or moving naturally - balanced urban rhythm and visual flow - should feel like a premium city-brand campaign poster MOOD: stylish urban life, calm yet lively, editorial travel magazine cover, timeless city identity, premium tourism campaign visual, minimal yet richly detailed TEXT QUALITY: - all typography must be legible and accurate - no random characters - no broken or distorted letters - local signage should feel authentic and natural - professional editorial typography alignment OUTPUT: - vertical poster composition - 8K ultra detailed - print-ready - ultra sharp vector quality

entries.title: Vintage Alpine Train Lounge
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a photorealistic ultra-wide 3:1 panoramic interior scene inside a vintage alpine train dining car or observation lounge, with warm polished wood paneling, rounded wooden ceiling trim, large rectangular windows wrapping around both sides and the front, and soft sheer white curtains on the right. The seating consists of two long facing green leather bench sofas forming a cozy booth, with simple wooden armrests and bases. In the center is a small round pedestal table covered by a white lace tablecloth, holding a tiny glowing table lamp and a small book or object. Outside every window is a bright winter mountain landscape: snow-covered pine trees in the foreground, misty snowy peaks in the distance, and a large central mountain framed by the front window under pale blue daylight. Use realistic natural light, crisp snow reflections, subtle interior shadows, nostalgic luxury railcar design, symmetrical centered composition, calm Sunday getaway mood, no people, no text. Emphasize high detail, cinematic realism, clean glass, warm brown wood against cool white snow, and a peaceful panoramic travel atmosphere. Customize the scene as a vintage alpine train observation lounge, with deep green leather, snowy alpine mountains and pine forest, bright winter morning, and 3:1 ultra-wide panorama.

entries.title: Gritty Naruto Poster Illustration
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic full-body anime character illustration of Naruto Uzumaki standing on a dark curved rooftop or giant pipe, facing forward with a calm, intense expression and blue eyes. He has spiky blond hair, a black forehead protector with a metal plate and spiral leaf symbol, and three whisker-like marks on each cheek. Pose him with one hand raised in a vertical ninja hand sign in front of his mouth while the other arm crosses his body. Dress him in an orange shinobi jumpsuit partly covered by a long black, ragged, wind-torn cloak with a high collar, loose black scarf ribbons streaming leftward, black boots, and bandage wraps around one thigh; include a circular red-orange spiral patch on the upper sleeve. Use a dark desaturated blue-gray background with no scenery except atmospheric texture. Surround the character with exactly 1 orange chakra-like spiral streak wrapping around his body and exactly 8 small orange leaf or ember fragments scattered in the air. Render in a gritty high-contrast ink-and-gouache anime style: rough black brush strokes, scratched dry-brush edges, painterly orange highlights, deep shadows, limited palette of charcoal black, muted navy, tan skin, and burnt orange. Composition is vertical poster format, character centered slightly right, viewed from a low angle so the legs and cloak feel imposing. entries.prompt: Create a vertical minimalist Mother's Day smartphone wallpaper on a warm off-white paper-textured background, centered composition with lots of negative space. At the bottom right, include two small black sans-serif lines: "TO THE MOST WONDERFUL MOTHER" and KANON. Use a refined Japanese greeting-card aesthetic, natural daylight, delicate shadows around the flowers, realistic botanical detail, clean premium magazine layout, no border, no extra objects.

entries.title: Psychedelic Cosmic Drift Concert Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a square 1960s psychedelic concert poster in a Wes Wilson-inspired San Francisco rock poster style, with dense hand-drawn warped typography, high-contrast screenprint texture, rough ink grain, and a dark navy background. The headline at the very top should read COSMIC DRIFT in huge hot-pink melting bubble letters that stretch across the width and curl into spiral terminals. Center the composition on a black silhouette of a curly-haired guitarist in a dramatic bent-knee pose, holding an electric guitar, set in front of a giant orange-yellow melting eyeball sun with a green iris and red vein details; add orange flame-like waves radiating from both sides. Include exactly 6 distinct text blocks: 1) top headline "COSMIC DRIFT", 2) left venue location block "LIVE IN SAN FRANCISCO", 3) right date block "SATURDAY JUNE 21 1969", 4) small central block "AT THE", 5) large lower venue block "ELECTRIC OWL BALLROOM SAN FRANCISCO", and 6) bottom supporting act banner "WITH VELVET HAZE AND THE BURNING MONKS". Use saturated hot pink, burnt orange, acid green, mustard yellow, and deep indigo, with ornate vine-like flourishes, swirling borders, paisley corners, and tightly packed negative space. Make the lettering intentionally wavy, distorted, and hand-rendered but still mostly readable, like a vintage 1969 concert bill printed on slightly worn paper. The venue should be The Electric Owl Ballroom, the city should be San Francisco, the date should be Saturday June 21 1969, and the supporting acts should be Velvet Haze and The Burning Monks.
entries.description: Generates a vintage 1969 San Francisco psychedelic rock concert poster with warped typography, a guitarist silhouette, and a melting eyeball sun centerpiece.

entries.title: Psychedelic Cosmic Drift Concert Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vintage 1969 psychedelic concert poster in a Wes Wilson-inspired San Francisco rock-poster style, printed on aged folded paper with scuffs, creases, faded ink, and a tan border. The composition is a square poster with a deep purple background filled with subtle swirling paisley waves, enclosed by an irregular black vine-and-tendril frame with neon green highlights. At the top, huge warped melting hand-lettered headline text reads COSMIC DRIFT, in orange-to-hot-pink gradients with black shadowing and green outline, stretched and distorted into organic bulbous letterforms. Beneath and around the title are 6 distinct event text elements: "performing LIVE at THE ELECTRIC OWL BALLROOM", "JUNE 21 1969", "SAN FRANCISCO 777 GROOVE ST AT THIRD", "with VELVET HAZE and", "THE BURNING MONKS", and a tiny footer reading "TICKETS $3.50 • DOORS 8PM • BROUGHT TO YOU BY THE HAIGHT INDEPENDENT SOUND SOCIETY". The central art shows a black silhouette of a long-haired electric guitarist leaning backward in a dramatic rock pose, one arm raised, guitar neck angled upward. Behind the performer, make a radiant orange, lime green, yellow, and magenta burst of psychedelic rays, wavy stripes, and liquid shapes. In the upper right of the burst, place a giant surreal eyeball-sun with red veins, a hypnotic spiral pupil, rainbow rays, and dripping goo hanging from the lower edge. Add exactly 7 smaller floating spiral-eye discs across the burst, plus a few tiny planets, mushrooms, bubbles, stars, flowers, flames, and abstract 1960s counterculture doodles. Use saturated fluorescent colors: purple, hot pink, orange, lime green, yellow, and black. Make the typography dense, hand-drawn, highly ornamental, legible but wavy and hallucinatory, with authentic screen-printed texture and slight misregistration.
entries.description: Generates a vintage 1969 San Francisco psychedelic rock concert poster with warped lettering, a guitarist silhouette, and surreal eyeball-sun artwork.

entries.title: Wukong Calligraphy Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic vertical vintage Chinese mythic poster on aged beige rice paper with visible fibers, cracks, scratches, and distressed print texture. The composition is dominated by two enormous black Chinese calligraphy characters reading 悟空, rendered as bold blocky brush typography filling almost the entire background from edge to edge. Place a small heroic Monkey King warrior figure near the lower center, walking left to right across a rough horizontal red cliff or platform; he wears dark ornate armor with ragged flowing red cloth ribbons, a golden headband or crown, and carries a long golden staff angled downward across his body. Behind the right side of the calligraphy, add a worn circular gold ink ring motif, like a faded seal or halo, partially overlapping the negative space of the character. Use a limited palette of matte black, parchment beige, blood red, and tarnished gold, with high contrast, rough screen-printed edges, ink bleed, grunge speckles, and cinematic wuxia energy. Make the figure tiny compared with the monumental typography to emphasize scale and legend. No modern objects, no border, poster-style centered layout.

entries.prompt: Using the provided reference image, transform the ordinary phone snapshot into a cinematic cyberpunk movie-poster style edit. Keep the same subject, pose, outfit, helmet, foreground composition, and convention-center setting intact, but dramatically relight and color grade the scene with a dark, moody Blade Runner-inspired cyberpunk atmosphere. Make the background darker and slightly defocused, deepen shadows, add high contrast, cool blue-gray tones, subtle vignette, and a soft filmic texture. Add a small warm amber reflection/glow on the helmet visor area as if from neon or sunset light, while preserving realistic skin texture and photographic detail. Do not change the character design or add text; make it look like a professionally retouched cinematic poster frame rather than a casual outdoor snapshot.
entries.description: Transforms a casual cosplay street photo into a dark Blade Runner-style cinematic poster while preserving the original subject and composition.

entries.title: Vintage Delhi India Gate Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a vintage travel poster for DELHI on warm off-white textured paper with subtle grain and faded ink. Use a clean centered editorial layout with 4 visible text elements: a huge uppercase block sans-serif headline at the top reading "DELHI" in pale dusty teal; a centered explanatory paragraph beneath it reading "India Gate is a war memorial located in the heart of New Delhi, India. Built in 1931, it stands 42 meters tall and honors the soldiers of the British Indian Army who died during World War I and the Third Anglo-Afghan War." in smaller bold teal type; a large Hindi label at the upper left of the image area reading "इंडिया गेट" in the same pale teal; and a page number at the upper right reading "03". The lower half contains one large rectangular photo-style image of India Gate, cropped from a low-angle viewpoint so the sandstone arch dominates the frame, showing beige stone blocks, carved cornices, circular medallions, the word "INDIA" near the top of the monument, and a soft blue sky with light clouds behind it. Keep the color palette muted and retro: dusty teal, cream paper, warm tan sandstone, and slightly desaturated sky blue. Add mild print wear, paper speckles, and a softly faded 1970s magazine-travel-guide aesthetic, with generous margins and precise alignment.
entries.description: Generates a retro editorial travel poster featuring Delhi's India Gate with bilingual-style labeling and informative monument text.

entries.title: Ancient Chinese Bronze Calligraphy Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A refined ancient Chinese poster design on warm ivory textured paper, minimalist editorial layout with large areas of negative space and a museum-catalog feel. The composition centers on the Chinese idiom 大丈夫當如是 rendered in bold, expressive black ink brush calligraphy, arranged vertically in 5 large characters on the left-center. On the right side, place a tall vertical line of elegant metallic-gold Chinese characters reading 彼可取而代之. In the center-right, feature a monumental dark bronze archaic ceremonial frame shaped like a squared jade bi or hooked rectangular ring, with weathered patina, heavy texture, rounded inner corners, and a stylized beast-head carving at the upper left corner. Inside the hollow opening of the bronze object, show a small misty historical landscape in pale grayscale ink wash: distant mountains, open plain, and a single upright flag on a pole with tattered cloth blowing in the wind. At the bottom center, place 1 separate bronze ritual vessel with two upright handles, squat rounded body, taotie-inspired relief patterns, and aged green-brown patina. Add multiple columns of small vertical Chinese annotation text around the composition like a scholarly exhibit poster: 1 thin vertical seasonal note on the far left, 1 compact vertical philosophical quote block at the upper right, 1 small vertical commentary block beside the main calligraphy, 1 lower-left source/explanation text block, and 1 lower-right era/culture text block. Include 4 small red seal stamps total placed in different areas, plus 1 tiny gold dragon emblem near the lower middle. Add subtle printed credit text at the bottom right reading DESIGNER : A CHIH. Color palette is off-white paper, matte black ink, dark oxidized bronze, muted grayscale landscape, antique gold typography, and cinnabar red seals. Lighting is soft and diffuse, flat poster presentation, straight-on view, ultra-clean high-end cultural graphic design, blending Song-dynasty aesthetics, calligraphy exhibition poster, bronzeware archaeology, and luxury editorial typography.
entries.description: A sophisticated cultural poster featuring bold Chinese calligraphy, archaic bronzeware, and scholarly annotations, ideal for historical editorial art or museum-style visual design.

entries.title: Add Cinematic Centered Title Banner
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Using REFERENCE_0 as the base artwork, expand it into a wide cinematic banner while preserving the same surreal abandoned library scene, composition, mood, and painterly lighting. Add a single centered title across the middle: MNEMOS. Set the text in a tall, clean, widely tracked all-caps sans-serif, bright warm white, sized large enough to span most of the frame width. Make the lettering feel integrated into the scene rather than pasted on: add a very subtle soft glow, a gentle shadow for readability, and a slightly dimmed outline or edge contrast so it sits naturally against the dark shelves and clouds. Keep the background untouched except for any minimal tonal balancing needed to improve text legibility and make the overall image look subtly more polished.

entries.title: Guangzhou Ink Brush Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A refined poster-style digital painting on a clean white background, featuring a large traditional calligraphy brush entering from the upper left corner and painting a bold, flowing S-shaped black ink stroke across the page. Inside the ink stroke, reveal a highly detailed panoramic cityscape of Guangzhou, blending modern skyline and historic waterside architecture into one continuous composition. In the upper section, show the contemporary skyline at sunrise or sunset with warm golden light, including the slender Canton Tower, dense glass skyscrapers, a river, bridges, and soft glowing clouds. Let the painted stroke curve downward into a scenic river corridor lined with lush green trees, colorful flowering accents, traditional Chinese pavilions, pagoda-style buildings, and elegant waterfront structures. In the lower section, continue the river scene with excursion boats and a red wooden sightseeing boat, then transition into more city landmarks including a large modern arch bridge and clustered high-rises in the distance. Use a fusion of ink wash, watercolor, and ultra-detailed travel-poster illustration, with expressive black splatter edges and dry-brush texture around the painted shape, creating the effect that the city has been painted by the brush in one sweeping gesture. Keep the composition vertically centered with generous negative space around it. At the lower right, place large black Chinese calligraphy reading "广州" with a small red seal stamp beside it; along the bottom center add smaller Chinese text reading "千年商都·活力广州". The overall mood is elegant, cultural, cinematic, and aspirational, combining heritage and futuristic urban beauty.
entries.description: This prompt generates a vertical white-background poster illustration of Guangzhou emerging inside a sweeping ink-brush stroke, ideal for tourism art, cultural branding, or city-poster design.

entries.title: Goshuin Style Character Illustration

entries.prompt: Use this character to draw a Goshuin-style illustration for a fictional temple. The overall composition should be simple, emphasizing a washi paper texture. The drawing should use an ink-wash touch like a brush, using only black and vermilion colors. As a Goshuin, include a temple name appropriate for the character, four main brushwork characters, and a date. The date should be placed naturally in vertical writing. The character should be small and integrated as part of the Goshuin. The pose should be a calm atmosphere, such as praying or standing quietly. The overall layout should be organized like a real Goshuin, while being unique and impressive.

entries.title: Double Exposure Character Poster Prompt
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A character promotional poster titled "INPUT NAME", designed in a unified vertical key visual composition (9:16). Each poster follows a hierarchy of large top and smaller bottom structure: the upper half features the most recognizable element of the character (head, facial contour, mask, or upper-body silhouette) as a dominant oversized visual, forming a highly identifiable silhouette. The middle to lower section contains the full character as a secondary subject, shown in a stable standing pose or with subtle movement, establishing the visual core of the composition. Inside the large silhouette and around the character, use a double-exposure and collage-style narrative composition. Multiple scenes, symbolic imagery, small character interactions, supporting elements, and environmental details are layered and blended into mist, ink wash, and negative space. The left and right sides include complementary secondary elements to create narrative tension and spatial variation. A continuous flowing visual line runs from top to bottom, connecting the main character, internal collage, and the large upper silhouette, enhancing cohesion and guiding the viewer's eye. The overall composition preserves large areas of negative space. Edges are treated with ink diffusion, soft blurring, and fragmented transitions, creating a balance between presence and absence inspired by Eastern aesthetics. The style is cohesive, refined, and restrained, emphasizing depth, storytelling, strong visual impact, and a consistent series-style poster language.
entries.description: A sophisticated prompt for creating vertical character posters featuring a large silhouette upper half and a full character lower half, using double-exposure and Eastern aesthetic elements like ink diffusion and negative space.

entries.title: Cinematic Sakura Ronin Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic vertical movie-poster composition for a samurai drama titled SAKURA RONIN. Place a lone female ronin in the center foreground, shown from about mid-thigh up in a three-quarter back view, her head turned slightly toward camera, with dark messy hair tied in a loose bun and a few stray strands. She wears a dark black-to-deep-burgundy floral kimono with subtle sakura patterns and a tied obi, realistic textured fabric, weathered and dramatic. In her right hand she grips a katana angled downward toward the lower left corner; a second sheathed sword hangs at her side. Her stance is calm, resolute, and battle-worn. Fill the scene with falling sakura petals, some sharp and some motion-blurred in the foreground and background. Set the background at dusk with a blazing fire behind a Japanese torii gate, smoke billowing into a stormy sky, wet reflective ground, tiny silhouetted figures near the gate, distant mountains, drifting embers, and a strong warm backlight from the left. entries.title: Futuristic Shenzhen City Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic vertical poster-style digital painting of Shenzhen, blending futuristic urban development with traditional culture at golden hour. At the top center, large expressive Chinese calligraphy reads 深圳 in textured gold brush strokes, with a small red seal stamp beside it. Directly below, a bold Chinese slogan reads 敢闯敢试,开放包容 in the same warm gold-white tone. The skyline is dominated by a tall, sleek central skyscraper resembling the Ping An Finance Centre, surrounded by dense modern high-rises under a vast painterly sky of deep stormy blue clouds opening into warm sunset light near the horizon. In the midground and right side, a modern port with exactly 4 red container cranes and stacked shipping containers emphasizes trade and industry. An elevated high-speed train curves from the bottom center toward the skyline, and the rail corridor glows with vivid neon-blue and white light trails that snake through the city in an elegant S-curve, suggesting speed, innovation, and connectivity. In the sky, exactly 11 quadcopter drones fly in loose formation, symbolizing technology and logistics. In the left foreground, include a historic Lingnan-style arcade building with ornate rooflines and warm interior lighting, contrasting old and new architecture. In the lower foreground, add dense greenery and blooming flowers, with especially vivid pink-red blossoms on the bottom right. Use a cinematic, aspirational, polished concept-art style with rich atmospheric perspective, ultra-detailed architecture, luminous highlights, subtle haze, and a blue-gold color palette. The composition should feel grand, optimistic, and visionary, like a tourism or city-branding propaganda poster celebrating innovation, openness, transportation, commerce, and heritage. Include a small white Chinese watermark at the bottom right reading 豆包AI生成.
entries.description: A cinematic city-branding poster of Shenzhen combining skyline, drones, port industry, high-speed rail, and traditional architecture for promotional or editorial use.

entries.title: Shenzhen Heritage Futuristic Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic vertical poster-style cityscape of Shenzhen at golden hour, blending traditional Chinese cultural heritage with a futuristic coastal megacity. Compose the scene as a tall, richly layered panoramic collage viewed from an elevated hillside lookout. On the right and center, show a dense modern skyline beside a calm bay, dominated by a sleek bullet-shaped supertall skyscraper, surrounded by glass towers, a long bridge crossing the water, distant mountains, and soft glowing clouds lit by sunrise or sunset. In the midground, include a large contemporary civic building with a flowing white roof and a red accent at its center. In the lower right, show an active container port with blue gantry cranes, ships, and curving roads traced by warm long-exposure light trails. In the lower foreground, place a white high-speed train traveling on an elevated viaduct that curves into the city. On the left, merge in a lush forested mountain slope with a traditional multi-story red pagoda, an old Chinese temple courtyard with gray tiled roofs and red lanterns, and a tall natural stone engraved with red Chinese characters. At the bottom right edge, include exactly 6 small people at the viewpoint, some standing and some sitting, looking out over the city. Use atmospheric mist drifting between the historical hillside and the modern urban core to unify the composition. Add bold black Chinese calligraphy at the upper left reading 深圳, with a small red seal stamp beneath it, and place a vertical column of Chinese slogan text nearby reading 敢为人先 开放包容 创新无限 与未来 共生长. On the engraved stone, add the red text 大鹏所城. Decorate the upper left and lower left borders with expressive gold ink splash and brush textures on a pale parchment-like background that fades into the photo-real city scene. Style it as ultra-detailed cinematic travel-poster concept art, photorealistic architecture, warm amber and teal color grading, crisp lighting, volumetric haze, intricate environmental detail, polished but slightly fantastical montage composition, high contrast, premium tourism campaign aesthetic.
entries.description: This prompt generates a cinematic vertical tourism poster that combines Shenzhen's historic landmarks, modern skyline, port, and high-speed rail into a dramatic cultural-futuristic city montage.

entries.title: Minimalist Literary Cover for Educated
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Design a literary Chinese book cover in a refined minimalist collage style on warm off-white textured paper with subtle grain and faint aging. The composition is tall and elegant, with one dominant central-right vertical Chinese title in large distressed black calligraphy-style characters reading "你当像鸟飞往你的山", arranged in 2 vertical columns, with the right column reading "你当像鸟" and the left column reading "飞往你的山". A delicate indigo-blue bird flies near the top center, and a thin winding blue dotted flight path snakes diagonally down across the title and toward the lower right, creating a sense of ascent and freedom. In the lower left, place a large triangular mountain form like a torn paper collage or painted wedge, its peak white and snowy, fading into deep ultramarine and navy textures below. Integrate a faint vertical strip of tiny English book text along the mountain's right edge, as if the mountain is partially constructed from printed pages. Inside the blue mountain, set the original English title in serif type: "Educated" on one line and "A Memoir" below it, in white. On the upper left, add a short vertical block of small Chinese quote text in black, arranged as 6 lines, with a long dash below, then the author name "Tara Westover" in muted blue serif on 2 lines, followed by another dash. Along the lower right edge, add slim vertical credits in small type: Chinese text for the author followed by the English name "Tara Westover" in blue, then translator and publisher lines beneath in black. Keep the layout spacious with strong negative space, asymmetrical balance, and a poetic contemporary publishing aesthetic. Use only 3 main colors: black, off-white, and indigo blue. The overall feeling should be intellectual, restrained, modern, and award-winning, suitable for a premium edition of Educated by Tara Westover.
entries.description: This prompt generates a sophisticated Chinese-market literary book cover with bold vertical typography, a blue mountain collage, and a bird motif, ideal for premium fiction and memoir cover design.

entries.title: Old Shanghai Fusion Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vertical cultural travel poster on warm off-white textured paper, designed like a handcrafted 3D shadow-box collage that forms the silhouette of the Chinese character for Shanghai. Use a refined old-meets-new Shanghai theme with miniature architecture, street scenes, props, food, and typography, photographed straight-on with soft studio lighting and delicate drop shadows. The composition should feel elegant, editorial, nostalgic, and premium, with muted cream, brass gold, teal green, brick red, jade, and weathered wood tones. At the upper left, build the top section of the character from 1 modern glass skyscraper, 1 tall historic high-rise with a golden crown, 1 domed neoclassical waterfront building, 1 clock-tower civic building, 2 smaller background towers, 2 red vintage Shanghai trams, and 1 rickshaw. Beneath that, create a canal-town section with 2 tall red Oriental Pearl Tower spheres-and-columns motifs, 2 qipao dresses displayed vertically, 4 old shikumen and lane houses, 1 curved waterfront canal, 4 wooden boats on the water, and 2 gramophones placed at the far left and right edges. Across the center, place a large diagonal metallic-gold embossed title reading SHANGHAI COLLECTION in bold retro 3D lettering. To the right of the upper composition, add hand-lettered vintage script text reading OLD SHANGHAI FUSION. On the lower left, add serif text reading DESIGN POSTER. The lower half should form the rest of the character using traditional Chinese architectural miniatures and market objects: 1 large classical Chinese roofed building complex, 4 vertical neon-style shop signs with Chinese characters, 2 square decorative plaques, 1 small green ceramic ewer, 2 shallow food trays, 1 rectangular tray of 6 soup dumplings, 1 long tray with 3 white tanghulu-like skewered sweets, 2 round mooncakes, and 1 small sauce dish, 1 rectangular display shelf containing 4 steamed buns, 1 bowl of noodles, 2 golden pastries, 1 plate of white flower-shaped sweets, 1 small doll figurine, and 2 painted opera masks, plus 2 hanging newspapers at the lower right. Keep the background spacious and minimal, with the collage and text arranged diagonally for a sophisticated poster layout. Make the whole image look like a meticulously assembled handmade paper-and-wood diorama, combining Art Deco Shanghai glamour, Republican-era nostalgia, Jiangnan water-town charm, and traditional Chinese market culture.
entries.description: A handcrafted 3D-style cultural poster celebrating Shanghai through miniature architecture, food, signage, and retro typography, ideal for travel, branding, or editorial design.

entries.title: Fauvist Persimmon Still Life
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A bold post-impressionist still life painting in thick impasto oil brushstrokes, viewed from slightly above. Center a round turquoise plate holding exactly 3 bright orange persimmons with green leafy tops, arranged in a triangular cluster. Place the plate on a vivid red tablecloth. In the upper left, add a dark green glass bottle casting a soft shadow onto a textured mustard-yellow wall. In the lower left, include a folded cloth napkin with wide cream and muted blue vertical stripes. On the right side of the table, place a kitchen knife with a shiny silver blade and a deep blue handle angled diagonally upward. Use saturated complementary colors, expressive painterly texture, visible palette-knife-like strokes, simplified forms, dark contour accents, and a warm, lively Fauvist color sensibility. The composition should feel handmade, energetic, and slightly naive, like a modern museum-style still life oil painting.

entries.title: Chinese Brushstroke Xi'an Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A refined Chinese cultural tourism poster on textured off-white rice paper with a large amount of negative space, featuring an elegant ink-and-watercolor brushstroke composition that curves upward diagonally from the lower left to the upper right like a sweeping river of paint. At the far left edge, show 1 traditional Chinese calligraphy brush entering the frame, its bristles appearing to paint the scene into existence. Inside the flowing brushstroke, depict a miniature historical landscape of Xi'an: 3 major architectural landmarks arranged along the curved path, including 1 ancient fortified city gate at the lower left with gray stone walls, arched entry, battlements, and a two-tier roofed gate tower; 1 grand traditional pavilion or palace hall in the middle with green-tiled roof, red wooden beams, raised stone platform, and stairways; and 1 tall multi-story brick pagoda at the upper right on a stepped base surrounded by sparse trees. Weave a narrow blue-green river or painted water channel through the scene, with dusty earth tones, scattered rocks, winding roads, tiny shrubs, and touches of muted autumn red foliage. The whole landmark vignette should feel like a handcrafted 3D miniature diorama blended with Chinese ink painting and relief sculpture, with delicate speckled paint dispersion around the edges of the brushstroke. In the lower left beneath the painted scene, place 1 large line of bold black Chinese brush-calligraphy reading "西安". Below it, place 2 smaller lines of neat Chinese text: "春风得意马蹄疾,一日看尽长安花" and "十三朝古都·丝路起点". Add 1 small red seal stamp near the text. Overall style: poetic, premium, museum-quality city publicity artwork, traditional Chinese aesthetic, subtle warm lighting, high detail, balanced composition, vertical poster layout.
entries.description: This prompt generates an elegant Chinese-style city promotion poster using a sweeping brushstroke landscape and iconic historical landmarks, ideal for tourism branding or cultural宣传 artwork.

entries.title: Chinese Ink-Wash Jinyun Travel Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A vertical Chinese ink-wash tourism poster on an off-white textured rice-paper background, with a large flowing red silk ribbon that rises in an S-curve from the lower right to the upper left and transforms into drifting mist, visually connecting 5 scenic vignettes. At the bottom right, place a lone ancient Chinese figure in long white Hanfu with a high topknot, seen from behind, one arm raised as if guiding or releasing the ribbon; the robe has subtle red sash accents that echo the ribbon. Build the composition upward through layered pale gray mountains, clouds, mist, and sparse birds, in an elegant shanshui painting style mixed with refined travel-poster design. Include 5 distinct labeled scenic areas embedded along the ribbon path: 1) a towering central mountain peak emerging from clouds with pine trees, labeled vertically in Chinese near the top; 2) a traditional waterside old town with white walls, gray tile roofs, calm reflective water, and a small stone arch bridge, labeled vertically; 3) a stone-built cliff village clustered on rugged slopes beside a waterfall and stream, labeled vertically; 4) a modern glass building perched dramatically on a rocky mountaintop, labeled vertically; 5) a wide flower field or pastoral plain with pink and white blossoms, a windmill, distant mountains, and winding paths, labeled vertically. Use soft ink tones, muted grays, warm beige rock, and restrained dusty red as the main accent color. Leave generous negative space. Add large vertical brush-calligraphy headline text on the lower left reading 黄帝缙云 人间仙都, with smaller supporting Chinese calligraphy seals and printed location text near the bottom left reading 浙江·缙云 / ZHEJIANG JINYUN. Include multiple red artist seals and elegant vertical scenic labels in traditional poster layout. The overall mood is poetic, airy, cultural, premium, and serene, like a high-end destination branding poster for Jinyun.
entries.description: This prompt generates a poetic vertical Chinese landscape tourism poster with five scenic vignettes linked by a flowing red ribbon, ideal for cultural destination branding and editorial travel art.

entries.title: Filmmaking Eras Typographic Grid
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a clean 2x2 grid of four front-facing 3D typographic sculptures on a light gray seamless studio background, separated by thin white dividers. Each quadrant features a single giant letter built entirely from dense, realistic filmmaking equipment and on-set props from a different cinematic era, with the letterform chaotic but clearly legible. Use high-end Cinema 4D product-render aesthetics, ambient occlusion, realistic scale relationships, intricate kit-bashing, subtle wear, metallic reflections, and three-point studio lighting with a soft overhead source. Top-left: the letter S, representing early silent-era or proto-cinema filmmaking, constructed from antique brass-and-wood cameras, exposed gears, film reels, projector parts, bellows, tripod wood legs, and vintage optical housings; warm bronze and copper tones; include 3 extra props at the base: a black megaphone labeled "DIRECTOR", a clapboard, and a short stack of film canisters; one projector-like lens at the upper right glows brightly. Top-right: the letter C, representing classical Hollywood film production, built from black metal film cameras, studio lenses, magazines, matte boxes, dolly components, control boxes, and analog set hardware; mostly black, steel, and gunmetal with subtle brass accents; include 4 extra props integrated around the base and inner right side: a clapperboard, a boxy side module, a film magazine marked "35", and a small cylindrical canister; a large forward-facing lamp or lens glows at the upper right. Bottom-left: the letter N, representing modern analog or late-20th-century cinema, assembled from Arriflex-style cameras, long cine zoom lenses, support rigs, rails, cables, a slate, and a field recorder; predominantly matte black with silver hardware and a few red accent rings; include 3 clearly visible base elements: a clapperboard section, a labeled director strip, and a rectangular audio recorder/control unit at the bottom. Bottom-right: the letter D, representing digital and virtual production, built from RED-style digital cinema cameras, monitors, battery packs, wireless transmitters, drones, LED panels, green-screen fabric inserts, and modular rig components; black technical bodies with vivid green accents and screen graphics; include 4 notable integrated device types: drone arms/propellers at the top, a rectangular LED light panel, multiple monitors, and a large camera lens at the lower left. Keep all objects grounded and physically connected, no floating pieces, no flat typography, no handwriting, no paper look, no messy background. Ultra-detailed, sharp, 8k, polished graphic design asset for a poster or visual comparison of filmmaking eras.
entries.description: A polished 2x2 studio render showing four letters sculpted from era-specific filmmaking equipment, ideal for editorial graphics or visual comparisons of cinema history.

entries.title: Epic French Dystopian Book Cover
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A cinematic French dystopian science-fantasy book cover in vertical poster format, dark and epic, with a cold desaturated palette of charcoal blue, steel gray, ash white, and muted silver. In the foreground, show 1 solitary young traveler seen from behind, standing on a snow-dusted rocky cliff at lower left, small against the environment, wearing a weathered winter jacket, rugged pants, boots, and a large worn backpack, with messy light brown hair visible, posture still and contemplative as he looks out over a vast ruined city. In the middle distance, depict 1 immense circular or sprawling fortified city in a frozen valley, dense with countless dark gothic-industrial buildings and spires, surrounded by icy water channels and connected by several narrow bridges. Rising from the exact center of the city, place 1 colossal needle-like black tower that dominates the skyline, dramatically taller than everything else. Surround the city with jagged snow-covered mountain ranges on both sides and in the far distance. Above, create a stormy sky filled with heavy textured clouds, faint snowfall or drifting ice particles, and a pale backlit glow breaking through behind the central tower, giving a mythic apocalyptic atmosphere. Composition should emphasize scale, isolation, and awe, with the traveler occupying only a small portion of the image and the city and tower centered. Add distressed serif typography integrated as a cover design: at the very top in small uppercase French text, "DANS L'UNIVERS DE APRÈS L'EFFONDREMENT"; below it, a huge title in cracked weathered off-white serif capitals, "ELON", spanning nearly the full width; beneath the title place 1 small compass-star ornament centered with thin horizontal lines. At the bottom center, add the author name in refined serif capitals, "MARTINOLLI". Make the overall image look like premium dark fantasy / post-apocalyptic cover art, ultra-detailed, atmospheric perspective, realistic textures, dramatic lighting, moody, monumental, polished publishing design.
