entries.title: Antique Celestial Goddess Mural
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A richly detailed vertical mural in the style of an aged East Asian religious wall painting on weathered silk or plaster, with visible cracks, abrasions, faded pigment, and distressed gold leaf. At the center, a celestial bodhisattva-like goddess floats gracefully above a large pink lotus pedestal, framed by a huge circular golden halo filling the upper middle of the composition. She wears an elaborate jeweled headdress, layered necklaces, armlets, and flowing robes in muted cinnabar red, cream, teal, and soft green, with long ribbon-like scarves swirling around her body in elegant arcs. Her right arm is raised, delicately holding a pink lotus flower, while her left hand extends outward in a gentle offering gesture. Surrounding her are exactly 3 smaller attendant maidens: one at lower left standing on clouds and playing a pipa, one at lower center kneeling or floating while presenting a tray of lotus blossoms, and one at lower right standing lightly on clouds with both hands raised in reverence. The background is a deep lapis-blue celestial sky filled with stylized cream and jade clouds, faint flying birds, lotus blooms, and 2 ornate temple pavilions in the upper left and upper right corners. Add hanging ornamental motifs near the mid-left and mid-right edges, and enclose the whole image in a decorative floral border. The overall mood is sacred, elegant, and antique, with intricate linework, delicate textile patterns, muted earthy tones, and a dominant blue-and-gold palette, resembling a treasured museum fresco or devotional hanging scroll.

entries.title: Japanese Legal Presentation Cover Slide
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a clean, modern Japanese presentation cover slide in a minimalist editorial style, landscape 16:9. Use a very light gray background with bold black typography and vivid yellow accent bars. The layout is asymmetrical and high contrast, with lots of negative space. Place a small black square near the upper left containing the white text "01" in italic bold sans serif. Across the center, set a large Japanese title in heavy black type on 2 lines: "司法書士等による" on the first line and "特別委任方式" on the second line, with the second line much larger and sitting on a rough hand-painted yellow highlight stroke. Below it, add a smaller Japanese subtitle in black: "登記原因証明情報の新しい取扱い". Under the subtitle, place a thin horizontal black line centered. Along the far right edge, add a tall vertical yellow sidebar with black vertical text reading "01 表紙". Near the top right, place 1 small black square as a decorative element. In the lower right quadrant, place a decorative 5 by 5 dotted grid made of 25 small black dots. On the far left edge, crop in oversized black Japanese characters so they are only partially visible, creating a strong graphic border effect. At the bottom left, place a single line of small black Japanese text: "令和7年12月9日 法務省民二第1578号 依命通知". At the bottom right, place 2 lines of small black Japanese text, right aligned: first line "司法書士事務所アンドロー・デザインワークショップ", second line "司法書士 浅野勇貴". Add a thin diagonal black line entering from the top left corner as another graphic accent. Overall feel: premium business presentation, legal seminar title slide, Swiss-inspired grid composition, bold Japanese typography, sharp and print-like.

entries.title: Classical Chinese Poem Scroll Landscape
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A classical Chinese ink-wash painting on warm aged rice paper, combining landscape art and calligraphy in a clean two-part composition. On the left half, leave broad negative space filled with bold black brush-calligraphy showing the poem title 早发白帝城, the poet name 李白, and four large vertical lines of poem text in expressive handwritten script: 朝辞白帝彩云间,千里江陵一日还。两岸猿声啼不住,轻舟已过万重山。. On the right half, paint a serene river gorge at sunrise in the style of a traditional shan shui scroll: a soft orange sun low above misty layered mountains, tall steep cliffs on both sides, faint haze in the distance, and calm reflective water glowing with pale gold light. In the foreground at lower right, place a small wooden river boat with a simple covered cabin and a vertical mast. A solitary ancient Chinese scholar in flowing white hanfu stands on the deck facing the landscape from behind, hair tied in a traditional topknot, long robe and sash slightly trailing in the breeze, creating a contemplative mood. Add a tiny temple pavilion perched high on the top of the right cliff. Use delicate ink outlines, subtle sepia and gray washes, textured paper grain, elegant empty space, and refined literati-painting aesthetics. The overall image should feel poetic, quiet, balanced, and museum-quality, with especially beautiful legible calligraphy integrated into the artwork.
entries.description: A traditional Chinese ink-style artwork featuring a famous poem in calligraphy beside a sunrise river gorge scene, ideal for literary posters, cultural prints, or editorial art.

entries.title: Chinese Calligraphy Poem Scroll
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A traditional Chinese calligraphy painting on aged tan xuan paper, landscape orientation, styled like an antique literati hanging scroll reproduction. The main composition is a large block of bold black semi-cursive to cursive brush calligraphy arranged in 10 vertical columns, read right to left, featuring the poem title at the top of the rightmost main column as 雨霖铃. The calligraphy should feel elegant, fluid, and expressive, with varied ink density, dry-brush texture, thick and thin stroke transitions, and natural hand-written spacing rather than perfect typesetting. Use the visible poem text as written in the image, including its inaccuracies, with the right-side main columns beginning: "寒蝉凄切,对长亭晚,骤雨初歇。都门帐饮无绪,留恋处,兰舟催发,执手相看泪眼,竟无语凝噎。念去去,千里烟波,暮霭沉沉楚天阔。多情自古,雷情自古伤离别,更那堪冷冷宵,酒醒倦兼芊?杨柳岸,晓风残月。此去经年良宰,经年,应是良辰好景。便纵有千种风情,更与何人说?" Place a narrower signature column on the far left with 1 vertical inscription reading 柳永《雨霖铃·寒蝉凄切》. Add 4 red seals total: 1 oval collector-style seal near the upper right margin and 3 square seals stacked vertically near the lower left inscription area. Include a faint monochrome ink-wash landscape in the lower right corner with 1 drooping willow tree and 1 small pavilion by the water, partially faded into the paper. The paper should have warm brown aging, subtle stains, mottling, foxing, worn edges, and a museum-photograph feel. Overall mood is refined, poetic, historical, and scholarly, like a Song-dynasty-inspired calligraphy artwork photographed flat in soft even light.

entries.title: Four Seasons Continuous Panorama
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Hyper-realistic digital illustration of the historic Shanghai Bund waterfront looking across the Huangpu River to the futuristic Lujiazui district, presented as a single continuous composition showcasing the cycle of seasons. The scene flows seamlessly from left to right in a natural progression: Winter, Spring, Summer, and Autumn. The left side features cold snowy winter elements, gradually thawing into the fresh green buds and blooms of spring, then morphing into the lush vibrant vegetation and bright sunlight of summer, and finally transitioning into the golden, orange, and red hues of autumn on the far right. There are no visible dividing lines between seasons; the weather, lighting, and vegetation blend smoothly to create a unified and harmonious panorama. Rich in detail, symbolic of the passage of time, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, highly detailed textures. --ar 4:3

entries.title: Minimalist Cinematic Vertical Poster with Character Reference
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt:
Using the attached character, generate the following:

# Instructions
Create a minimalist theater-style vertical poster for [user input] using monochrome + one accent color.

# Layout Requirements
- Place the title largely in the bottom 1/4 area, with the Japanese title at maximum size and the English subtitle small directly underneath.
- Place a catchphrase (1-2 lines) in the top center.
- Stack 3-4 awards/official certification badges vertically in the top-left corner.
- Place a vertical catchphrase (2-3 lines) along the right edge.
- Position the main character as a silhouette from behind, slightly left of the center.
- Represent fantastical elements (floating islands, giant creatures) in the background as silhouettes.
- Place staff credits, release date, and distribution info in a small horizontal line at the bottom.
- Highlight the release date in a large font at the bottom right.

# Design Requirements
- Keep the background monochrome (black to gray gradient).
- Use only one accent color (e.g., vivid cobalt blue or gold).
- Combine silhouette and thin line art styles.
- Emphasize the title text with white + the accent color.
- Create a cinematic and artistic atmosphere overall.
- Avoid colorful backgrounds, excessive decoration, or heavy use of gradients.
- Format: Vertical, aspect ratio 2:3, high resolution.
entries.description: A sophisticated prompt for creating minimalist, monochrome posters with single accent colors while maintaining character consistency from a reference image.

entries.title: Tiny Planet Aerial of Canakkale
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A dramatic ultra-wide aerial tiny-planet photograph of Canakkale, Turkey, rendered as a full 360-degree stereographic projection so the city and waterfront form a compact spherical world surrounded by a swirling ring of blue sky and white clouds. The viewpoint is high above the shoreline in bright daytime with crisp summer light, realistic colors, and strong photographic detail. Place the large hillside sign reading Canakkale prominently across the center of the miniature planet. On the left-upper side of the sphere, show a tall pale stone clock tower with a small red Turkish flag at the top, surrounded by dense urban blocks with red-tiled roofs and mid-rise buildings. On the right side, include a vivid blue harbor with 2 white passenger ferries docked along the waterfront and a long curving coastline extending into the distance. In the lower-right quadrant, feature the monumental dark wooden Trojan horse statue on a circular plaza. In the lower-left quadrant, include the large rectangular concrete memorial structure set within green parkland. entries.title: Spanish Sports Newspaper Front Page
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A realistic Spanish sports newspaper front page in the style of a major daily broadsheet, clean white background with strong red and black typography, editorial print layout, high-resolution scanned-paper look. At the very top, an oversized red masthead reading MARCA spans nearly the full width, with a small black price in the upper-right corner reading 2,50€. Beneath the masthead, a thin line of small black publication details includes a Tuesday date, website, year, and issue number. The dominant main headline on the left takes up most of the page in gigantic bold condensed black uppercase letters over two lines: ARBELOA, DESTITUIDO. Below it, a red subheadline in bold sentence case says that Real Madrid dismisses the coach after 100 days on the bench and seeks a replacement until the end of the season. A smaller black explanatory line underneath mentions the decision following Champions League elimination and loss of the LaLiga lead. The main photo occupies the lower-left majority of the cover: a suited football coach standing in a stadium with blue seats, one hand touching his forehead in a stressed or disappointed gesture, wearing a dark navy suit, white shirt, and dark tie, with the Bernabéu environment visible and a pitch-side barrier reading Real Madrid C. F. Along the bottom of the main image, a small caption line notes that the coach leaves the Bernabéu after learning the decision. At the very bottom left and center are 2 narrow columns of small black article text in Spanish newspaper style. To the right side, a vertical sidebar contains 2 stacked secondary stories separated by red divider lines. The top sidebar story has a red section label reading NBA PLAYOFFS, a bold black headline saying the Lakers force game seven, a rectangular action photo of 2 basketball players with a Lakers player in a purple number 77 jersey going up with the ball against a Nuggets defender, and a short caption below mentioning Doncic scoring 42 points in Denver. The lower sidebar story has a red section label reading TENIS · MUTUA MADRID OPEN, a bold black headline about Alcaraz dominating at the Caja Mágica, and a rectangular tennis photo of a player in light purple kit hitting a forehand against a bright blue backdrop. Near the bottom center-right, include a pull-quote box marked by large red quotation marks and bold black text reading Agradezco al club la oportunidad de mi vida. Overall composition should feel like an authentic dramatic sports front page: sharp print typography, rigid newspaper grid, realistic photojournalism, heavy black headline blocks, red accents, and a contemporary Spanish press design.

entries.title: Minecraft Ender Dragon Fantasy Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: Create a dramatic vertical dark-fantasy poster in a Minecraft-inspired voxel style, like an epic movie or game cover. At the very top, place a large ornate metallic-gold blackletter title reading [Heliocore.C6], with a smaller elegant serif subtitle beneath it reading The Final Convergence. The main scene shows 1 massive Ender Dragon made of black cubic blocks, flying forward and downward out of the sky with its wings spread wide, mouth open, glowing purple eyes, and violet energy in its throat, while chunks of voxel debris break apart around its body. Behind the dragon, place 3 large concentric glowing magic circles with arcane runes and geometric symbols in pale gold light, centered in the sky like a summoning seal. In the foreground, show 1 blocky hero seen from behind, resembling Steve, standing on a ruined stone staircase-throne and raising 1 glowing purple enchanted sword toward the dragon. Surround the platform with 4 visible Endermen total, tall and slender with black blocky bodies and glowing purple eyes, acting as ominous witnesses. The environment is an enormous ruined End-city style abyss with towering broken pillars, floating block fragments, crystal clusters, and distant structures fading into purple fog. Use a palette of black, charcoal, deep violet, magenta glow, and antique gold highlights, with cinematic volumetric lighting, heavy atmosphere, sparks, dust, magical particles, extreme scale, high contrast, and a polished ultra-detailed poster composition.

entries.title: Classical Beauty in Modern Urban Sunset
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A graceful lady with hair like a waterfall of smooth black silk stands contemplatively, her eyes reflecting a classical, reserved charm. Her wide-sleeved robes made of moon-white brocade and intricate floral embroidery hang elegantly, while traditional silk ribbons and warm jade pendants sway gently with her steps. The golden sunset glow pours across the sky, casting a soft amber halo around her figure. Modern buildings with cold glass reflections and geometric structures fade into the depth of field, using a traditional ink-wash "negative space" technique to create an airy composition of dialogue between the past and present. A long-lasting oriental poetic atmosphere, blending reality and illusion, quietly melds into the city streets, capturing a serene scroll of time out of place amidst the interplay of warm and cold tones.

A tiny figure in red Hanfu at the bottom right holds a flowing red silk ribbon that sweeps upward, transforming into a surreal, detailed landscape of Guangzhou. entries.title: Guangzhou City Promotional Poster
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A 2026 city promotional poster filled with a festive New Year atmosphere without losing its elegant style. Double exposure, the composition continues the flowing S-shaped sense; in the lower right corner of a pure white textured background, a miniature figure in traditional Chinese costume is waving a long red silk dance ribbon. This red silk dances in the air, not only showing the smooth texture of silk, but also fantastically transforming into a magnificent mountain and river as it floats toward the upper left. In this 'river', a hand-drawn map of Guangzhou with mountains, seas, and rivers is superimposed, featuring national tide style, the scenery is all in sight, magnificent and shocking. Landmarks of Guangzhou (Canton Tower, Zhujiang New Town buildings, Pearl River, ancient buildings in Guangzhou city, cruise ships, Baiyun Mountain). Surrounded by clouds and mist, with a fairy-like atmosphere, rich colors, complex structure, and abundant details, but because of the large area of white space, the picture still looks fresh and refined. The lower left corner is typeset with 'SPRING 2026' and a vertical slogan, the overall meaning being 'Thousand-year commercial capital, charming Guangzhou'. The typography is beautiful, generous, and the handwriting is clear and complete, size 9:16.

entries.title: Traditional Chinese Calligraphy and Ink Painting
entries.author: YouMind
entries.prompt: A photograph of a piece of aged, slightly textured paper featuring traditional Chinese calligraphy and an ink wash painting. The upper and left portions of the paper are filled with handwritten Chinese text in elegant running script, with the centered title "赤壁赋" and the author "苏轼" written next to it. The text flows across multiple lines, resembling a classical poem. Integrated into the bottom right section of the paper is a traditional Chinese ink wash painting depicting a serene nighttime river scene with craggy, misty mountains. A single pale full moon hangs in the sky, casting a shimmering reflection on the rippling water below. In the foreground, there is a small wooden boat with a woven canopy carrying 2 figures in traditional robes. A single square red seal stamp is stamped in the extreme bottom right corner. The image has a warm, historical aesthetic, capturing the authentic look of ink on traditional rice paper.
